class CL_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SRV definition
  public
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_ITERATOR .

public section.

  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !SRV type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 .
  methods IS_EVENT_ACTIVE
    importing
      !EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
      !EVENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !IR_EVENT_HANDLER_CALLED type ref to ABAP_BOOL optional
      !IO_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    returning
      value(RV_ACTIVE) type ABAP_BOOL .
protected section.

  data SRV type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 .
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SRV
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.

  type-pools ABAP .
  methods IS_DND_ACTIVE
    importing
      !IO_TREE_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    exporting
      !EV_DRAG_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL
      !EV_DROP_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SRV IMPLEMENTATION.


method constructor.
  me->srv = srv.
endmethod.


method is_dnd_active.

  ev_drag_active = abap_false.
  ev_drop_active = abap_false.

  if me->srv is bound.
    me->srv->is_dnd_active(
      exporting
        io_tree_node    = io_tree_node
      importing
        ev_drag_active  = ev_drag_active
        ev_drop_active  = ev_drop_active ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_event_active.

  rv_active = srv->is_event_active( event_type   = event_type
                                    event_id     = event_id
                                    event_entity = event_entity
                                    ir_event_handler_called = ir_event_handler_called
                                    io_node_entity = io_node_entity ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.


class CL_CRM_IU_DYN_CFG_CUSTOM_TEXTS definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_CRM_IU_DYN_CFG_DESC_ABSTR
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK .

public section.
  type-pools ABAP .

  types:
    begin of  TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR,
           name type char70,
           value type string,
         end of  TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR .
  types:
    TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR_TAB type standard table of ty_name_value_pair with non-unique default key .

  methods GET_CUSTOM_TEXTS
    returning
      value(RT_CUSTOM_TEXTS) type TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR_TAB .
  methods SET_CUSTOM_TEXTS
    importing
      !IT_CUSTOM_TEXTS type TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR_TAB .
  methods SET_PRIMARY_LABEL
    importing
      !IV_PRIMARY_LABEL_NAME type STRING default 'STRUCT.TR_OBJ_ID'
      !IV_PRIMARY_LABEL type CRMT_TC_TEXT .

  methods IF_BSP_DLC_CONFIGURATION~GET_CUSTOM_TEXT
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR~GET_FIELD_LABEL
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_DYN_CFG_CUSTOM_TEXTS
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.

  data PRIMARY_LABEL_NAME type STRING .
  data PRIMARY_LABEL type STRING .
  data CUSTOM_TEXTS type TY_NAME_VALUE_PAIR_TAB .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_DYN_CFG_CUSTOM_TEXTS IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD get_custom_texts.

  rt_custom_texts = me->custom_texts.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_custom_text.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <custom_text> TYPE ty_name_value_pair.


  READ TABLE me->custom_texts ASSIGNING <custom_text> WITH KEY name = iv_element_id.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    rv_text = <custom_text>-value.
  ELSE.
    rv_text = super->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_custom_text(
                iv_element_id = iv_element_id
                iv_source     = iv_source ).
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor~get_field_label.

  IF  iv_element_id CS primary_label_name
  AND NOT me->primary_label IS INITIAL.
    rv_result = me->primary_label.
  ELSE.
    CALL METHOD super->if_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor~get_field_label
      EXPORTING
        iv_element_id           = iv_element_id
        iv_context_node         = iv_context_node
        iv_skip_text_repository = abap_false
      RECEIVING
        rv_result               = rv_result.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD set_custom_texts.

  me->custom_texts = it_custom_texts.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD set_primary_label.

  primary_label_name = iv_primary_label_name.
  primary_label      = iv_primary_label.

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_DYN_CFG_DESC_ABSTR IMPLEMENTATION.


method ADD_NEW_TABLE_VIEW_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


METHOD adjust_config_data.

  if not ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA_SPEC( changing CV_CONFIG_DATA = CV_CONFIG_DATA ).

    DATA:
      lv_appl_viewname               TYPE string,
      lv_changed                     TYPE abap_bool,
      lv_config_data                 TYPE string,
      lv_group_id                    TYPE crm_isu_product_det_group,
      lv_index                       TYPE sytabix,
      lv_invalid                     TYPE abap_bool,
      lv_string1                     TYPE string,             "#EC NEEDED
      lv_string2                     TYPE string,
      ls_config_data                 TYPE bsp_dlcs_conf_data,
      ls_ovw_config                  TYPE bsp_dlc_ovw_assgnm_xml,
      ls_pdo_group                   TYPE crmc_isu_group,
      ls_view                        TYPE bsp_dlc_ovw_assgnm,
      ls_view_copy                   TYPE bsp_dlc_ovw_assgnm,
      lt_dynamic_table_configuration TYPE bsp_dlc_table_descr,
      lt_pdo_groups                  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF crmc_isu_group.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <fs_tiled_layout_sequence>     TYPE gty_tiled_layout_sequence,
      <fs_view>                      TYPE bsp_dlc_ovw_assgnm.


    TRY.
        IF me->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_current_config_data_origin( ) NE 'P'. "#EC NOTEXT
          lt_dynamic_table_configuration = cl_bsp_dlc_table_utility=>conf_xml_to_abap( iv_xml = cv_config_data ).
          change_column_definitions(
            CHANGING
              p_column_definitions = lt_dynamic_table_configuration-columndefinition ).
          cv_config_data = cl_bsp_dlc_table_utility=>conf_abap_to_xml( is_table_config = lt_dynamic_table_configuration ).
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_root.                                          "#EC *
*       It's not a table configuration -> nothing to do
    ENDTRY.

    TRY.
        IF NOT mt_tiled_layout_sequence IS INITIAL.
          cl_bsp_dlc_config_ovw=>conv_xml_to_data(
            EXPORTING
              iv_xml = cv_config_data
            IMPORTING
              rt_data = ls_ovw_config ).

          IF NOT ls_ovw_config IS INITIAL.
            LOOP AT  mt_tiled_layout_sequence ASSIGNING <fs_tiled_layout_sequence>. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
              READ TABLE ls_ovw_config-views ASSIGNING <fs_view>
                WITH KEY tile_id = <fs_tiled_layout_sequence>-tile_id.

              IF sy-subrc = 0.
                <fs_view>-sequence = <fs_tiled_layout_sequence>-sequence.
                lv_changed = abap_true.
              ENDIF.
            ENDLOOP.

            IF lv_changed = abap_true.
              cv_config_data = cl_bsp_dlc_config_ovw=>conv_data_to_xml( it_data = ls_ovw_config ).
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_root.                                          "#EC *
    ENDTRY.

    TRY.
        cl_bsp_dlc_config_ovw=>conv_xml_to_data(
          EXPORTING
            iv_xml = cv_config_data
          IMPORTING
            rt_data = ls_ovw_config ).

        IF NOT ls_ovw_config IS INITIAL.
          LOOP AT ls_ovw_config-views INTO ls_view.
            IF  ls_view-appl_viewname CS cl_crm_isu_pfc_tools=>gc_prefix_comp_usage
            AND ls_view-appl_viewname CS 'MainWindow'.        "#EC NOTEXT
              SPLIT ls_view-appl_viewname AT cl_crm_isu_pfc_tools=>gc_prefix_comp_usage INTO lv_string1 lv_string2.
              SPLIT lv_string2 AT '.MainWindow' INTO lv_group_id lv_string1. "#EC NOTEXT

              ls_pdo_group-client  = sy-mandt.
              ls_pdo_group-group_id = lv_group_id.
              APPEND ls_pdo_group TO lt_pdo_groups.
            ENDIF.
          ENDLOOP.

          SORT lt_pdo_groups BY group_id.

          LOOP AT lt_pdo_groups INTO ls_pdo_group.
            READ TABLE m_pdo_groups
              TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS
              WITH KEY group_id = ls_pdo_group-group_id binary search.    "#EC *

            IF sy-subrc <> 0.
              lv_invalid = abap_true.
              exit.
            ENDIF.
          ENDLOOP.

          IF  sy-subrc <> 0.
            loop at m_pdo_groups transporting no fields where group_id is not initial.
              lv_invalid = abap_true.
              exit.
            endloop.
          ENDIF.

          IF lv_invalid = abap_true.
*           load config XML
            TRY.
                me->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_config_key(
                  importing
                    ev_component       = data(lv_component)
                    ev_viewname        = data(lv_viewname)
                    ev_role_key        = data(lv_role_key)
                    ev_component_usage = data(lv_component_usage)
                    ev_object_type     = data(lv_object_type)
                    ev_object_sub_type = data(lv_object_sub_type) ).
                CALL METHOD cl_bsp_dlc_xml_storage2=>get_config_data
                  EXPORTING
                    iv_component       = lv_component
                    iv_viewname        = lv_viewname
                    iv_role_key        = lv_role_key
                    iv_component_usage = lv_component_usage
                    iv_object_type     = lv_object_type
                    iv_object_sub_type = lv_object_sub_type
                  IMPORTING
                    es_config_data     = ls_config_data.      "#EC NOTEXT
              CATCH cx_root.                               "#EC CATCH_ALL
                RETURN.
            ENDTRY.

            lv_config_data = ls_config_data-config.

            cl_bsp_dlc_config_ovw=>conv_xml_to_data(
              EXPORTING
                iv_xml  = lv_config_data
              IMPORTING
                rt_data = ls_ovw_config ).

            IF NOT ls_ovw_config IS INITIAL.
              IF lines( m_pdo_groups ) > 0.
                READ TABLE ls_ovw_config-views
                  INTO ls_view
                  WITH KEY appl_viewname = 'PRD.MainWindow'.  "#EC NOTEXT

                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  lv_index = sy-tabix.

                  LOOP AT m_pdo_groups INTO ls_pdo_group where group_id is not initial.
                    CLEAR:
                      lv_appl_viewname,
                      ls_view_copy.

                    ls_view_copy = ls_view.
                    lv_index = lv_index + 1.
                    CONCATENATE cl_crm_isu_pfc_tools=>gc_prefix_comp_usage ls_pdo_group-group_id INTO lv_appl_viewname. "#EC NOTEXT
                    REPLACE 'PRD' IN ls_view_copy-appl_viewname WITH lv_appl_viewname. "#EC NOTEXT
                    REPLACE 'PRD' IN ls_view_copy-title_ref WITH lv_appl_viewname. "#EC NOTEXT
                    INSERT ls_view_copy INTO ls_ovw_config-views INDEX lv_index.
                  ENDLOOP.

                  read table m_pdo_groups transporting no fields with key group_id = space binary search.
                  if sy-subrc <> 0.
                    READ TABLE ls_ovw_config-views
                      INTO ls_view
                      WITH KEY appl_viewname = 'PRD.MainWindow'. "#EC NOTEXT

                    IF sy-subrc = 0.
                      DELETE ls_ovw_config-views INDEX sy-tabix.
                    ENDIF.
                  endif.

                  LOOP AT ls_ovw_config-views ASSIGNING <fs_view>.
                    <fs_view>-sequence = sy-tabix.
                  ENDLOOP.

                  lv_changed = abap_true.
                ENDIF.
              ELSE.
                lv_changed = abap_true.
              ENDIF.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.

        IF lv_changed = abap_true.
          cv_config_data = cl_bsp_dlc_config_ovw=>conv_data_to_xml( it_data = ls_ovw_config ).
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_root.                                          "#EC *
    ENDTRY.

  endif.

ENDMETHOD.


method ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method CHANGE_COLUMN_DEFINITIONS ##NEEDED.
  if not CHANGE_COLUMN_DEFINITIONS_SPEC( changing P_COLUMN_DEFINITIONS = P_COLUMN_DEFINITIONS ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method CHANGE_COLUMN_DEFINITIONS_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method check_appl_descriptor.

  if m_appl_descriptor is not bound.
    try.
        m_appl_descriptor ?= m_configuration_descriptor.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error. "#EC NO_HANDLER
    endtry.
  endif.
endmethod.


method check_view_descriptor.

  if not m_view_descriptor is bound.
    m_view_descriptor = m_configuration_descriptor->get_property_descriptor( iv_component_name ).
    assert m_view_descriptor is bound.
  endif.

endmethod.


method constructor.

  if ir_config_desc is bound.
    try.
        data lo_config_desc type ref to cl_bsp_dlc_configuration2.
        lo_config_desc ?= ir_config_desc.
        data lv_view_descriptor_type type seoclsname.
        data lv_viewname type string.
        data lv_role_key type bsp_dlc_role_key.
        data lv_enhancement_set type bsp_wd_enhancement_set.
        lv_view_descriptor_type = lo_config_desc->view_descriptor_type.
        lv_viewname             = lo_config_desc->component && '/' && lo_config_desc->viewname.
        lv_role_key             = lo_config_desc->role_key.
        lv_enhancement_set      = lo_config_desc->enhancement_set.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    endtry.
  endif.

  super->constructor(
    iv_view_descriptor_type = lv_view_descriptor_type
    iv_viewname             = lv_viewname
    iv_role_key             = lv_role_key
    iv_enhancement_set      = lv_enhancement_set ).

  assert ir_config_desc is bound.
  me->m_configuration_descriptor = get_underlying_descriptor( ir_config_desc ).

  if me->m_configuration_descriptor is bound.
    set handler me->on_underlying_config_changed for me->m_configuration_descriptor activation abap_true.
  endif.

  me->sync_conf_keys( ).

endmethod.


method DELETE_TABLE_LAYOUT_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method GET_ACTIVE_LAYOUT_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method GET_TABLE_LAYOUTS_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method GET_TABLE_LAYOUT_FOR_USER_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


METHOD get_underlying_descriptor.

  DATA:
    lr_current TYPE REF TO if_bsp_dlc_configuration,
    lr_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_dyn_cfg_desc_abstr.


  IF ir_input IS BOUND.
    lr_current = ir_input.
    TRY.
        DO.                                                 "#EC DO_OK
          lr_wrapper ?= lr_current.
          lr_current = lr_wrapper->m_configuration_descriptor.
        ENDDO.
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error ##no_handler.
    ENDTRY.

    rr_output = lr_current.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method if_bsp_dlc_configuration~delete_config_data.

  m_configuration_descriptor->delete_config_data(
    exporting
      iv_all_subkeys = iv_all_subkeys
      iv_personalization_for_user = iv_personalization_for_user
    exceptions
      error_occurred = 1 ).

  case sy-subrc.
    when 1.
      raise error_occurred.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_dlc_configuration~delete_custom_text.

  m_configuration_descriptor->delete_custom_text(
    exporting
      iv_element_id  = iv_element_id
      iv_langu       = iv_langu
      iv_all_subkeys = iv_all_subkeys
    exceptions
      error_occurred = 1 ).

  if sy-subrc eq 1.
    raise error_occurred.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_BSP_DLC_CONFIGURATION~GET_CONFIG_DATA.

  M_CONFIGURATION_DESCRIPTOR->GET_CONFIG_DATA(
    exporting
      IV_4_EDIT                = IV_4_EDIT
      IV_WITHOUT_PERS          = IV_WITHOUT_PERS
      IV_PERS_ONLY             = IV_PERS_ONLY
      IV_FOR_DISPLAY_MODE      = IV_FOR_DISPLAY_MODE
      IV_FOR_TABLE_LAYOUT_PERS = IV_FOR_TABLE_LAYOUT_PERS
    receiving
      RV_RESULT                = RV_RESULT
    exceptions
      FOREIGN_LOCK             = 1
      CONFIG_NOT_FOUND         = 2
      others                   = 3 ).

  case SY-SUBRC.
    when 1.
      raise FOREIGN_LOCK.
    when 2.
      raise CONFIG_NOT_FOUND.
  endcase.

  INT_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA( changing CV_CONFIG_DATA = RV_RESULT ).

  SYNC_CONF_KEYS( ).

endmethod.


method IF_BSP_DLC_CONFIGURATION~GET_CONFIG_DATA_EXPLICIT.

  M_CONFIGURATION_DESCRIPTOR->GET_CONFIG_DATA_EXPLICIT(
    exporting
      IV_4_EDIT            = IV_4_EDIT
      IV_SKIP_ACCESS_SEQ   = IV_SKIP_ACCESS_SEQ
      IV_SOURCE            = IV_SOURCE
      IV_RET_PERS_IF_EXIST = IV_RET_PERS_IF_EXIST
    receiving
      RV_RESULT        = RV_RESULT
    exceptions
      FOREIGN_LOCK     = 1
      CONFIG_NOT_FOUND = 2
      PARAMETER_ERROR  = 3
      others           = 4 ).
  case SY-SUBRC.
    when 1.
      raise FOREIGN_LOCK.
    when 2.
      raise CONFIG_NOT_FOUND.
    when 3.
      raise PARAMETER_ERROR.
  endcase.

  INT_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA( changing CV_CONFIG_DATA = RV_RESULT ).

  SYNC_CONF_KEYS( ).

endmethod.

method if_bsp_dlc_configuration~set_config_key.

  if me->mv_no_delegation = abap_true.
    super->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~set_config_key(
      iv_role_key        = iv_role_key
      iv_component_usage = iv_component_usage
      iv_object_type     = iv_object_type
      iv_object_sub_type = iv_object_sub_type ).
  else.
    me->m_configuration_descriptor->set_config_key(
      iv_role_key        = iv_role_key
      iv_component_usage = iv_component_usage
      iv_object_type     = iv_object_type
      iv_object_sub_type = iv_object_sub_type ).
    me->role_key        = iv_role_key.
    me->component_usage = iv_component_usage.
    me->object_type     = iv_object_type.
    me->object_sub_type = iv_object_sub_type.
  endif.

endmethod.

method INT_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA.
  if not INT_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA_SPEC( changing CV_CONFIG_DATA = CV_CONFIG_DATA ).
    ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA( changing CV_CONFIG_DATA = CV_CONFIG_DATA ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method INT_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method on_underlying_config_changed.

  raise event if_bsp_dlc_configuration~config_changed
    exporting
      parameters = parameters.

endmethod.


method SET_ACTIVE_TABLE_LAYOUT_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


METHOD set_component.

  component = iv_component.

ENDMETHOD.


method set_pdo_groups.

  data(lt_pdo_groups) = it_pdo_groups.
  sort lt_pdo_groups by group_id.
  delete adjacent duplicates from lt_pdo_groups.

  if lt_pdo_groups <> m_pdo_groups.
    m_pdo_groups = lt_pdo_groups.
    sort m_pdo_groups by group_id.
    delete adjacent duplicates from m_pdo_groups.
    raise event if_bsp_dlc_configuration~config_changed
      exporting
        parameters = value #(
                       ( name  = cl_bsp_wd_ovw_viewset=>c_changed_param_personalized
                         value = abap_true )
                       ( name  = cl_bsp_wd_ovw_viewset=>c_changed_param_displ_views
                         value = cl_bsp_wd_ovw_viewset=>c_pers_changed_displayed_views ) ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method SET_TABLE_LAYOUT_USER_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method set_tiled_layout_sequence.

  data:
    lr_tiled_layout_sequence type ref to cl_crm_iu_dyn_cfg_desc_abstr=>gty_tiled_layout_sequence.


  read table me->mt_tiled_layout_sequence reference into lr_tiled_layout_sequence
    with table key tile_id = iv_tile_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    create data lr_tiled_layout_sequence.
    lr_tiled_layout_sequence->tile_id = iv_tile_id.
    insert lr_tiled_layout_sequence->* into table me->mt_tiled_layout_sequence reference into lr_tiled_layout_sequence.
  endif.

  lr_tiled_layout_sequence->sequence = iv_sequence.

endmethod.


METHOD set_viewname.

  viewname = iv_viewname.

ENDMETHOD.


method sync_conf_keys.

  if not SYNC_CONF_KEYS_SPEC( ).

*   set main attributes first
    try.
        data lo_conf type ref to cl_bsp_dlc_configuration2.
        lo_conf ?= me->m_configuration_descriptor.
        me->role_key        = lo_conf->role_key.
        me->component_usage = lo_conf->component_usage.
        me->object_type     = lo_conf->object_type.
        me->object_sub_type = lo_conf->object_sub_type.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    endtry.

*   get config context ID from wrapped descriptor
    data lv_context_id type bsp_dlc_context_id.
    lv_context_id = me->m_configuration_descriptor->get_current_context_id( ).
    if lv_context_id is initial.
      return.
    endif.

*   compare context ID of wrapped descriptor with wrapper
    try.
        me->mv_no_delegation = abap_true.
        if me->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_current_context_id( ) = lv_context_id.
          me->mv_no_delegation = abap_false.
          return.  "context ID is valid -> we are done
        endif.
      cleanup.
        me->mv_no_delegation = abap_false.
    endtry.

*   get context ID parameters
    data ls_current_config type bsp_dlcs_conf_sem_key_var_part.
    select single role_key component_usage object_type object_sub_type from bspc_dl_xmlstrx2
      into corresponding fields of ls_current_config where context_id = lv_context_id.
    if sy-subrc <> 0.
      select single role_key component_usage object_type object_sub_type from bsp_dl_xmlstrx2
        into corresponding fields of ls_current_config where context_id = lv_context_id.
      if sy-subrc <> 0.
        return.
      endif.
    endif.

*   set wrapper attributes
    try.
        data ls_old_config type bsp_dlcs_conf_sem_key_var_part.
        ls_old_config-role_key        = me->role_key.
        ls_old_config-component_usage = me->component_usage.
        ls_old_config-object_type     = me->object_type.
        ls_old_config-object_sub_type = me->object_sub_type.
        me->mv_no_delegation = abap_true.
        me->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~set_config_key(
          iv_role_key        = ls_current_config-role_key
          iv_component_usage = ls_current_config-component_usage
          iv_object_type     = ls_current_config-object_type
          iv_object_sub_type = ls_current_config-object_sub_type ).
        me->mv_no_delegation = abap_false.
        me->role_key        = ls_old_config-role_key.
        me->component_usage = ls_old_config-component_usage.
        me->object_type     = ls_old_config-object_type.
        me->object_sub_type = ls_old_config-object_sub_type.
      cleanup.
        me->mv_no_delegation = abap_false.
        me->role_key        = ls_old_config-role_key.
        me->component_usage = ls_old_config-component_usage.
        me->object_type     = ls_old_config-object_type.
        me->object_sub_type = ls_old_config-object_sub_type.
    endtry.

  endif.

endmethod.


method SYNC_CONF_KEYS_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE IMPLEMENTATION.


method class_constructor.

  if_bsp_dlc_a_conf_type~config_type = cl_bsp_dlc_config_base=>type_table.

endmethod.


method CONSTRUCTOR.
  SUPER->CONSTRUCTOR( ).
  VIEW_NAME = VIEW.
  if FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS is initial.
    FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_CONTEXT_CLASS.
  endif.
endmethod.


METHOD do_handle_data.

* Data input processing
  fill_model_data(
    fields   = form_fields
    messages = global_messages ).

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD do_handle_event.

  DATA:
    lv_event_id TYPE crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id.

  IF htmlb_event IS BOUND.
    CASE htmlb_event->server_event.
      WHEN 'showCustomizingProfile'.                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onshowcustomizingprofile(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'DECREASE'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_ondecrease(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'INCREASE'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onincrease(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'CLOSE'.                                         "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onclose(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'next_hit'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onnext_hit(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'position'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onposition(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'collapse_all'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_oncollapse_all(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'expand_all'.                                    "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onexpand_all(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'virtual_root'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onvirtual_root(
          htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'refresh'.                                       "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onrefresh( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'reset'.                                         "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onreset( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'resetall'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onresetall( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'focus_parent'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onfocus_parent( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'focus_sub'.                                     "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onfocus_sub( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'activate_filter'.                               "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onactivate_filter( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'deactivate_filter'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_ondeactivate_filter( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

      WHEN 'profgrp_selected'.                              "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onprofgrp_selected( htmlb_event = htmlb_event ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A_01 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A STATIC .

      WHEN OTHERS.
        IF htmlb_event->server_event CS if_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service=>co_event_id_prefix.
          cl_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service=>get_instance(
            )->handle_event_ext( htmlb_event->server_event ).
        ENDIF.

    ENDCASE.
  ENDIF.

  IF htmlb_event_ex IS BOUND.
    IF htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'tree'
    OR htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'tableView'.            "#EC NOTEXT
      CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.
        WHEN 'nodeSelect'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
          eh_onnodeselect( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

        WHEN 'nodeExpand'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
          eh_onnodeexpand( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

        WHEN 'nodeCollapse'.                                "#EC NOTEXT
          eh_onnodecollapse( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

        WHEN 'sort'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
          eh_on_sort(
            htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
            htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

        WHEN 'tvNavigator'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT
          eh_ontvnavigator( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

        WHEN OTHERS.
          IF htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name CS if_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service=>co_event_id_prefix.
            cl_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service=>get_instance(
              )->handle_event_ext( htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name ).
*           disable delta handling to force rebuilding of context menu
            IF me->typed_context->isuboltree->tree_node_action_tab IS NOT INITIAL.
              if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>get_disable_dh( ) = abap_true.
                RAISE EVENT disable_dh_navigation
                  EXPORTING
                    validity = cl_ajax_utility=>gc_dh_nav_block_once.
              endif.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDIF.

    IF  htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'link'
    AND htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name = 'nodeClick'.    "#EC NOTEXT
      eh_onnodeclick( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

    ELSEIF htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name CS cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event.
      SPLIT htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name AT cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event INTO lv_event_id lv_event_id.

      eh_on_generic_nav(
        htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex
        event_type     = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_oca_event_type
        event_id       = lv_event_id ).

    ELSEIF htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name CS cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_toolbar_event.
      SPLIT htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name AT cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_toolbar_event INTO lv_event_id lv_event_id.

      eh_on_generic_nav(
        htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex
        event_type     = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type
        event_id       = lv_event_id ).

    ELSEIF htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name CS cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_link_event.
      eh_onnodeselect( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).
      SPLIT htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name AT cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_link_event INTO lv_event_id lv_event_id.

      eh_on_generic_nav(
        htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex
        event_type     = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_link_event_type
        event_id       = lv_event_id ).

    ELSEIF htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name EQ 'find_popup_close'. "#EC NOTEXT
      eh_onfind_popup_close(
        htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
        htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

    ELSEIF htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'image' or
           htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'checkbox' or
           htmlb_event_ex->event_name = 'dropdownListBox'.            "#EC NOTEXT
      lv_event_id = htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

      eh_on_generic_nav(
        htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex
        event_type     = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_link_event_type
        event_id       = lv_event_id
        iv_suppress_generic_nav = abap_true ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A_02 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A STATIC .

    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A_03 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_A STATIC .


ENDMETHOD.


METHOD do_prepare_output.

* build all dummy tables
  IF typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab IS INITIAL.
    typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).
  ENDIF.

  typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).

ENDMETHOD.

ENDMETHOD.

method GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS.
  if FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS is initial.
    FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_CONTEXT_CLASS.
  endif.
  RV_RESULT = FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS.
endmethod.


METHOD op_node_clicked.                                     "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD set_models.

* Set the models for output
  view->set_attribute(
    name  = 'ISUBOLTREE'
    value = typed_context->isuboltree ).                    "#EC NOTEXT

ENDMETHOD.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

  if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
    CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
      IV_CONTROLLER = ME
      IV_TYPE       = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT'
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

  CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
    IV_CONTROLLER = ME
    IV_TYPE       = GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS( )
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  TYPED_CONTEXT ?= CONTEXT.

endmethod.


METHOD wd_destroy_context.

  CLEAR me->typed_context.
  super->wd_destroy_context( ).

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

public section.

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CFG_DESC IMPLEMENTATION.


method adjust_config_data.

  try.

      data dynamic_table_configuration type bsp_dlc_table_descr.
      dynamic_table_configuration = cl_bsp_dlc_table_utility=>conf_xml_to_abap( iv_xml = cv_config_data ).

      change_column_definitions( changing p_column_definitions = dynamic_table_configuration-columndefinition ).

      if dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows is initial.
        dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows            = get_tree_service( )->get_number_rows( ).
        if dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows = 0.
          clear dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows.
        endif.
      endif.

      if dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll is initial.
        if me->ms_tag_properties-scrollrowcount is not initial.
          dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll = me->ms_tag_properties-scrollrowcount.
        else.
          dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll = get_tree_service( )->get_scroll_rows( ).
        endif.
        if dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll = 0.
          clear dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll.
        endif.
      endif.

      if dynamic_table_configuration-page_scroll_mode = 'B' and
         dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows <= dynamic_table_configuration-visible_rows_bef_scroll.
        dynamic_table_configuration-page_scroll_mode = 'P'.
      endif.

      cv_config_data = cl_bsp_dlc_table_utility=>conf_abap_to_xml( is_table_config = dynamic_table_configuration ).

    catch cx_root.

  endtry.

endmethod.


method change_column_definitions.

  constants: name_prefix  type string value 'COL'.

  data:
    columns      type table of crmt_isutree_pcol,
    column       type crmt_isutree_pcol,
    col_id       type string,
    col          type bsp_dlc_column_descr,
    id           type i,
    num2         type numc2,
    customized   type bsp_dlc_column_descr_tab,
    pixel_used   type abap_bool,
    title_prefix type string value '//ISUBOLTREE/COL'.

  field-symbols:   <col> type bsp_dlc_column_descr,
                   <column> type crmt_isutree_pcol.

  check get_tree_service( ) is bound.

  columns    = get_tree_service( )->get_columns( reread = me->ms_tag_properties-adjust_columns ).

  loop at columns transporting no fields where sequence is not initial.
  endloop.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
    sort columns by sequence col_id.
  endif.

*first loop over already personalized columns
  loop at p_column_definitions assigning <col>.
    num2 = <col>-name+3.
    read table columns assigning <column> with key col_id = num2.
    if sy-subrc eq 0.
* check if a column width is personalized with pixel
      if pixel_used eq abap_false and <col>-width cs 'px'.
        pixel_used = abap_true.
      elseif <col>-width is initial and sy-index eq 1 and <column>-width is not initial.
        concatenate <column>-width '%' into <col>-width.
      endif.
      append <col> to customized." column is already in configuration/personilazation
    endif.
  endloop.

*then loop over customized columns and add missing
  loop at columns assigning <column>.
    clear col.
    id = <column>-col_id. col_id = id. "make numc2 to string, e.g. 04 -> 4
    concatenate name_prefix col_id into col-name. condense col-name.

    read table p_column_definitions transporting no fields with key name = col-name.
    if sy-subrc ne 0.
      concatenate title_prefix col_id into col-title. condense col-title.
      col-hidden = <column>-hidden.

* use width entries from customizing
      if col-hidden is initial and <column>-width is not initial and pixel_used eq abap_false.
        col-width = <column>-width.
        concatenate col-width '%' into col-width.
      elseif col-hidden is initial and pixel_used eq abap_true.
* this column is customized after a personalization was defined, set a small width! otherwise column would have 0px width
        col-width = '40px'.
      endif.

      append col to customized." column is only defined in customizing
    endif.
  endloop.

  p_column_definitions = customized.

endmethod.


method CONSTRUCTOR.
  SUPER->CONSTRUCTOR(
    IR_CONFIG_DESC = IR_CONFIG_DESC
  ).
  FTREE_INSTANCE = IR_TREE_INSTANCE.
  TREE_SERVICE   = IR_TREE_SERVICE.
  PERSONALIZABLE = IV_PERSONALIZABLE.
endmethod.


method get_col_name.
*  //ISUBOLTREE/COL2
  data str type string.

  str = element_id.

  shift str left deleting leading '/'.
  split str at '/' into str col_name.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_INSTANCE.
  RR_RESULT = FTREE_INSTANCE.
  if RR_RESULT is not bound and GET_TREE_SERVICE( ) is bound.
    RR_RESULT = GET_TREE_SERVICE( )->TREE_CONTROLLER.
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_SERVICE.
  RR_RESULT = TREE_SERVICE.
endmethod.


method get_visible_columns.
  data: table type bsp_dlc_table_descr,
        xml   type bsp_dlc_xml,
        line  type bsp_dlc_column_descr,
        name  type name_komp.

  xml = me->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_config_data( ).
  table = cl_bsp_dlc_table_utility=>conf_xml_to_abap( iv_xml = xml ).

  loop at table-columndefinition into line.
    name = line-name.
    append name to rt_col.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_config_data.

  super->if_bsp_dlc_configuration~get_config_data(
    exporting
      iv_4_edit                = iv_4_edit
      iv_without_pers          = iv_without_pers
      iv_pers_only             = iv_pers_only
      iv_for_display_mode      = iv_for_display_mode
      iv_for_table_layout_pers = iv_for_table_layout_pers
    receiving
      rv_result                = rv_result
    exceptions
      foreign_lock             = 1
      config_not_found         = 2
      others                   = 3 ).
  case sy-subrc.
    when 1.
      raise foreign_lock.
    when 2.
      raise config_not_found.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor~get_field_label.
  data col_name type string.

  col_name = get_col_name( iv_element_id ).

  rv_result = get_tree_service( )->get_name_column( iv_column_name = col_name )."#EC NOTEXT

*  check rv_result is initial.
*
*  call method super->if_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor~get_field_label
*    exporting
*      iv_element_id           = iv_element_id
*      iv_context_node         = iv_context_node
*      iv_skip_text_repository = abap_false
*    receiving
*      rv_result               = rv_result.

endmethod.


method set_tag_properties.

  me->ms_tag_properties = is_tag_properties.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

    returning

protected section.

  data MO_TREE_SRV type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .
  data:
    PUBLISHED_NEW_FOCUS_NODES type hashed table of ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE with unique default key .
  data OWNER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  data DURING_EXCEL_EXPORT type ABAP_BOOL .
  data FNODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS type TT_NODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS .
  data FSELECTED_TREE_NODES type TT_SELECTED_TREE_NODES .
  data FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES type TT_SELECTED_NODE_PROXIES .
  data FUSENEWSELECTION type SAP_BOOL value ABAP_FALSE ##NO_TEXT.
  data FUSE_ROUNDTRIP_EVENT type SAP_BOOL value ABAP_FALSE ##NO_TEXT.
  data FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .
  data FTREE_NODE_PROXY_TYPE type SEOCLSNAME value 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01' ##NO_TEXT.
  data FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT type I value 0 ##NO_TEXT.
  data MT_CELL_INFO type TT_CELL_INFOS .
  data MT_EDITABLE_INFO type TT_EDITABLE_INFOS .
  data FALLNODESSELECTED type ABAP_BOOL value ABAP_FALSE ##NO_TEXT.
