  methods DESELECT_PARENT_NODE
    importing
      !IR_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE
      !IV_RECURSIVE type SAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE .
  methods GET_NODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS
    returning
      value(RT_RESULT) type TT_NODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS .
  methods DO_ROW_SELECTION
    importing
      !IV_HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT_TABLEVIEW
      !IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA
    returning
      value(RV_HANDLED) type SAP_BOOL .
  methods GET_PARENT_NODE
    importing
      !IR_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE optional
      !IV_NODE_KEY type STRING optional
    returning
      value(RR_NODE) type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_PARENT_NODE_KEY
    importing
      !IR_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE optional
      !IV_NODE_KEY type STRING optional
    returning
      value(RV_PARENT_NODE_KEY) type STRING .
  methods INTERNAL_SET_NODE_SELECTED
    importing
      !IR_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE
      !IV_SELECTED type SAP_BOOL default ABAP_TRUE
      !IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_PARENT type SAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_CHILDS type SAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE .
  methods DO_SELECT_ALL .
  methods INT_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods INT_H_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR
    returning
      value(RV_HIDDEN) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods INT_I_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods INT_M_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !IV_TYPE_NAME type STRING
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods INT_SETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR
      !VALUE type STRING .
  methods INT_STRUCTURE_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING optional
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    exporting
      !VALUE type ANY .
  methods INT_STRUCTURE_SETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING optional
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type ANY .
  methods INT_TABLE_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING optional
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    exporting
      !VALUE type ANY .
  methods INT_TABLE_SETTER
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING optional
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type ANY .
  methods INT_P_GETTER_TREE_COLUMN
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING
      !IV_PROPERTY type STRING
      !IV_INDEX type I optional
      !IV_DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning
      value(RV_VALUE) type STRING .
  methods INT_P_GETTER
    importing
      !IV_PROPERTY type STRING
      !IV_INDEX type I optional
      !IV_DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning
      value(RV_VALUE) type STRING .

  methods GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method BUILD_TABLE.

  clear MT_EDITABLE_INFO.
  clear MT_CELL_INFO.

  if USE_MODE = IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>DESIGNTIME_MODE.
    " build empty hierarchy table in designtime mode
    clear NODE_TAB.
    clear SELECTION_TAB.
    SELECTED_INDEX = -1.
    append -1 to SELECTION_TAB.
    data(LV_SAMPLE_LINE_REF) = GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE( ).
    assign LV_SAMPLE_LINE_REF->* to field-symbol(<LS_TABLINE>).
    create data TABLE like standard table of <LS_TABLINE>.
  else.
*   standard code in runtime mode
    SUPER->BUILD_TABLE( ).
  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    FNODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS = GET_NODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method CL_GET_SELECTION_EVENT_DATA.

  data(LV_ROW_KEY)               = value STRING( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LV_ROW_INDEX)             = value INT4( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LV_SELECTEDROWINDEX)      = value STRING( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE) = value INT4_TABLE( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LV_SELECTEDROWKEY)        = value STRING( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LT_SELECTEDROWKEYTABLE)   = value STRING_TABLE( ) ##NEEDED.
  data(LV_SELECT_ALL)            = ABAP_FALSE ##NEEDED.
  data(LV_DESELECT_ALL)          = ABAP_FALSE ##NEEDED.

  ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = value #( ).
  EV_SELECT_ALL = ABAP_FALSE.
  EV_DESELECT_ALL = ABAP_FALSE.

  if IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_CLASS = 'CL_THTMLB_TREE' ##NO_TEXT
    and IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX is instance of CL_THTMLB_TREE.
    data(LR_THTMLB_TREE) = cast CL_THTMLB_TREE( IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX ) ##NEEDED.
    LV_ROW_KEY               = LR_THTMLB_TREE->ROW_KEY.
    LV_ROW_INDEX             = LR_THTMLB_TREE->ROW_INDEX.
    LV_SELECTEDROWINDEX      = LR_THTMLB_TREE->SELECTEDROWINDEX.
    LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = LR_THTMLB_TREE->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE.
    LV_SELECTEDROWKEY        = LR_THTMLB_TREE->SELECTEDROWKEY.
    LT_SELECTEDROWKEYTABLE   = LR_THTMLB_TREE->SELECTEDROWKEYTABLE.
    case IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE.
      when CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>CO_HEADER_CLICK.
        LV_SELECT_ALL   = BOOLC( LR_THTMLB_TREE->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_MARK_ALL ).
        LV_DESELECT_ALL = BOOLC( LR_THTMLB_TREE->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_UNMARK_ALL ).
    endcase.
  elseif IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_CLASS = 'CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW' ##NO_TEXT
    and IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX is instance of CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW.
    data(LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW) = cast CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW( IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX ) ##NEEDED.
    LV_ROW_KEY               = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->ROW_KEY.
    LV_ROW_INDEX             = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->ROW_INDEX.
    LV_SELECTEDROWINDEX      = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->SELECTEDROWINDEX.
    LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE.
    LV_SELECTEDROWKEY        = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->SELECTEDROWKEY.
    LT_SELECTEDROWKEYTABLE   = LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->SELECTEDROWKEYTABLE.
    case IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE.
      when CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>CO_HEADER_CLICK.
        LV_SELECT_ALL   = BOOLC( LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_MARK_ALL ).
        LV_DESELECT_ALL = BOOLC( LR_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_UNMARK_ALL ).
    endcase.
  elseif IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_CLASS = 'CL_THTMLB_LINK' ##NO_TEXT
    and IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX is instance of CL_THTMLB_LINK.
    data(LR_THTMLB_LINK) = cast CL_THTMLB_LINK( IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX ) ##NEEDED.
    CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_EVENT_INFO(
      exporting
        IV_EVENT = IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX
      importing
        EV_INDEX = LV_ROW_INDEX
    ).
    LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = value #( ( LV_ROW_INDEX ) ).
  endif.

  delete LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE where TABLE_LINE <= 0.

  ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE.
  EV_SELECT_ALL = LV_SELECT_ALL.
  EV_DESELECT_ALL = LV_DESELECT_ALL.

endmethod.


method CONSTRUCTOR.

  SUPER->CONSTRUCTOR( IV_SELECTION_MODE = IV_SELECTION_MODE ).

  SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_SINGLE.

  create object FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION.

  set handler ON_TREE_NODE_DELETED for all instances.

  if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
    FUSENEWSELECTION = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

endmethod.                    "constructor


method DESELECT_ALL.

  SUPER->DESELECT_ALL( ).

  DO_DESELECT_ALL( ).

endmethod.


method DESELECT_PARENT_NODE.
**  IV_NODE_KEY
**  IR_NODE
*
*  data(LR_PARENT_NODE) = GET_PARENT_NODE( IV_NODE_KEY = IV_NODE_KEY ).
*  if LR_PARENT_NODE is bound.
*    DO_DESELECT_NODE( IR_NODE = LR_PARENT_NODE ).
*    if IV_RECURSIVE is not initial and LR_PARENT_NODE->NODE_KEY is not initial.
*      DESELECT_PARENT_NODE(
*        IV_NODE_KEY  = LR_PARENT_NODE->NODE_KEY
*        IV_RECURSIVE = IV_RECURSIVE
*      ).
*    endif.
*  endif.
*
*  if
*  TRY.
*    LV_PARENT_NODE_KEY FNODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS[ KEY NODE_KEY COMPONENTS NODE_KEY = IV_NODE_KEY ]-PARENT_NODE_KEY
*
*  clear RT_RESULT.
*
*    loop at NODE_TAB assigning field-symbol(<NODE_ENTRY>).
*      data(LV_INDEX) = SY-TABIX.
*      data(LR_NODE_PROXY) = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = <NODE_ENTRY>-NODE_KEY ).
*      if LR_NODE_PROXY is not bound or LR_NODE_PROXY is not instance of CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
*        raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
*          exporting
*            TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
*      endif.
*      if <NODE_ENTRY>-PARENT_KEY is not initial.
*        data(LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY) = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = <NODE_ENTRY>-PARENT_KEY ).
*        if LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY is not bound or LR_NODE_PROXY is not instance of CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
*          raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
*            exporting
*              TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
*        endif.
*      else.
*        clear LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY.
*      endif.
*      insert value #(
*        INDEX           = LV_INDEX
*        NODE_KEY        = LR_NODE_PROXY->NODE_KEY
*        PARENT_NODE_KEY = cond #( when LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY is bound
*                                  then LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY->NODE_KEY
*                                  else ''
*                                )
*        NODE            = cast #( LR_NODE_PROXY )
*        PARENT_NODE     = cast #( LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY )
*      ) into table RT_RESULT.
*    endloop.
*
**  loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<NODE_REL>) where TREE_NODE is bound.
**    insert value #(
**      NODE_KEY        = <NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE->NODE_KEY
**      PARENT_NODE_KEY = cond #( when <NODE_REL>-PARENT_TREE_NODE is bound
**                                then <NODE_REL>-PARENT_TREE_NODE->NODE_KEY
**                                else ''
**                              )
**      NODE            = <NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE
**      PARENT_NODE     = <NODE_REL>-PARENT_TREE_NODE
**    ) into table RT_RESULT.
**  endloop.
  endmethod.


method DESTROY.

  clear FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION.
  clear FNODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS.

  clear TREE_NODE_ACTION_TAB.

  clear TREE_NODE_REL_TAB.

  if FOCUS_COL is bound.
    set handler ON_NEW_FOCUS_COL_FOCUS for FOCUS_COL activation ABAP_FALSE.
    clear FOCUS_COL.
  endif.

  set handler ON_TREE_NODE_DELETED for all instances activation ABAP_FALSE.

  SUPER->DESTROY( ).

endmethod.                    "destroy


method DO_DESELECT_ALL.

  if IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~CLEAR( ).
  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.                    "deselect_all


method DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES.

  if not IS_UPDATE_MODE( ).

    " alle Knoten werden über GET_NODES_FROM_COL erzeugt und in der TREE_NODE_REL_TAB registriert.
    " D.h., die TREE_NODE_REL_TAB enthält alle erzeugten Node-Proxies. Die Node-Proxies haben das
    " Selektionskennzeichen.

    data(LV_SELECTED_NODE_PROXIES_OLD) = FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES.
    data(LV_SELECTED_TREE_NODES_OLD) = FSELECTED_TREE_NODES.

    clear FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES.
    clear FSELECTED_TREE_NODES.

    loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<TREE_NODE_REL>) where TREE_NODE is bound.
      if <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE is not instance of CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
        raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
          exporting
            TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
      endif.
      if <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED is not initial.
        data(LR_TREE_NODE_PROXY) = cast CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY( <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE ).
        try.
            insert LR_TREE_NODE_PROXY into table FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES.
          catch CX_SY_ITAB_DUPLICATE_KEY.
        endtry.
        if LR_TREE_NODE_PROXY->BO is bound and LR_TREE_NODE_PROXY->BO is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.
          data(LR_TREE_NODE) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE( LR_TREE_NODE_PROXY->BO ).
          try.
              insert LR_TREE_NODE into table FSELECTED_TREE_NODES.
            catch CX_SY_ITAB_DUPLICATE_KEY.
          endtry.
        endif.
      endif.
    endloop.

    LR_TREE_NODE = FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
    while LR_TREE_NODE is bound.
      if not LINE_EXISTS( FSELECTED_TREE_NODES[ TABLE_LINE = LR_TREE_NODE ] ).
        FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( IV_BO = LR_TREE_NODE ).
        LR_TREE_NODE = FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION->GET_CURRENT_NODE( ).
        continue.
      endif.
      LR_TREE_NODE = FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
    endwhile.
    loop at FSELECTED_TREE_NODES assigning field-symbol(<SELECTED_TREE_NODE>).
      FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( IV_ENTITY = <SELECTED_TREE_NODE> ).
    endloop.

    data(LV_SELECTION_CHANGED) = ABAP_FALSE.
    if LV_SELECTED_NODE_PROXIES_OLD <> FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES
      or LV_SELECTED_TREE_NODES_OLD <> FSELECTED_TREE_NODES.
      LV_SELECTION_CHANGED = ABAP_TRUE.
      raise event SELECTION_CHANGED.
    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method DO_ROW_SELECTION.

  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.

  if not IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).

    RV_HANDLED = ABAP_TRUE.

    CL_GET_SELECTION_EVENT_DATA(
      exporting
        IV_HTMLB_EVENT           = IV_HTMLB_EVENT
        IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX        = IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX
      importing
        ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = data(LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE)
        EV_SELECT_ALL            = data(LV_SELECT_ALL)
        EV_DESELECT_ALL          = data(LV_DESELECT_ALL)
    ).

    if LV_SELECT_ALL is not initial.

      " mark all
      SELECT_ALL( ).

    elseif LV_DESELECT_ALL is not initial.

      " unmark all
      DESELECT_ALL( ).

    else.

      " Indices to deselect
      data(LT_INDICES_DESELECT) = value INT4_TABLE( ).
      loop at SELECTION_TAB assigning field-symbol(<INDEX>) where TABLE_LINE > 0.
        if not LINE_EXISTS( LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE[ TABLE_LINE = <INDEX> ] ).
          data(LR_NODE) = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <INDEX> ).
          if LR_NODE is bound and LR_NODE->SELECTED is not initial.
            insert <INDEX> into table LT_INDICES_DESELECT.
          endif.
        endif.
      endloop.

      " Indices to select
      data(LT_INDICES_SELECT) = value INT4_TABLE( ).
      loop at LT_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE assigning <INDEX>.
        LR_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <INDEX> ).
        if LR_NODE is bound and LR_NODE->SELECTED is initial.
          insert <INDEX> into table LT_INDICES_SELECT.
        endif.
      endloop.

      loop at LT_INDICES_DESELECT assigning <INDEX>.
        SET_NODE_SELECTED(
          IR_NODE     = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <INDEX> )
          IV_SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE
        ).
      endloop.

      loop at LT_INDICES_SELECT assigning <INDEX>.
        " Wozu soll das gut sein? Der Index im Wrapper hat
        " nichts mit dem Index der NODE_TAB zu tun. Noch dazu
        " inkonsistent, da dies im SELECT_ALL Fall auch nicht
        " gemacht wird.
        " COLLECTION_WRAPPER->MARK( IV_INDEX = <INDEX> ).
        SET_NODE_SELECTED(
          IR_NODE     = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <INDEX> )
          IV_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE
        ).
      endloop.

      DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).

    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method DO_SELECT_ALL.

  if IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~CLEAR( ).
    loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<TREE_NODE_REL>) where BO_NODE is bound.
      FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE ).
    endloop.
    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK_ALL( ).
  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.                    "select_all


method EH_ON_ROW_SELECTION.

  data: LV_NODE              type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE,
        LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT type ref to CL_THTMLB_TREE,
        LV_TABLE_EVENT       type ref to CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW,
        LV_SELECTED_INDEX    type INT4,
        LV_ROW_INDEX         type INT4.
  data: LS_NODE type TY_TREE_NODE_REL.

  field-symbols: <FS_SELECTED_ROW> type INT4.

  check IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX is bound.

  if not DO_ROW_SELECTION(
    IV_HTMLB_EVENT    = IV_HTMLB_EVENT
    IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX = IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX
  ).

    CL_GET_SELECTION_EVENT_DATA(
      exporting
        IV_HTMLB_EVENT           = IV_HTMLB_EVENT
        IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX        = IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX
      importing
        ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = data(ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE)
        EV_SELECT_ALL            = data(EV_SELECT_ALL)
        EV_DESELECT_ALL          = data(EV_DESELECT_ALL)
    ).

    try.
        LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT ?= IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX.
        if LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT is bound.
          LV_ROW_INDEX = LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->ROW_INDEX.
        endif.

        " mark/unmark all
        if IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>CO_HEADER_CLICK.
          if LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_MARK_ALL.
            SELECT_ALL( ).
            exit.
          elseif LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_UNMARK_ALL.
            DESELECT_ALL( ).
            exit.
          endif.
        else.
          if IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).

*           Deselect only the ones that are not part of the selection anymore
            loop at SELECTION_TAB assigning <FS_SELECTED_ROW>.
              read table LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE with key TABLE_LINE = <FS_SELECTED_ROW> transporting no fields.
              if SY-SUBRC <> 0.
                LV_NODE ?= GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <FS_SELECTED_ROW>  ).
                if LV_NODE is bound and LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                  LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                  read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                  if SY-SUBRC is initial.
                    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
                    if OWNER->GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.
*                     deselect parent node if a sub node has been deselected
                      data LO_BO_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.
                      LO_BO_NODE = LS_NODE-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                      while LO_BO_NODE is bound.
                        read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<LS_NODE>) with table key BO_NODE = LO_BO_NODE.
                        if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE is bound.
                          <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                          LO_BO_NODE = <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                          read table NODE_TAB transporting no fields with key NODE_KEY = <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->NODE_KEY.
                          if SY-SUBRC = 0.
*                           store unmarked indexes, we cannot remove them here because we are in the loop..
                            data LT_INDEX_UNMARKED type standard table of SYTABIX with empty key.
                            append SY-TABIX to LT_INDEX_UNMARKED.
                          endif.
                        else.
                          clear LO_BO_NODE.
                        endif.
                      endwhile.
*                     deselect all sub nodes if parent node has been deselected
                      data LT_NODE type standard table of ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE with empty key.
                      clear LT_NODE.
                      append LV_NODE to LT_NODE.
                      loop at LT_NODE into LV_NODE.
                        loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_NODE>  using key PARENT_TREE_NODE where PARENT_TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                          if <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                            <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                            FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                            append <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE to LT_NODE.
                            read table NODE_TAB transporting no fields with key NODE_KEY = <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->NODE_KEY.
                            if SY-SUBRC = 0.
                              data(LV_INDEX) = SY-TABIX.
                              delete LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE where TABLE_LINE = LV_INDEX.
                              delete SELECTION_TAB where TABLE_LINE = LV_INDEX.
                            endif.
                          endif.
                        endloop.
                      endloop.
                    endif.
                  endif.
                endif.
              endif.
            endloop.

*           some nodes might be unmarked meanwhile
            loop at LT_INDEX_UNMARKED into LV_INDEX.
              delete LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE where TABLE_LINE = LV_INDEX.
              delete SELECTION_TAB where TABLE_LINE = LV_INDEX.
            endloop.

*             Adjust newly selected rows (collection wrapper and node)
            loop at LV_THTMLB_TREE_EVENT->SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE assigning <FS_SELECTED_ROW>.
              COLLECTION_WRAPPER->MARK( IV_INDEX = <FS_SELECTED_ROW> ).
              LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( <FS_SELECTED_ROW> ).
              if LV_NODE is not initial and LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                if SY-SUBRC is initial.
                  FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
                  FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = LS_NODE-BO_ENTITY ).
                  if OWNER->GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.
*                   select all sub nodes if parent node has been selected
                    clear LT_NODE.
                    append LV_NODE to LT_NODE.
                    loop at LT_NODE into LV_NODE.
                      loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_NODE> using key PARENT_TREE_NODE where PARENT_TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                        if <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                          <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                          append <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE to LT_NODE.
                        endif.
                      endloop.
                    endloop.
*                   select parent node if all sub nodes have been selected
                    LO_BO_NODE = LS_NODE-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                    while LO_BO_NODE is bound.
                      read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_NODE> with table key BO_NODE = LO_BO_NODE.
                      if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE is bound and <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                        data(LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED) = ABAP_TRUE.
                        loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB transporting no fields using key PARENT_TREE_NODE
                          where PARENT_TREE_NODE = <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE and
                                TREE_NODE is bound and
                                TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                          LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                          exit.
                        endloop.
                        if LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                          <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                          LO_BO_NODE = <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                        else.
                          clear LO_BO_NODE.
                        endif.
                      else.
                        clear LO_BO_NODE.
                      endif.
                    endwhile.
                  endif.
                endif.
              endif.
            endloop.

            if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
              DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
            endif.

            return.
          endif.
        endif.

        SUPER->EH_ON_ROW_SELECTION(
          IV_HTMLB_EVENT    = IV_HTMLB_EVENT
          IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX = IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX ).
      catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
        try.
            LV_TABLE_EVENT ?= IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX.

            if LV_TABLE_EVENT is bound.
              LV_ROW_INDEX = LV_TABLE_EVENT->ROW_INDEX.
            endif.

*           mark/unmark all
            if IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>CO_HEADER_CLICK.
              if LV_TABLE_EVENT->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_MARK_ALL.
                SELECT_ALL( ).
                exit.
              elseif LV_TABLE_EVENT->GV_MARKALL = CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>C_ROWS_UNMARK_ALL.
                DESELECT_ALL( ).
                exit.
              endif.
            elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( )
              and ( IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE = 'shiftKeySelection'
               or IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_TYPE = 'multiselect' ).

*             Deselect only the ones that are not part of the selection anymore
              loop at SELECTION_TAB assigning <FS_SELECTED_ROW>.
                read table ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE with key TABLE_LINE = <FS_SELECTED_ROW> transporting no fields.
                if SY-SUBRC ne 0.
                  LV_NODE ?= GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX = <FS_SELECTED_ROW>  ).
                  if LV_NODE is bound.
                    LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                    read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                    if SY-SUBRC is initial.
                      FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
                    endif.
                  endif.
                endif.
              endloop.

*             Adjust newly selected rows (collection wrapper and node)
              loop at ET_SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE assigning <FS_SELECTED_ROW>.
                COLLECTION_WRAPPER->MARK( IV_INDEX = <FS_SELECTED_ROW> ).
                LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( <FS_SELECTED_ROW> ).
                if LV_NODE is bound.
                  LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                  read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                  if SY-SUBRC is initial.
                    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
                    FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = LS_NODE-BO_ENTITY ).
                  endif.
                endif.
              endloop.

              if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
                DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
              endif.

              return.
            endif.
          catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
*           Link Event
            data: LR_LINK_EVENT type ref to CL_THTMLB_LINK.
            try.
                LR_LINK_EVENT ?= IV_HTMLB_EVENT_EX.
                CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_EVENT_INFO(
                  exporting
                    IV_EVENT = LR_LINK_EVENT
                  importing
                    EV_INDEX = LV_ROW_INDEX ).
              catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.

                if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
                  DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
                endif.

                return.
            endtry.
        endtry.
    endtry.

    LV_SELECTED_INDEX = SELECTED_INDEX.

    case SELECTION_MODE.
      when SELMODE_NONE.
        return.

      when SELMODE_SINGLE or SELMODE_LINEEDIT.
        if LV_SELECTED_INDEX > 0.
*         deselect prior node
          LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( LV_SELECTED_INDEX ).
          if LV_NODE is bound.
            LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
          endif.
        endif.
        if LV_ROW_INDEX ne LV_SELECTED_INDEX.
*         selection changed -> select new node
          LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( LV_ROW_INDEX ).
          if LV_NODE is bound.
            LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
          endif.
        endif.
      when SELMODE_MULTI or SELMODE_MULTIEDIT.
*       adapt selection
        read table SELECTION_TAB with key TABLE_LINE = LV_ROW_INDEX
                   binary search transporting no fields.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
*         line was marked -> unmark it
          LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( LV_ROW_INDEX ).
          if LV_NODE is bound.
            LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
            read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
            if SY-SUBRC is initial.
              FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
            endif.
          endif.
        else.
*         line was not yet marked -> mark it
          LV_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( LV_ROW_INDEX ).
          if LV_NODE is bound.
            LV_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
            read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LV_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
            if SY-SUBRC is initial.
              FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( LS_NODE-BO_NODE ).
              FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = LS_NODE-BO_ENTITY ).
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.
    endcase.

    if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
      DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.                    "eh_on_row_selection


  method eh_on_sort.

    data: lv_bo               type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
          lv_thtmlb_tableview type ref to cl_thtmlb_table_view,
          lv_attr_name        type name_komp,
          lv_sort_order       type char1,
          lv_stable           type abap_bool value abap_false.



    try.
        lv_thtmlb_tableview ?= iv_htmlb_event_ex.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        exit.
    endtry.

    if lv_thtmlb_tableview is bound.
*   check whether its realy a sorting event
      check lv_thtmlb_tableview->event_type = cl_thtmlb_table_view=>co_header_click.
*   get name of column to be sorted
      lv_attr_name  = lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_key.
      check lv_attr_name is not initial.

*   get sorting direction
      case lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_sort_direction.
        when 'U'.
          lv_sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_ascending.
        when 'D'.
          lv_sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_descending.
        when others.
          return.
      endcase.
*   sort
      try.
          me->collection_wrapper->sort( iv_attr_name     = lv_attr_name
                                        iv_sort_order    = lv_sort_order
                                        iv_stable        = lv_stable
*                                  IV_SORT_CALLBACK =
                                       ).


          me->sort_state = me->collection_wrapper->sort_state.

        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
*     could be a renamed attribute or field which does not belong to the collection
      endtry.
*   in case of single selection restore the selected row index
      if   me->selection_mode = selmode_single
        or me->selection_mode = selmode_lineedit.
        if me->selected_index <> '0'.
          me->selected_index = me->collection_wrapper->get_current_index( ).
        endif.
      endif.
    else.
      exit.
    endif.


  endmethod.                    "eh_on_sort


method ENTER_UPDATE_MODE.
  FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT = FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT + 1.
  ENTER_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC( ).
endmethod.


method ENTER_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


  method get_ac_t_table.

    field-symbols:
      <ls_tree_node_action> type ty_tree_node_action.


    read table me->tree_node_action_tab assigning <ls_tree_node_action>
      with table key component = iv_component  index = iv_index.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      rv_action_descriptor = <ls_tree_node_action>-provider.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "get_ac_t_table


  method get_all_children_col.

    data:
      _node  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      _bo    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


    check node is bound.
    create object result type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

    _node ?= node.
    _bo   ?= _node->bo.

    result = _bo->get_all_child_nodes( wrapped_entities = abap_true ).

  endmethod.                    "get_all_children_col


  method get_a_t_table.
* within this tree no a getters are defined
    "# EC NEEDED
  endmethod.                    "get_a_t_table


  method get_children_col.

    data:
      node     type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      bo       type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      focus_bo type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
      children type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


    node ?= focus_node.
    bo   ?= node->bo.
    children = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
    if children is bound.
      bo ?= children->get_first( ).
      while bo is bound.
        if not col is bound.
          create object col.
        endif.
        col->if_bol_bo_col~add( bo ).
*       there can be only one focus
        if not focus_bo is bound.
          if bo->is_focus( ) = abap_true.
            focus_bo = bo.
          endif.
        endif.
        bo ?= children->get_next( ).
      endwhile.
    endif.

    if col is bound.
      if focus_bo is bound.
        col->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = focus_bo ).
      endif.
      set handler me->on_new_focus for col.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "get_children_col


  method get_current_bo.

    data: tree_node type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
          index     type syindex.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.

    index = selected_index.
    if selection_mode ne selmode_multi and index > 0.

      tree_node = get_node_by_index( index ).

      read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> with key tree_node COMPONENTS tree_node = tree_node. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        result = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node.
      endif.

    endif.

  endmethod.                    "GET_CURRENT_BO


method get_i_t_table.

  field-symbols <ls_editable_info> type gty_editable_info.
  read table me->mt_editable_info assigning <ls_editable_info> with table key index = index  component = component.
  if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_editable_info>-disabled = abap_true.
    rv_disabled = |TRUE|.
  endif.

endmethod.                    "get_i_t_table


method GET_MODEL_ID.
  RV_ID = IF_BSP_MODEL_BINDING~GET_ID( ).
endmethod.


  method get_m_t_table.
* within this tree no m getters are defined
    "# EC NEEDED

    metadata = super->get_m_t_table( attribute_path = attribute_path component = component ).


  endmethod.                    "get_m_t_table


  method get_nodes_by_entity.

    data: ls_node_key type          crmt_isutree_node_key,
          lr_node     type ref to   cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel>     type ty_tree_node_rel,
      <tree_node_rel_new> type ty_tree_node_rel.

*loop over all root nodes and search for given entity
    loop at tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> where parent_bo_node is initial. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      lr_node = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node.
      while lr_node is bound." go for one root the tree path down
        lr_node = lr_node->find( iv_searched_entity = entity ).
        if lr_node is bound. " one node found
          read table node_key_tab with key node_key = lr_node transporting no fields." don't add same node again
          if sy-subrc ne 0.
            ls_node_key-node_key      = lr_node.
            read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel_new> with table key bo_node = lr_node." is node selected?
            if sy-subrc eq 0.
              ls_node_key-is_selected = <tree_node_rel_new>-tree_node->selected.
            endif.
            append ls_node_key to node_key_tab.
          endif.
          lr_node = lr_node->find( iv_next_hit = abap_true iv_searched_entity = entity ). " go deeper and try to find next one
        endif.
      endwhile.
    endloop.

  endmethod.                    "get_nodes_by_entity


method GET_NODES_FROM_COL.

  data:
    ENTITY        type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE, " Tree Node
    NODE          type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01, " Tree Node Proxy
    TREE_NODE_REL type TY_TREE_NODE_REL,
    NODE_COL      type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL.


  check COL is bound and NODE_FACTORY is bound.

  try.

      try.
          NODE_COL ?= COL.
          ENTITY = NODE_COL->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
          ENTITY ?= COL->GET_FIRST( ).
      endtry.

      while ENTITY is bound.

        if ENTITY->TREE_SRV <> GET_TREE_SRV( ).
          ENTITY->TREE_SRV = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
        endif.

        NODE ?= NODE_FACTORY->GET_PROXY(
          IV_BO           = ENTITY
          IV_PROXY_TYPE   = FTREE_NODE_PROXY_TYPE "'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01'    "#EC NOTEXT
          IV_PARENT_PROXY = PARENT_NODE
        ).

        SETUP_TREE_NODE_PROXY( IR_TREE_NODE_PROXY = NODE ).

        append NODE to NODES.

        " log node relation

        " BO_NODE          -> Tree Node CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
        " BO_ENTITY        -> Wrapped Entity (BOL Entity/CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY)
        " PARENT_BO_NODE   -> Tree Node CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
        " TREE_NODE        -> Tree Node Proxy CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01
        " PARENT_TREE_NODE -> Tree Node Proxy CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01

        delete table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB with table key BO_NODE = ENTITY.
        TREE_NODE_REL-BO_NODE           = ENTITY.
        TREE_NODE_REL-BO_ENTITY         = ENTITY->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).
        TREE_NODE_REL-PARENT_BO_NODE    = ENTITY->GET_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE( ).
        TREE_NODE_REL-TREE_NODE         = NODE.
        TREE_NODE_REL-PARENT_TREE_NODE ?= PARENT_NODE.

        " store hierarchy level (0 indicates the root nodes)
        field-symbols <LS_TREE_NODE_REL_PARENT> type TY_TREE_NODE_REL.
        read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE_REL_PARENT>
          with table key BO_NODE = TREE_NODE_REL-PARENT_BO_NODE.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          TREE_NODE_REL-HIER_LEVEL = <LS_TREE_NODE_REL_PARENT>-HIER_LEVEL + 1.
        endif.

        insert TREE_NODE_REL into table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB.

        if OWNER->GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.
          " select all sub nodes if parent node has been selected
          if TREE_NODE_REL-PARENT_TREE_NODE is bound and TREE_NODE_REL-PARENT_TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
            TREE_NODE_REL-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
            if FOCUS_COL is bound and TREE_NODE_REL-BO_ENTITY is bound.
              FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( TREE_NODE_REL-BO_ENTITY ).
              FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = TREE_NODE_REL-BO_ENTITY ).
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.

        if NODE_COL is bound.
          ENTITY = NODE_COL->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
        elseif COL is bound.
          ENTITY ?= COL->GET_NEXT( ).
        endif.

      endwhile.

    catch:
      CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR,                            "#EC NO_HANDLER
      CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL,                             "#EC NO_HANDLER
      CX_CRM_GENIL_MODEL_ERROR.                         "#EC NO_HANDLER

  endtry.

endmethod.                    "get_nodes_from_col


method GET_NODE_BY_BO.

  data:
    LR_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.

  field-symbols:
    <TREE_NODE_REL> type TY_TREE_NODE_REL.


  read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <TREE_NODE_REL> with key BO_NODE = BO.

  if SY-SUBRC = 0.
    NODE = <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE.
  elseif IV_NO_FALLBACK_SEARCH is initial.
    if BO is bound.
      LR_ENTITY = BO->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).

      if LR_ENTITY is bound.
        read table TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <TREE_NODE_REL> with key BO_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ

        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          NODE = <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.                    "get_node_by_bo


  method get_node_by_child.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> with key tree_node COMPONENTS tree_node = child. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      parent = <tree_node_rel>-parent_tree_node.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "get_node_by_child


  method get_node_by_entity.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    if entity is not bound.
      return.
    endif.

* try to retrieve correct node with matching node ID (if supplied)
    loop at tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> where bo_entity = entity. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      if node_id is initial or
         <tree_node_rel>-bo_node is bound and
         <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_node_id( ) = node_id.
        node = <tree_node_rel>-tree_node.
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.

  endmethod.                    "get_node_by_entity


  method get_node_by_parent.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    loop at tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel>
      USING KEY parent_tree_node where parent_tree_node = parent. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      if <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->is_focus( ) = abap_true.
        child = <tree_node_rel>-tree_node.
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.

    if not child is bound.
      loop at tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> USING KEY parent_tree_node where parent_tree_node = parent. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
        <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->set_focus( abap_true ).
        child = <tree_node_rel>-tree_node.
        exit.
      endloop.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "get_node_by_parent


method GET_NODE_NODE_KEY_ASSIGNS.

  " Das gleiche Node Object kann nicht mehrfach eingehangen werden,
  " denn die factory liefert zu einer Tree Node immer den gleichen
  " Node Proxy. Der NODE_MAPPER Eintrag ist eindeutig pro Node Proxy.

  data LR_NODE_PROXY        type ref to CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
  data LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY type ref to CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
  data LV_COUNT_SELECTED    type I.

  clear RT_RESULT.

  FALLNODESSELECTED = BOOLC( LINES( NODE_TAB ) > 0 ).

  loop at NODE_TAB assigning field-symbol(<NODE_ENTRY>).

    data(LV_INDEX) = SY-TABIX.

    clear: LR_NODE_PROXY, LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY.

    data(LR_NODE_REF) = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = <NODE_ENTRY>-NODE_KEY ).
    if LR_NODE_REF is not bound or LR_NODE_REF is not instance of CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
        exporting
          TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
    endif.
    LR_NODE_PROXY = cast #( LR_NODE_REF ).

    if <NODE_ENTRY>-PARENT_KEY is not initial.
      LR_NODE_REF = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = <NODE_ENTRY>-PARENT_KEY ).
      if LR_NODE_REF is not bound or LR_NODE_REF is not instance of CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
        raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
          exporting
            TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
      endif.
      LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY = cast #( LR_NODE_REF ).
    endif.

    if LR_NODE_PROXY->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~SELECTED is not initial.
      LV_COUNT_SELECTED = LV_COUNT_SELECTED + 1.
    else.
      FALLNODESSELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
    endif.

    insert value #(
      INDEX           = LV_INDEX
      NODE_KEY        = LR_NODE_PROXY->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~NODE_KEY
      PARENT_NODE_KEY = cond #( when LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY is bound
                                then LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~NODE_KEY
                                else ''
                              )
      NODE            = LR_NODE_PROXY
      PARENT_NODE     = LR_PARENT_NODE_PROXY
      SELECTED        = LR_NODE_PROXY->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~SELECTED
    ) into table RT_RESULT.

  endloop.

  " Da es keine absichernde Schnittstelle zur Selektion der Tree Nodes gibt ist
  " es möglich, obwohl der Baum im Singleselektion-Modus operiert, das mehr als
  " ein Tree Node Proxy als selektiert markiert sein kann. Dies führt nicht zu
  " einem Fehler, da in Build_Table, also wenn der Baum zur Anzeige gebracht wird,
  " der letzte selektierte Tree Node Proxy gewinnt. Das ist gut und schön, hat
  " aber zur Folge das die Abfrage der Selektion über die Tree Node Proxies zu
  " einm falschen Ergebnis kommt. Sollte das hier aufschlagen gibt es irgendwo
  " die Manipulation der Selektion ohne die korrekte Beachtung in welchem
  " Selektion-Modus der Baum operiert.

  if IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
    if LV_COUNT_SELECTED > 0.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
        exporting
          TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
    endif.
  elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( ).
    if LV_COUNT_SELECTED > 1.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
        exporting
          TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
    endif.
  elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
    " NOP
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_PARENT_NODE.
  clear RR_NODE.
  data(LV_PARENT_NODE_KEY) = GET_PARENT_NODE_KEY(
    IR_NODE     = IR_NODE
    IV_NODE_KEY = IV_NODE_KEY
  ).
  if LV_PARENT_NODE_KEY is not initial.
    RR_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = LV_PARENT_NODE_KEY ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_PARENT_NODE_KEY.
  clear RV_PARENT_NODE_KEY.
  data(LR_NODE) = IR_NODE.
  if LR_NODE is not bound and IV_NODE_KEY is not initial.
    LR_NODE = GET_NODE_BY_KEY( IV_NODE_KEY = IV_NODE_KEY ).
  endif.
  if LR_NODE is not bound.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
      exporting
        TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
  endif.
  try.
      data(LR_PARENT_TREE_NODE) = TREE_NODE_REL_TAB[ key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LR_NODE ]-PARENT_TREE_NODE.
      if LR_PARENT_TREE_NODE is bound.
        RV_PARENT_NODE_KEY = LR_PARENT_TREE_NODE->NODE_KEY.
      endif.
    catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
      clear RV_PARENT_NODE_KEY.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
        exporting
          TEXTID = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>CANNOT_ACCESS_TREE_NODE.
  endtry.
endmethod.


method GET_P_COL1.
  " GET_P_COL 1.
  RV_VALUE  = INT_P_GETTER_TREE_COLUMN(
    IV_COLUMN_NAME  = 'COL1'
    IV_PROPERTY     = IV_PROPERTY
    IV_INDEX        = IV_INDEX
    IV_DISPLAY_MODE = IV_DISPLAY_MODE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.

method GET_P_COL68.

method GET_P_T_TABLE.

* check implementation class
  data:
    LO_TREE_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE,
    LO_CUST_EXIT type ref to IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_ENH.

  field-symbols:
    <LS_TREE_NODE_REL> type TY_TREE_NODE_REL.


  if IV_INDEX > 0.
    LO_TREE_NODE = ME->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( IV_INDEX ).
    read table ME->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE_REL> with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LO_TREE_NODE.
    if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE is bound.
      try.
          LO_CUST_EXIT ?= <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->GET_CUST_EXIT( ).
          if LO_CUST_EXIT is bound.
            data LV_DISABLED type ABAP_BOOL.
            LO_CUST_EXIT->GET_P_T_TABLE(
              exporting
                ENTITY          = <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( )
                NODE            = <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE
                ATTR_NAME       = |{ REPLACE( VAL = COMPONENT  SUB = |COL| WITH = |COL_| ) }|
                HIER            = <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->GET_HIER( )
                IV_INDEX        = IV_INDEX
                IV_PROPERTY     = IV_PROPERTY
                IV_DISPLAY_MODE = IV_DISPLAY_MODE
              importing
                EV_DISABLED     = LV_DISABLED
                RV_VALUE        = RV_VALUE ).
            if IV_PROPERTY = IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_FIELDTYPE and IV_DISPLAY_MODE is supplied.
*           store editable info for later usage in GET_I_T_TABLE()
              insert value #( INDEX = IV_INDEX  COMPONENT = COMPONENT  DISABLED = LV_DISABLED ) into table ME->MT_EDITABLE_INFO.
              if SY-SUBRC <> 0.
                modify table ME->MT_EDITABLE_INFO from value #( INDEX = IV_INDEX  COMPONENT = COMPONENT  DISABLED = LV_DISABLED ).
              endif.
            endif.
          else.
            clear RV_VALUE.
          endif.
        catch CX_ROOT ##needed.
          clear RV_VALUE.
      endtry.

*     let's highlight search results!
      if CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_FILTER_MODE( ) is not initial.
        try.
            if IV_PROPERTY = 'backgroundColor' and RV_VALUE is initial and ME->OWNER is bound and
               <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE is bound and <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED <> ABAP_TRUE.

*             mark node as result of position/find
              data LV_FIND_STRING type STRING.
              LV_FIND_STRING = ME->OWNER->GET_FIND_STRING( ).
              if LV_FIND_STRING is not initial and
                 <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->FIND(
                   IV_STRING       = LV_FIND_STRING
                   IT_COL          = ME->OWNER->GET_VISIBLE_COLUMNS( )
                   IV_NEXT_HIT     = ABAP_FALSE
                   IV_PREVIOUS_HIT = ABAP_FALSE ) is bound.
                RV_VALUE = '#EBFEF4'.                       "#EC NOTEXT
              endif.

*             mark node from search result lists
              if RV_VALUE is initial and
                 <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-PARENT_TREE_NODE is bound and
                 <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->IS_FOLDER( ) = ABAP_FALSE and
                 ME->OWNER->GET_COMP_CONTROLLER(
                   )->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( )->GET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING( 'MODE' ) = 'R'.
                data LO_TREE_SRV type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE.
                LO_TREE_SRV = ME->GET_TREE_SRV( ).
                if LO_TREE_SRV->IS_FILTER_ACTIVE( ) = ABAP_FALSE and
                   LO_TREE_SRV->IS_FILTER_AVAILABLE( ) = ABAP_TRUE and
                   ME->OWNER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_ITERATOR( )->FIND_BO( <LS_TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ) ) = ABAP_TRUE.
                  RV_VALUE = '#FAFC91'.                     "#EC NOTEXT
                endif.
              endif.

            endif.
          catch CX_ROOT ##needed.
        endtry.
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

*within this tree no p getters are defined
  if IV_PROPERTY eq IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER~FP_FIELDTYPE and RV_VALUE is initial.
    RV_VALUE = '#'. "Undefined Fieldtype! -> cell content is rendered in own iterator!
  endif.

endmethod.                    "get_p_t_table


method GET_SELECTED_INDICES.
  clear RT_SELECTED_INDICES.
  if IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
    " NOP
  elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( ).
    insert conv #( SELECTED_INDEX ) into table RT_SELECTED_INDICES.
  elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
    RT_SELECTED_INDICES = SELECTION_TAB.
  endif.
  delete RT_SELECTED_INDICES where TABLE_LINE <= 0.
endmethod.


method GET_SELECTED_NODES.
  RT_NODES = FSELECTED_NODE_PROXIES.
endmethod.


method GET_SELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION.
  RR_NODES_COLLECTION = FSELECTED_NODES_COLLECTION.
endmethod.


method GET_SELECTED_TREE_NODES.
  RT_NODES = FSELECTED_TREE_NODES.
endmethod.


  method get_siblings_col.

    data:
      node            type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      bo              type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      focus_bo        type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
      focus_bo_import type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
      children        type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
      children_nodes  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.


    node ?= focus_node.
    if node is bound.
      bo   ?= node->bo.
      focus_bo_import = bo.
      bo = bo->get_visible_parent_node( ).
      if bo is bound.
        children = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
      else.
*     node is root -> get all root nodes
        children = me->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
      endif.
    endif.

    if children is bound.
      try.
          children_nodes ?= children.
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
          clear children_nodes.
      endtry.
      if children_nodes is bound.
        bo = children_nodes->get_first_node( ).
      else.
        bo ?= children->get_first( ).
      endif.
      while bo is bound.
        if not col is bound.
          create object col.
        endif.
        col->if_bol_bo_col~add( bo ).
*       there can be only one focus
        if not focus_bo is bound.
          if bo->is_focus( ) = abap_true.
            focus_bo = bo.
          endif.
        endif.
        if children_nodes is bound.
          bo = children_nodes->get_next_node( ).
        else.
          bo ?= children->get_next( ).
        endif.
      endwhile.
    endif.

    if col is bound.
      if focus_bo_import is bound.
        if col->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = focus_bo_import ) is bound.
          clear focus_bo.
        endif.
      endif.
      if focus_bo is bound.
        col->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = focus_bo ).
      endif.
      set handler me->on_new_focus for col.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "get_siblings_col

      col82 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col83 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col84 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col85 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col86 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col87 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col88 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col89 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col90 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col91 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col92 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col93 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col94 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col95 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col96 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col97 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col98 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
      col99 TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    END OF line.

  CREATE DATA rv_sample TYPE line.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_SRV.
  if MO_TREE_SRV is not bound.
    MO_TREE_SRV = OWNER->GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  endif.
  RESULT = MO_TREE_SRV.
endmethod.


  method get_t_table.

* content is rendered in the iterator
* this is only used to fill the excel or in tables for filtering!

    data: node      type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.

* check whether we have only a table are a table
    check during_excel_export eq abap_true or
          owner->is_table( ) eq abap_true or
          me->owner->get_comp_controller( )->typed_context->profile->get_tree_properties( )-allow_column_filter = abap_true or
* call getter if custom P/V-getters are implemented
          me->get_p_t_table(
            component   = component
            iv_index    = index
            iv_property = if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype ) <> |#|.



    try.

        node ?= get_node_by_index( index ).
        value = node->get_s_struct( component = component ).

        condense value.

        insert value #( index = index  component = component  value = value ) into table me->mt_cell_info.
        if sy-subrc <> 0.
          modify table me->mt_cell_info from value #( index = index  component = component  value = value ).
        endif.

      catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method  cx_sy_dyn_call_error cx_sy_ref_is_initial . " # EC NOHANDLER
    endtry.
  endmethod.                    "get_t_table


  method get_visible_root_node.

    field-symbols: <node> type ty_tree_node_rel.

    root_node = node.

    read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <node> with table key bo_node = node.
    if sy-subrc is initial and <node>-parent_bo_node is bound.
      root_node = get_visible_root_node( <node>-parent_bo_node ).
    endif.
  endmethod.                    "get_visible_root_node


  method get_v_t_table.

*   check implementation class
    data:
      lo_tree_node type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      lo_cust_exit type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh.

    field-symbols:
      <ls_tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    if iv_index > 0.
      lo_tree_node = me->get_node_by_index( iv_index ).
      read table me->tree_node_rel_tab assigning <ls_tree_node_rel> with key tree_node COMPONENTS tree_node = lo_tree_node. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_tree_node_rel>-bo_node is bound.
        try.
            lo_cust_exit ?= <ls_tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_cust_exit( ).
            rv_valuehelp_descriptor = lo_cust_exit->get_v_t_table(
                                        entity    = <ls_tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
                                        node      = <ls_tree_node_rel>-bo_node
                                        attr_name = |{ replace( val = component  sub = |COL| with = |COL_| ) }|
                                        hier      = <ls_tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_hier( )
                                        iv_index  = iv_index
                                        iv_mode   = iv_mode ).
          catch cx_root ##needed.
            clear rv_valuehelp_descriptor.
        endtry.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "GET_V_T_TABLE


  method has_node_siblings.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> with key tree_node COMPONENTS tree_node = node. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      loop at tree_node_rel_tab transporting no fields USING KEY parent_tree_node
        where parent_tree_node = <tree_node_rel>-parent_tree_node and
              tree_node <> node.                        "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
        result = abap_true.
        exit.
      endloop.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "has_node_siblings


  method has_virtual_root.

    data:
      tree_srv type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service.


    tree_srv = me->get_tree_srv( ).
    check tree_srv is bound.

    result = tree_srv->is_virtual_root_active( ).

  endmethod.                    "has_virtual_root


method if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_data_ref.

  if me->table is not bound.
    me->build_table( ).
  endif.

  value = super->if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_data_ref(
            attribute_ref  = attribute_ref
            attribute_path = attribute_path ).

endmethod.


method IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT.

  ME->OWNER ?= OWNER.

  if OWNER is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL.
    TREE_CONTROLLER = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL( OWNER ).
    MO_TREE_SRV = TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  endif.

  SUPER->IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT(
    ID    = ID
    OWNER = OWNER
  ).

  REGISTER_ROUNDTRIP_EVENTS( IV_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE ).

endmethod.                    "if_bsp_model~init


  method if_bsp_wd_model_tv_excel_exprt~get_data_xml.
* this method is processed during excel export after button was clicked
* method GET_T_TABLE is called to get the excel content
    during_excel_export = abap_true.

    rv_content_bin = super->if_bsp_wd_model_tv_excel_exprt~get_data_xml(
        iv_config_xml      = iv_config_xml
        iv_config_table    = iv_config_table
        iv_view_controller = iv_view_controller ).

    clear during_excel_export.

  endmethod.                    "if_bsp_wd_model_tv_excel_exprt~get_data_xml


method IF_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EH~ON_ROUNDTRIP_END ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EH~ON_ROUNDTRIP_START ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method INTERNAL_SET_NODE_SELECTED.

  if not IR_NODE->SELECTED = IV_SELECTED.

    IR_NODE->SELECTED = IV_SELECTED.

    if IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ) and OWNER->GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.

      " select all sub nodes if parent node has been selected
      " deselect all sub nodes if parent node has been deselected
      if IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_CHILDS is initial.
        data(LT_CHILD_NODES) = value BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_TAB(
          for <X> in TREE_NODE_REL_TAB
            using key PARENT_TREE_NODE
            where ( PARENT_TREE_NODE = IR_NODE )
          ( <X>-TREE_NODE )
        ).
        if LINES( LT_CHILD_NODES ) > 0.
          loop at LT_CHILD_NODES assigning field-symbol(<CHILD_NODE>).
            INTERNAL_SET_NODE_SELECTED(
              IR_NODE                   = <CHILD_NODE>
              IV_SELECTED               = IR_NODE->SELECTED
              IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_PARENT = ABAP_TRUE " Don't call me back
            ).
          endloop.
        endif.
      endif.

      " select parent node if all sub nodes have been selected
      " deselect parent node if a sub node has been deselected
      if IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_PARENT is initial.
        data(LR_PARENT_NODE) = GET_PARENT_NODE( IR_NODE = IR_NODE ).
        if LR_PARENT_NODE is bound.
          LT_CHILD_NODES = value BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_TAB(
            for <Y> in TREE_NODE_REL_TAB
              using key PARENT_TREE_NODE
              where ( PARENT_TREE_NODE = LR_PARENT_NODE )
            ( <Y>-TREE_NODE )
          ).
          if LINES( LT_CHILD_NODES ) > 0.
            INTERNAL_SET_NODE_SELECTED(
              IR_NODE                   = LR_PARENT_NODE
              IV_SELECTED               = BOOLC( not LINE_EXISTS( LT_CHILD_NODES[ TABLE_LINE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE ] ) )
              IV_SUPPRESS_UPDATE_CHILDS = ABAP_TRUE " Don't call me back
            ).
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.

    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method INTERNAL_UPDATE_FOCUS_COL.

  if FOCUS_COL is bound.

    if IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).

      FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~CLEAR( ).

    elseif IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( ) or IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).

      data(LR_TREE_NODE) = FOCUS_COL->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
      while LR_TREE_NODE is bound.
        if not LINE_EXISTS( FSELECTED_TREE_NODES[ TABLE_LINE = LR_TREE_NODE ] ).
          FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( IV_BO = LR_TREE_NODE ).
          LR_TREE_NODE = FOCUS_COL->GET_CURRENT_NODE( ).
          continue.
        endif.
        LR_TREE_NODE = FOCUS_COL->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
      endwhile.
      loop at FSELECTED_TREE_NODES assigning field-symbol(<SELECTED_TREE_NODE>).
        FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( IV_ENTITY = <SELECTED_TREE_NODE> ).
        " FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <SELECTED_TREE_NODE> ).
      endloop.
      " FOCUS_COL enthält außschließlich selektierte Tree Nodes.
      " Warum diese noch markiert werden müssen weiß wohl nur Gott.
      FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK_ALL( ).

    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method INT_GETTER.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  VALUE = |ValueNode { GET_MODEL_ID( ) case = upper } not bound| ##NO_TEXT.

  " get current entity
  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  " get old value and dataref to appropriate type
  try.
      data(DREF) = LR_CURRENT->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.
      return.
  endtry.

  " assure that attribue exists
  if DREF is not bound.
    VALUE = |ValueNode { GET_MODEL_ID( )  case = upper }/{ IV_ATTR_NAME  case = upper } not bound| ##NO_TEXT.
    return.
  endif.

  try.
      VALUE = IF_BSP_MODEL_UTIL~CONVERT_TO_STRING(
        ATTRIBUTE_PATH = ATTRIBUTE_PATH
        DATA_REF       = DREF
      ).
    catch CX_BSP_CONV_ILLEGAL_REF.
*      field-symbols: <L_DATA> type DATA.
*      assign DREF->* to <L_DATA>.
      VALUE = '-CURR/QUANT REF DATA MISSING-' ##NO_TEXT.
    catch CX_ROOT.
      VALUE = '-CONVERSION FAILED-' ##NO_TEXT.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method INT_H_GETTER.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  RV_HIDDEN = ABAP_FALSE.

  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  try.
      RV_HIDDEN = LR_CURRENT->IS_PROPERTY_HIDDEN( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.
      return.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method INT_I_GETTER.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  RV_DISABLED = 'TRUE' ##NO_TEXT.

  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  try.
      if LR_CURRENT->IS_PROPERTY_READONLY( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ) = ABAP_FALSE ##NO_TEXT.
        RV_DISABLED = 'FALSE' ##NO_TEXT.
      endif.
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.
      return.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method INT_M_GETTER.
  data:
    LR_DATA type ref to DATA,
    LV_PATH type STRING value 'LR_DATA->*' ##NO_TEXT.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial or IV_TYPE_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  data(LV_ATTR_NAME) = TO_UPPER( VAL = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  data(LV_TYPE_NAME) = TO_UPPER( VAL = IV_TYPE_NAME ).

  if LV_TYPE_NAME na '-' ##NO_TEXT.
    create data LR_DATA type (LV_TYPE_NAME).
  else.
    split LV_TYPE_NAME at '-' into data(LV_STRUCTURENAME) data(LV_FIELDNAME) ##NO_TEXT.
    create data LR_DATA type (LV_STRUCTURENAME).
    LV_PATH = |LR_DATA->{ LV_FIELDNAME }| ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.
  assign (LV_PATH) to field-symbol(<DATA>).

  METADATA ?= IF_BSP_MODEL_BINDING~GET_ATTRIBUTE_METADATA(
    ATTRIBUTE_REF  = ref #( <DATA> )
    ATTRIBUTE_PATH = ATTRIBUTE_PATH
    NAME           = LV_ATTR_NAME
    NO_GETTER      = 1
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.

method INT_P_GETTER_TREE_COLUMN.
  GET_TREE_SRV( )->GET_COLUMN_PROPERTY(
    IV_COLUMN_NAME  = IV_COLUMN_NAME
    IV_PROPERTY     = IV_PROPERTY
    IV_INDEX        = IV_INDEX
    IV_DISPLAY_MODE = IV_DISPLAY_MODE
  ).
endmethod.


method INT_SETTER.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  data: COPY type ref to DATA.

  field-symbols:
    <NVAL> type ANY,
    <OVAL> type ANY.

  " get current entity
  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  " get old value and dataref to appropriate type
  try.
      data(DREF) = LR_CURRENT->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.
      return.
  endtry.

  " assure that attribue exists
  check DREF is bound.

  " set <oval> to old value
  assign DREF->* to <OVAL>.
  " create a copy for new value
  create data COPY like <OVAL>.
  " set <nval> to new value
  assign COPY->* to <NVAL>.

  " fill new value using the right conversion
  try.
      IF_BSP_MODEL_UTIL~CONVERT_FROM_STRING(
        DATA_REF       = COPY
        VALUE          = VALUE
        ATTRIBUTE_PATH = ATTRIBUTE_PATH
      ).
    catch CX_SY_CONVERSION_ERROR.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_CONV_FAILED
        exporting
          NAME = conv #( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  endtry.

  " only set new value if value has changed
  if <NVAL> <> <OVAL>.
    LR_CURRENT->SET_PROPERTY(
      IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
      IV_VALUE     = <NVAL>
    ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method INT_STRUCTURE_GETTER.

  clear VALUE.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  " get current entity
  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  LR_CURRENT->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE(
    exporting
      IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
    importing
      EV_RESULT    = VALUE
  ).

endmethod.


method INT_STRUCTURE_SETTER.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  " get current entity
  if ITERATOR is bound.
    data(LR_CURRENT) = ITERATOR->GET_CURRENT( ).
  else.
    LR_CURRENT = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
  endif.

  if LR_CURRENT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  LR_CURRENT->SET_PROPERTY(
    IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
    IV_VALUE     = VALUE
  ).

endmethod.
