method IS_ALL_SELECTED.
  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    RV_ALL_IS_SELECTED = FALLNODESSELECTED.
  else.
    RV_ALL_IS_SELECTED = SUPER->IS_ALL_SELECTED( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


  method is_node_hidden.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    read table tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> with key tree_node COMPONENTS tree_node = node. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      result = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->is_hidden( ).
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "is_node_hidden


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_MULTIEDIT or SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_MULTI ).
endmethod.


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_NONE ).
endmethod.


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_LINEEDIT or SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_SINGLE ).
endmethod.


method IS_UPDATE_MODE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT > 0 ).
endmethod.


method IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( FUSENEWSELECTION is not initial ).
endmethod.


  method is_virtual_root_possible.

    data:
      index type sytabix,
      node  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      bo    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


    index = me->selected_index.
    node ?= me->get_node_by_index( index ).
    check node is bound.

    bo ?= me->get_bo( node->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key ).
    check bo->is_hidden( ) = abap_false and
          bo->is_virtual_root( ) = abap_false and
          bo->get_visible_parent_node( ) is bound.

    result = abap_true.

  endmethod.                    "is_virtual_root_possible


method LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE.
  if IS_UPDATE_MODE( ).
    FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT = FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT - 1.
  endif.
  LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC( ).
endmethod.


method LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
*  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
*    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
*  endif.
endmethod.


  method on_new_focus.

    if not focus_bo is bound.
      set handler me->on_new_focus for sender activation abap_false.
    elseif focus_bo->alive( ) = abap_true.
      focus_bo->set_focus( abap_true ).
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "on_new_focus


  method on_new_focus_col_focus.

    data:
      node01 type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.


    if focus_bo is bound and focus_bo->alive( ) = abap_false.
      return.
    endif.

    node01 ?= me->get_node_by_bo( focus_bo ).

    insert node01 into table me->published_new_focus_nodes.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      raise event new_focus_node exporting node = node01.
      delete table me->published_new_focus_nodes with table key table_line = node01.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "on_new_focus_col_focus


method on_tree_node_deleted.

  delete table tree_node_rel_tab with table key bo_node = sender.

* if the tree node was a virtual root node we reset the tree to the next level
  try.
      if sender->is_virtual_root( ) = abap_true.
        me->owner->eh_onreset( io_tree_node = sender ).
      endif.
    catch cx_root  ##no_handler  ##catch_all.
  endtry.

endmethod.                    "on_tree_node_deleted


method REFRESH.

  data:
    BO type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS.

  field-symbols:
    <TREE_NODE_REL> type TY_TREE_NODE_REL.

  if 1 = 2. " needed to get the tree proxy node in the workbench
    ME->NODE_FACTORY->GET_PROXY(
      IV_BO         = BO
      IV_PROXY_TYPE = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01' ).
    ME->NODE_FACTORY->GET_PROXY(
      IV_BO         = BO
      IV_PROXY_TYPE = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE' ).
  endif.

  RESET_NODE_MAPPER( ).

  clear NODE_TAB.
  clear MO_TREE_SRV.

  " reset IS_LEAF-flag where necessary
  loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <TREE_NODE_REL>
    where BO_NODE is bound and
          TREE_NODE is bound and
          TREE_NODE->IS_LEAF = ABAP_TRUE.               "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <TREE_NODE_REL>-TREE_NODE->IS_LEAF = <TREE_NODE_REL>-BO_NODE->IS_LEAF = ABAP_FALSE.
  endloop.

  clear TREE_NODE_REL_TAB.

  " loop over the root objects -> type must be tree node (CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE)
  if COLLECTION_WRAPPER is bound and COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SIZE( ) > 0.
    try.
        data(LR_COLLECTION) = COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_COPY( ).
        if LR_COLLECTION is bound.

          if SORT_STATE is not initial.
            LR_COLLECTION->SORT(
              IV_ATTR_NAME  = SORT_STATE-SORT_ATTR
              IV_SORT_ORDER = SORT_STATE-SORT_ORDER
            ).
          endif.

          data(LT_ROOTS) = GET_NODES_FROM_COL(
            COL          = LR_COLLECTION
            NODE_FACTORY = NODE_FACTORY
          ).

          loop at LT_ROOTS into data(LR_ROOT).
            LR_ROOT->NODE_KEY = ADD_ROOT_NODE( IV_NODE = LR_ROOT ).
          endloop.

        endif.
      catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL ##NO_HANDLER.
    endtry.
  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.                    "refresh


method REGISTER_ROUNDTRIP_EVENTS ##NEEDED.
  if FUSE_ROUNDTRIP_EVENT is not initial.
    data(LR_MNGR) = CL_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EVENT_MGR=>GET_CURRENT( ).
    if IV_ACTIVE is not initial.
      LR_MNGR->REGISTER_EH( ME ).
    else.
      LR_MNGR->DEREGISTER_EH( ME ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


  method reset_virtual_root.

    data:
      col type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col,
      bo  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


    if io_tree_node is bound.
      bo = io_tree_node.
    else.
      col ?= me->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
      check col is bound.

      bo = col->get_current_node( ).
    endif.

    if all = abap_true.
      while bo is bound.
        bo->set_virtual_root( abap_false ).
        bo = bo->get_parent_node( ).
      endwhile.
    else.
      if bo is bound.
        bo->set_virtual_root( abap_false ).
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "reset_virtual_root


  method restore_selection_on_active.
    data: bo      type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
        node    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
        lr_iter type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator.


*   focus collection has to be instantiated before
    if me->focus_col is not bound.
      return.  "re-selection not possible
    endif.

    if selection_mode eq selmode_multi.
    lr_iter = ir_col->get_iterator( ).
    bo = lr_iter->get_first( ).
      while bo is bound.
        node ?= get_node_by_entity( bo ).
        if node is bound.
          node->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~selected = abap_true.

          if sy-subrc is initial.
            me->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~add( node->bo ).
          endif.
        endif.

      bo = lr_iter->get_next( ).
      endwhile.
    me->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col_multi_sel~mark_all( ).

    else.
      bo = ir_col->get_current( ).
      node ?= get_node_by_entity( bo ).
      if node is bound.
        deselect_all( ).
        node->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~selected = abap_true.

        focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).
        focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~add( node->bo ).

      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "restore_selection_on_active


  method save_tree.

    data: tx_node type ref to if_bol_transaction_context,
          tx_col type ref to cl_crm_bol_custom_tx_ctxt,
          lv_success type abap_bool.

    field-symbols:
      <tree_node_rel> type ty_tree_node_rel.


    create object tx_col.

    loop at tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel>.

      tx_node = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_transaction( ).

      tx_col->add_tx_context( tx_node ).

    endloop.

    if tx_col->if_bol_transaction_context~check_save_needed( ) eq abap_true.

      if tx_col->if_bol_transaction_context~check_save_possible( ) eq abap_true.

        lv_success = tx_col->if_bol_transaction_context~save( ).

        if lv_success eq 'X'.
          tx_col->if_bol_transaction_context~commit( ).
        else.
          tx_col->if_bol_transaction_context~revert( ).
        endif.

      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "save_tree


method SELECT_ALL.

  SUPER->SELECT_ALL( ).

  DO_SELECT_ALL( ).

endmethod.


method SETUP_TREE_NODE_PROXY.
  IR_TREE_NODE_PROXY->TREE_CN00 = ME.
  IR_TREE_NODE_PROXY->INITIALIZE( ).
endmethod.


method SET_NODE_SELECTED.
  INTERNAL_SET_NODE_SELECTED(
    IR_NODE     = IR_NODE
    IV_SELECTED = IV_SELECTED
  ).
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES.
  if not SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_SPEC(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_ENTITIES
    IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
    IT_NODE_IDS   = IT_NODE_IDS
  ).
    SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL(
      IR_COLLECTION = IR_ENTITIES
      IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
      IT_NODE_IDS   = IT_NODE_IDS
    ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL.

  if IV_APPEND is initial. " or IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
    DESELECT_ALL( ).
  endif.

*  if not IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
  if IR_COLLECTION is bound and IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) > 0.
    data(LR_ENTITY) = IR_COLLECTION->GET_FIRST( ).
    while LR_ENTITY is bound.
      loop at TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<NODE_RELATION>) using key BO_ENTITY
        where BO_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY.
        if IT_NODE_IDS is initial
          or LINE_EXISTS( IT_NODE_IDS[ TABLE_LINE = <NODE_RELATION>-BO_NODE->GET_NODE_ID( ) ] ).
          SET_NODE_SELECTED(
            IR_NODE     = <NODE_RELATION>-TREE_NODE
            IV_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE
          ).
        endif.
      endloop.
      LR_ENTITY = IR_COLLECTION->GET_NEXT( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.
*  endif.

  if FUSENEWSELECTION is not initial.
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES.
  if not SET_SELECTED_NODES_SPEC(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
  ).
    SET_SELECTED_NODES_INTERNAL(
      IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
      IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
    ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES_INTERNAL.

  data LR_TREE_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.

  if IV_APPEND is initial." or IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
    DESELECT_ALL( ).
  endif.

  data(LR_CONVERT) = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_CONV=>GET_INSTANCE( IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION ).
  data(LR_COLLECTION) = LR_CONVERT->GET_AS_BO_COLLECTION( ).

*  if not IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
  if LR_COLLECTION is bound and LR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) > 0.
    data(LR_ITERATOR) = LR_COLLECTION->GET_ITERATOR( ).
    if LR_ITERATOR is bound.
      LR_TREE_NODE = cast #( LR_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ) ).
      while LR_TREE_NODE is bound.
        SET_NODE_SELECTED(
          IR_NODE     = TREE_NODE_REL_TAB[ BO_NODE = LR_TREE_NODE ]-TREE_NODE
          IV_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE
        ).
        LR_TREE_NODE = cast #( LR_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ) ).
      endwhile.
    endif.
  endif.
*  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTION_MODE.
  data(LV_SELECTION_MODE_OLD) = SELECTION_MODE.
  SUPER->SET_SELECTION_MODE( IV_SELECTION_MODE ).
  data(LV_SELECTION_MODE_CHANGED) = XSDBOOL( LV_SELECTION_MODE_OLD <> IV_SELECTION_MODE and SELECTION_MODE = IV_SELECTION_MODE ).
  if IV_SELECTION_MODE ne SELMODE_SINGLE.
    create object FOCUS_COL.
    ME->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~SET_MULTI_SELECT( ).
  endif.

  if LV_SELECTION_MODE_CHANGED is not initial.
*    DO_CLEAR_SELECTION( ).
  endif.

  if IS_USE_NEW_SELECTION( ).
    DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  endif.

endmethod.                    "set_selection_mode


  method set_t_table.

    field-symbols <ls_cell_info> type gty_cell_info.
    read table me->mt_cell_info assigning <ls_cell_info> with table key index = index component = component.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_cell_info>-value = value.
      return.
    endif.

    data: node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.
    try.
        node ?= get_node_by_index( index ).

        node->set_s_struct( component = component value = value ).

      catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method  cx_sy_dyn_call_error  .
    endtry.
  endmethod.                    "set_t_table


  method set_virtual_root.

    data:
      node_bo type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      node_   type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.


    node_ ?= node.
    check node_ is bound and node_->bo is bound.

    node_bo ?= node_->bo.

    node_bo->set_virtual_root( abap_true ).

  endmethod.                    "set_virtual_root


  method update_focus_col.
* never execute for multi selection
    check me->selection_mode ne me->selmode_multi.

    data:
      node01 type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.


    if me->focus_col is bound.
      set handler me->on_new_focus_col_focus for me->focus_col activation abap_false.
    endif.

    if node is supplied.
      node01 ?= node.
      me->focus_col = me->get_siblings_col( node01 ).
    else.
      clear me->focus_col.
    endif.

    raise event new_focus_node exporting node = node01.

    if me->focus_col is bound.
      set handler me->on_new_focus_col_focus for me->focus_col activation abap_true.
    endif.

  endmethod.                    "update_focus_col
ENDCLASS.


class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE_PROXY
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CONTROLLER
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_TREE_VIEW
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_NODE_PROXY .

  methods INITIALIZE .
  methods GET_S_STRUCT
    importing
      !COMPONENT type STRING
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_S_STRUCT
    importing
      !COMPONENT type STRING
      value(VALUE) type STRING .

  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~COLLAPS_NODE
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~EXPAND_NODE
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_CHILDREN
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_ICON
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_ICON_TOOLTIP
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_NODE_NAME
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~IS_EXPANDED
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data TREE_CN00 type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00 .
private section.

  class-data GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING type hashed table of string with unique key table_line.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method get_s_struct.

  data: col_name type name_komp.

  clear value.

  col_name = component.

  value = me->bo->get_property_as_string( col_name ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~collaps_node.

  data:
    bo type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.

  bo ?= me->bo.

  if bo->has_children( ) eq abap_true.

    super->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~collaps_node( ).

    bo->set_expanded( me->node_expanded ).

  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~expand_node.

  data:
    bo type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  super->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~expand_node( ).

  bo ?= me->bo.

  bo->set_expanded( me->node_expanded ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~get_children.

  data:
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    ent type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  ent ?= me->bo.

  col = ent->get_child_nodes( ).

  if col is bound and col->size( ) > 0.

    if is_sort_wish is not initial.
      col->sort(
        iv_attr_name  = is_sort_wish-sort_attr
        iv_sort_order = is_sort_wish-sort_order ).
    endif.

    rt_children = tree_cn00->get_nodes_from_col(
                    col          = col
                    parent_node  = me
                    node_factory = me->node_factory ).

  endif.

  if rt_children is initial.
    me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~is_leaf = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~get_icon.

*Icon is rendered in Iterator

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~get_icon_tooltip.
* content is rendered in the iterator
endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_NODE_NAME.
*CALL METHOD SUPER->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_NODE_NAME
**  EXPORTING
**    ATTRIBUTE_PATH =
*  RECEIVING
*    VALUE          =
*    .
endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~is_expanded.

  data:
    ent          type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    ls_hier      type crm_isutree_hier,
    lv_num_roots type i.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_tree_node_rel> like line of me->tree_cn00->tree_node_rel_tab.


* check for "expand all"
  if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding is not initial.
    read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding transporting no fields
      with table key table_line = me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
*     check if node is blocked for "Expand All"
      ent ?= me->bo.
      if ent is bound and ( ent->hier-max_children = 889 or ent->hier-max_siblings = 889 ).
*       the node must not be expanded if it was not visible before expanding
        read table tree_cn00->mt_visible_nodes_before_expand transporting no fields
          with key node_key = me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key binary search.
        if sy-subrc <> 0.
          rv_expanded = me->node_expanded.
          return.
        endif.
      endif.
      me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~expand_node( ).
      rv_expanded = me->node_expanded.
      return.
    else.
*     check parent node
      try.
          ent ?= me->bo.
          if ent is bound.
*           check if node is blocked for "Expand All"
            if ent->hier-max_children = 889 or ent->hier-max_siblings = 889.
*             the node must not be expanded if it was not visible before expanding
              read table tree_cn00->mt_visible_nodes_before_expand transporting no fields
                with key node_key = me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key binary search.
              if sy-subrc <> 0.
                rv_expanded = me->node_expanded.
                return.
              endif.
            endif.
            read table me->tree_cn00->tree_node_rel_tab assigning <ls_tree_node_rel>
              with table key bo_node = ent.
            if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_tree_node_rel>-parent_tree_node is bound.
              read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding transporting no fields
                with table key table_line = <ls_tree_node_rel>-parent_tree_node->node_key.
              if sy-subrc = 0.
                me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~expand_node( ).
                insert me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
                rv_expanded = me->node_expanded.
                return.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
      endtry.
    endif.
  endif.

  if me->tree_cn00 is bound.
    lv_num_roots = me->tree_cn00->collection_wrapper->size( ).
  endif.

  ent ?= me->bo.

  me->node_expanded = ent->is_expanded( lv_num_roots ).

  rv_expanded = me->node_expanded.

endmethod.


method INITIALIZE ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method set_s_struct.
  data:
     current  type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
     col_name type name_komp,
     dref     type ref to data,
     copy     type ref to data.

  field-symbols:
    <nval> type any,
    <oval> type any.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type


  current = me->bo.

  col_name = component.

  replace 'COL' with 'COL_' into col_name.

  concatenate col_name '_EDIT' into col_name.

  try.
      try.
          dref = current->get_property( col_name ).         "#EC NOTEXT
        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
      endtry.

    catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      return.
  endtry.


*   assure that attribue exists
  check dref is bound.

*   set <oval> to old value
  assign dref->* to <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
  create data copy like <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
  assign copy->* to <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
  try.
      call method if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
        exporting
          data_ref = copy
          value    = value.
    catch cx_sy_conversion_error.
      raise exception type cx_bsp_conv_failed
        exporting
          name = ''.                                "#EC NOTEXT
  endtry.

*   only set new value if value has changed
  if <nval> <> <oval>.

    current->set_property(
                    iv_attr_name = col_name             "#EC NOTEXT
                    iv_value     = <nval> ).

  endif.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN02 definition

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN03 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

public section.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value '' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE
    for event NEW_FOCUS_NODE of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00
    importing
      !NODE
      !SENDER .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN03
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN03 IMPLEMENTATION.


method on_new_focus_node.

  me->collection_wrapper->set_collection(
    iv_collection        = sender->focus_col
    iv_try_to_keep_focus = abap_false ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method on_new_focus_node.

  data:
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


* fill sub object col
  if node is bound.
    col = sender->get_children_col( node ).

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN06 IMPLEMENTATION.


method on_new_focus_node.

  data:
    parent type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
    col    type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


* fill parent collection
  if node is bound.
    parent ?= sender->get_node_by_child( node ).
    if parent is bound and parent->bo is bound.
      create object col type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.
      col->add( parent->bo ).
    endif.
  endif.

  me->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN07 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

public section.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value '' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE
    for event NEW_FOCUS_NODE of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00
    importing
      !NODE
      !SENDER .

  methods IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT
    redefinition .
protected section.

  data MO_OWNER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN07
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN07 IMPLEMENTATION.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  super->if_bsp_model~init(
   id     = id
   owner  = owner ).

  me->mo_owner ?= owner.

endmethod.


method on_new_focus_node.

  data:
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


* check if node is requested by outer component
  if me->mo_owner->get_comp_controller( )->typed_context->allsubobjects->is_requested_by_using_comp( ) = abap_false.
    return.
  endif.

* fill all sub object col
  if node is bound.
    col = sender->get_all_children_col( node ).
  endif.

  me->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN09 IMPLEMENTATION.


method destroy.

  super->destroy( ).

  clear me->isuboltree.

endmethod.


method GET_AC_T_TABLE.
* within this tree no ac getters are defined
"# EC NEEDED
endmethod.


method GET_A_T_TABLE.
* within this tree no a getters are defined

* within this tree no i getters are defined

endmethod.


method GET_M_T_TABLE.
* within this tree no m getters are defined
  "# EC NEEDED
endmethod.


method GET_P_T_TABLE.
* within this tree no p getters are defined

  if iv_property eq if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter~fp_fieldtype.
    rv_value = '#'. "Undefined Fieldtype! -> cell content is rendered in own iterator!
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_table_line_sample.
  types:
  begin of line,
    col1 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col2 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col3 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col4 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col5 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col6 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col7 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col8 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col9 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col10 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col11 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col12 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col13 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col14 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col15 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col16 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col17 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col18 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col19 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
    col20 type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_title,
  end of line.

  create data rv_sample type line.
endmethod.


method GET_T_TABLE.
* content is rendered in the iterator
" # EC NEEDED
endmethod.


method GET_V_T_TABLE.
* within this tree no v getters are defined
"# EC NEEDED
endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_model_tv_excel_exprt~get_data_xml.

  rv_content_bin = isuboltree->if_bsp_wd_model_tv_excel_exprt~get_data_xml(
      iv_config_xml      = iv_config_xml
      iv_config_table    = iv_config_table
      iv_view_controller = iv_view_controller ).
endmethod.


method set_t_table.

  isuboltree->set_t_table(
    attribute_path = attribute_path
    index          = index
    component      = component
    value          = value ).

endmethod.


method use_table.

  me->isuboltree = isuboltree.

  set_collection( isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ) ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CONVERS definition
  public
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CONVERS
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  class-methods CONVERSION_2007 .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CONVERS
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CONVERS
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CONVERS IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONVERSION_2007.
  check 1 eq 2.
  data: lt_pres      type table of crm_isutree_pres,
        lt_prof      type table of crm_isutree_prof,
        lt_prot      type table of crm_isutree_prot,
        ls_pres      type crm_isutree_pres,
        ls_prof      type crm_isutree_prof,
        ls_prot      type crm_isutree_prot,
        ls_pcol      type crm_isutree_pcol,
        ls_pcot      type crm_isutree_pcot,
        lv_pres_id   type crmt_pres_id,
        lv_bol_type  type crmt_ext_obj_name,
        ls_col       type crm_isutree_prco,

        lv_new_lines    type i,
        lv_old_lines_changed type i.

  delete from crm_isutree_prco.  "#EC CI_NOWHERE
  delete from crm_isutree_pcol.  "#EC CI_NOWHERE
  delete from crm_isutree_pcot.  "#EC CI_NOWHERE

  select * from crm_isutree_pres into table lt_pres.

  loop at lt_pres into ls_pres.
    lv_pres_id  = ls_pres-pres_id.
    lv_bol_type = ls_pres-bol_typ.

    clear ls_pres-mandt.
    clear ls_pres-pres_id.
    clear ls_pres-bol_typ.

* there are some values in the old structure -> save them to the new table
    if ls_pres is not initial.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 1
**************************************************************************************
      ls_col-col_path_a    = ls_pres-col_1.
      ls_col-col_path_b    = ls_pres-col_1a.
      ls_col-col_path_c    = ls_pres-col_1b.
      ls_col-col_path_edit = ls_pres-col_1_edit.
      ls_col-flag_edit     = ls_pres-flag_1_edit.
      ls_col-col_img       = ls_pres-col_1_img.
      ls_col-col_link      = ls_pres-col_1_link.
      ls_col-col_link_id   = ls_pres-col_1_link_id.

      if ls_col is not initial.
        ls_col-pres_id       = lv_pres_id.
        ls_col-col_id        = 1.
        insert into crm_isutree_prco values ls_col.
        if sy-subrc eq 0.
          add 1 to lv_new_lines.
        endif.
        clear ls_col.
      endif.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 2
**************************************************************************************
      ls_col-col_path_a    = ls_pres-col_2.
      ls_col-col_path_b    = ls_pres-col_2a.
      ls_col-col_path_c    = ls_pres-col_2b.
      ls_col-col_path_edit = ls_pres-col_2_edit.
      ls_col-flag_edit     = ls_pres-flag_2_edit.
      ls_col-col_img       = ls_pres-col_2_img.
      ls_col-col_link      = ls_pres-col_2_link.
      ls_col-col_link_id   = ls_pres-col_2_link_id.

      if ls_col is not initial.
        ls_col-pres_id       = lv_pres_id.
        ls_col-col_id        = 2.
        insert into crm_isutree_prco values ls_col.
        if sy-subrc eq 0.
          add 1 to lv_new_lines.
        endif.
        clear ls_col.
      endif.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 3
**************************************************************************************
      ls_col-col_path_a    = ls_pres-col_3.
      ls_col-col_path_b    = ls_pres-col_3a.
      ls_col-col_path_c    = ls_pres-col_3b.
      ls_col-col_path_edit = ls_pres-col_3_edit.
      ls_col-flag_edit     = ls_pres-flag_3_edit.
      ls_col-col_img       = ls_pres-col_3_img.
      ls_col-col_link      = ls_pres-col_3_link.
      ls_col-col_link_id   = ls_pres-col_3_link_id.

      if ls_col is not initial.
        ls_col-pres_id       = lv_pres_id.
        ls_col-col_id        = 3.
        insert into crm_isutree_prco values ls_col.
        if sy-subrc eq 0.
          add 1 to lv_new_lines.
        endif.
        clear ls_col.
      endif.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 4
**************************************************************************************
      ls_col-col_path_a    = ls_pres-col_4.
      ls_col-col_path_b    = ls_pres-col_4a.
      ls_col-col_path_c    = ls_pres-col_4b.
      ls_col-col_path_edit = ls_pres-col_4_edit.
      ls_col-flag_edit     = ls_pres-flag_4_edit.
      ls_col-col_img       = ls_pres-col_4_img.
      ls_col-col_link      = ls_pres-col_4_link.
      ls_col-col_link_id   = ls_pres-col_4_link_id.

      if ls_col is not initial.
        ls_col-pres_id       = lv_pres_id.
        ls_col-col_id        = 4.
        insert into crm_isutree_prco values ls_col.
        if sy-subrc eq 0.
          add 1 to lv_new_lines.
        endif.
        clear ls_col.
      endif.

* update old structure
      clear ls_pres.
      ls_pres-pres_id = lv_pres_id.
      ls_pres-bol_typ = lv_bol_type.
*      update crm_isutree_pres from ls_pres.
      if sy-subrc eq 0.
        add 1 to lv_old_lines_changed.
      endif.

    endif.
  endloop.

  data: msg_txt type string,
      i1      type string,
      i2      type string.
  i1 = lv_new_lines.
  i2 = lv_old_lines_changed.
  concatenate i1 ' new lines created; ' i2 ' old lines adjusted' into msg_txt. "#EC NOTEXT
  message msg_txt type 'I'.



  select * from crm_isutree_prof into table lt_prof.
  select * from crm_isutree_prot into table lt_prot.

  loop at lt_prof into ls_prof.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 1
**************************************************************************************
    clear ls_pcol.
    clear ls_pcot.
* fill profile column
    ls_pcol-prof_id = ls_pcot-prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
    ls_pcol-col_id  = ls_pcot-col_id  = 1.
    ls_pcol-width   = ls_prof-col_1_size.
    ls_pcol-hidden  = abap_false." first column is never hidden

* fill text table
    if ls_pcol-hidden eq abap_false.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
    endif.
    loop at lt_prot into ls_prot where prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
      ls_pcot-title    = ls_prot-name_col1.
      ls_pcot-language = ls_prot-language.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcot values ls_pcot.
    endloop.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 2
**************************************************************************************
    clear ls_pcol.
    clear ls_pcot.
* fill profile column
    ls_pcol-prof_id = ls_pcot-prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
    ls_pcol-col_id  = ls_pcot-col_id  = 2.
    ls_pcol-width   = ls_prof-col_2_size.
    ls_pcol-hidden  = ls_prof-col2_hidden.

* fill text table
    if ls_pcol-hidden eq abap_false.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
    endif.
    loop at lt_prot into ls_prot where prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
      ls_pcot-title    = ls_prot-name_col2.
      ls_pcot-language = ls_prot-language.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcot values ls_pcot.
    endloop.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 3
**************************************************************************************
    clear ls_pcol.
    clear ls_pcot.
* fill profile column
    ls_pcol-prof_id = ls_pcot-prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
    ls_pcol-col_id  = ls_pcot-col_id  = 3.
    ls_pcol-width   = ls_prof-col_3_size.
    ls_pcol-hidden  = ls_prof-col3_hidden.

* fill text table
    if ls_pcol-hidden eq abap_false.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
    endif.
    loop at lt_prot into ls_prot where prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
      ls_pcot-title    = ls_prot-name_col3.
      ls_pcot-language = ls_prot-language.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcot values ls_pcot.
    endloop.

**************************************************************************************
** Column 4
**************************************************************************************
    clear ls_pcol.
    clear ls_pcot.
* fill profile column
    ls_pcol-prof_id = ls_pcot-prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
    ls_pcol-col_id  = ls_pcot-col_id  = 4.
    ls_pcol-width   = ls_prof-col_4_size.
    ls_pcol-hidden  = ls_prof-col4_hidden.

* fill text table
    if ls_pcol-hidden eq abap_false.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
    endif.
    loop at lt_prot into ls_prot where prof_id = ls_prof-prof_id.
      ls_pcot-title    = ls_prot-name_col4.
      ls_pcot-language = ls_prot-language.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcol values ls_pcol.
      insert into crm_isutree_pcot values ls_pcot.
    endloop.

  endloop.

  commit work.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CONTEXT .

  constants C_DEFAULT_TREE_CONTEXT_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME value 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SELECTEDNODES type STRING value 'SELECTEDNODES' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_ISUBOLTREE type STRING value 'ISUBOLTREE' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_ROOTOBJECTS type STRING value 'ROOTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_FOCUSOBJECTS type STRING value 'FOCUSOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SUBOBJECTS type STRING value 'SUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_FILTEROBJECTS type STRING value 'FILTEROBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_PARENTOBJECTS type STRING value 'PARENTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS type STRING value 'ALLSUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_TRANSACTION type STRING value 'TRANSACTION' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SELECTEDENTITIES type STRING value 'SELECTEDENTITIES' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_TREE_STATE type STRING value 'tree_state' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_SELECTION_MODE type STRING value 'selection_mode' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_PROFILE type STRING value 'profile' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_FOCUS_NODE_IDS type STRING value 'focus_node_ids' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_FOCUS_COL type STRING value 'focus_col' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_FILTER_FLAGS type STRING value 'filter_deactivated_by_user' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_SI_ROOT_COL type STRING value 'root_col' ##NO_TEXT.
  data SELECTEDNODES type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN10 read-only .
  data ISUBOLTREE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00 read-only .
  data ROOTOBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN02 read-only .
  data FOCUSOBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN03 read-only .
  data SUBOBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN04 read-only .
  data FILTEROBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN05 read-only .
  data PARENTOBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN06 read-only .
  data ALLSUBOBJECTS type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN07 read-only .
  data TRANSACTION type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN08 read-only .
  data TREE_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL read-only .
  data SELECTEDENTITIES type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN11 read-only .

  methods IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE~STATE_RESTORE
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE~STATE_STORE
    redefinition .
  methods INITIALIZE
    redefinition .
protected section.

  types:
    TT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS type standard table of CHAR10 with default key.

  methods GET_TREE_CONTROLLER
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  methods IS_STATE_CONTAINER_ITEM_EXISTS
    importing
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT
      !IV_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods CREATE_SELECTEDENTITIES .
  methods STORE_TREE_STATE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods STORE_SELECTION_MODE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods STORE_PROFILE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods STORE_FOCUS_NODE_IDS
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods STORE_FOCUS_COL
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods STORE_FILTER_FLAGS
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods CREATE_SELECTEDNODES .
  methods RESTORE_TREE_STATE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods RESTORE_SELECTION_MODE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods RESTORE_ROOT_COL
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods RESTORE_PROFILE
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods RESTORE_FOCUS_COL
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods RESTORE_FILTER_FLAGS
    importing
      !IV_STATE_ID type I
      !IR_STATE_CONTAINER type ref to IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE_CONT .
  methods INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL
    importing
      !CLASS_NAME type SEOCLSNAME
      !MODEL_ID type STRING
    returning
      value(MODEL_INSTANCE) type ref to CL_BSP_MODEL .
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
  methods CREATE_PARENTOBJECTS .
  methods CREATE_FOCUSOBJECTS .
  methods CREATE_ISUBOLTREE .
  methods CREATE_ROOTOBJECTS .
  methods CREATE_SUBOBJECTS .
  methods CREATE_FILTEROBJECTS .
  methods CREATE_TRANSACTION .
  methods CREATE_ALLSUBOBJECTS .
  methods GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN03 .
  methods GET_TREE_PROPERTIES
    returning
      value(RS_RESULT) type CRM_ISUTREE_TREE_PROPERTIES .

  methods CONNECT_NODES
    redefinition .
  methods CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


  method CONNECT_NODES.

    data:
      OWNER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL.

    set handler ME->SUBOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for ME->ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.
    set handler ME->ALLSUBOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for ME->ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.
    set handler ME->PARENTOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for ME->ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.

* register event handler for focus objects after subobjects to ensure that dependent nodes
* get filled before publishing of new focus node to outside
    set handler ME->FOCUSOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for ME->ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.

    OWNER ?= ME->OWNER.

    set handler OWNER->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for ME->ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.

    set handler OWNER->ON_SELECTION_CHANGED for ISUBOLTREE activation IV_ACTIVATE.

  endmethod.                    "connect_nodes


method CREATE_ALLSUBOBJECTS.

  ALLSUBOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN07'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  try.
      OWNER->DO_CONTEXT_NODE_BINDING(
        IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_COMPONENT
        IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = conv #( C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS )
        IV_NODE_2_BIND      = ALLSUBOBJECTS
      ) ##NO_TEXT.
    catch CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endtry.

endmethod.


  method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

    CREATE_ISUBOLTREE( ).

    CREATE_ROOTOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_FOCUSOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_SUBOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_ALLSUBOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_FILTEROBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_PARENTOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_TRANSACTION( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_SELECTEDNODES( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_SELECTEDENTITIES( ).
  endmethod.

  FILTEROBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN05'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_FILTEROBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  try.
      OWNER->DO_CONTEXT_NODE_BINDING(
        IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_COMPONENT
        IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = conv #( C_CN_FILTEROBJECTS )
        IV_NODE_2_BIND      = FILTEROBJECTS
      ) ##NO_TEXT.
    catch CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endtry.

endmethod.
