  TRANSACTION ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN08'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_TRANSACTION
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  try.
      OWNER->DO_CONTEXT_NODE_BINDING(
        IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_COMPONENT
        IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = conv #( C_CN_TRANSACTION )
        IV_NODE_2_BIND      = TRANSACTION
      ) ##NO_TEXT.
    catch CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endtry.

  CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_TRX=>GET_INSTANCE(
    IO_COLLECTION_WRAPPER = TRANSACTION->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )
    IO_OWNER              = OWNER
  ).

endmethod.


method GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE.
  data(LR_TREE_CONTROLLER) = GET_TREE_CONTROLLER( ).
  if LR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    RR_RESULT = LR_TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_CONTROLLER.
  RR_RESULT = TREE_CONTROLLER.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_PROPERTIES.
  data(LR_TREE_CONTROLLER) = GET_TREE_CONTROLLER( ).
  if LR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    RS_RESULT = LR_TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE~STATE_RESTORE.

  RESTORE_PROFILE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  RESTORE_SELECTION_MODE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  RESTORE_TREE_STATE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  RESTORE_FILTER_FLAGS(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  RESTORE_FOCUS_COL(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

endmethod.                    "if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_restore


method IF_BSP_WD_HISTORY_STATE~STATE_STORE.

  STORE_TREE_STATE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  STORE_SELECTION_MODE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  STORE_FOCUS_COL(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  STORE_FOCUS_NODE_IDS(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  STORE_PROFILE(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

  STORE_FILTER_FLAGS(
    IV_STATE_ID        = STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

endmethod.                    "if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_store


method INITIALIZE.
  if OWNER is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL.
    TREE_CONTROLLER = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL( OWNER ).
  endif.
  SUPER->INITIALIZE( ).
endmethod.


method INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL.

  data(LV_CLASS_NAME) = CLASS_NAME.

  if TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    LV_CLASS_NAME = TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_CONTEXT_NODE_IMPL_CLASS(
      IV_MODEL_ID      = MODEL_ID
      IV_DEFAULT_CLASS = LV_CLASS_NAME
    ).
  endif.

  if LV_CLASS_NAME is initial.
    LV_CLASS_NAME = CLASS_NAME.
  endif.

  MODEL_INSTANCE = OWNER->CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME     = LV_CLASS_NAME
    MODEL_ID       = MODEL_ID
  ).

endmethod.


method IS_STATE_CONTAINER_ITEM_EXISTS.
  data(LT_ITEM_LIST) = IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM_LIST( ).
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( LINE_EXISTS( LT_ITEM_LIST[ TABLE_LINE = IV_NAME ] ) ).
endmethod.


method RESTORE_FILTER_FLAGS.

  data(LR_TREE_CONTROLLER) = GET_TREE_CONTROLLER( ).
  data LV_VALUE type ABAP_BOOL.
  if LR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
      exporting
        IM_NAME            = C_SI_FILTER_FLAGS
      importing
        EX_VALUE           = LV_VALUE
      exceptions
        NOT_FOUND          = 1
        FIELD_INCOMPATIBLE = 2
        others             = 3
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if SY-SUBRC is initial.
      LR_TREE_CONTROLLER->SET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER(
        IV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER = LV_VALUE
      ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method RESTORE_FOCUS_COL.

  data LR_COL            type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL.
  data LV_FOCUS_NODE_ID  type CHAR10.
  data LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS type TT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS.
  data LR_ENTITY         type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS.
  data LR_NODE           type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01.

  data(LS_TREE_PROPERTIES) = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  if LS_TREE_PROPERTIES-NO_REFRESH_ON_RESTORE is initial.

    " FOCUS_COL could be deleted by BOL RESET if objects aren't access objects!!!
    " -> so try just to select by index

    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
      exporting
        IM_NAME  = C_SI_FOCUS_COL
      importing
        EX_VALUE = LR_COL
      exceptions
        NOT_FOUND          = 1
        FIELD_INCOMPATIBLE = 2
        others             = 3
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if SY-SUBRC is initial and LR_COL is bound.

      " in addition to the focus entities we also store the node IDs to be able
      " to restore the correct nodes (entities might be used on different levels)
      IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
        exporting
          IM_NAME  = C_SI_FOCUS_NODE_IDS
        importing
          EX_VALUE = LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS
        exceptions
          others = 0
      ).

      ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
      if ISUBOLTREE->IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
        LR_ENTITY = LR_COL->GET_FIRST( ).
        while LR_ENTITY is bound.
          read table LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS into LV_FOCUS_NODE_ID index LR_COL->GET_CURRENT_INDEX( ).
          LR_NODE = cast #( ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( ENTITY = LR_ENTITY NODE_ID = LV_FOCUS_NODE_ID ) ).
          if LR_NODE is bound.
            LR_NODE->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
            if ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
              ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( LR_NODE->BO ).
            endif.
          endif.
          LR_ENTITY = LR_COL->GET_NEXT( ).
        endwhile.
      else. " single selection mode
        LR_ENTITY = LR_COL->GET_CURRENT( ).
        if LR_ENTITY is bound.
          read table LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS into LV_FOCUS_NODE_ID index 1.
          LR_NODE = cast #( ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( ENTITY = LR_ENTITY NODE_ID = LV_FOCUS_NODE_ID ) ).
        endif.
      endif.

    endif.

    ISUBOLTREE->UPDATE_FOCUS_COL( LR_NODE ). " will inernally not run for multi selection

  endif.

endmethod.


method RESTORE_PROFILE.

  data LR_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL.

  data(LR_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).
  if LR_PROFILE is bound.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
      exporting
        IM_NAME  = C_SI_PROFILE
      importing
        EX_VALUE = LR_COL
      exceptions
        NOT_FOUND          = 1
        FIELD_INCOMPATIBLE = 2
        others             = 3
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if SY-SUBRC is initial and LR_COL is bound.
      LR_PROFILE->SET_COLLECTION( LR_COL->GET_COPY( ) ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method RESTORE_ROOT_COL.

  data LR_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL.
  if IS_STATE_CONTAINER_ITEM_EXISTS(
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = IR_STATE_CONTAINER
    IV_NAME            = C_SI_ROOT_COL
  ) ##NO_TEXT.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
      exporting
        IM_NAME  = C_SI_ROOT_COL
      importing
        EX_VALUE = LR_COL
      exceptions
        NOT_FOUND          = 1
        FIELD_INCOMPATIBLE = 2
        others             = 3
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if SY-SUBRC is initial and LR_COL is bound.
      ISUBOLTREE->SET_COLLECTION( LR_COL->GET_COPY( ) ).
      ISUBOLTREE->REFRESH( ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method RESTORE_SELECTION_MODE.

  IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
    exporting
      IM_NAME  = C_SI_SELECTION_MODE
    importing
      EX_VALUE = ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE
    exceptions
      others = 0
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method RESTORE_TREE_STATE.

  data(LS_TREE_STATE) = value BSP_WD_TREE_STATE( ).
  if IS_STATE_CONTAINER_ITEM_EXISTS(
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = IR_STATE_CONTAINER
    IV_NAME            = C_SI_TREE_STATE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->GET_ITEM(
      exporting
        IM_NAME            = C_SI_TREE_STATE
      importing
        EX_VALUE           = LS_TREE_STATE
      exceptions
        NOT_FOUND          = 1
        FIELD_INCOMPATIBLE = 2
        others             = 3
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if SY-SUBRC is initial and LS_TREE_STATE is not initial.
      " ensure root collection is up to date (nodes might have been deleted by BOL reverts)
      try.
          data(LR_TREE_NODE_COL) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL(
            LS_TREE_STATE-ROOT_COLLECTION
          ).
          LR_TREE_NODE_COL->INVALIDATE_NODE_CHILDREN( ).
        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.
      endtry.
      ISUBOLTREE->SET_TREE_STATE( IS_STATE = LS_TREE_STATE ).
      return.
    endif.
  endif.

  " Fallback -> restore root collection
  RESTORE_ROOT_COL(
    IV_STATE_ID        = IV_STATE_ID
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER = IR_STATE_CONTAINER
  ).

endmethod.


method STORE_FILTER_FLAGS.

  data(LR_TREE_CONTROLLER) = GET_TREE_CONTROLLER( ).

  if LR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
      IM_NAME  = C_SI_FILTER_FLAGS
      IM_VALUE = LR_TREE_CONTROLLER->MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

endmethod.


method STORE_FOCUS_COL.

  if ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
      IM_NAME  = C_SI_FOCUS_COL
      IM_VALUE = cast IF_BOL_BO_COL(
        cast IF_BOL_BO_COL( ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL )->GET_COPY( )
      )
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

endmethod.


method STORE_FOCUS_NODE_IDS.

  " in addition to the focus entities we also store the node IDs to be able
  " to restore the correct nodes (entities might be used on different levels)

  data(LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS) = value TT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS( ).

  if ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
    try.
        data(LR_FOCUS_COL) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL(
          cast IF_BOL_BO_COL( ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL )->GET_COPY( )
        ).
        if ISUBOLTREE->IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ).
          data(LR_FOCUS_NODE) = LR_FOCUS_COL->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
          while LR_FOCUS_NODE is bound.
            insert LR_FOCUS_NODE->GET_NODE_ID( ) into table LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS.
            LR_FOCUS_NODE = LR_FOCUS_COL->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
          endwhile.
        else.
          LR_FOCUS_NODE = LR_FOCUS_COL->GET_CURRENT_NODE( ).
          if LR_FOCUS_NODE is bound.
            insert LR_FOCUS_NODE->GET_NODE_ID( ) into table LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS.
          endif.
        endif.
        IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
          IM_NAME  = C_SI_FOCUS_NODE_IDS
          IM_VALUE = LT_FOCUS_NODE_IDS
        ).
      catch CX_ROOT ##CATCH_ALL ##NO_HANDLER.
    endtry.
  endif.

endmethod.


method STORE_PROFILE.

  data(LR_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).
  if LR_PROFILE is bound.
    IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
      IM_NAME  = C_SI_PROFILE
      IM_VALUE = LR_PROFILE->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->GET_COPY( )
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

endmethod.


method STORE_SELECTION_MODE.

  IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
    IM_NAME  = C_SI_SELECTION_MODE
    IM_VALUE = ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method STORE_TREE_STATE.

  data(LS_TREE_STATE) = ISUBOLTREE->GET_TREE_STATE_COPY( ).

  if not LS_TREE_STATE-ROOT_COLLECTION is bound.
    create object LS_TREE_STATE-ROOT_COLLECTION type CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL.
  endif.

  IR_STATE_CONTAINER->ADD_ITEM(
    IM_NAME  = C_SI_TREE_STATE
    IM_VALUE = LS_TREE_STATE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CUST_IL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_CRM_GENIL_ABSTR_COMPONENT2
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CUST_IL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
  type-pools GENIL .

  constants CO_OBJ_NODE type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustNode'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_OCA type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustOCA'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PRES type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustPres'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PRESCOL type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustPresCol'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PROF type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProf'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PROFCOL type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProfCol'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PROF_QS type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProfQS'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_PROF_QSA type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProfQSAdv'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_NODE_OCA type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustNodeOCA'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_NODE_PRES type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustNodePres'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_NODE_SUBNODE type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustNodeSubNode'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_PRES_COL type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustPresCol'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_PROF_COL type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProfCol'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_REL_PROF_ROOTNODE type CRMT_RELATION_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProfRootNode'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_MODEL_PREFIX type STRING value 'IsuBolTreeCust'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_OBJ_VALUENODE type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeValueNode'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods IF_GENIL_APPL_INTLAY~GET_DYNAMIC_QUERY_RESULT
    redefinition .
  methods IF_GENIL_APPL_INTLAY~GET_OBJECTS
    redefinition .
  methods IF_GENIL_APPL_INTLAY~GET_QUERY_RESULT
    redefinition .
  methods IF_GENIL_APPL_MODEL~GET_MODEL
    redefinition .
  methods IF_GENIL_APPL_MODEL~GET_OBJECT_PROPS
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CUST_IL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.

  types:
    GTY_HIER_TAB type standard table of crm_isutree_hier with non-unique default key .
  types:
    begin of gty_hier ,
      prof_id type crmt_tree_profile ,
      hier_tab type gty_hier_tab ,
    end of gty_hier .

  class-data:
    gt_hier type hashed table of gty_hier with unique key prof_id .

  class-methods READ_HIER
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE
      !IV_BYPASS_BUFFER type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RT_HIER) type GTY_HIER_TAB .
  class-methods READ_HIER_NODE
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE
      !IV_NODE_ID_INT type CRMT_NODE_ID optional
      !IV_NODE_ID_EXT type CRMT_NODE_ID optional
    returning
      value(RS_HIER) type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER .
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CUST_IL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CUST_IL IMPLEMENTATION.


method if_genil_appl_intlay~get_dynamic_query_result.

  data:
    param  type crm_isutree_cust_preview_qsa,
    proft  type table of char10,
    where  type string,
    selt   type genilt_selection_parameter_tab,
    object type ref to if_genil_cont_root_object,
    value  type string,
    lsel   type genilt_selection_parameter.

  field-symbols:
    <prof> type char10,
    <sel>  type genilt_selection_parameter.


  case iv_query_name.

    when co_obj_prof_qsa.

*     build selection string
      selt = it_selection_parameters.
      sort selt by attr_name.

      loop at selt assigning <sel>.
        <sel>-attr_name = cl_abap_dyn_prg=>escape_quotes( <sel>-attr_name ).
        <sel>-low       = cl_abap_dyn_prg=>escape_quotes( <sel>-low ).
        if where is initial.
          concatenate '(' <sel>-attr_name into where separated by space.
        elseif <sel>-attr_name = lsel-attr_name.
          concatenate where 'OR' <sel>-attr_name into where separated by space.
        else.
          concatenate where ') AND (' <sel>-attr_name into where separated by space.
        endif.
        if <sel>-sign = 'E'.
          concatenate where 'NOT' into where separated by space.
        endif.
        value = <sel>-low.
*       determine operator
        if <sel>-low cs '*'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
          replace all occurrences of '*' in value with '%'.   "#EC NOTEXT
          concatenate where 'LIKE' into where separated by space.
        else.
          concatenate where '=' into where separated by space.
        endif.
        value = '''' && value && ''''.
        concatenate where value into where separated by space.
        lsel = <sel>.
        at last.
          concatenate where ')' into where separated by space.
        endat.
      endloop.

      if where is not initial.
        read table it_selection_parameters transporting no fields with key attr_name = 'PROF_DESC'.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          select prof_id from crm_isutree_prot
            into table proft
            where (where) and language = sy-langu.
        else.
          select prof_id from crm_isutree_prof
            into table proft
            where (where).
        endif.
      else.
        select prof_id from crm_isutree_prof
          into table proft
          where prof_id <> space.
      endif.

      loop at proft assigning <prof>.
        object = iv_root_list->add_object( iv_object_name = co_obj_prof  is_object_key = <prof> ).
      endloop.

  endcase.

endmethod.


method if_genil_appl_intlay~get_objects.

  data:
    prof_key  type char10,
    node_key  type crm_isutree_cust_preview_nkey,
    col_key   type crm_isutree_cust_preview_ckey,
    col_keyt  type table of crm_isutree_cust_preview_ckey,
    pcol_key  type crm_isutree_cust_preview_pkey,
    pcol_keyt type table of crm_isutree_cust_preview_pkey,
    oca_key   type crm_isutree_cust_preview_okey,
    oca_keyt  type table of crm_isutree_cust_preview_okey,
    pres_key  type crmt_pres_id,
    node_keyt type table of crm_isutree_cust_preview_nkey,
    pres_keyt type table of crmt_pres_id,
    prof_attr type crm_isutree_cust_preview_profa,
    node_attr type crm_isutree_hier,
    col_attr  type crm_isutree_pcov,
    col_tab   type table of crm_isutree_pcov,
    pcol_attr type crm_isutree_prco,
    pcol_tab  type table of crm_isutree_prco,
    hier_tab  type table of crm_isutree_hier,
    hier_tabr type ref to gty_hier_tab,
    pres_attr type crm_isutree_cust_preview_presa,
    oca_tab   type table of crm_isutree_ocav,
    oca_attr  type crm_isutree_ocav,
    relt      type crmt_relation_name_tab,
    object    type ref to if_genil_cont_root_object.


  field-symbols:
    <col>  type crm_isutree_pcov,
    <pcol> type crm_isutree_prco,
    <oca>  type crm_isutree_ocav,
    <hier> type crm_isutree_hier,
    <rel>  type crmt_relation_name.


  object = iv_root_list->get_first( ).

  while object is bound.

    if object->check_attr_requested( ) = abap_true.

      case object->get_name( ).

        when co_obj_prof.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = prof_key ).

*         reset buffer
          read_hier( iv_profile_id = prof_key  iv_bypass_buffer = abap_true ).

          select single * from crm_isutree_prof
            into corresponding fields of prof_attr
            where prof_id = prof_key.

          select single * from crm_isutree_prot
            into corresponding fields of prof_attr
            where prof_id  = prof_key and
                  language = sy-langu.

          if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>is_ehp2_active( ) = abap_true.
            prof_attr-is_table = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>is_table_by_cust( prof_key ).
          endif.

          object->set_attributes( prof_attr ).

        when co_obj_node.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = node_key ).

          node_attr = read_hier_node( iv_profile_id = node_key-prof_id  iv_node_id_int = node_key-node_id ).

          object->set_attributes( node_attr ).

        when co_obj_pres.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = pres_key ).

          select single * from crm_isutree_pres
            into corresponding fields of pres_attr
            where pres_id = pres_key.

          select single * from crm_isutree_pret
            into corresponding fields of pres_attr
            where pres_id = pres_key and
                  langu   = sy-langu.

          object->set_attributes( pres_attr ).

        when co_obj_profcol.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = col_key ).

          select single * from crm_isutree_pcol
            into corresponding fields of col_attr
            where prof_id = col_key-prof_id and
                  col_id  = col_key-col_id.

          select single * from crm_isutree_pcot
            into corresponding fields of col_attr
            where prof_id  = col_key-prof_id and
                  col_id   = col_key-col_id and
                  language = sy-langu.

          object->set_attributes( col_attr ).

        when co_obj_oca.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = oca_key ).

*         read external key
          oca_key-node_id = read_hier_node( iv_profile_id = oca_key-prof_id  iv_node_id_int = oca_key-node_id )-node_id.

          select single * from crm_isutree_oca
            into corresponding fields of oca_attr
            where prof_id = oca_key-prof_id and
                  node_id = oca_key-node_id and
                  id      = oca_key-id.

          select single * from crm_isutree_ocat
            into corresponding fields of oca_attr
            where prof_id = oca_key-prof_id and
                  node_id = oca_key-node_id and
                  id      = oca_key-id and
                  langu   = sy-langu.

          object->set_attributes( oca_attr ).

        when co_obj_prescol.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = pcol_key ).

          select single * from crm_isutree_prco
            into corresponding fields of pcol_attr
            where pres_id = pcol_key-pres_id and
                  col_id  = pcol_key-col_id.

          object->set_attributes( pcol_attr ).

      endcase.

    endif.


    if object->check_rels_requested( ) = abap_true.

      case object->get_name( ).

        when co_obj_prof.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = prof_key ).

          relt = object->get_foreign_relations( ).

          loop at relt assigning <rel>.

            case <rel>.

              when co_rel_prof_rootnode.

                hier_tab = read_hier( prof_key ).
                delete hier_tab where parent_node_id <> space.

                if not hier_tab is initial.
                  sort hier_tab by sequence.
                  loop at hier_tab assigning <hier>.
                    node_key-prof_id = <hier>-prof_id.
                    node_key-node_id = <hier>-mandt.  "MANDT is used for internal ID  (NODE_ID might be non-unique)
                    append node_key to node_keyt.
                  endloop.
                  object->set_foreign_relation(
                    iv_relation_name = <rel>
                    it_child_keys    = node_keyt ).
                endif.

              when co_rel_prof_col.

                select prof_id col_id from crm_isutree_pcol
                  into corresponding fields of table col_tab
                  where prof_id = prof_key.

                if not col_tab is initial.
                  sort col_tab by col_id.
                  loop at col_tab assigning <col>.
                    col_key-prof_id = <col>-prof_id.
                    col_key-col_id  = <col>-col_id.
                    append col_key to col_keyt.
                  endloop.
                  object->set_foreign_relation(
                    iv_relation_name = <rel>
                    it_child_keys    = col_keyt ).
                endif.

            endcase.

          endloop.

        when co_obj_node.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = node_key ).

          relt = object->get_foreign_relations( ).

          loop at relt assigning <rel>.

            case <rel>.

              when co_rel_node_subnode.

                hier_tab = read_hier( node_key-prof_id ).
*               read external NODE_ID
                read table hier_tab assigning <hier> with key mandt = node_key-node_id.
                if sy-subrc = 0.
                  delete hier_tab where parent_node_id <> <hier>-node_id.

                  if not hier_tab is initial.
                    sort hier_tab by sequence.
                    loop at hier_tab assigning <hier>.
                      node_key-prof_id = <hier>-prof_id.
                      node_key-node_id = <hier>-mandt.  "we use MANDT as internal key (NODE_ID might be non-unique
                      append node_key to node_keyt.
                    endloop.
                    object->set_foreign_relation(
                      iv_relation_name = <rel>
                      it_child_keys    = node_keyt ).
                  endif.
                endif.

              when co_rel_node_pres.

                pres_key = read_hier_node( iv_profile_id = node_key-prof_id  iv_node_id_int = node_key-node_id )-pres_id.

                append pres_key to pres_keyt.
                object->set_foreign_relation(
                  iv_relation_name = <rel>
                  it_child_keys    = pres_keyt ).

              when co_rel_node_oca.

                node_attr = read_hier_node( iv_profile_id = node_key-prof_id  iv_node_id_int = node_key-node_id ).

                select prof_id node_id id sequence from crm_isutree_oca
                  into corresponding fields of table oca_tab
                  where prof_id = node_key-prof_id and
                        node_id = node_attr-node_id.

                if not oca_tab is initial.
                  sort oca_tab by sequence.
                  loop at oca_tab assigning <oca>.
                    oca_key-prof_id = <oca>-prof_id.
                    oca_key-node_id = node_attr-mandt.
                    oca_key-id      = <oca>-id.
                    append oca_key to oca_keyt.
                  endloop.
                  object->set_foreign_relation(
                    iv_relation_name = <rel>
                    it_child_keys    = oca_keyt ).
                endif.

            endcase.

          endloop.

        when co_obj_pres.

          object->get_key( importing es_key = pres_key ).

          relt = object->get_foreign_relations( ).

          loop at relt assigning <rel>.

            case <rel>.

              when co_rel_pres_col.

                select pres_id col_id from crm_isutree_prco
                  into corresponding fields of table pcol_tab
                  where pres_id = pres_key.

                if not pcol_tab is initial.
                  sort pcol_tab by col_id.
                  loop at pcol_tab assigning <pcol>.
                    pcol_key-pres_id = <pcol>-pres_id.
                    pcol_key-col_id  = <pcol>-col_id.
                    append pcol_key to pcol_keyt.
                  endloop.
                  object->set_foreign_relation(
                    iv_relation_name = <rel>
                    it_child_keys    = pcol_keyt ).
                endif.

            endcase.

          endloop.

      endcase.

    endif.

    object = iv_root_list->get_next( ).

  endwhile.

endmethod.


method if_genil_appl_intlay~get_query_result.

  data:
    param  type crm_isutree_cust_preview_qs,
    attrt  type table of crm_isutree_prof,
    object type ref to if_genil_cont_root_object.

  field-symbols:
    <attr> type crm_isutree_prof.


  case iv_query_name.

    when co_obj_prof_qs.

      call method fill_struct_from_nvp_tab
        exporting
          it_parameters = it_parameters
        changing
          cs_parameter  = param.

      if param-prof_id is initial.
        select * from crm_isutree_prof
          into corresponding fields of table attrt.
      else.
        select * from crm_isutree_prof
          into corresponding fields of table attrt
          where prof_id = param-prof_id.
      endif.

      loop at attrt assigning <attr>.
        object = iv_root_list->add_object( iv_object_name = co_obj_prof  is_object_key = <attr>-prof_id ).
      endloop.

  endcase.

endmethod.


method if_genil_appl_model~get_model.

  data:
    rel type crmt_relation_detail.


* profile -> root node
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_prof.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_prof_rootnode.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_node.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-one.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-aggregation.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

* node -> node
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_node.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_node_subnode.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_node.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-zero_or_one.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-aggregation.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

* node -> presentation
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_node.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_node_pres.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_pres.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_one.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-association.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

* profile -> col
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_prof.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_prof_col.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_profcol.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-one.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-aggregation.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

* node -> oca
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_node.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_node_oca.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_oca.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-one.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-aggregation.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

* presentation -> col
  rel-object_a      = co_obj_pres.
  rel-relation_name = co_rel_pres_col.
  rel-object_b      = co_obj_prescol.
  rel-card_a        = genil_card-one.
  rel-card_b        = genil_card-zero_or_more.
  rel-relation_kind = genil_relkind-aggregation.
  insert rel into table rt_relation_det.

endmethod.


method if_genil_appl_model~get_object_props.

  data:
    prop type crmt_obj_properties.


* tree profile
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_prof.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>root_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRMT_PNT_PROFILE'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_PROFA'.   "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree profile query
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_prof_qs.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>query_object.
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_QS'.      "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree profile advanced query
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_prof_qsa.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>dquery_object.
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_QSA'.     "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree node
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_node.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_NKEY'.    "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_HIER'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree presentation
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_pres.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>root_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRMT_PRES_ID'.                     "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_PRESA'.   "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_pres.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree column
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_profcol.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_CKEY'.    "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_PCOV'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree column one click action
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_oca.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_OKEY'.    "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_OCAV'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_prof.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* tree presentation columns
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = co_obj_prescol.
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_PKEY'.    "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'CRM_ISUTREE_PRCO'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = co_obj_pres.
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

* add value node object
  clear prop.
  prop-object_name    = CO_OBJ_VALUENODE.              "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-object_kind    = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object.
  prop-key_struct     = 'CRMT_OBJECT_GUID'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-attr_struct    = 'BSP_WD_DROPDOWN_LINE'.             "#EC NOTEXT
  prop-root_object    = CO_OBJ_VALUENODE.              "#EC NOTEXT
  insert prop into table rt_obj_props.

endmethod.


method read_hier.

  if iv_bypass_buffer = abap_true.
    delete table gt_hier with table key prof_id = iv_profile_id.
  endif.

  if rt_hier is not supplied.
    return.
  endif.

  field-symbols <ls_hier> type gty_hier.
  read table gt_hier assigning <ls_hier> with table key prof_id = iv_profile_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    data ls_hier type gty_hier.
    ls_hier-prof_id = iv_profile_id.
    insert ls_hier into table gt_hier assigning <ls_hier>.

*   select hierarchy nodes for profile
    select * from crm_isutree_hier into table <ls_hier>-hier_tab where prof_id = iv_profile_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0.

*     check for dynamic hierarchy entries
      field-symbols <hier> type crm_isutree_hier.
      loop at <ls_hier>-hier_tab assigning <hier> where parent_node_id is initial and class is not initial.
        data classes_processed type hashed table of crmt_class with unique key table_line.
        insert <hier>-class into table classes_processed.
        check sy-subrc = 0.  "avoid multiple calls for same class
        try.
            data impl_class type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree.
            create object impl_class type (<hier>-class).
            data impl_class_hier type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree_hier.
            impl_class_hier ?= impl_class.
            data hier_tab_dyn type table of crm_isutree_hier.
            if hier_tab_dyn is initial.
              hier_tab_dyn = <ls_hier>-hier_tab.
            endif.
            impl_class_hier->adjust_hier_entries(
              exporting
                iv_profile_id = iv_profile_id
              changing
                ct_hier       = hier_tab_dyn ).
          catch cx_root.
        endtry.
      endloop.

      if hier_tab_dyn is not initial and hier_tab_dyn <> <ls_hier>-hier_tab.
        <ls_hier>-hier_tab = hier_tab_dyn.
*       check if potential dynamic recursions exist  (A->B->C->D->B->C...  -> B is recursive because it has two different parent node IDs)
        data hier_tab_dyn_recursion type sorted table of crm_isutree_hier with non-unique key node_id.
        insert lines of <ls_hier>-hier_tab into table hier_tab_dyn_recursion.
        loop at <ls_hier>-hier_tab assigning <hier>.
          data hier_node_id_tab_recursive type hashed table of crmt_node_id with unique key table_line.
          read table hier_node_id_tab_recursive transporting no fields with table key table_line = <hier>-node_id.
          if sy-subrc = 0.
            assert <hier>-recursive <> abap_true.  "combination of static and dynamic recursion is not supported!
            <hier>-recursive = 'M'.  "mark as potential multi-level recursion
          else.
            data hier_node_id_count type sytabix.
            hier_node_id_count = 0.
            loop at hier_tab_dyn_recursion transporting no fields where node_id = <hier>-node_id.
              hier_node_id_count = hier_node_id_count + 1.
              if hier_node_id_count > 1.
                assert <hier>-recursive <> abap_true.  "combination of static and dynamic recursion is not supported!
                <hier>-recursive = 'M'.  "mark as potential multi-level recursion
                insert <hier>-node_id into table hier_node_id_tab_recursive.
                exit.
              endif.
            endloop.
          endif.
        endloop.
      endif.

*     set new internal key and fill parent node type
      loop at <ls_hier>-hier_tab assigning <hier>.
        data lv_num type numc3.
        <hier>-mandt = lv_num = sy-tabix.  "we use MANDT is internal key
        if <hier>-parent_node_type is initial.
          field-symbols <parent_hier> type crm_isutree_hier.
          read table <ls_hier>-hier_tab assigning <parent_hier> with key node_id = <hier>-parent_node_id.
          if sy-subrc = 0.
            <hier>-parent_node_type = <parent_hier>-bol_type.
          endif.
        endif.
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

  rt_hier = <ls_hier>-hier_tab.

endmethod.


method read_hier_node.

  data lt_hier type gty_hier_tab.
  lt_hier = read_hier( iv_profile_id ).

  if iv_node_id_int is not initial.
    read table lt_hier into rs_hier with key mandt = iv_node_id_int.
  elseif iv_node_id_ext is not initial.
    read table lt_hier into rs_hier with key node_id = iv_node_id_ext.
  endif.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

    importing

      !IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE

    for event EXPAND_ALL_SUB of CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL

CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


  method activate_filters.

    data:
      tree_srv type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service.


    tree_srv = me->get_tree_srv( ).
    check tree_srv is bound.

    if tree_srv->is_filter_active( ) = abap_false.
*   store user filter activation/deactivation
      me->set_filter_deactivated_by_user( abap_undefined ).
      tree_srv->set_filter_active( abap_true ).
      me->build_tree( ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


method ACTIVATE_WINDOW_CTRL_EVENTS.
  data(LR_WCO) = cast CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL( VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ) ).
  set handler ON_TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED   for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
  set handler ON_FOCUS_PARENT_REQUESTED for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
  set handler ON_FOCUS_SUB_REQUESTED    for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
  set handler ON_TREE_SAVE_REQUESTED    for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
  set handler ON_EXPAND_ALL_SUB         for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
  set handler ON_SELECT_NODE            for LR_WCO activation ABAP_TRUE.
endmethod.


method ADAPT_REQUEST_NODESELECT.
  data(LV_CELLERATOR_ID) = GENERATE_CELLERATOR_ID( ).
  if LV_CELLERATOR_ID is not initial.
    " C81_W144_V145_Hier3_Table
    data(LV_NAME) = |{ LV_CELLERATOR_ID }_{ GC_ALL_ROWS_SELECTED }|.
    data(LV_VALUE) = REQUEST->GET_FORM_FIELD( LV_NAME ).
    if LV_VALUE = 'ALL'.
      clear LV_VALUE.
      REQUEST->SET_FORM_FIELD( NAME = LV_NAME VALUE = LV_VALUE ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method ADJUST_COLUMNS.

  data(LR_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  if LR_TREE_SERVICE is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  " if the application has dynamically changed the columns we have to reread the tree
  data LR_COLS_CHANGED type ref to ABAP_BOOL.
  create data LR_COLS_CHANGED.
  data(LS_TREE_PROPERTIES) = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  LR_TREE_SERVICE->GET_COLUMNS( REREAD = LS_TREE_PROPERTIES-ADJUST_COLUMNS IR_COLS_CHANGED = LR_COLS_CHANGED ).
  RV_RESULT = LR_COLS_CHANGED->*.

endmethod.


method ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  "
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_31 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  " Set a "exist" marker
  loop at CT_BUTTON_GROUPS assigning field-symbol(<BUTTON_GROUP>).
    loop at <BUTTON_GROUP>-ITEMS assigning field-symbol(<BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>).
      if FIND( VAL = <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_.*$| ) = -1.
        <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND = |_EXISTMARKER_{ <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND }|.
      endif.
      loop at <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-ITEMS assigning field-symbol(<ITEM>).
        if FIND( VAL = <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_.*$| ) = -1.
          <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 = |_EXISTMARKER_{ <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 }|.
        endif.
      endloop.
    endloop.
  endloop.

  " Convert button groups to button list
  data(LT_BUTTONS_LIST) = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>BUTTONGROUPS_TO_BUTTONS( IT_BUTTON_GROUPS = CT_BUTTON_GROUPS ).

  " adjust toolbar actions in the parent component
  IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE->ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS( changing CT_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS = LT_BUTTONS_LIST ).

  " Convert button list to button groups
  CT_BUTTON_GROUPS = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>BUTTONS_TO_BUTTONGROUPS( IT_ITEMS = LT_BUTTONS_LIST ).

  " Clear the "exist" marker
  loop at CT_BUTTON_GROUPS assigning <BUTTON_GROUP>.
    loop at <BUTTON_GROUP>-ITEMS assigning <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>.
      if FIND( VAL = <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_.*$| ) = -1.
        <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-ON_CLICK = REPLACE(
          VAL   = <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-ON_CLICK
          REGEX = |^(?:{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT }\|{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_OCA_EVENT })\{0\}(.*)$|
          WITH  = |{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT }$1|
        ).
      else.
        <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND = REPLACE( VAL = <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-SUBMENU_ONDEMAND REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_(.*)$| WITH = `$1` ).
      endif.
      loop at <BUTTON_GROUP_ITEM>-ITEMS assigning <ITEM>.
        if FIND( VAL = <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_.*$| ) = -1.
          <ITEM>-ONSELECT = REPLACE(
            VAL   = <ITEM>-ONSELECT
            REGEX = |^(?:{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT }\|{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_OCA_EVENT })\{0\}(.*)$|
            WITH  = |{ CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT }$1|
          ).
          <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-SERVER_EVENT = <ITEM>-ONSELECT.
        else.
          <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 = REPLACE( VAL = <ITEM>-EVENTING_OPTIONS-PARAM_9 REGEX = |^_EXISTMARKER_(.*)$| WITH = `$1` ).
        endif.
      endloop.
    endloop.
  endloop.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_32 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method ADJUST_TOOLBAR_MORE_BUTTON.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  "
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_33 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data(LS_PROFILE) = IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->GET_PROFILE_DETAILS( IV_PROFILE_ID = IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->GET_PROFILE_ID( ) ).

  if LS_PROFILE-MAXTBBTNS is not initial.
    TREE_PROPERTIES-MAXBUTTONNUMBER = LS_PROFILE-MAXTBBTNS.
  elseif TREE_PROPERTIES-MAXBUTTONNUMBER is initial.
    TREE_PROPERTIES-MAXBUTTONNUMBER = 8. " default
  endif.

  RT_ACTIONS = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>CREATE_MENU_BY_BUTTONGROUPS(
    IT_BUTTON_GROUPS    = IT_BUTTON_GROUPS
    IV_MAX_BUTTON_COUNT = conv #( TREE_PROPERTIES-MAXBUTTONNUMBER )
  ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_34 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method AFTER_INITIALIZE_TREE_SERVICE ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method BEFORE_INITIALIZE_TREE_SERVICE ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


  method BUILD_TREE.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_37 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

    data:
      TREE_SRV   type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE,
      ROOT_COL   type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
      FILTER_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
      ROOT_NODES type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
      NODE       type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01,
      BO         type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE,
      ENTITY     type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY,
      COMP_CONTR type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL,
      PROF_NODE  type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
      BOL_CORE   type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_CORE.


* conditional breakpoint
* // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
* // or
* // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
    assert id CRMUIF_CONDITIONAL_BREAKPOINTS
           subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Build Tree (UI)'
           condition CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP_BT=>ASSERT(
                       IV_BREAK_EVENT = IF_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GC_EVENT_BT_BUILD_TREE
                       IV_PROF_ID     = ME->DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( ) ) = ABAP_TRUE. "#EC NOTEXT

* send updates and ensure BOL buffer is reread
    BOL_CORE = CL_CRM_BOL_CORE=>GET_INSTANCE( ).
    BOL_CORE->MODIFY( ).

    " get tree service
    TREE_SRV = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
    check TREE_SRV is bound.

    RAISE_BEFORE_BUILD_TREE_EVENT( ).

    if BUILD_TREE_SPEC(
      exporting
        IR_SELECTION                = SELECTION
        IV_MODE                     = MODE
        IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED
        IT_SELECTION_PATH           = IT_SELECTION_PATH
      changing
        CV_PROCESSED                = PROCESSED
    ) is initial.

      " if the application has dynamically changed the columns we have to reread the tree
      PROCESSED = ADJUST_COLUMNS( ).

      " special filter handling
      if ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = ABAP_TRUE and
         MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER = ABAP_FALSE and
         switch ABAP_BOOL(
           CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_FILTER_MODE( )
             when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GC_DEFAULT_FILTER_OFF or
                  CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GC_FILTER_OFF then ABAP_TRUE ) = ABAP_TRUE and
         TREE_SRV->IS_FILTER_AVAILABLE( IV_AVAILABLE_AND_FILTERED = ABAP_TRUE ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        SET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER( ABAP_TRUE ).
        PROCESSED = ABAP_TRUE.
      endif.

      " if the caller requests an update only if the root collection has changed, we check the root collection including the filter
      if PROCESSED = ABAP_FALSE.
        PROCESSED = IS_BUILD_TREE_NEEDED( IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED ).
      endif.

      if PROCESSED = ABAP_FALSE.
        return.
      endif.

      CLEAR_FORCE_BUILD_TREE( ).

      " store last roundtrip's root and filter IDs to allow auto refresh in DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT
      STORE_CURRENT_DATA_CONTEXTS( ).

      " get root entities
      ROOT_COL = GET_ROOT_ENTITIES( IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE = TREE_SRV ).

      if ROOT_COL is bound and ROOT_COL->SIZE( ) > 0.
*       get filter entities
        FILTER_COL = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->FILTEROBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_COPY( ).

*       remove last filters
        TREE_SRV->CLEAR_FILTER( ).
        TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_ACTIVE( ABAP_FALSE ).

*       apply filters
        if FILTER_COL is bound and FILTER_COL->SIZE( ) > 0.
          TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_COLLECTION( FILTER_COL ).
          if ME->MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER <> ABAP_TRUE.
            TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_ACTIVE( ABAP_TRUE ).
          endif.
        else.
          TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_ACTIVE( ABAP_FALSE ).
        endif.

*       in result list mode the filter should be active
        try.
            COMP_CONTR ?= ME->COMP_CONTROLLER.
            PROF_NODE ?= COMP_CONTR->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
            if PROF_NODE->GET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING( 'MODE' ) = 'R'.
              if ME->MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER <> ABAP_TRUE.
                TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_ACTIVE( ABAP_TRUE ).
              endif.
            endif.
          catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL CX_CRM_CIC_PARAMETER_ERROR. "#EC NO_HANDLER
        endtry.

*       get root nodes
        data LR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST type ref to ABAP_BOOL.
        create data LR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST.
        ROOT_NODES = TREE_SRV->GET_ROOT_NODES( COLLECTION = ROOT_COL  IR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST = LR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST ).
        if ROOT_NODES is bound and LR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST->* = ABAP_TRUE and ROOT_NODES->SIZE( ) = 0.
*         no root nodes but hidden nodes exist -> reset virtual root node state
          if TREE_SRV->RESET_ALL_VIRTUAL_ROOT_NODES( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
*           there were some hidden nodes, try again!
            ROOT_NODES = TREE_SRV->GET_ROOT_NODES( ROOT_COL ).
          endif.
        endif.

      else.
        TREE_SRV = ME->GET_TREE_SRV( ).
        if TREE_SRV is bound.
          TREE_SRV->CLEAR_FILTER( ).
          TREE_SRV->DELETE_PENDING_FILTERS( ).
          TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_ACTIVE( ABAP_FALSE ).
        endif.
      endif.

*     rebuild tree
      ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SET_COLLECTION( ROOT_NODES ).
      ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->REFRESH( ).

      BUILD_TREE_PRESELECTION( SELECTION = SELECTION MODE = MODE IT_SELECTION_PATH = IT_SELECTION_PATH ).

*     store user filter state for current profile
      if TREE_SRV is bound.
        TREE_SRV->SET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER( ME->MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER ).
      endif.

    endif.

    RAISE_AFTER_BUILD_TREE_EVENT( ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_01 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  endmethod.


method BUILD_TREE_PRESELECTION.

  data:
    NODE   type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01,
    BO     type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE,
    ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.

  data(LV_HANDLED) = BUILD_TREE_PRESELECTION_SPEC(
    SELECTION         = SELECTION
    MODE              = MODE
    IT_SELECTION_PATH = IT_SELECTION_PATH
  ).

  if LV_HANDLED is initial.

* only proceed if there is anything to be selected
    if TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->SIZE( ) > 0.

*   do the preselections
      case MODE.
        when CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_SELECT_FIRST.
          if TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB is initial.
            TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
          endif.
          SELECT_NODE( INDEX = 1  FORCE_FOCUS_COL_REBUILD = ABAP_TRUE ).
        when CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_VIRTUAL_ROOT.
          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
          NODE ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( SELECTION ).
          if not NODE is bound.
            NODE ?= ENSURE_ENTITY_IS_VISIBLE( SELECTION ).
          endif.
          if NODE is bound.
            SELECT_NODE( SELECTED_NODE = NODE  FORCE_FOCUS_COL_REBUILD = ABAP_TRUE ).
          endif.

        when others. "  also for mode cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl=>co_mode_selection and cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl=>co_mode_no_selection
          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).

          " selection is passed -> use it
          if SELECTION is bound.
            NODE ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( SELECTION ).
            if not NODE is bound.
              NODE ?= ENSURE_ENTITY_IS_VISIBLE( ENTITY = SELECTION  IT_SELECTION_PATH = IT_SELECTION_PATH ).
            endif.
            " check for object in focus_col collection
          elseif TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
            if GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
              BO = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
              while BO is bound.
                clear NODE.
*             ensure all nodes are still part of the tree
                read table TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<LS_NODE>) with table key BO_NODE = BO.
                if SY-SUBRC = 0.
                  NODE ?= <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE.
                else.
                  read table TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_NODE> with key BO_ENTITY = BO->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ). "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                  if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE is bound.
*                 node has been moved
                    NODE ?= <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE.
                    data(LV_INDEX) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~GET_CURRENT_INDEX( ).
                    TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( BO ).
                    TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~INSERT(
                      IV_BO        = <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE
                      IV_INDEX     = LV_INDEX
                      IV_SET_FOCUS = ABAP_TRUE ).
                    TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~MARK( IV_INDEX = LV_INDEX ).
                  endif.
                endif.
                if NODE is bound.
                  NODE->IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                  if <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE is bound and GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.
*                 select parent node if all sub nodes have been selected
                    data(LO_BO_NODE) = <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                    while LO_BO_NODE is bound.
                      read table TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning <LS_NODE> with table key BO_NODE = LO_BO_NODE.
                      if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE is bound and <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                        data(LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED) = ABAP_TRUE.
                        loop at TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB transporting no fields
                          using key PARENT_TREE_NODE
                          where PARENT_TREE_NODE = <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE and
                                TREE_NODE is bound and
                                TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                          LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                          exit.
                        endloop.
                        if LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                          <LS_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                          LO_BO_NODE = <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                        else.
                          clear LO_BO_NODE.
                        endif.
                      else.
                        clear LO_BO_NODE.
                      endif.
                    endwhile.
                  endif.
                endif.
                BO = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
              endwhile.
              clear NODE.
              clear BO.
            else.
              BO = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->GET_CURRENT_NODE( ).
              if BO is bound.
                NODE ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_BO( BO ).
              endif.
            endif.
            " check in focusobjects node
          elseif GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_FALSE.
            ENTITY ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
            if ENTITY is bound.
              NODE ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( ENTITY ).
*           ensure visibility
              if NODE is not bound and MODE eq CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_SELECTION.
                NODE ?= ENSURE_ENTITY_IS_VISIBLE( ENTITY ).
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
          if NODE is bound.
            if MODE eq CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_NO_SELECTION.
              NO_PUBLISHING = ABAP_TRUE.
            endif.
            SELECT_NODE( SELECTED_NODE = NODE  FORCE_FOCUS_COL_REBUILD = ABAP_TRUE ).
            NO_PUBLISHING = ABAP_FALSE.
          else." Node is not bound -> entity can't be found in tree -> maybe root change -> clear focus
            if TREE_PROPERTIES-INITIAL_SELECT = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_SELECT_FIRST.
              SELECT_NODE( INDEX = 1  FORCE_FOCUS_COL_REBUILD = ABAP_TRUE ).
            else.
              UPDATE_FOCUS_COL( ).
            endif.
          endif.

          if MODE = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_NO_SELECTION.
            try.
                TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DESELECT_ALL( ).
              catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.               "#EC NO_HANDLER
            endtry.
          elseif MODE = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_EXPAND_ALL
          or     TREE_PROPERTIES-INITIAL_SELECT = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_EXPAND_ALL.
            EH_ONEXPAND_ALL( ).
          endif.
      endcase.

    else.
*   empty tree -> no next hit possible
      clear LAST_FOUND_NODE.

*   empty tree -> deselect and publish
      try.
          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DESELECT_ALL( ).
        catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.                     "#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.

*   empty tree -> publish
      UPDATE_FOCUS_COL( ).

    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method BUILD_TREE_PRESELECTION_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method BUILD_TREE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method CHANGE_PROFILE.

  data:
    LV_PROF_ID   type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE,
    LO_SELECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS.

  if IV_PROF_ID is initial.
    return.
  endif.

  data(LR_PROFILE) = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE.

  if LR_PROFILE->GET_PROFGRP_ID( ) is not initial.
    if LR_PROFILE->GET_PROFGRP_SEL( ) = IV_PROF_ID.
      return.
    endif.
  else.
    if LR_PROFILE->GET_PROF_ID( ) = IV_PROF_ID.
      return.
    endif.
  endif.

  if ENTER_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_PROFILE_CHANGE ) is initial.
    return.
  endif.
  try.
      if CHANGE_PROFILE_SPEC(
        IV_PROFGRP_ID = IV_PROFGRP_ID
        IV_PROF_ID    = IV_PROF_ID
      ) is initial.

        raise event BEFORE_PROFILE_CHANGE.

        CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>SET_DEFAULT_PROFILE_BY_GROUP(
          IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID = LR_PROFILE->GET_PROFGRP_ID( )
          IV_DEFAULT_PROF_ID  = IV_PROF_ID ).
        LR_PROFILE->SET_PROFGRP_SEL( IV_PROF_ID ).

        if TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE <> TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_MULTI.
          LO_SELECTION = TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
        else.
          data(LO_MARKED) = TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_MARKED( ).
          try.
              data LO_TREE_NODE_COL type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL.
              LO_TREE_NODE_COL ?= LO_MARKED.
              data(LO_MARKED_ENT) = LO_TREE_NODE_COL->GET_STANDARD_COPY( ).
            catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR ##no_handler.
          endtry.
        endif.

*     reset user filter activation/deactivation
        data(LO_TREE_SRV) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
        if LO_TREE_SRV is bound.
          data(LV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER) = LO_TREE_SRV->GET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER( ).
        endif.
        SET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER( LV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER ).

        BUILD_TREE( SELECTION = LO_SELECTION ).

        if LO_SELECTION is bound and TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ) is not bound.
          BUILD_TREE( MODE = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL=>CO_MODE_SELECT_FIRST ).
        elseif LO_MARKED_ENT is bound.
          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DESELECT_ALL( ).
          data(LO_BO) = LO_MARKED_ENT->GET_FIRST( ).
          while LO_BO is bound.
            data(LO_TREE_NODE) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( LO_BO ).
            if LO_TREE_NODE is bound and LO_TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
              LO_TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
              read table TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<LS_NODE>)
                with key TREE_NODE components TREE_NODE = LO_TREE_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
              if SY-SUBRC = 0.
                TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                if GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ) = 'A'.
*               select all sub nodes if parent node has been selected
                  data LT_NODE type standard table of ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE with empty key.
                  clear LT_NODE.
                  append LO_TREE_NODE to LT_NODE.
                  loop at LT_NODE into LO_TREE_NODE.
                    loop at TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<LS_SUB_NODE>)
                      using key PARENT_TREE_NODE where PARENT_TREE_NODE = LO_TREE_NODE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                      if <LS_SUB_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                        <LS_SUB_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                        TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_SUB_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                        TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_SUB_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                        append <LS_SUB_NODE>-TREE_NODE to LT_NODE.
                      endif.
                    endloop.
                  endloop.
*               select parent node if all sub nodes have been selected
                  data LO_BO_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.
                  LO_BO_NODE = <LS_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                  while LO_BO_NODE is bound.
                    read table TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB assigning field-symbol(<LS_PARENT_NODE>) with table key BO_NODE = LO_BO_NODE.
                    if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <LS_PARENT_NODE>-TREE_NODE is bound and <LS_PARENT_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                      data(LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED) = ABAP_TRUE.
                      loop at TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB transporting no fields
                        using key PARENT_TREE_NODE
                        where PARENT_TREE_NODE = <LS_PARENT_NODE>-TREE_NODE and
                              TREE_NODE is bound and
                              TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
                        LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_FALSE.
                        exit.
                      endloop.
                      if LV_ALL_SUB_NODES_SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                        <LS_PARENT_NODE>-TREE_NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.
                        TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <LS_PARENT_NODE>-BO_NODE ).
                        TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->IF_BOL_BO_COL_MULTI_SEL~MARK( IV_BO = <LS_PARENT_NODE>-BO_ENTITY ).
                        LO_BO_NODE = <LS_PARENT_NODE>-PARENT_BO_NODE.
                      else.
                        clear LO_BO_NODE.
                      endif.
                    else.
                      clear LO_BO_NODE.
                    endif.
                  endwhile.
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.
            LO_BO = LO_MARKED_ENT->GET_NEXT( ).
          endwhile.
        endif.

        TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->REFRESH( ).

        raise event AFTER_PROFILE_CHANGED.
      endif.

    cleanup.
      LEAVE_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_PROFILE_CHANGE ).
  endtry.
  LEAVE_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_PROFILE_CHANGE ).

endmethod.


method CHANGE_PROFILE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR.

  C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS = value #(
    VIRTUAL_ROOT            = value #( ID = 'virtual_root'              EVENT_ID = 'virtual_root' ) ##NO_TEXT
    FOCUS_PARENT            = value #( ID = 'focus_parent'              EVENT_ID = 'focus_parent' ) ##NO_TEXT
    FOCUS_SUB               = value #( ID = 'focus_sub'                 EVENT_ID = 'focus_sub' ) ##NO_TEXT
    REFRESH                 = value #( ID = 'refresh'                   EVENT_ID = 'refresh' ) ##NO_TEXT
    RESET                   = value #( ID = 'reset'                     EVENT_ID = 'reset' ) ##NO_TEXT
    RESETALL                = value #( ID = 'resetall'                  EVENT_ID = 'resetall' ) ##NO_TEXT
    EXPAND_ALL              = value #( ID = 'expand_all'                EVENT_ID = 'expand_all' ) ##NO_TEXT
    COLLAPSE_ALL            = value #( ID = 'collapse_all'              EVENT_ID = 'collapse_all' ) ##NO_TEXT
    FILTERSEPARATOR         = value #( ID = 'filterseparator'           EVENT_ID = '' ) ##NO_TEXT
    FILTER                  = value #( ID = 'filter'                    EVENT_ID = '' ) ##NO_TEXT
    DEACTIVATE_FILTER       = value #( ID = 'filter'                    EVENT_ID = 'deactivate_filter' ) ##NO_TEXT
    ACTIVATE_FILTER         = value #( ID = 'filter'                    EVENT_ID = 'activate_filter' ) ##NO_TEXT
    POSITION                = value #( ID = 'position'                  EVENT_ID = 'position' ) ##NO_TEXT
    NEXT_HIT                = value #( ID = 'next_hit'                  EVENT_ID = 'next_hit' ) ##NO_TEXT
    TOOLBAR_MENU            = value #( ID = 'toolbar_oca_menu'          EVENT_ID = '' ) ##NO_TEXT
    TOOLBAR_OBJECT_MENU     = value #( ID = 'toolbar_object_oca_menu'   EVENT_ID = '' ) ##NO_TEXT
    PROFILE_GROUP           = value #( ID = 'profgrp'                   EVENT_ID = 'profgrp_selected' ) ##NO_TEXT
    PROFILE_GROUP_SEPARATOR = value #( ID = 'profgrp_selectedseparator' EVENT_ID = '' ) ##NO_TEXT
  ).

endmethod.


method CLEAR_FORCE_BUILD_TREE.
  clear FFORCE_BUILD_TREE.
endmethod.


method COLLAPSE_ALL.

  data: NODE    type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE,
        INDEX   type SYINDEX,
        LS_NODE type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.


* special mode "Expand next level"
  if TO_UPPER( ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL ) = 'L'.
*   we only want to collapse the nodes on the last hierarchy level where not all nodes are collapsed
    data LT_PARENT_KEY type table of STRING.
    append initial line to LT_PARENT_KEY.  "let's start with the root nodes
*   consider selection?
    if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL <> ABAP_TRUE.
      data LT_SELECTED_KEY type sorted table of STRING with unique key TABLE_LINE.
      if ME->GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_TAB into INDEX.
          field-symbols <LS_TREE_NODE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.
          read table ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index INDEX.
          if SY-SUBRC = 0.
            insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
          endif.
        endloop.
      elseif ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX > 0.
        INDEX = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
        read table ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index INDEX.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.
*   iterate the hierarchy levels
    do.
      data LT_CURRENT_KEY type table of STRING.
      clear LT_CURRENT_KEY.
      data LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED type ABAP_BOOL.
      LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_FALSE.
      field-symbols <LV_PARENT_KEY> type STRING.
      loop at LT_PARENT_KEY assigning <LV_PARENT_KEY>.
        loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> where PARENT_KEY = <LV_PARENT_KEY>.
          check <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY is not initial and <LS_TREE_NODE>-IS_LEAF <> ABAP_TRUE.
          append <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY to LT_CURRENT_KEY.
          if LT_SELECTED_KEY is not initial.
            read table LT_SELECTED_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY.
            if SY-SUBRC <> 0.  "if node is not selected, we check if it is part of the selected hierarchy
              read table LT_SELECTED_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-PARENT_KEY.
              if SY-SUBRC = 0.  "parent is selected -> add current entry as well
                insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
              else.  "parent is also not part of the selection -> check selection if below current node
                data LV_SEL_BELOW_CURRENT_NODE type ABAP_BOOL.
                LV_SEL_BELOW_CURRENT_NODE = ABAP_FALSE.
                data LV_SELECTED_KEY type STRING.
                loop at LT_SELECTED_KEY into LV_SELECTED_KEY.
                  while LV_SELECTED_KEY is not initial.
                    field-symbols <LS_TREE_NODE_SELECTED> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.
                    read table ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE_SELECTED>
                      with key NODE_KEY = LV_SELECTED_KEY.
                    if SY-SUBRC = 0.
                      if <LS_TREE_NODE_SELECTED>-NODE_KEY = <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY.
                        LV_SEL_BELOW_CURRENT_NODE = ABAP_TRUE.  "selection is part of current node's sub hierarchy
                        exit.
                      endif.
                      LV_SELECTED_KEY = <LS_TREE_NODE_SELECTED>-PARENT_KEY.
                    else.
                      exit.
                    endif.
                  endwhile.
                  if LV_SEL_BELOW_CURRENT_NODE = ABAP_TRUE.
                    exit.
                  endif.
                endloop.
                if LV_SEL_BELOW_CURRENT_NODE = ABAP_FALSE.
                  delete LT_CURRENT_KEY where TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY.  "ignore node and sub nodes
                  continue.  "node is not relevant
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
          check <LS_TREE_NODE>-IS_EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.
          LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.  "current level is expanded
        endloop.
      endloop.
      if LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_FALSE or LT_CURRENT_KEY is initial.
*       all nodes on current level are collapsed -> collapse parent nodes
        loop at LT_PARENT_KEY assigning <LV_PARENT_KEY> where TABLE_LINE is not initial.
          data LO_TREE_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE.
          LO_TREE_NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( <LV_PARENT_KEY> ).
          if LO_TREE_NODE is bound.
            LO_TREE_NODE->COLLAPS_NODE( ).
          endif.
        endloop.
        exit.
      endif.
      LT_PARENT_KEY = LT_CURRENT_KEY.  "continue on next hierarchy level
    enddo.
    return.
  endif.

  if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL = ABAP_TRUE.
    loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB into LS_NODE where PARENT_KEY is initial.
      NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( LS_NODE-NODE_KEY ).
      ME->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
    endloop.
  elseif ME->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq ABAP_TRUE.

    loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_TAB into INDEX.
      if INDEX > 0.
        NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( INDEX ).
        ME->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
      else." expand all root nodes.
        loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB into LS_NODE where PARENT_KEY is initial.
          NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( LS_NODE-NODE_KEY ).
          ME->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
        endloop.
      endif.
    endloop.
  else.
    if ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX > 0.
*  bo = me->typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
      INDEX = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
      NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( INDEX ).
      ME->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
    else." expand all root nodes.
      loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB into LS_NODE where PARENT_KEY is initial.
        NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( LS_NODE-NODE_KEY ).
        ME->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
      endloop.
    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


  method collapse_all_sub.

    data:
      child   type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      ls_node type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.

    check node is bound.

    loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab into ls_node where parent_key eq node->node_key.
      child = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( ls_node-node_key ).
      collapse_all_sub( child ).
    endloop.

* ensure node is collapsed
    if node->is_expanded( ) = abap_true and node->is_leaf eq abap_false.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->collapse_node( node->node_key ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


method CONSTRUCTOR.
  SUPER->CONSTRUCTOR( ).
  FTREE_CONTEXT_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_CONTEXT_CLASS.
endmethod.


  method deactivate_filters.

    data:
      tree_srv type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service.


    tree_srv = me->get_tree_srv( ).
    check tree_srv is bound.

    if tree_srv->is_filter_active( ) = abap_true.
*   store user filter activation/deactivation
      me->set_filter_deactivated_by_user( abap_true ).
      tree_srv->set_filter_active( abap_false ).
      me->build_tree( ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


method DETERMINE_CALLER_ID.

  clear MV_CALLER_ID.

  data(LV_CALLER_ID) = MV_CALLER_ID.

  " build caller ID from view hierarchy
  data(LO_WINDOW) = VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).
  while LO_WINDOW is bound.
    LV_CALLER_ID = SUBSTRING_AFTER(
                     VAL = LO_WINDOW->COMPONENT_ID
                     SUB = IF_BSP_CONTROLLER=>CO_SEP
                     OCC = -1
                   ) && LV_CALLER_ID.
    LO_WINDOW = LCL_WINDOW_ACCESS=>GET_PARENT_WINDOW( LO_WINDOW ).
  endwhile.

  SET_CALLER_ID( IV_CALLER_ID = LV_CALLER_ID ).

endmethod.


method DETERMINE_TREE_PROFGRP_ID.

  clear RESULT.

  " abbreviation
  data(LR_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).

  if not CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>IS_EHP2_ACTIVE( ).
    return.
  endif.

  data(LV_RESULT) = conv CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROFGRP_ID( LR_PROFILE->GET_PROFGRP_ID( ) ).

  " get from view configuration
  if LV_RESULT is initial.
    GET_VIEW_CONFIG_ATTRIBUTE(
      exporting
        IV_ATTR_NAME = 'PROFGRP_ID'
      importing
        EV_RESULT    = LV_RESULT
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

  " store/restore last tree profile
  if LV_RESULT is initial.
    RESULT = LAST_TREE_PROFGRP.
  else.
    RESULT = LAST_TREE_PROFGRP = LV_RESULT.
  endif.

endmethod.


method DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID.

  clear RESULT.

  " abbreviation
  data(LR_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).

  data(LV_PROFILE_ID) = value CRMT_TREE_PROFILE( ).

  if CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>IS_EHP2_ACTIVE( ).
    data(LV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID) = DETERMINE_TREE_PROFGRP_ID( ).
    if LV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID is not initial.
      LV_PROFILE_ID = LR_PROFILE->GET_PROFGRP_SEL( ).
      if LV_PROFILE_ID is initial.
        LV_PROFILE_ID = LR_PROFILE->GET_PROF_ID( ).
      endif.
      if not CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>IS_PROFILE_IN_PROFILE_GROUP(
        IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID = LV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID
        IV_PROFILE_ID       = LV_PROFILE_ID
      ).
        LV_PROFILE_ID = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_DEFAULT_PROFILE_BY_GROUP(
          IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID = LV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID
        ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.
  LR_PROFILE->SET_PROFGRP_SEL( LV_PROFILE_ID ).

  if LV_PROFILE_ID is initial and LV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID is initial.
    LV_PROFILE_ID = LR_PROFILE->GET_PROF_ID( ).
    if LV_PROFILE_ID is initial.
      " get from view configuration
      GET_VIEW_CONFIG_ATTRIBUTE(
        exporting
          IV_ATTR_NAME = 'PROF_ID'
        importing
          EV_RESULT    = LV_PROFILE_ID
      ) ##NO_TEXT.
    endif.
  endif.

  " check IC ovw setting
  if LV_PROFILE_ID is initial.
    LV_PROFILE_ID = CUSTOM_PROPERTIES-PROF_ID.
  endif.

  " store/restore last tree profile
  if LV_PROFILE_ID is initial.
    RESULT = LAST_TREE_PROFILE.
  else.
    RESULT = LAST_TREE_PROFILE = LV_PROFILE_ID.
  endif.

endmethod.


  method do_cleanup_context.

    data:
      wico      type ref to cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl.


    wico ?= me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
    check wico is bound.

    set handler me->on_tree_build_requested   for wico activation abap_false.
    set handler me->on_focus_parent_requested for wico activation abap_false.
    set handler me->on_focus_sub_requested    for wico activation abap_false.
    set handler me->on_tree_save_requested    for wico activation abap_false.
    set handler me->on_expand_all_sub         for wico activation abap_false.
    set handler me->on_select_node            for wico activation abap_false.

    clear me->iterator.
    clear last_found_node.
    clear last_selection.

    me->set_filter_deactivated_by_user( abap_false ).

    set handler me->on_history_state_restored for all instances activation abap_false.

* set typed copmonent controller
    me->typed_coco ?= me->comp_controller.
    me->typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->set_bol_tree( ).

* let's keep at least the rootobjects
    me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper->set_reset_survival_mode( abap_true ).

  endmethod.


  method do_config_determination.

    data:
      object_sub_type type bsp_dlc_object_sub_type,
      profile         type char10,
      conf_desc       type ref to if_bsp_dlc_config_appl,
      cucoprp         type ref to cl_iuprod_s_cucoprodsearc_impl.


* set profile id as sub object type, personalization is then unique for each profile
    conf_desc ?= me->configuration_descr.

    profile = me->determine_tree_prof_id( ).
    object_sub_type = profile.

    conf_desc->set_object_sub_type( object_sub_type ).

    if profile = 'IUPROD_S'.                                "#EC NOTEXT
      cucoprp ?= get_custom_controller( cl_iuprod_s_cucoprodsearc_impl=>gc_cuco_name ).

      if cucoprp is bound.
        if cucoprp->get_hide_fields( ) = abap_true.
          conf_desc->set_object_type( '<DEFAULT>' ).        "#EC NOTEXT
        else.
          conf_desc->set_object_type( 'IUICAMIPROD' ).      "#EC NOTEXT
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.
  SUPER->DO_HANDLE_DATA(
    FORM_FIELDS     = FORM_FIELDS
    GLOBAL_MESSAGES = GLOBAL_MESSAGES
  ).
endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
  GLOBAL_EVENT = SUPER->DO_HANDLE_EVENT(
    EVENT           = EVENT
    HTMLB_EVENT     = HTMLB_EVENT
    HTMLB_EVENT_EX  = HTMLB_EVENT_EX
    GLOBAL_MESSAGES = GLOBAL_MESSAGES
  ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_04 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method DO_INIT_CONTEXT.

  SUPER->DO_INIT_CONTEXT( ).

  ON_AFTER_ACTIVATED( ).

endmethod.


  method do_prepare_output.

* we do an auto refresh if the root collection has changed since the last build_tree
    if me->build_tree( only_if_root_col_changed = abap_true ) = abap_true.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).
    elseif me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab is not initial.
      try.
          if me->get_tree_srv( )->apply_filters( me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper ) = abap_true.
            clear me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab.
          endif.
        catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial.                     "#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.
    endif.

    super->do_prepare_output( iv_first_time ).

* check again the filter because it could be set within the SUPER->DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT
    if me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab is not initial.
      try.
          if me->get_tree_srv( )->apply_filters( me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper ) = abap_true.
            clear me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab.
            super->do_prepare_output( iv_first_time ).
          endif.
        catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial.                     "#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.
    endif.

* disable delta handling to force rebuilding of context menu (only for dynamic content)
    if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>get_disable_dh( ) = abap_true.
      loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->tree_node_action_tab transporting no fields where dynamic_content = abap_true. "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
        raise event disable_dh_navigation
          exporting
            validity = cl_ajax_utility=>gc_dh_nav_block_once.
        exit.
      endloop.
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method do_request.

    constants:
      lc_menu_trigger_hover   type string value 'HOVER',    "#EC NOTEXT
