      lc_menu_trigger_onclick type string value 'ONCLICK'.  "#EC NOTEXT

    data:
      lv_menu_trigger          type c length 40,
      lv_menu_trigger_original type string.


    lv_menu_trigger_original = cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_menu_trigger.

    get parameter id 'CRM_ISU_BOT_OCA_TRIG' field lv_menu_trigger.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      if to_upper( lv_menu_trigger ) = lc_menu_trigger_hover.
        cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_menu_trigger = lc_menu_trigger_hover.
      elseif to_upper( lv_menu_trigger ) = lc_menu_trigger_onclick.
        cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_menu_trigger = lc_menu_trigger_onclick.
      endif.
    endif.

    try.
        super->do_request( ).
      cleanup.
        cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_menu_trigger = lv_menu_trigger_original.
    endtry.

    cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_menu_trigger = lv_menu_trigger_original.

  endmethod.


method DO_VIEW_INIT_ON_ACTIVATION.
  SUPER->DO_VIEW_INIT_ON_ACTIVATION( ).
endmethod.


method DO_VIEW_INIT_ON_RESTORE.

" Will be done earlier -> see WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
*    clear me->mv_caller_id.
*
** build caller ID from view hierarchy
*    data(lo_window) = me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
*    while lo_window is bound.
*      me->mv_caller_id = substring_after(
*                           val = lo_window->component_id
*                           sub = if_bsp_controller=>co_sep
*                           occ = -1 ) && me->mv_caller_id.
*      lo_window = lcl_window_access=>get_parent_window( lo_window ).
*    endwhile.

  ON_AFTER_ACTIVATED( IV_RESTORE = ABAP_TRUE ).

  if PAGE_ROOTS is not initial and PAGE_ROOTS ne GET_ROOT_IDS( ).
    RESET_AFTER_RESTORE = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

endmethod.


  method eh_onactivate_filter.

    me->activate_filters( ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_onclose.

    typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_event(
      event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type
      event_id     = 'TREE_CLOSE' ).

  endmethod.


method EH_ONCOLLAPSE_ALL.

  COLLAPSE_ALL( ).

*
*    data: node    type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
*          index   type syindex,
*          ls_node type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.
*
*
** special mode "Expand next level"
*    if to_upper( me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all ) = 'L'.
**   we only want to collapse the nodes on the last hierarchy level where not all nodes are collapsed
*      data lt_parent_key type table of string.
*      append initial line to lt_parent_key.  "let's start with the root nodes
**   consider selection?
*      if me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all_ignore_sel <> abap_true.
*        data lt_selected_key type sorted table of string with unique key table_line.
*        if me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) = abap_true.
*          loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_tab into index.
*            field-symbols <ls_tree_node> type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.
*            read table me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> index index.
*            if sy-subrc = 0.
*              insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*            endif.
*          endloop.
*        elseif me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index > 0.
*          index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index.
*          read table me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> index index.
*          if sy-subrc = 0.
*            insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*          endif.
*        endif.
*      endif.
**   iterate the hierarchy levels
*      do.
*        data lt_current_key type table of string.
*        clear lt_current_key.
*        data lv_hier_level_expanded type abap_bool.
*        lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_false.
*        field-symbols <lv_parent_key> type string.
*        loop at lt_parent_key assigning <lv_parent_key>.
*          loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> where parent_key = <lv_parent_key>.
*            check <ls_tree_node>-node_key is not initial and <ls_tree_node>-is_leaf <> abap_true.
*            append <ls_tree_node>-node_key to lt_current_key.
*            if lt_selected_key is not initial.
*              read table lt_selected_key transporting no fields with table key table_line = <ls_tree_node>-node_key.
*              if sy-subrc <> 0.  "if node is not selected, we check if it is part of the selected hierarchy
*                read table lt_selected_key transporting no fields with table key table_line = <ls_tree_node>-parent_key.
*                if sy-subrc = 0.  "parent is selected -> add current entry as well
*                  insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*                else.  "parent is also not part of the selection -> check selection if below current node
*                  data lv_sel_below_current_node type abap_bool.
*                  lv_sel_below_current_node = abap_false.
*                  data lv_selected_key type string.
*                  loop at lt_selected_key into lv_selected_key.
*                    while lv_selected_key is not initial.
*                      field-symbols <ls_tree_node_selected> type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.
*                      read table me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node_selected>
*                        with key node_key = lv_selected_key.
*                      if sy-subrc = 0.
*                        if <ls_tree_node_selected>-node_key = <ls_tree_node>-node_key.
*                          lv_sel_below_current_node = abap_true.  "selection is part of current node's sub hierarchy
*                          exit.
*                        endif.
*                        lv_selected_key = <ls_tree_node_selected>-parent_key.
*                      else.
*                        exit.
*                      endif.
*                    endwhile.
*                    if lv_sel_below_current_node = abap_true.
*                      exit.
*                    endif.
*                  endloop.
*                  if lv_sel_below_current_node = abap_false.
*                    delete lt_current_key where table_line = <ls_tree_node>-node_key.  "ignore node and sub nodes
*                    continue.  "node is not relevant
*                  endif.
*                endif.
*              endif.
*            endif.
*            check <ls_tree_node>-is_expanded = abap_true.
*            lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_true.  "current level is expanded
*          endloop.
*        endloop.
*        if lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_false or lt_current_key is initial.
**       all nodes on current level are collapsed -> collapse parent nodes
*          loop at lt_parent_key assigning <lv_parent_key> where table_line is not initial.
*            data lo_tree_node type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node.
*            lo_tree_node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( <lv_parent_key> ).
*            if lo_tree_node is bound.
*              lo_tree_node->collaps_node( ).
*            endif.
*          endloop.
*          exit.
*        endif.
*        lt_parent_key = lt_current_key.  "continue on next hierarchy level
*      enddo.
*      return.
*    endif.
*
*    if me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all_ignore_sel = abap_true.
*      loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab into ls_node where parent_key is initial.
*        node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( ls_node-node_key ).
*        me->collapse_all_sub( node ).
*      endloop.
*    elseif me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq abap_true.
*
*      loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_tab into index.
*        if index > 0.
*          node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( index ).
*          me->collapse_all_sub( node ).
*        else." expand all root nodes.
*          loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab into ls_node where parent_key is initial.
*            node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( ls_node-node_key ).
*            me->collapse_all_sub( node ).
*          endloop.
*        endif.
*      endloop.
*    else.
*      if me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index > 0.
**  bo = me->typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
*        index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index.
*        node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( index ).
*        me->collapse_all_sub( node ).
*      else." expand all root nodes.
*        loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab into ls_node where parent_key is initial.
*          node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( ls_node-node_key ).
*          me->collapse_all_sub( node ).
*        endloop.
*      endif.
*
*    endif.

endmethod.


  method eh_ondeactivate_filter.

    me->deactivate_filters( ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_ondecrease.

    typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_event(
      event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type
      event_id     = 'TREE_DECREASE' ).

  data(LS_PROPS) = ME->TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  LS_PROPS-ALREADY_INCREASED = ABAP_FALSE.
  ME->TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->GET_CURRENT( )->SET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME = 'TREEPROPERTIES' IV_VALUE = LS_PROPS ).
* after decrease increase-icon should be displayed
    me->increase_icon = abap_true.
  endmethod.


method EH_ONEXPAND_ALL.

  EXPAND_ALL( ).

*    data:
*      index type syindex,
*      node  type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node.
*
*
** special mode "Expand next level"
*    if me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all = 'L'.
**   we only want to expand the nodes on the first hierarchy level where not all nodes are expanded
*      data lt_parent_key type table of string.
*      append initial line to lt_parent_key.  "let's start with the root nodes
**   consider selection?
*      if me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all_ignore_sel <> abap_true.
*        data lt_selected_key type sorted table of string with unique key table_line.
*        if me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) = abap_true.
*          loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_tab into index.
*            field-symbols <ls_tree_node> type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.
*            read table me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> index index.
*            if sy-subrc = 0.
*              insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*            endif.
*          endloop.
*        elseif me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index > 0.
*          index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index.
*          read table me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> index index.
*          if sy-subrc = 0.
*            insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*          endif.
*        endif.
*      endif.
**   iterate the hierarchy levels
*      do.
*        data lt_current_key type table of string.
*        clear lt_current_key.
*        data lv_hier_level_expanded type abap_bool.
*        lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_false.
*        field-symbols <lv_parent_key> type string.
*        loop at lt_parent_key assigning <lv_parent_key>.
*          loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_tree_node> where parent_key = <lv_parent_key>.
*            check <ls_tree_node>-node_key is not initial and <ls_tree_node>-is_leaf <> abap_true.
*            append <ls_tree_node>-node_key to lt_current_key.
*            if lt_selected_key is not initial.
*              read table lt_selected_key transporting no fields with table key table_line = <ls_tree_node>-node_key.
*              if sy-subrc <> 0.  "if node is not selected, we check if it is part of the selected hierarchy
*                read table lt_selected_key transporting no fields with table key table_line = <ls_tree_node>-parent_key.
*                if sy-subrc = 0.  "parent is selected -> add current entry as well
*                  insert <ls_tree_node>-node_key into table lt_selected_key.
*                else.  "parent is also not part of the selection -> skip entry
*                  continue.
*                endif.
*              endif.
*            endif.
*            check <ls_tree_node>-is_expanded = abap_false.
*            data lo_tree_node type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node.
*            lo_tree_node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_key( <ls_tree_node>-node_key ).
*            check lo_tree_node is bound and lo_tree_node->is_leaf <> abap_true and lo_tree_node->is_expanded( ) = abap_false.
*            lo_tree_node->expand_node( ).
*            lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_true.  "current level had to be expanded
*          endloop.
*        endloop.
*        if lt_current_key is initial or lv_hier_level_expanded = abap_true.
*          exit.  "no more hierarchy levels found or hierarchy level has been expanded
*        endif.
*        lt_parent_key = lt_current_key.  "continue on next hierarchy level
*      enddo.
*      return.
*    endif.
*
** store currently visible nodes
*    me->typed_context->isuboltree->mt_visible_nodes_before_expand = me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab.
*    sort me->typed_context->isuboltree->mt_visible_nodes_before_expand by node_key.
*
*    if me->tree_properties-expand_collapse_all_ignore_sel = abap_true.
*      clear cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
*      me->expand_all_root_nodes( ).
*    elseif me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq abap_true.
*      loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_tab into index.
*        if index > 0.
*          node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( index ).
*
*          if node is bound.
**         ensure node is expanded
*            me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( node->node_key ).
**         new version -> set root node into root node table for expanding
*            insert node->node_key into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
*          endif.
*        else." expand all root nodes.
*          clear cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
*          expand_all_root_nodes( ).
*          exit.
*        endif.
*      endloop.
*
*      if not cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding is initial.
*        me->typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).
*        clear cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
*      endif.
*    else.
*      if me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index > 0.
**      bo = me->typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
*        index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index.
*        node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( index ).
*        me->expand_all_sub( node ).
*      else.
**     expand all root nodes.
*        expand_all_root_nodes( ).
*      endif.
*    endif.
*
*    clear me->typed_context->isuboltree->mt_visible_nodes_before_expand.

endmethod.


  method eh_onfind_popup_close.

    data: iterator      type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col,
          entity        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          lt_col        type crmt_attr_name_tab,
          search_string type string,
          tree_node     type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node.


    if me->find_popup is not bound.
      return.
    endif.

    case me->find_popup->get_fired_outbound_plug( ).

      when 'FIND'.

        search_string = me->get_find_string( ).
        check search_string is not initial.
*   search only in current visible columns
        lt_col = me->get_visible_columns( ).

        iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
        entity = iterator->get_first_node( ).

        while entity is bound.

          last_found_node = entity->find( iv_string = search_string it_col = lt_col ).
          if last_found_node is bound.
            exit.
          endif.

          entity = iterator->get_next_node( ).
        endwhile.
        if last_found_node is bound.
          tree_node = me->ensure_node_is_visible( last_found_node ).
          select_node( selected_node = tree_node ).
          calculate_visible_row = abap_true.
        else.
          eh_onposition( iv_message = abap_true ).

*        data: lv_msgsrv type ref to cl_bsp_wd_message_service.
*
*        lv_msgsrv = cl_bsp_wd_message_service=>get_instance( ).
*        lv_msgsrv->add_message(
*              iv_msg_type       = 'I'
*              iv_msg_id         = '0H'
*              iv_msg_number     = 228
*              iv_important_info = abap_true ).
        endif.

      when 'CANCEL'.

        clear me->last_found_node.
        clear me->find_popup.
        try.
            me->typed_coco->typed_context->find->collection_wrapper->get_current(
              )->set_property(
                iv_attr_name = 'STRING'
                iv_value     = '' ).                        "#EC NOTEXT
          catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
        endtry.

    endcase.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onfocus_parent.

    me->on_focus_parent_requested( ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_onfocus_sub.

    me->on_focus_sub_requested( ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_onincrease.

    typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_event(
      event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type
      event_id     = 'TREE_INCREASE' ).

  data(LS_PROPS) = ME->TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  LS_PROPS-ALREADY_INCREASED = ABAP_TRUE.
  ME->TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->GET_CURRENT( )->SET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME = 'TREEPROPERTIES' IV_VALUE = LS_PROPS ).
* after increase decrease-icon should be displayed
    me->increase_icon = abap_false.
  endmethod.


  method eh_onnext_hit.

    data: entity        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          next_found    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          tree_node     type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
          lt_col        type crmt_attr_name_tab,
          search_string type string,
          iterator      type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.
*try to take the selected node
    if me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col is bound.
      if me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq abap_false and me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~size( ) > 0. "#EC BLANK_OK
        last_found_node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_current_bo( ).
      endif.
    endif.

    check last_found_node is bound.
    search_string = me->get_find_string( ).
    lt_col = me->get_visible_columns( ).

* first search below last found node
    next_found = last_found_node->find( iv_string = search_string it_col = lt_col iv_next_hit = abap_true ).

    if next_found is not bound.
* search in further root objects
      iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
      entity = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_visible_root_node( last_found_node ).
      iterator->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = entity ).  " set focus to root
      entity = iterator->get_next_node( ).

      while entity is bound.

        next_found = entity->find( iv_string = search_string it_col = lt_col ).
        if next_found is bound.
          exit.
        endif.

        entity = iterator->get_next_node( ).
      endwhile.
    endif.

    if next_found is bound.
      last_found_node = next_found.
      tree_node = me->ensure_node_is_visible( last_found_node ).
      select_node( selected_node = tree_node ).
      calculate_visible_row = abap_true.
    else.
      data: lv_msgsrv type ref to cl_bsp_wd_message_service.

      lv_msgsrv = cl_bsp_wd_message_service=>get_instance( ).
      lv_msgsrv->add_message(
            iv_msg_type       = 'I'
            iv_msg_id         = '0H'
            iv_msg_number     = 229
            iv_important_info = abap_true ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onnodeclick.

  DATA: entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
        col          TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
        col1_link_id TYPE crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id.

  get_infos_4_event( EXPORTING iv_htmlb_data   = htmlb_event_ex
                     IMPORTING er_entity       = entity
                               ev_col1_link_id = col1_link_id ).

* if generic navigation is wished don't trigger the normal navigation
  IF col1_link_id EQ 'LINK' OR col1_link_id EQ 'NODE_SELECT'.   "#EC NOTEXT

    CREATE OBJECT col TYPE cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
    col->add( entity ).

    op_node_clicked( iv_data_collection = col ).

  ELSE.
*   fire the new defined event for column 1
    eh_on_generic_nav( htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex
                       event_type     = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_link_event_type
                       event_id       = col1_link_id ).
  ENDIF.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onnodecollapse.

    data:
      event type ref to cl_thtmlb_tree.


    event ?= htmlb_event_ex.
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->collapse_node( event->row_key ).

    loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab transporting no fields
      where node_key = event->row_key.
      me->selectedrowindex = sy-tabix.
      exit.
    endloop.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onnodeexpand.

    data:
      event type ref to cl_thtmlb_tree.


    event ?= htmlb_event_ex.
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( event->row_key ).

    loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab transporting no fields
      where node_key = event->row_key.
      me->selectedrowindex = sy-tabix.
      exit.
    endloop.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onnodeselect.

    data:
      bonode     type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      node01     type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      event      type ref to cl_thtmlb_tree,
      event_link type ref to cl_thtmlb_link ##needed,
      event_tab  type ref to cl_thtmlb_table_view,
      row_idx    type syindex,
      node       type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      sel_node   type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      sel_node1  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      sel_bo     type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
      sel_bo1    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      octxtnav   type ref to if_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service.


    check htmlb_event_ex is bound.

    if typed_context->isuboltree->selection_mode eq typed_context->isuboltree->selmode_multi.
      typed_context->isuboltree->eh_on_row_selection( iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).
      ADAPT_REQUEST_NODESELECT( ).
    else.
      try.
*       tree event
          event ?= htmlb_event_ex.
          row_idx = event->row_index.
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
*       table event
          try.
              event_tab ?= htmlb_event_ex.
              row_idx = event_tab->row_index.
            catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
*           link event
              try.
                  event_link ?= htmlb_event_ex.
                  cl_thtmlb_util=>get_event_info(
                    exporting
                      iv_event = htmlb_event_ex
                    importing
                      ev_index = row_idx ).
                catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
                  return.
              endtry.
          endtry.
      endtry.

      node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( row_idx ).

      if node is not bound.
        return.
      endif.

      node01 ?= node.
      bonode ?= node01->bo.

      data(lr_comp_controller) = cast cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl( comp_controller ).

      if lr_comp_controller is bound.
        data(lr_profile) = lr_comp_controller->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

        if lr_profile is bound.
          data lv_profile type crm_si_wb_prfname.

          try.
              call method lr_profile->get_property_as_value
                exporting
                  iv_attr_name = 'WB_PROFILE' ##no_text
                importing
                  ev_result    = lv_profile.

              if not lv_profile is initial.
                data(lr_obj_cust) = cl_crm_iu_ic_obj_cust=>get_instance( profile = lv_profile ).

                if lr_obj_cust is bound.
                  data(lr_wrapped_entity) = bonode->get_wrapped_entity( ).

                  if lr_wrapped_entity is bound.
                    if lr_obj_cust->get_detail_view_for_object( object = lr_wrapped_entity ) is initial.
                      return.
                      " TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).
                    endif.
                  endif.
                endif.
              endif.
            catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error ##no_handler.
          endtry.
        endif.
      endif.

      if bonode->is_folder( ) = abap_false or me->tree_properties-allow_folder_selection = abap_true.
        if  me->tree_properties-allow_unselect eq abap_true
        and node->selected                     eq abap_true.
*        unselect the line
          me->typed_context->isuboltree->deselect_all( ).
          me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).
        elseif node is bound.
          sel_node = me->select_node( selected_node = node ).
        elseif event is bound.
          sel_node = me->select_node( index = row_idx  key = event->row_key ).
        else.
          sel_node = me->select_node( index = row_idx ).
        endif.
        if sel_node is bound.
*       publish new selection to context menu
          try.
              sel_node1 ?= sel_node.
              sel_bo1 ?= sel_node1->bo.
              sel_bo = sel_bo1->get_wrapped_entity( ).
              octxtnav = cl_crm_iu_obj_ctxt_nav_service=>get_instance( ).
              octxtnav->publish( sel_bo ).
            catch cx_root ##no_handler ##catch_all.
*           no problem
          endtry.
        endif.
      endif.

      TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).

    endif.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onposition.

  data: title type string.

  title = me->runtime->get_otr_text( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/FIND_POSITION' )."#EC NOTEXT

  if find_popup is not bound.
    find_popup = comp_controller->window_manager->create_popup(
                           iv_interface_view_name = 'IUBOTREE/FindPopup'
                           iv_usage_name          = 'findPopup'
                           iv_title               = title ). "#EC NOTEXT
  endif.

  find_popup->set_on_close_event( iv_event_name = 'find_popup_close' iv_view = me )."#EC NOTEXT
  find_popup->set_window_width( 200 ).
  find_popup->set_window_height( 30 ).
  find_popup->set_display_mode( find_popup->c_display_mode_surrounded ).

  if iv_message eq abap_true.
    find_popup->open( iv_inbound_plug = 'MESSAGE' )."#EC NOTEXT
  else.
    find_popup->open( ).
  endif.
  endmethod.


  method eh_onprofgrp_selected.
  data(LV_PROF_ID) = value CRMT_TREE_PROFILE( ).
  if HTMLB_EVENT is bound.
    LV_PROF_ID = SUBSTRING_AFTER( VAL = HTMLB_EVENT->ID  SUB = |__| ) ##NO_TEXT.
    if LV_PROF_ID is initial.
      LV_PROF_ID = SUBSTRING_AFTER( VAL = HTMLB_EVENT->ID  SUB = |{ COMPONENT_ID }_| ) ##NO_TEXT.
    endif.
    CHANGE_PROFILE( IV_PROF_ID = LV_PROF_ID ).
  endif.
  endmethod.


  method eh_onrefresh.

    me->build_tree( ).
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_onreset.

    data:
      bo   type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.


* reset virtual root
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->reset_virtual_root( io_tree_node = io_tree_node ).

    me->build_tree( ).
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).

* publish current focus because siblings could be there now
    if me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col is bound and
       me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~size( ) = 1.
      bo = me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->get_current_node( ).
      node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
      if me->typed_context->isuboltree->has_node_siblings( node ) = abap_true.
        me->update_focus_col( node ).
      endif.
    endif.

    me->calculate_visible_row = abap_true.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onresetall.

    data:
      bo   type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.


* reset all virtual roots
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->reset_virtual_root( all = abap_true ).

    me->build_tree( ).
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).

* publish current focus because siblings could be there now
    if me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col is bound and
       me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~size( ) = 1.
      bo = me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->get_current_node( ).
      node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
      if me->typed_context->isuboltree->has_node_siblings( node ) = abap_true.
        me->update_focus_col( node ).
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method eh_onshowcustomizingprofile.

    data:
      ent type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
      col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


* create popup with customizing tree profile
    ent = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity(
            name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof
            key  = me->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ).
    if ent is bound.
      create object col type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
      col->add( ent ).
*   open the popup for the tree profile customizing
      me->comp_controller->window_manager->create_popup(
        iv_interface_view_name = 'MainWindow'
        iv_usage_name          = 'profileCustomizingDisplay'
        iv_title               = ent->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_DESC' )
      )->open(
        iv_inbound_plug = 'PROFILE'
        iv_collection   = col ).                            "#EC NOTEXT
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method eh_ontvnavigator.

*remember visible first row for rentry to view
    data: table_event type ref to clg_thtmlb_tableview.

    try.
        table_event ?= htmlb_event_ex.
        page_visiblefirstrow = table_event->visiblefirstrow.
        page_visiblerowcount = table_event->visiblerowcount.
* remember all roots
        page_roots = get_root_ids( ).

      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.                      "#EC NO_HANDLER
    endtry.
  endmethod.


  method eh_onvirtual_root.

    data:
      node  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      index type sytabix.


    index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index.
    check index > 0.

    node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( index ).

* special handling for dynmically hidden nodes above the selected node:
* - if the parent node is hidden by the custom exit it might reappear after the parent's parent is hidden
* - in this case we will set the parent node as virtual root
    try.
        data lo_selected_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
        data lo_direct_parent_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
        data lo_visible_parent_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
        lo_selected_node ?= node->bo.
        lo_visible_parent_node = lo_selected_node->get_parent_node( only_visible = abap_true ).
        if lo_visible_parent_node is bound.
          lo_direct_parent_node = lo_selected_node->get_parent_node( ).
          while lo_direct_parent_node is bound and
                lo_direct_parent_node <> lo_visible_parent_node.
            data lt_direct_parent_node type table of ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
            insert lo_direct_parent_node into lt_direct_parent_node index 1.
            lo_direct_parent_node = lo_direct_parent_node->get_parent_node( ).
          endwhile.
          loop at lt_direct_parent_node into lo_direct_parent_node.
            if lo_direct_parent_node->is_hidden_by_custom_exit( ) = abap_true.
*           let's check if the node reappears after it's parent nodes are hidden
              data lo_parent_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
              lo_parent_node = lo_direct_parent_node->get_parent_node( ).
              while lo_parent_node is bound.
                add 1 to lo_parent_node->hidden_status.
                lo_parent_node = lo_parent_node->get_parent_node( ).
              endwhile.
              if lo_direct_parent_node->is_hidden_by_custom_exit( ) = abap_false.
*             we found the alternate virtual root node!
                data lo_alternate_virtual_root_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
                lo_alternate_virtual_root_node = lo_direct_parent_node.
              endif.
              lo_parent_node = lo_direct_parent_node->get_parent_node( ).
              while lo_parent_node is bound.
                add -1 to lo_parent_node->hidden_status.
                lo_parent_node = lo_parent_node->get_parent_node( ).
              endwhile.
              if lo_alternate_virtual_root_node is bound.
                exit.  "done!
              endif.
            endif.
          endloop.
        endif.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error cx_sy_ref_is_initial ##no_handler.
    endtry.

    if lo_alternate_virtual_root_node is bound.
      lo_alternate_virtual_root_node->set_virtual_root( active = abap_true ).
    else.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->set_virtual_root( node ).

      if node is bound.
        loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab transporting no fields
          where node_key = node->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key.
          me->selectedrowindex = sy-tabix.
          exit.
        endloop.
      endif.
    endif.

    me->build_tree( ).
    me->typed_context->isuboltree->refresh( ).

    if lo_alternate_virtual_root_node is bound.
      me->selectedrowindex = 1.
      try.
          node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( lo_alternate_virtual_root_node ).
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
          clear node.
      endtry.
    endif.

    if me->typed_context->isuboltree->has_node_siblings( node ) = abap_true.
      me->update_focus_col( node ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method eh_on_generic_nav.

* special handling for toolbar OCAs
    get_infos_4_event(
      exporting
        iv_htmlb_data                = htmlb_event_ex
        iv_return_current_if_initial = boolc( event_type = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_oca_event_type or
                                              event_type = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type )
      importing
        er_entity                    = data(entity)
        ev_node_id                   = data(node_id)
        eo_node_entity               = data(node_entity) ).

* special event IDs...
    case event_id.
      when '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT#'  ##no_text.
*     select node first
        data lv_index type i.
        cl_thtmlb_util=>get_event_info(
          exporting
            iv_event = htmlb_event_ex
          importing
            ev_index = lv_index ).
        if lv_index is not initial.
          data lo_tree_evt type ref to cl_thtmlb_tree.
          create object lo_tree_evt.
          lo_tree_evt->row_index = lv_index.
          me->eh_onnodeselect( htmlb_event_ex = lo_tree_evt ).
          me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index = lv_index.
          me->eh_onvirtual_root( ).
        endif.
        return.
      when '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT_RESET#'  ##no_text.
        me->eh_onreset( ).
        return.
    endcase.

    typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_event(
      event_type              = event_type
      event_id                = event_id
      event_entity            = entity
      node_id                 = node_id
      io_node_entity          = node_entity
      io_htmlb_event_ex       = htmlb_event_ex
      iv_suppress_generic_nav = iv_suppress_generic_nav ).

  endmethod.


  method eh_on_sort.

  data: treenode type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
        iterator type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.

  data: lv_bo               type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
        lv_thtmlb_tableview type ref to cl_thtmlb_table_view,
        lv_attr_name        type name_komp,
        lv_sort_order       type char1,
        lv_stable           type abap_bool value abap_false,
        ls_sort_state       type crmt_bol_sort_state.


  data:
     comp    type name_komp,
     path1   type string,
     path2   type string,
     pathtab type table of crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_path,
     index   type sytabix.

  try.
      lv_thtmlb_tableview ?= htmlb_event_ex.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
      return.
  endtry.

  if lv_thtmlb_tableview is bound.

*   check whether its realy a sorting event
    check lv_thtmlb_tableview->event_type = cl_thtmlb_table_view=>co_header_click.

*   now check if we have to sort a tree or a table...
    if me->get_tree_srv( )->is_table( ) = abap_false.

*     get name of column to be sorted
      ls_sort_state-sort_attr  = lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_key.
      check ls_sort_state-sort_attr is not initial.
*     get sorting direction
      case lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_sort_direction.
        when 'U'.
          ls_sort_state-sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_ascending.
        when 'D'.
          ls_sort_state-sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_descending.
        when others.
          return.
      endcase.

      if ls_sort_state ne me->typed_context->isuboltree->sort_state.
*       set SORT parameters and trigger tree refresh
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->sort_state = ls_sort_state.

*       give application full control about the actual sorting
*       -> Root Nodes may be sorted in application redefined REFRESH() method based on
*          sort param member attribute
*       -> Sort parameter passed to tree node proxy GET_CHILDREN()
        me->build_tree( ).
      endif.

    else.

*     get name of column to be sorted
      lv_attr_name  = lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_key.
      check lv_attr_name is not initial.

*   convert generic attribute name to real entity name:
      replace 'COL' with 'COL_' into lv_attr_name.

      iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
      treenode = iterator->get_first_node( ).
      treenode = treenode->get_root_node( ).
      try.
          path1 = treenode->get_mapped_pres_entry( lv_attr_name ).
        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
          clear path1.
      endtry.
      if path1 is not initial.

        shift path1 left deleting leading '/'.

        if path1 ns '/'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
          comp = path1.
        else.
          split path1 at '/' into table pathtab.              "#EC NOTEXT
          index =  lines( pathtab ).
          read table pathtab into comp index index.
          delete pathtab index index.
          loop at pathtab into path1.
            if path2 is initial.
              path2 = path1.
            else.
              concatenate path2 path1 into path2 separated by '/'."#EC NOTEXT
            endif.
          endloop.
        endif.

*     get sorting direction
        case lv_thtmlb_tableview->column_sort_direction.
          when 'U'.
            lv_sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_ascending.
          when 'D'.
            lv_sort_order = cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper=>sort_descending.
          when others.
            return.
        endcase.
*     sort
        try.
            me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper->sort( iv_attr_name        = comp
                                                                      iv_sort_order       = lv_sort_order
                                                                      iv_stable           = lv_stable
                                                                      iv_path_2_subobject = path2 ).

          catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error."#EC NO_HANDLER
*       could be a renamed attribute or field which does not belong to the collection
        endtry.
*     in case of single selection restore the selected row index
*        if   me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_mode = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selmode_single
*          or me->typed_context->isuboltree->selection_mode = me->typed_context->isuboltree->selmode_lineedit.
*          if me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index <> '0'.
*            me->typed_context->isuboltree->selected_index = me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_current_index( ).
*          endif.
*        endif.
        build_tree( ).
      else.

        me->typed_context->isuboltree->eh_on_sort( iv_htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                                              iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

*   now tree node is sorted but rootobjects node has to be sorted:

        me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper->clear_collection( ).

        iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
        treenode = iterator->get_first_node( ).

        while treenode is bound.
          treenode = treenode->get_root_node( ).
          lv_bo = treenode->get_wrapped_entity( ).

          me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper->add( lv_bo ).
          treenode = iterator->get_next_node( ).
        endwhile.
        build_tree( ).

      endif.

    endif.

  endif.

  endmethod.


  method ensure_entity_is_visible.

    data:
      bo        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      children  type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
      to_do_col type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
      lo_ent    type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
      lv_name   type crmt_ext_obj_name.


    check entity is bound.

* is node in tree but collapsed? -> expand till node is visible
    node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_parent( ).
    check node is bound.

* get root node
    bo ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_bo( node->node_key ).

    check bo is bound and bo->get_wrapped_entity( ) <> entity.

    clear node.

* determine chhildren of root and put them to to do list
    try.
        lo_ent ?= entity.
        lv_name = lo_ent->get_name( ).
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error ##no_handler.
    endtry.

    if lv_name is initial or bo->check_potential_child_types( iv_child_type = lv_name ) = abap_true.
      to_do_col = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
    endif.
    check to_do_col is bound.

    " performance improvement: first while checks only first level children
    bo ?= to_do_col->get_first( ).
    while bo is bound.
      data lo_entity type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.
      lo_entity ?= bo->get_wrapped_entity( ).
      if lo_entity = entity.
*     correct entry found!
        node = ensure_node_is_visible( bo ).
        return.
      elseif it_selection_path is not initial.
        read table it_selection_path transporting no fields with key table_line = lo_entity.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
*       current node is the right path -> reduce list to this node!
          if lv_name is initial or bo->check_potential_child_types( iv_child_type = lv_name ) = abap_true.
            to_do_col = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
          endif.
          clear bo.
          if to_do_col is bound.
            bo ?= to_do_col->get_first( ).
          endif.
          continue.
        endif.
      endif.
      bo ?= to_do_col->get_next( ).
    endwhile.

    "second while considers also sub-children
    bo ?= to_do_col->get_first( ).
    while bo is bound.
      if bo->get_wrapped_entity( ) = entity.
*     correct entry found!
        node = ensure_node_is_visible( bo ).
        return.
      else.
*     entry not found -> get next children and put them to the to do list
        if lv_name is initial or bo->check_potential_child_types( iv_child_type = lv_name ) = abap_true.
          children = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
          to_do_col->add_collection( children ).
        endif.
        bo ?= to_do_col->get_next( ).
      endif.
    endwhile.

  endmethod.


  method ensure_node_is_visible.

    data:
      bo           type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      to_do_col    type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
      has_children type abap_bool.

    bo = tree_bo.

    create object to_do_col
      type
      cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

* get path from target entity to root and put it to the to do list
    while bo is bound.
      to_do_col->add( bo ).
      bo = bo->get_parent_node( ).
    endwhile.
*     expand tree from root to target entity
    bo ?= to_do_col->get_last( ).
    while bo is bound.
      node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
      has_children = bo->has_children( ).

      bo ?= to_do_col->get_previous( ).
      if node is bound and node->is_expanded( ) = abap_false and bo is bound.
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( node->node_key ).
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).
      elseif node is bound and has_children eq abap_false.
        node->is_leaf = abap_true.
      endif.

    endwhile.

  endmethod.


method ENTER_MUTEX.
  if LINE_EXISTS( FMUTEX[ ID = IV_ID ] ).
    return.
  endif.
  insert value #( ID = IV_ID ) into table FMUTEX.
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.
endmethod.


method ENTER_UPDATE_MODE.
  FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT = FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT + 1.
  ENTER_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC( ).
endmethod.


method ENTER_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method EXPAND_ALL.

  data:
    INDEX type SYINDEX,
    NODE  type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE.


* special mode "Expand next level"
  if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL = 'L'.
*   we only want to expand the nodes on the first hierarchy level where not all nodes are expanded
    data LT_PARENT_KEY type table of STRING.
    append initial line to LT_PARENT_KEY.  "let's start with the root nodes
*   consider selection?
    if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL <> ABAP_TRUE.
      data LT_SELECTED_KEY type sorted table of STRING with unique key TABLE_LINE.
      if ME->GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_TAB into INDEX.
          field-symbols <LS_TREE_NODE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.
          read table ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index INDEX.
          if SY-SUBRC = 0.
            insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
          endif.
        endloop.
      elseif ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX > 0.
        INDEX = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
        read table ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index INDEX.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.
*   iterate the hierarchy levels
    do.
      data LT_CURRENT_KEY type table of STRING.
      clear LT_CURRENT_KEY.
      data LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED type ABAP_BOOL.
      LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_FALSE.
      field-symbols <LV_PARENT_KEY> type STRING.
      loop at LT_PARENT_KEY assigning <LV_PARENT_KEY>.
        loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> where PARENT_KEY = <LV_PARENT_KEY>.
          check <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY is not initial and <LS_TREE_NODE>-IS_LEAF <> ABAP_TRUE.
          append <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY to LT_CURRENT_KEY.
          if LT_SELECTED_KEY is not initial.
            read table LT_SELECTED_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY.
            if SY-SUBRC <> 0.  "if node is not selected, we check if it is part of the selected hierarchy
              read table LT_SELECTED_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-PARENT_KEY.
              if SY-SUBRC = 0.  "parent is selected -> add current entry as well
                insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_KEY.
              else.  "parent is also not part of the selection -> skip entry
                continue.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
          check <LS_TREE_NODE>-IS_EXPANDED = ABAP_FALSE.
          data LO_TREE_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE.
          LO_TREE_NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY ).
          check LO_TREE_NODE is bound and LO_TREE_NODE->IS_LEAF <> ABAP_TRUE and LO_TREE_NODE->IS_EXPANDED( ) = ABAP_FALSE.
          LO_TREE_NODE->EXPAND_NODE( ).
          LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.  "current level had to be expanded
        endloop.
      endloop.
      if LT_CURRENT_KEY is initial or LV_HIER_LEVEL_EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.
        exit.  "no more hierarchy levels found or hierarchy level has been expanded
      endif.
      LT_PARENT_KEY = LT_CURRENT_KEY.  "continue on next hierarchy level
    enddo.
    return.
  endif.

* store currently visible nodes
  ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->MT_VISIBLE_NODES_BEFORE_EXPAND = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB.
  sort ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->MT_VISIBLE_NODES_BEFORE_EXPAND by NODE_KEY.

  if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL = ABAP_TRUE.
    clear CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01=>GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING.
    ME->EXPAND_ALL_ROOT_NODES( ).
  elseif ME->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq ABAP_TRUE.
    loop at ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_TAB into INDEX.
      if INDEX > 0.
        NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( INDEX ).

        if NODE is bound.
*         ensure node is expanded
          ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->EXPAND_NODE( NODE->NODE_KEY ).
*         new version -> set root node into root node table for expanding
          insert NODE->NODE_KEY into table CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01=>GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING.
        endif.
      else." expand all root nodes.
        clear CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01=>GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING.
        EXPAND_ALL_ROOT_NODES( ).
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.

    if not CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01=>GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING is initial.
      ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
      clear CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01=>GT_ROOT_NODES_FOR_EXPANDING.
    endif.
  else.
    if ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX > 0.
*      bo = me->typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
      INDEX = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
      NODE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( INDEX ).
      ME->EXPAND_ALL_SUB( NODE ).
    else.
*     expand all root nodes.
      EXPAND_ALL_ROOT_NODES( ).
    endif.
  endif.

  clear ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->MT_VISIBLE_NODES_BEFORE_EXPAND.

endmethod.


  method expand_all_root_nodes.

    field-symbols:
      <ls_node> type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.


    loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab assigning <ls_node> where parent_key is initial.
*   ensure node is expanded
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( <ls_node>-node_key ).
*   new version -> set root node into root node table for expanding
      insert <ls_node>-node_key into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
    endloop.

    me->typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).

    clear cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.

  endmethod.


  method expand_all_sub.

    if node is bound.
*   ensure node is expanded
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( node->node_key ).
*   new version -> set root node into root node table for expanding
      insert node->node_key into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
      if sy-subrc = 0 and lines( cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding ) = 1.
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).
        clear cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01=>gt_root_nodes_for_expanding.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method GENERATE_CELLERATOR_ID.
  RV_RESULT = GV_CELLERATOR_TAG_ID = |{ COMPONENT_ID }_{ GENERATE_CELLERATOR_TAG_ID( ) }|.
endmethod.


method GENERATE_CELLERATOR_TAG_ID.
  data(LR_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  data(LS_TREE_PROPERTIES) = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  if LR_TREE_SERVICE->IS_TABLE( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
    RV_RESULT = |Hier3_Table| ##NO_TEXT.
    return.
  endif.
  if LS_TREE_PROPERTIES-TOOLBAR_FOREIGN_USE = 'TRUE' ##NO_TEXT.
    RV_RESULT = |Hier1| ##NO_TEXT.
  else.
    RV_RESULT = |Hier2| ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS.

  RESULT = new #( ).

  data(LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  data(LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE) = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE.
  data(LR_ISU_BOL_TREE) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE.

  data(LT_BUTTON_GROUPS) = value CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>TT_BUTTON_GROUPS( ).

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_19 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  " Node dependent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_NODE_OCA'
    SEQUENCE = 01
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_NODE_OCA(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Node independent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_OCA'
    SEQUENCE = 02
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_OCA(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Node dependent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons and
  " Node independent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'OCA_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS'
    SEQUENCE = 03
    ITEMS    = GET_OCA_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Tree Profile Selection
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_PROFILEGROUPS'
    SEQUENCE = 04
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_PROFILEGROUPS(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Environment buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_ENV_REFRESH'
    SEQUENCE = 05
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_ENV_REFRESH(
                 IV_MODE              = MODE
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_ENV_FOCUS'
    SEQUENCE = 06
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_ENV_FOCUS(
                 IV_MODE              = MODE
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_ENV_FILTER'
    SEQUENCE = 07
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_ENV_FILTER(
                 IV_MODE              = MODE
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Expand and Collapse buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_EXPAND_COLLAPSE'
    SEQUENCE = 08
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_EXPAND_COLLAPSE(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Search buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_SEARCH'
    SEQUENCE = 09
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_SEARCH(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Filter buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_FILTER'
    SEQUENCE = 10
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_FILTER(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

  " Sort buttons
  insert value #(
    ID       = 'ACTIONS_SORT'
    SEQUENCE = 11
    ITEMS    = GET_ACTIONS_SORT(
                 IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
                 IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
               )
  ) into table LT_BUTTON_GROUPS ##NO_TEXT.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_02 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_20 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS(
    exporting
      IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
      IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
      IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
    changing
      CT_BUTTON_GROUPS     = LT_BUTTON_GROUPS
  ).

  RESULT->* = ADJUST_TOOLBAR_MORE_BUTTON(
    IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
    IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
    IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
    IT_BUTTON_GROUPS     = LT_BUTTON_GROUPS
  ).

  " customizing preview if config mode is active
  insert lines of GET_ACTIONS_PROFILE_CUSTOM(
    IR_ISU_BOL_TREE      = LR_ISU_BOL_TREE
    IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE  = LR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
    IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE = LR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE
  ) into table RESULT->*.

  " ensure no separator at end or beginning or next to each other
  CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>OPTIMIZE_SEPERATORS( changing CT_BUTTONS = RESULT->* ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_18 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_ENV_FILTER.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add some buttons
  "
  " - "Restrict Environment to Focus Object" Button
  " - "Extend Environmemt" Button
  " - "Display Entire Environment" Button
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_10 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data:
    LR_ACTION type ref to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON.

  if cond ABAP_BOOLEAN( when IV_MODE = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>C_TREE_MODE-ENVIRONMENT
                        then cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_FILTER <> ABAP_TRUE
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   )
                        else cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_FILTER = ABAP_UNDEFINED
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   ) ) = ABAP_TRUE.

    " "Restrict Environment to Focus Object" Button
    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-VIRTUAL_ROOT-ID ] ).
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-VIRTUAL_ROOT-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-VIRTUAL_ROOT-EVENT_ID
          TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/VIRTUAL_ROOT' ) ##NO_TEXT
          ICON_SRC = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = 'sap-icon://zoom-in' ) ##NO_TEXT
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->IS_VIRTUAL_ROOT_POSSIBLE( ).
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

    " "Extend Environmemt" Button
    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESET-ID ] ).
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESET-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESET-EVENT_ID
          TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/VIRTUAL_ROOT_RESET' ) ##NO_TEXT
          ICON_SRC = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = 'sap-icon://zoom-out' ) ##NO_TEXT
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->HAS_VIRTUAL_ROOT( ).
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

    " "Display Entire Environment" Button
    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESETALL-ID ] ).
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESETALL-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-RESETALL-EVENT_ID
          TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/SHOW_COMPLETE_ENV' ) ##NO_TEXT
          ICON_SRC = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = 'sap-icon://background' ) ##NO_TEXT
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->HAS_VIRTUAL_ROOT( ).
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_11 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_ENV_FOCUS.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add "Show Parent" and "Show Child" buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_09 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data:
    LR_ACTION type ref to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON.

  if cond ABAP_BOOLEAN( when IV_MODE = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>C_TREE_MODE-ENVIRONMENT
                        then cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_FOCUS_NAV <> ABAP_TRUE
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   )
                        else cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_FOCUS_NAV = ABAP_UNDEFINED
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   ) ) = ABAP_TRUE.

    " "Show Parent" button
    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_PARENT-ID ] ).
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_PARENT-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_PARENT-EVENT_ID
          TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/SHOW_PARENT' ) ##NO_TEXT
          ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL(
                       IV_ICON_NAME = 'SORTUP'
                       IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
                     ) ##NO_TEXT
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = BOOLC( TYPED_CONTEXT->PARENTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SIZE( ) > 0 ).
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

    " "Show Child" button
    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_SUB-ID ] ) ##NO_TEXT.
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_SUB-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FOCUS_SUB-EVENT_ID
          TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/SHOW_CHILD' ) ##NO_TEXT
          ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL(
                       IV_ICON_NAME = 'SORTDOWN'
                       IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
                     ) ##NO_TEXT
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = BOOLC( TYPED_CONTEXT->SUBOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SIZE( ) > 0 ).
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_12 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_ENV_REFRESH.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add "Refresh" buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_08 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data:
    LR_ACTION type ref to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON.

  if cond ABAP_BOOLEAN( when IV_MODE = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>C_TREE_MODE-ENVIRONMENT
                        then cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_REFRESH <> ABAP_TRUE
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   )
                        else cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-DISABLE_ENVIRONMENT_REFRESH = ABAP_UNDEFINED
                                     then ABAP_TRUE
                                     else ABAP_FALSE
                                   ) ) = ABAP_TRUE.

    clear LR_ACTION.
    try.
        LR_ACTION = ref #( ACTIONS[ ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-REFRESH-ID ] ) ##NO_TEXT.
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
        insert value #(
          ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-REFRESH-ID
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-REFRESH-EVENT_ID
          TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_REFRESH
        ) into table ACTIONS reference into LR_ACTION.
    endtry.

    if LR_ACTION is bound.
      LR_ACTION->ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE.
      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.
    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_13 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_EXPAND_COLLAPSE.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add "Expand all" and "Collapse all" buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_07 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  if TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL <> ABAP_FALSE
    and IS_TABLE( IV_ACTUAL = ABAP_TRUE ) = ABAP_FALSE.

*    case TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE.
*      when CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_NONE.
*      when CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_SINGLE.
*      when CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_MULTI.
*      when CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_LINEEDIT.
*      when CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_MULTIEDIT.
*    endcase.

*   analyze expand/collapse state
    data LV_EXPAND_ENABLED   type ABAP_BOOL.
    data LV_COLLAPSE_ENABLED type ABAP_BOOL.

    field-symbols <LS_TREE_NODE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.

*   check if restricted to selected nodes
    if TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL <> ABAP_TRUE.
      data LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY type hashed table of STRING with unique key TABLE_LINE.
      if GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        data LV_INDEX type SYTABIX.
        loop at IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->SELECTION_TAB into LV_INDEX where TABLE_LINE > 0.
          read table IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index LV_INDEX.
          if SY-SUBRC = 0.
            insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY.
          endif.
        endloop.
      elseif IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->SELECTED_INDEX > 1.
        LV_INDEX = IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
        read table IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> index LV_INDEX.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.

*   analyze visible tree nodes (ignore leafs, they cannot be opened nor collapsed)
    loop at IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->NODE_TAB assigning <LS_TREE_NODE> where IS_LEAF <> ABAP_TRUE.
*     check selection restriction
      if LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY is not initial.
        read table LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY.
        if SY-SUBRC <> 0.  "current node is not within selection -> check parent
          check <LS_TREE_NODE>-PARENT_KEY is not initial.
          read table LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY transporting no fields with table key TABLE_LINE = <LS_TREE_NODE>-PARENT_KEY.
          if SY-SUBRC = 0.  "parent node is selected -> mark current node also as selected
            insert <LS_TREE_NODE>-NODE_KEY into table LT_SELECTED_NODE_KEY.
          else.
            continue.  "node is not within selection
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
      if <LS_TREE_NODE>-IS_EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.
        LV_COLLAPSE_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE.
      else.
        LV_EXPAND_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE.
      endif.
*     check if we are done
      if LV_EXPAND_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE and LV_COLLAPSE_ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE.
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.

    " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    " Add "Expand all" button
    " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    data(ACTION) = value CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON( ).
    ACTION-ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-EXPAND_ALL-ID.
    ACTION-ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-EXPAND_ALL-EVENT_ID.
    ACTION-TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_EXPANDALL.
    ACTION-ENABLED  = LV_EXPAND_ENABLED.
    if TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL <> ABAP_TRUE or CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial.
      data LV_EXPAND_TEXT type STRING.
      CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_ICON_INFO(
        exporting
          IV_ICON_TYPE    = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_EXPAND
        importing
          EV_ICON_TOOLTIP = ACTION-TOOLTIP
          EV_ICON_TITLE   = LV_EXPAND_TEXT
        exceptions
          others          = 0 ).
      "adaption for Fiori 3.0
*      if cl_htmlb_element=>mc_accessibility is not initial.
      ACTION-TEXT = LV_EXPAND_TEXT.
*      endif.
    endif.

*   expand one level?
    if TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL = 'L'.
      ACTION-TOOLTIP = text-EXL.  "Expand Next Level
      if ACTION-TOOLTIP is initial.
        ACTION-TOOLTIP = CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'CRM_UIU_LST_PPRITEM/EXPAND_ONE_LEVEL' ).
      endif.
      if CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial.
        ACTION-TEXT = ACTION-TOOLTIP.
      endif.
    endif.

    insert ACTION into table RT_ACTIONS.

    " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    " Add "Collapse all" button
    " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ACTION = value CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON( ).
    ACTION-ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-COLLAPSE_ALL-ID.
    ACTION-ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-COLLAPSE_ALL-EVENT_ID.
    ACTION-TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_COLLAPSEALL.
    ACTION-ENABLED  = LV_COLLAPSE_ENABLED.
    if TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL_IGNORE_SEL <> ABAP_TRUE or
       CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial or
       TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL = 'L'.
      data LV_COLLAPSE_TEXT type STRING.
      CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_ICON_INFO(
        exporting
          IV_ICON_TYPE    = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_COLLAPSE
        importing
          EV_ICON_TOOLTIP = ACTION-TOOLTIP
          EV_ICON_TITLE   = LV_COLLAPSE_TEXT
        exceptions
          others          = 0 ).
      "adaption for Fiori 3.0
*      if cl_htmlb_element=>mc_accessibility is not initial.
      ACTION-TEXT = LV_COLLAPSE_TEXT.
*      endif.
    endif.

*   collapse one level?
    if TO_UPPER( TREE_PROPERTIES-EXPAND_COLLAPSE_ALL ) = 'L'.
      if text-COL is not initial.
        ACTION-TOOLTIP = text-COL.  "Collapse Last Level
        if CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial.
          ACTION-TEXT = ACTION-TOOLTIP.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.

    insert ACTION into table RT_ACTIONS.
  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_14 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_FILTER.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add Filter buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_03 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data(LV_FILTER_MODE) = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_FILTER_MODE( ).

  if ( LV_FILTER_MODE = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GC_DEFAULT_FILTER_ON
    or LV_FILTER_MODE = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GC_DEFAULT_FILTER_OFF ).

    if IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE is bound
      and ( MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER <> ABAP_FALSE
       or IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_FILTER_AVAILABLE( IV_AVAILABLE_AND_FILTERED = ABAP_TRUE ) ).


      CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( exporting IV_ID = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FILTERSEPARATOR-ID changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

      insert value #(
        ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-FILTER-ID
        ENABLED  = ABAP_TRUE
        ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL(
          IV_ICON_NAME = 'FILTERED' ##NO_TEXT
          IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
        )
        ON_CLICK = cond #( when IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_FILTER_ACTIVE( )
                           then C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-DEACTIVATE_FILTER-EVENT_ID
                           else C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-ACTIVATE_FILTER-EVENT_ID
                         )
        TOGGLED  = cond #( when IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_FILTER_ACTIVE( )
                           then 'DOWN' ##NO_TEXT
                           else 'UP' ##NO_TEXT
                         )
        TOOLTIP  = cond #( when IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_FILTER_ACTIVE( )
                           then RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/DEACTIVATE_FILTER' ) ##NO_TEXT
                           else RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_OBJOVW/ACTIVATE_FILTER' ) ##NO_TEXT
                         )
      ) into table RT_ACTIONS.

    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_15 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_PROFILEGROUPS.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add "Tree Profile" buttons / menu
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_05 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data:
    LR_ACTION      type ref to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON,
    LR_ACTION_ITEM type ref to WCFS_MENUBUTTON_ITEM.

  " profile group selection
  data(LV_PROFGRP_ID) = DETERMINE_TREE_PROFGRP_ID( ).

  if LV_PROFGRP_ID is not initial.

    data(LT_PROFILE) = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_PROFILES_BY_GROUP( LV_PROFGRP_ID ).
    data(LS_PROFGRP) = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_PROFILE_GROUP_DETAILS( LV_PROFGRP_ID ).
    data(LV_PROF_ID) = DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( ).

    if LS_PROFGRP-PROFGRP_MODE = 'A' ##NO_TEXT.  "show buttons instead of menu

      loop at LT_PROFILE assigning field-symbol(<PROFILE>).

        insert value #(
          ID       = <PROFILE>-PROF_ID
          ENABLED  = cond #( when <PROFILE>-PROF_ID <> LV_PROF_ID then ABAP_TRUE )
          TOGGLED  = cond #( when <PROFILE>-PROF_ID <> LV_PROF_ID then 'UP' else 'DOWN' ) ##NO_TEXT
          TEXT     = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT is not initial
                             then <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT
                           )
          TOOLTIP  = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TOOLTIP is not initial
                             then <PROFILE>-UI_TOOLTIP
                             else cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT is not initial
                                          then <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT
                                          else <PROFILE>-PROF_DESC
                                        )
                           )
          ICON_SRC = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_ICON is not initial
                             then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>GET_IMAGE_REPLACE_URL_HCB(
                                    cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ca |./| ##NO_TEXT
                                            then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>VALIDATE_IMAGE_SOURCE( conv #( <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ) )
                                            else CL_BSP_MIMES=>SAP_ICON( ID = conv #( <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ) IS_RTL = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>WITH_RIGHT_TO_LEFT( ) )
                                    )
                                  )
                           )
          ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-PROFILE_GROUP-EVENT_ID
        ) into table RT_ACTIONS ##NO_TEXT.

      endloop.

    elseif LINES( LT_PROFILE ) > 1 or LS_PROFGRP-UI_TEXT is not initial.

      LR_ACTION = new #(
        ID         = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-PROFILE_GROUP-ID
        ENABLED    = ABAP_TRUE
        TYPE       = cond #( when TREE_PROPERTIES-TOOLBAR_FOREIGN_USE = 'TRUE' ##NO_TEXT
                             then CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE
                             else '' ) ##NO_TEXT
        ICON_SRC   = cond #( when LS_PROFGRP-UI_ICON is not initial
                             then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>GET_IMAGE_REPLACE_URL_HCB(
                                    cond #( when LS_PROFGRP-UI_ICON ca |./| ##NO_TEXT
                                            then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>VALIDATE_IMAGE_SOURCE( conv #( LS_PROFGRP-UI_ICON ) )
                                            else CL_BSP_MIMES=>SAP_ICON( ID = conv #( LS_PROFGRP-UI_ICON ) IS_RTL = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>WITH_RIGHT_TO_LEFT( ) )
                                    )
                                  )
                           )
      ) ##NO_TEXT.

      if LR_ACTION->ICON_SRC is initial.
        if LS_PROFGRP-UI_TEXT is initial.
          LR_ACTION->ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL( IV_ICON_NAME = 'PAGE_MAP' ##NO_TEXT
                                                                  IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON ) ##NO_TEXT.
        else.
          LR_ACTION->ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE
                                                                  IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON ) ##NO_TEXT.
        endif.
      endif.

      LR_ACTION->TEXT = LS_PROFGRP-UI_TEXT.

      if LS_PROFGRP-UI_TOOLTIP is not initial.
        LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP = LS_PROFGRP-UI_TOOLTIP.
      else.
        LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP = text-003.
      endif.

      " add menu tooltip in accessibility mode
      if CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial.
        data LV_MENU_TOOLTIP type STRING.
        LV_MENU_TOOLTIP = CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'BSP_DYN_CONFIG_TAG_LIB/MENU' ) ##NO_TEXT.
        concatenate LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP LV_MENU_TOOLTIP into LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP separated by SPACE.
      endif.

      LR_ACTION->MENU_DESIGN  = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_DESIGN_ACTIONMENU.
      LR_ACTION->MENU_TRIGGER = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_TRIGGER_CLICK.

      loop at LT_PROFILE assigning <PROFILE>.

        LR_ACTION_ITEM = new #(
          ID          = <PROFILE>-PROF_ID
          IS_SELECTED = cond #( when <PROFILE>-PROF_ID = LV_PROF_ID
