                                then ABAP_TRUE
                                else ABAP_FALSE
                              )
          TEXT        = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT is not initial
                                then <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT
                                else <PROFILE>-PROF_DESC
                              )
          TOOLTIP     = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TOOLTIP is not initial
                                then <PROFILE>-UI_TOOLTIP
                                else cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE and <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT is not initial
                                             then <PROFILE>-UI_TEXT
                                             else <PROFILE>-PROF_DESC
                                           )
                              )
          ICON_SRC    = cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_ICON is not initial
                                then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>GET_IMAGE_REPLACE_URL_HCB(
                                       cond #( when <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ca |./| ##NO_TEXT
                                               then CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>VALIDATE_IMAGE_SOURCE( conv #( <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ) )
                                               else CL_BSP_MIMES=>SAP_ICON( ID = conv #( <PROFILE>-UI_ICON ) IS_RTL = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>WITH_RIGHT_TO_LEFT( ) )
                                       )
                                     )
                              )
          ONSELECT    = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-PROFILE_GROUP-EVENT_ID
        ) ##NO_TEXT.

        if <PROFILE>-PROF_ID = LV_PROF_ID.
          if LR_ACTION->TEXT cs '&1' ##NO_TEXT.
            replace '&1' in LR_ACTION->TEXT with LR_ACTION_ITEM->TEXT ##NO_TEXT.
          endif.
          if LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP cs '&1' ##NO_TEXT.
            replace '&1' in LR_ACTION->TOOLTIP with LR_ACTION_ITEM->TOOLTIP ##NO_TEXT.
          endif.
        endif.

        insert LR_ACTION_ITEM->* into table LR_ACTION->ITEMS.

      endloop.

      insert LR_ACTION->* into table RT_ACTIONS.

    endif.

    if LINES( RT_ACTIONS ) > 0.
      insert value #(
        ID      = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-PROFILE_GROUP_SEPARATOR-ID
        TYPE    = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_SEPARATOR
        ENABLED = ABAP_TRUE
      ) into table RT_ACTIONS ##NO_TEXT.
    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_16 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_PROFILE_CUSTOM.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add customizing preview if config mode is active
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_29 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

    " add customizing preview if config mode is active (not within simulation mode, avoid recursion)
    if CL_CHTMLB_CONFIG_UTILITY=>IS_CONFIG_MODE_ENABLED( ) = ABAP_TRUE and
      VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->GET_COMPONENT_USAGE_NAME( ) <> 'SimTreeUsage' ##NO_TEXT.

      data(LV_PROF_ID) = DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( ).
      data(LV_PROFGRP_ID) = DETERMINE_TREE_PROFGRP_ID( ).

      CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( exporting IV_ID = 'showCustomizingProfileSeparator' changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

      insert value #(
        ID       = 'showCustomizingProfile' ##NO_TEXT
        ON_CLICK = 'showCustomizingProfile' ##NO_TEXT
        TOOLTIP  = cond #( when LV_PROFGRP_ID is not initial
                           then REPLACE( VAL = text-000 SUB = '&1' WITH = |{ LV_PROF_ID } [{ CONDENSE( VAL = text-004 ) }: { LV_PROFGRP_ID }]| CASE = ABAP_FALSE ) ##NO_TEXT
                           else REPLACE( VAL = text-000 SUB = '&1' WITH = |{ LV_PROF_ID }| CASE = ABAP_FALSE ) ##NO_TEXT
                         )
        ENABLED  = ABAP_TRUE
        TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
        ICON_SRC = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_COMPONENT
                                                     IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON )
      ) into table RT_ACTIONS ##NO_TEXT.

    endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_30 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_SEARCH.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add "Seach" and "Find Next" buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_06 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  if TREE_PROPERTIES-FIND = ABAP_TRUE.

    insert value #(
      ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-POSITION-ID
      ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-POSITION-EVENT_ID
      TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TXT_SEARCH_POSITION' ) ##NO_TEXT
      "TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TTP_SEARCH_POSITION' ) ##NO_TEXT
      TEXT     = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TXT_SEARCH_POSITION' ) ##NO_TEXT
      ICON_SRC = cond #( when CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ) is not initial
                         then CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = 'sap-icon://sys-find' ) ##NO_TEXT
                         else '' ##NO_TEXT
                       )
      ENABLED  = BOOLC( IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SIZE( ) > 0 )
    ) into table RT_ACTIONS.

    insert value #(
      ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-NEXT_HIT-ID
      ON_CLICK = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-NEXT_HIT-EVENT_ID
      TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TXT_SEARCH_NEXT_HIT' ) ##NO_TEXT
      "TOOLTIP  = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TTP_SEARCH_NEXT_HIT' ) ##NO_TEXT
      TEXT     = RUNTIME->GET_OTR_TEXT( 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/AC_TXT_SEARCH_NEXT_HIT' ) ##NO_TEXT
      ICON_SRC = cond #( when CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ) is not initial
                         then CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = 'sap-icon://sys-find-next' ) ##NO_TEXT
                         else '' ##NO_TEXT
                       )
      ENABLED  = BOOLC( LAST_FOUND_NODE is bound and IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SIZE( ) > 0 )
    ) into table RT_ACTIONS.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_17 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_SORT.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add Sort buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_27 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_28 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_NODE_OCA.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add node dependent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_23 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

* TREE_PROPERTIES-TOOLBAR_OCA
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_OFF.        " ' ' = Toolbar OCAs Off (default)
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON          " 'X' = Toolbar OCAs On
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY        " 'Y' = Toolbar OCAs On (show toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions)
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY_BTNS   " 'N' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as buttons [toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON_BTNS.    " 'B' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as buttons [toolbar actions & node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY_MENU   " 'C' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as menu [toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON_MENU.    " 'M' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as menu [toolbar actions & node dependent actions])

* IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( )
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.       " ' ' = Show toolbar actions as buttons
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_ON.        " 'X' = Show toolbar actions as menu
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_WITH_OCM.  " 'Y' = Show toolbar actions as menu (include node dependent actions)

  " must have!!!
  if IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE is bound and IR_ISU_BOL_TREE is bound.

    " check if singleselect and OCA in toolbar is active
    if GET_MULTISELECT( ) is initial and IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( ) = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION-MENU_WITH_OCM.

      " get currently selected node
      data(LR_NODE) = IR_ISU_BOL_TREE->GET_CURRENT_BO( ).
      if LR_NODE is bound.

        " Get definiton of OneClick-Actions from tree node
        LR_NODE->GET_OCA_TABLE( importing ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = data(LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS) ).

        if LINES( LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS ) > 0.

          CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

          " get BOL Entity
          data(LR_ENTITY) = LR_NODE->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).

          loop at LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS assigning field-symbol(<OCA_DEFINITION>).
            <OCA_DEFINITION>-ACTIVE = cond #( when IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE is bound
                                              then IR_BOL_EVENT_SERVICE->IS_EVENT_ACTIVE(
                                                     EVENT_TYPE     = IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_HANDLER=>GC_OCA_EVENT_TYPE
                                                     EVENT_ID       = <OCA_DEFINITION>-ID
                                                     EVENT_ENTITY   = LR_ENTITY
                                                     IO_NODE_ENTITY = LR_NODE
                                                   )
                                              else ABAP_TRUE
                                            ).
          endloop.

          insert value #(
            ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-TOOLBAR_OBJECT_MENU-ID
            TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
            ICON_SRC = cond #( when CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>IS_FONTCODE(
                                      IV_VALUE = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE )
                                    )
                                and CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( )
                               then CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE )
                               else CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL(
                                      IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE
                                      IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
                                    )
                             )
            TEXT     = CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TOOLS/TOOLBAR_OBJECT_OCA_MENU_TEXT' ) ##NO_TEXT
            TOOLTIP  = CL_THTMLB_SECTION508_UTILS=>GET_BUTTON_TOOLTIP_TEXT(
              CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TOOLS/TOOLBAR_OBJECT_OCA_MENU_TTIP' ) ##NO_TEXT
            )
            ENABLED  = ABAP_TRUE
            MENU_DESIGN  = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_DESIGN_ACTIONMENU
            MENU_TRIGGER = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_TRIGGER_CLICK
            " convert OneClick-Actions Definitions to WCFT_MENUBUTTON_ITEM table
            ITEMS    = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>CL_OCA_ENTRIES_TO_MENUITEMS(
              IT_OCA_ENTRIES         = LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS
              IV_ID_PREFIX           = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_OCA_EVENT
              IV_EVENT_PREFIX        = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_OCA_EVENT
            )
          ) into table RT_ACTIONS ##NO_TEXT.

          CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

        endif.

      endif.

    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_24 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_OCA.

  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  " Add node independent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons
  " ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  clear RT_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_25 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

* TREE_PROPERTIES-TOOLBAR_OCA
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_OFF.        " ' ' = Toolbar OCAs Off (default)
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON          " 'X' = Toolbar OCAs On
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY        " 'Y' = Toolbar OCAs On (show toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions)
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY_BTNS   " 'N' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as buttons [toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON_BTNS.    " 'B' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as buttons [toolbar actions & node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ONLY_MENU   " 'C' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as menu [toolbar actions only / no node dependent actions])
* IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>CO_TOOLBAR_OCA_ON_MENU.    " 'M' = Toolbar OCAs On (shown as menu [toolbar actions & node dependent actions])

* IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( )
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.       " ' ' = Show toolbar actions as buttons
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_ON.        " 'X' = Show toolbar actions as menu
* CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_WITH_OCM.  " 'Y' = Show toolbar actions as menu (include node dependent actions)

  " must have!!!
  if IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE is bound.

    " Handle node independent (Toolbar) OneClick-Actions
    if not ( IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( ) = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION-TOOLBAR_OFF ).

      " Get definiton of toolbar items (OneClick-Actions) from tree profile
      IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->GET_TBA_TABLE( importing ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = data(LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS) ).

      if LINES( LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS ) > 0.

        CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

        case IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( ).
          when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION-BUTTONS.

            " convert OneClick-Actions Definitions to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON_T table
            data(LT_TOOLBAR_BUTTONS) = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>CL_OCA_ENTRIES_TO_BUTTONS(
              exporting
                IT_OCA_ENTRIES         = LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS
                IV_ID_PREFIX           = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT
                IV_EVENT_PREFIX        = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT
            ) ##NO_TEXT.

            insert lines of LT_TOOLBAR_BUTTONS into table RT_ACTIONS.

          when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION-MENU
            or CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION-MENU_WITH_OCM.

            insert value #(
              ID       = C_DEFAULT_BOLTREE_ACTIONS-TOOLBAR_MENU-ID
              TYPE     = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
              ICON_SRC = cond #( when CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>IS_FONTCODE(
                                        IV_VALUE = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE )
                                      )
                                  and CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( )
                                 then CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE )
                                 else CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GET_DYN_ICON_URL(
                                        IV_ICON_NAME = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_ICON_MORE
                                        IV_ICON_TYPE = CL_THTMLB_UTIL=>GC_BUTTON_ICON
                                      )
                               )
              TEXT     = CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TOOLS/TOOLBAR_OCA_MENU_TEXT' ) ##NO_TEXT
              TOOLTIP  = CL_THTMLB_SECTION508_UTILS=>GET_BUTTON_TOOLTIP_TEXT(
                CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS( 'CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TOOLS/TOOLBAR_OCA_MENU_TOOLTIP' ) ##NO_TEXT
              )
              ENABLED  = ABAP_TRUE
              MENU_DESIGN  = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_DESIGN_ACTIONMENU
              MENU_TRIGGER = CL_THTMLB_DYNAMENU=>GC_TRIGGER_CLICK
              " convert OneClick-Actions Definitions to WCFT_MENUBUTTON_ITEM table
              ITEMS    = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>CL_OCA_ENTRIES_TO_MENUITEMS(
                IT_OCA_ENTRIES         = LT_OCA_DEFINITIONS
                IV_ID_PREFIX           = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT
                IV_EVENT_PREFIX        = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>GC_TOOLBAR_EVENT
              )
            ) into table RT_ACTIONS ##NO_TEXT.

        endcase.

        CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MENU_TOOLS=>ADD_SEPERATOR( changing CT_BUTTONS = RT_ACTIONS ) ##NO_TEXT.

      endif.

    endif.

  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_26 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_CALLER_ID.
  RV_RESULT = MV_CALLER_ID.
endmethod.


  method get_comp_controller.

    ro_comp_controller ?= me->comp_controller.

  endmethod.


method GET_CONTEXT_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method GET_CURRENT_FILTER_IDS.
  RT_RESULT = GET_IDS_OF_COLLECTION(
    IR_COLLECTION = TYPED_CONTEXT->FILTEROBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )
  ).
  sort RT_RESULT.
endmethod.


method GET_CURRENT_ROOT_IDS.
  data(LS_TREE_PROPERTIES) = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  RT_RESULT = GET_IDS_OF_COLLECTION(
    IR_COLLECTION   = TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )
    IV_CURRENT_ONLY = BOOLC( LS_TREE_PROPERTIES-ROOTFOCUSONLY = ABAP_TRUE )
  ).
  sort RT_RESULT.
endmethod.


method GET_EVENT_SERVICE_CONTEXT_NODE.
  clear RR_RESULT.
  if TYPED_COCO is bound.
    RR_RESULT = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE.
  endif.
endmethod.


  method get_filter_ids.

*remember visible first row for rentry to view
    data: iter type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
          ent  type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.

    iter = typed_context->filterobjects->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
    if iter is bound.
      ent ?= iter->get_first( ).
      while ent is bound.
        append ent->get_key( ) to rt_filter_ids.
        ent ?= iter->get_next( ).
      endwhile.
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method get_find_string.

    data value_ent     type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.

    value_ent     = typed_coco->typed_context->find->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    rv_string = value_ent->get_property_as_string( 'STRING' ).
  endmethod.


method GET_IDS_OF_COLLECTION.

  clear RT_RESULT.

  if IR_COLLECTION is not bound or IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.

  if IV_CURRENT_ONLY is not initial.
    data(LR_ENTITY) = IR_COLLECTION->GET_CURRENT( ).
    if LR_ENTITY is bound and LR_ENTITY is instance of CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.
      data(LR_BOL_ENTITY) = cast CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY( LR_ENTITY ).
      insert value #(
        OBJECT_NAME = LR_BOL_ENTITY->GET_NAME( )
        OBJECT_ID   = LR_BOL_ENTITY->GET_KEY( )
      ) into table RT_RESULT.
    endif.
  else.
    data(LR_ITERATOR) = IR_COLLECTION->GET_ITERATOR( ).
    if LR_ITERATOR is bound.
      LR_ENTITY = LR_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ).
      while LR_ENTITY is bound.
        if LR_ENTITY is instance of CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.
          LR_BOL_ENTITY = cast CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY( LR_ENTITY ).
          insert value #(
            OBJECT_NAME = LR_BOL_ENTITY->GET_NAME( )
            OBJECT_ID   = LR_BOL_ENTITY->GET_KEY( )
          ) into table RT_RESULT.
        endif.
        LR_ENTITY = LR_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ).
      endwhile.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


  method get_infos_4_event.

  DATA:
    lv_col_id           TYPE string,
    lv_dummy            TYPE string,                        "#EC NEEDED
    lv_index            TYPE i,
    lv_name             TYPE string,
    lv_string           TYPE string,
    lr_ent              TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    lr_image            TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_image,
    lr_node             TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
    lr_parent_node      type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    lv_parent_relation  type crmt_relation_name.


  cl_thtmlb_util=>get_event_info(
    EXPORTING
      iv_event = iv_htmlb_data
    IMPORTING
      ev_index = lv_index ).

  IF lv_index IS INITIAL.
    TRY.
        lr_image ?= iv_htmlb_data.
        lv_name   = lr_image->if_htmlb_data~event_server_name.
        SPLIT lv_name AT 'CONFIG' INTO lv_dummy lv_string.  "#EC NOTEXT

        IF NOT lv_string IS INITIAL.
          lv_index = lv_string.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        IF iv_return_current_if_initial = abap_false.
          RETURN.
        ENDIF.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDIF.

* get entity of the line
  lr_node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_index( lv_index ).

  IF lr_node IS BOUND.
    lr_ent ?= lr_node->bo.
  ELSEIF iv_return_current_if_initial = abap_true.
    if GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq ABAP_FALSE.
      lr_ent = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_current_bo( ).
    else.
      data(LR_SELECTED_NODES) = GET_SELECTED_NODES( ).
      if LR_SELECTED_NODES->SIZE( ) = 1.
        LR_ENT ?= LR_SELECTED_NODES->GET_CURRENT( ).
      endif.
    endif.
  ENDIF.

  IF NOT lr_ent IS BOUND.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

" Ist hier definitiv falsch. Fachliche Logik in einer Basisklasse. C5084067
*  lv_name = lr_ent->get_name( ).
*  IF lv_name EQ 'BuilHeader'.                               "#EC NOTEXT
**   if the contact person is requested, get the parent entity to navigate to the correct target view
*    lr_ent->get_parent_relation( IMPORTING ev_relation_name = lv_parent_relation ).
*    IF lv_parent_relation EQ 'BuilGetPersonforContactRel'.  "#EC NOTEXT
*      lr_parent_node = lr_ent->get_parent_node( ).
*      IF lr_parent_node IS BOUND AND lr_parent_node->get_name( ) EQ 'BuilContactPerson'. "#EC NOTEXT
*        lr_ent = lr_parent_node.
*      ENDIF.
*    ENDIF.
*  ENDIF.

  IF eo_node_entity IS REQUESTED.
    eo_node_entity = lr_ent.
  ENDIF.

  IF er_entity IS REQUESTED.
    er_entity = lr_ent->get_wrapped_entity( ).
  ENDIF.

  IF ev_node_id IS REQUESTED.
    ev_node_id = lr_ent->get_node_id( ).
  ENDIF.

  IF ev_col1_link_id IS REQUESTED.
    lr_ent->get_cell_info(
      EXPORTING
        iv_col_key = 'COL1'
      IMPORTING
        ev_link_id = lv_col_id ).                           "#EC NOTEXT
    ev_col1_link_id = lv_col_id.
  ENDIF.

  endmethod.


method GET_MULTISELECT.
  RV_MULTISELECT = TREE_PROPERTIES-MULTISELECT.
endmethod.


method GET_MULTISELECT_MODE.
  RV_MULTISELECT_MODE = TREE_PROPERTIES-MULTISELECT_MODE.
endmethod.


method GET_OCA_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_21 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

" !!! OBSOLETE !!!
"
" see Methods:
"   - GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_OCA       for Node/Object independent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons (Toolbar Actions)
"   - GET_ACTIONS_TOOLBAR_NODE_OCA  for Node/Object dependent OneClick-Actions menu/buttons (Toolbar Object Actions)


*  constants:
*    lc_col_id_tba type string value 'TBA' ##no_text.
*  data:
*    lt_oca         type crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action_t,
*    lo_node        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
*    lo_entity      type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
*    lv_event_id    type crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id,
*    lo_tree_srv    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service,
*    ls_ctxt_menu   type wcfs_menubutton_item,
**  ls_tree_node_action type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn00=>ty_tree_node_action,
*    lv_oca_as_menu type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_oca_menu,
*    ls_action      type crmt_thtmlb_button,
*    lv_tba_size    type sytabix.
*
*  types:
*    begin of lty_oca_c.
*      include type crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action.
*  types: col_id type string,
*    end of lty_oca_c.
*
*  data:
*    ls_oca_c type lty_oca_c,
*    lt_oca_c type table of lty_oca_c.
*
*  field-symbols:
*    <ls_oca>   type crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action,
*    <ls_oca_c> type lty_oca_c.
*
*
*
**get tree service
*  lo_tree_srv = me->get_tree_srv( ).
*  if lo_tree_srv is not bound.
*    return.
*  endif.
*
**check if singleselect and OCA in toolbar is active
*  if me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) is initial and
*     me->tree_properties-toolbar_oca <> if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_off.
*
**get current selection
*    lo_node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_current_bo( ).
*    if lo_node is bound.
*
**   get oca table
*      lt_oca = lo_node->get_oca_table( ).
*      if lt_oca is not initial.
*
**     pre-analyze OCAs
*        loop at lt_oca assigning <ls_oca>.
*
**       check if OCA should be shown
*          lo_entity = lo_node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
*          lv_event_id = <ls_oca>-id.
*
**       inform external event service subribers if requested
*          if me->typed_coco is bound.
*            <ls_oca>-active = me->typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->is_event_active(
*                                event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_oca_event_type
*                                event_id     = lv_event_id
*                                event_entity = lo_entity
*                                io_node_entity = lo_node ).
*            check <ls_oca>-active <> abap_false.
*          endif.
*
**       add colum ID for later sorting
*          move-corresponding <ls_oca> to ls_oca_c.
*          ls_oca_c-col_id = lo_node->get_oca_column_key( <ls_oca>-id ).
*          append ls_oca_c to lt_oca_c.
*
**       check how to present actions (take "highest" value)
*          if lv_oca_as_menu <> cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
*            data lv_oca_as_menu_tmp type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_oca_menu.
*            lv_oca_as_menu_tmp = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>show_oca_as_menu(
*                                   iv_column_key = ls_oca_c-col_id
*                                   io_node       = lo_node
*                                   io_tree_srv   = lo_tree_srv ).
*            if lv_oca_as_menu = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_off or
*               lv_oca_as_menu = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_on and
*               lv_oca_as_menu_tmp = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
*              lv_oca_as_menu = lv_oca_as_menu_tmp.
*            endif.
*          endif.
*
*        endloop.
*
**     sort OCA by columns
*        data lt_col type crmt_attr_name_tab.
*        sort lt_oca_c stable by col_id.
*        lt_col = me->get_visible_columns( ).
*        field-symbols <lv_col> type name_komp.
*        data lt_oca_c_temp like lt_oca_c.
*        lt_oca_c_temp = lt_oca_c.
*        clear lt_oca_c.
*        loop at lt_col assigning <lv_col>.
*          read table lt_oca_c_temp transporting no fields with key col_id = <lv_col>.
*          if sy-subrc = 0.
*            data lv_index type sytabix.
*            lv_index = sy-tabix.
*            loop at lt_oca_c_temp assigning <ls_oca_c> from lv_index.
*              if <ls_oca_c>-col_id <> <lv_col>.
*                exit.
*              endif.
*              append <ls_oca_c> to lt_oca_c.
*              delete lt_oca_c_temp.
*            endloop.
*          endif.
*        endloop.
*      endif.
*    endif.
*  endif.
*
**get node independent actions
*  lt_oca = lo_tree_srv->get_tba_table( ).
*  if lt_oca is not initial.
** pre-analyze OCAs
*    lv_tba_size = lines( lt_oca ).
*    clear lv_index.
*    loop at lt_oca assigning <ls_oca>.
*      move-corresponding <ls_oca> to ls_oca_c.
*      add 1 to lv_index.
*      ls_oca_c-col_id = lc_col_id_tba.
*      insert ls_oca_c into lt_oca_c index lv_index.
*    endloop.
*  endif.
*
**now process OCAs
*  loop at lt_oca_c assigning <ls_oca_c>.
*
*    if <ls_oca_c>-col_id = lc_col_id_tba.
*      concatenate cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_toolbar_event <ls_oca_c>-id into <ls_oca_c>-id.
*    else.
*      concatenate cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event <ls_oca_c>-id into <ls_oca_c>-id.
*    endif.
*
** special icon -> shopping cart remove
*    if <ls_oca_c>-icon cs 'SHOPPING_CART_SMALL_REMOVE.GIF'. "#EC NOTEXT
*      <ls_oca_c>-icon = '/SAP/BC/BSP/SAP/IUBSKH/SHOPPING_CART_SMALL_REMOVE.GIF'. "#EC NOTEXT
*    endif.
*
*    if cl_crm_iu_icon_tools=>is_new_iconname( iv_icon_name = <ls_oca_c>-icon ) and cl_crm_iu_compatibility=>is_on_premise( ).
*      <ls_oca_c>-icon = cl_crm_iu_icon_tools=>get_icon_fontcode( iv_icon_name = <ls_oca_c>-icon ).
*    endif.
*
*    if <ls_oca_c>-col_id is initial or
*       ( lv_oca_as_menu = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_off and
*         me->tree_properties-toolbar_oca <> if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_on_menu and
*         me->tree_properties-toolbar_oca <> if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_only_menu or
*         me->tree_properties-toolbar_oca = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_on_btns or
*         me->tree_properties-toolbar_oca = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_only_btns ).
*
*      ls_action-id       = <ls_oca_c>-id.
*      ls_action-on_click = <ls_oca_c>-id.
*      ls_action-icon_src = <ls_oca_c>-icon.
*      ls_action-text     = <ls_oca_c>-text.
*      ls_action-tooltip  = <ls_oca_c>-tooltip.
*      ls_action-enabled  = <ls_oca_c>-active.
*      append ls_action to rt_action.
*
*    else.
*
*      ls_ctxt_menu-icon_src = <ls_oca_c>-icon.
*      ls_ctxt_menu-text     = <ls_oca_c>-text.
*      ls_ctxt_menu-onselect = <ls_oca_c>-id.
*      ls_ctxt_menu-is_disabled = boolc( <ls_oca_c>-active <> abap_true ).
*      append ls_ctxt_menu to ls_action-items.
*
*      at last.
*        ls_action-id       = |ocatoolbar|.
**      ls_action-icon_src = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_icon_url( |icon_action.gif| ).
*        ls_action-icon_src = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
*          exporting
*            iv_icon_name = 'ICON_ACTION'
*            iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ). "#EC NOTEXT
*        ls_action-tooltip  = cl_wd_utilities=>get_otr_text_by_alias( cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>gc_ac_tooltip ).
*        ls_action-enabled  = abap_true.
*        append ls_action to rt_action.
*      endat.
*
*    endif.
*
*  endloop.
*
**add separator if between toolbar and one-click actions available
*  if rt_action is not initial.
*    if lv_tba_size > 0 and lv_tba_size < lines( rt_action ).
*      clear ls_action.
*      ls_action-id      = |tbatoolbarseparator|.
*      ls_action-type    = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_separator.
*      ls_action-enabled = abap_true.
*      insert ls_action into rt_action index lv_tba_size + 1.
*    endif.
*
**add separator if OCAs available
*    clear ls_action.
*    ls_action-id      = |ocatoolbarseparator|.
*    ls_action-type    = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_separator.
*    ls_action-enabled = abap_true.
*    append ls_action to rt_action.
*  endif.
*
*** add action menu if no OCAs active but the Object Context Menu should be shown
*** // (only for the first visible column)
**if p_column_index = 1 and
** lo_ctxt_menu is not bound and
** lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
**if beehive is not bound.
**create object beehive.
**endif.
**lo_ctxt_menu = cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>factory(
**               id  = p_cell_id
**               id_postfix = '_MENU'
**               for = p_cell_id ).
**create object lo_actions
**exporting
**  io_img    = io_img
**  io_menu   = lo_ctxt_menu
**  io_entity = ir_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
**  iv_ocm    = boolc( lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ).
**ls_tree_node_action-component = p_column_key.
**ls_tree_node_action-index     = p_row_index.
**ls_tree_node_action-provider  = lo_actions.
**insert ls_tree_node_action into table me->gr_context_node->tree_node_action_tab.
**lo_ctxt_menu->actiondescriptor = lo_actions.
**beehive->add( lo_ctxt_menu ).
**endif.
**
**if lv_oca_as_menu <> gc_oca_as_menu_off.
**if io_img is bound and beehive is bound and lo_ctxt_menu is not bound.
**beehive->add( io_img ).
**endif.
**endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_22 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.                                               "#EC CI_VALPAR


method GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE.
  if TYPED_COCO is bound.
    RR_RESULT = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE.
  endif.
endmethod.


  method get_program_text.

    if iv_langu is supplied and iv_langu <> sy-langu.
      set language iv_langu.
    endif.

* this method retrieves a requested text element of this class like text-000
    data lv_text_id type c length 8.
    field-symbols <lv_text> type any.
    lv_text_id = |TEXT-{ iv_text_id case = upper }|.
    assign (lv_text_id) to <lv_text>.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      rv_text = <lv_text>.
    endif.

    if iv_langu is supplied and iv_langu <> sy-langu.
      set language sy-langu.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method GET_RESOLVER.
  RR_RESOLVER = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_RESOLVER( ).
endmethod.


method GET_ROOT_ENTITIES.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_35 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  clear RR_ROOT_COLLECTION.

  if GET_ROOT_ENTITIES_SPEC(
    exporting
      IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE = IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
    importing
      ER_ROOT_COLLECTION  = RR_ROOT_COLLECTION
  ) is initial.
    RR_ROOT_COLLECTION = INTERNAL_GET_ROOT_ENTITIES( IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE = IR_BOL_TREE_SERVICE ).
  endif.

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_36 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ROOT_ENTITIES_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


  method GET_ROOT_IDS.

*remember visible first row for rentry to view
    data: ITER type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR,
          ENT  type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.

    if ME->TREE_PROPERTIES-ROOTFOCUSONLY = ABAP_TRUE.
      ENT ?= TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
      if ENT is bound.
        append ENT->GET_KEY( ) to RT_ROOT_IDS.
      endif.
    else.
      ITER = TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_ITERATOR( ).
      if ITER is bound.
        ENT ?= ITER->GET_FIRST( ).
        while ENT is bound.
          append ENT->GET_KEY( ) to RT_ROOT_IDS.
          ENT ?= ITER->GET_NEXT( ).
        endwhile.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method GET_SELECTED_ENTITIES.
  " The tree node can only handle with a real BOL entity because the wrapped entity must be one.
  RR_ENTITIES = new CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY_COL( ).
  data(LR_ITERATOR) = GET_SELECTED_NODES( )->GET_ITERATOR( ).
  " The cast doesn't work? Than GET_SELECTED_NODES doesn't work correctly because GET_SELECTED_NODES
  " is supposed to ensure that the list contains only tree nodes. Therefore the name. ;)
  data(LR_NODE) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE( LR_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ) ).
  while LR_NODE is bound.
    data(LR_BOL_ENTITY) = LR_NODE->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).
    if LR_BOL_ENTITY is bound.
      RR_ENTITIES->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_BOL_ENTITY ).
    endif.
    LR_NODE = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE( LR_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ) ).
  endwhile.
endmethod.


method GET_SELECTED_NODES.
  " Yes! Only a BO collection because the tree node collection is a little bit tricky. To get the tree node
  " you must use the correct iterator methods otherwise you get the wrapped entity. For RR_NODES it is certain
  " that you get a tree node (cast to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE required).
  RR_NODES = new CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL( ).
*  data(LR_COLLECTION) = TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->GET_COPY( ).
*  if LR_COLLECTION is bound.
*    data(LR_ITERATOR) = LR_COLLECTION->GET_ITERATOR( ).
*    data(LR_ENTITY) = LR_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ).
*    while LR_ENTITY is bound.
*      if LR_ENTITY is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.
*        RR_NODES->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY ).
*      endif.
*      LR_ENTITY = LR_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ).
*    endwhile.
*  endif.
  data(LT_SELECTED_TREE_NODES) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_SELECTED_TREE_NODES( ).
  loop at LT_SELECTED_TREE_NODES assigning field-symbol(<TREE_NODE>).
    RR_NODES->ADD( IV_ENTITY = <TREE_NODE> ).
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_ITERATOR_IMPL_CLASS.
  RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_PROPERTIES.
  RS_RESULT = TREE_PROPERTIES = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_SERVICE_IMPL_CLASS.
  RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_SRV.
  RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>GET_INSTANCE(
    IV_TREE_SERVICE_IMPL_CLASS = GET_TREE_SERVICE_IMPL_CLASS( )
    IV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS    = GET_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS( )
    IR_TREE_CONTROLLER         = ME
    PROF_ID                    = DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( )
    CALLER_ID                  = GET_CALLER_ID( )
    EVENT_SERVICE              = GET_EVENT_SERVICE_CONTEXT_NODE( )
    CONTROLLER                 = VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )
  ).
endmethod.


  method get_typed_context.

    result = me->typed_context.

  endmethod.


  method get_viewarea_content_id.

    if iv_viewarea = |cellObjPreview|.
      me->set_config_keys_4_children( iv_object_type = value #( )  iv_object_sub_type = value #( ) ).
      me->bind_view(
        rep_view = me->rep_view->create_instance_by_name( me->application_name && '/' && iv_viewarea )
        viewarea = iv_viewarea ).
    endif.

    rv_id = super->get_viewarea_content_id( iv_viewarea ).

  endmethod.


method GET_VIEW_ATTR_ACTIONS.
  IR_VIEW->GET_ATTRIBUTE( exporting NAME = 'ACTIONS' importing VALUE = RT_RESULT ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method GET_VIEW_ATTR_TAG_PROPERTIES.
  IR_VIEW->GET_ATTRIBUTE( exporting NAME = 'TAG' importing VALUE = RS_RESULT ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method GET_VIEW_ATTR_TREE.
  IR_VIEW->GET_ATTRIBUTE( exporting NAME = 'ISUBOLTREE' importing VALUE = RR_RESULT ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method GET_VIEW_CONFIG_ATTRIBUTE.
  clear EV_RESULT.
  if CONFIGURATION_DESCR is bound and CONFIGURATION_DESCR is instance of IF_BSP_DLC_CONFIG_ATTRIB.
    try.
        UPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA( ).
        data(LR_VIEW_ATTRIBUTES) = cast IF_BSP_DLC_CONFIG_ATTRIB( CONFIGURATION_DESCR )->GET_ATTRIB_AS_STRUCT_REF( ).
        if LR_VIEW_ATTRIBUTES is bound.
          assign LR_VIEW_ATTRIBUTES->* to field-symbol(<VIEW_ATTRIBUTES>).
          if SY-SUBRC is initial and <VIEW_ATTRIBUTES> is assigned.
            assign component TO_UPPER( VAL = IV_ATTR_NAME ) of structure <VIEW_ATTRIBUTES> to field-symbol(<VALUE>).
            if SY-SUBRC is initial and <VALUE> is assigned.
              EV_RESULT = <VALUE>.
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.
      catch CX_ROOT ##NO_HANDLER ##CATCH_ALL.
        clear EV_RESULT.
    endtry.
  endif.
endmethod.


  method get_visible_columns.

    data: conf_desc type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cfg_desc.

    conf_desc ?= me->configuration_descr.
    rt_col = conf_desc->get_visible_columns( ).

  endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EH~ON_ROUNDTRIP_END ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EH~ON_ROUNDTRIP_START ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


  method if_crm_ic_ovw_view_config~set_custom_view_properties.

    me->custom_properties = is_properties.

  endmethod.


  method if_thtmlb_drag_n_drop~on_drag.

    data:
      lo_source type ref to cl_thtmlb_table_dnd_object.


    if drag_n_drop_object is bound.
      try.
          lo_source ?= drag_n_drop_object.
          drag_n_drop_object->object = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_bo_by_index( lo_source->row ).
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.                    "#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method if_thtmlb_drag_n_drop~on_drop.

    data:
      lo_drag_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      lo_drop_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      lo_target    type ref to cl_thtmlb_table_dnd_object.



    if  drag_n_drop_object is bound
    and drag_n_drop_object->object is bound.
*   determine target/drop node
      lo_target ?= drag_n_drop_object.
      lo_drop_node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_bo_by_index( lo_target->row ).

      if lo_drop_node is bound.
*     now check if source was a BOL tree or not
        try.
            lo_drag_node ?= drag_n_drop_object->object.
          catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.                  "#EC NO_HANDLER
        endtry.

        if lo_drag_node is bound.
*       source was BOL tree -> call with drag node and entity
          if me->typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_dnd(
               io_drag_entity      = lo_drag_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
               iv_drag_node_id     = lo_drag_node->get_node_id( )
               io_drag_node_entity = lo_drag_node
               io_drop_entity      = lo_drop_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
               iv_drop_node_id     = lo_drop_node->get_node_id( )
               io_drop_node_entity = lo_drop_node ) = abap_true.
            me->build_tree( ).
          endif.
        else.
*       source was no BOL tree -> call with generic drag object instance
          if me->typed_coco->typed_context->event_service->handle_dnd(
               io_drag_object      = drag_n_drop_object->object
               io_drop_entity      = lo_drop_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
               iv_drop_node_id     = lo_drop_node->get_node_id( )
               io_drop_node_entity = lo_drop_node ) = abap_true.
            me->build_tree( ).
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method INTERNAL_GET_ROOT_ENTITIES.
  if TREE_PROPERTIES-ROOTFOCUSONLY = ABAP_TRUE.
    data(LR_ENTITY) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
    if LR_ENTITY is bound.
      create object RR_RESULT type CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL.
      RR_RESULT->ADD( LR_ENTITY ).
    endif.
  else.
    RR_RESULT = TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_COPY( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


  method ip_default.

* followup inbound plug -> build tree
    me->on_tree_build_requested( ).

  endmethod.


method IS_ACCESSIBILITY_MODE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( CL_HTMLB_ELEMENT=>MC_ACCESSIBILITY is not initial ).
  "RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.
endmethod.


method IS_BUILD_TREE_NEEDED.
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.
  data(LS_TREE_PROPERTIES) = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
  if not IS_FORCE_BUILD_TREE( )
    and SORT_STATE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SORT_STATE
    and IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = ABAP_TRUE
    and ( LS_TREE_PROPERTIES-ROOTFOCUSONLY = ABAP_TRUE or LINES( FCURRENT_ROOT_IDS ) = TYPED_CONTEXT->ROOTOBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->SIZE( ) )
    and ( LINES( FCURRENT_FILTER_IDS ) = TYPED_CONTEXT->FILTEROBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->SIZE( ) )
    and FCURRENT_FILTER_IDS = GET_CURRENT_FILTER_IDS( )
    and FCURRENT_ROOT_IDS = GET_CURRENT_ROOT_IDS( ).
    RV_RESULT = ABAP_FALSE.
  endif.
endmethod.


method IS_FORCE_BUILD_TREE.
  RV_RESULT = FFORCE_BUILD_TREE.
endmethod.


method IS_MUTEX_ACTIVE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( LINE_EXISTS( FMUTEX[ ID = IV_ID ] ) ).
endmethod.


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE ).
endmethod.


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( not IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( ) and not IS_SELCTION_MODE_MULTI( ) ).
endmethod.


method IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_FALSE ).
endmethod.


  method is_table.

* check customizing if it is a table
    rv_result = get_tree_srv( )->is_table( ).

* if requested check also runtime
    if rv_result = abap_false and iv_actual = abap_true.
      data lv_is_tree type abap_bool.
      lv_is_tree = abap_false.
      loop at me->typed_context->isuboltree->node_tab transporting no fields
          where parent_key is not initial or is_leaf = abap_false.
        lv_is_tree = abap_true.
        exit.
      endloop.
      if lv_is_tree = abap_false.
        rv_result = abap_true.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method IS_UPDATE_MODE.
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT > 0 ).
endmethod.


method LEAVE_MUTEX.
  delete FMUTEX where ID = IV_ID.
endmethod.


method LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE.
  if IS_UPDATE_MODE( ).
    FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT = FUPDATE_MODE_COUNT - 1.
  endif.
  LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC( ).
endmethod.


method LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method MAKE_ENTITIES_VISIBLE.
  data: NODE    type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE,
        LS_NODE type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00=>TY_TREE_NODE_REL.

  loop at TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->TREE_NODE_REL_TAB into LS_NODE where PARENT_BO_NODE is initial. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    NODE = LS_NODE-BO_NODE.
    while NODE is bound.
      NODE = NODE->FIND( IV_NEXT_HIT = ABAP_TRUE IV_SEARCHED_ENTITY = IV_ENTITY ).
      ENSURE_NODE_IS_VISIBLE( NODE ).
    endwhile.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method MAKE_NODES_VISIBLE.

  data(LR_NODE) = IR_COLLECTION->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
  while LR_NODE is bound.
    if LR_NODE->MAKE_VISIBLE( ).
      " handle first hit only if requested
      if IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial.
        exit.
      endif.
    else.
      data(LV_NOT_VISIBLE_NODES) = ABAP_TRUE.
    endif.
    LR_NODE = IR_COLLECTION->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
  endwhile.

  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( LV_NOT_VISIBLE_NODES is initial ).

endmethod.


method MAKE_NODE_VISIBLE.
  ENSURE_NODE_IS_VISIBLE( TREE_BO = IR_TREE_NODE ).
  RV_RESULT = IR_TREE_NODE->IS_VISIBLE( ).
endmethod.


method on_after_activated.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_38 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  if ENTER_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_ACTIVATION ) is initial.
    return.
  endif.
  try.
      if ON_AFTER_ACTIVATED_SPEC(
    IV_RESTORE = IV_RESTORE
  ) is initial.

    data:
          COPY_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
      tree_srv  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service,
      wico      type ref to cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl.

        " activate history restore event handler to be able to react on restore on OVPage
        set handler ON_HISTORY_STATE_RESTORED for all instances activation ABAP_TRUE.

        " mark controller as initialized within this roundtrip (cleared in SET_MODELS)
        FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_AFTER_ACTIVATE = ABAP_TRUE.

        " set typed copmonent controller
        TYPED_COCO ?= COMP_CONTROLLER.
        TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE->SET_BOL_TREE( ME ).

        BEFORE_INITIALIZE_TREE_SERVICE( ).

        " get tree service
        TREE_SRV = GET_TREE_SRV( ).

        " start roundtrip
        TREE_SRV->SET_FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_START( ).

        AFTER_INITIALIZE_TREE_SERVICE( ).

        TREE_SRV->GET_COLUMNS( REREAD = ABAP_TRUE ).

    " read tree properties
    tree_properties = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).

        " after reentry try to save the selected objects.
    if typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->size( ) > 0.
      copy_col = typed_context->focusobjects->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
      copy_col->set_multi_select( abap_false ).
    endif.

    " exchange view configuration descriptor by own wrapper
    PREPARE_CONFIGURATION_DESCR( ).

    " prepare for multi row selection mode
    PREPARE_SELECTION_MODE( ).

    " create tree iterator
    PREPARE_TREE_ITERATOR( ).

        " activate event handler methods raised from window
        WICO ?= VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).

        ACTIVATE_WINDOW_CTRL_EVENTS( ).

        RESTORE_SELECTION_ON_ACTIVE(
          IR_COLLECTION = COPY_COL
          IV_RESTORE    = IV_RESTORE
        ).

        PREPARE_PAGE_RESTORE_FLAG( ).

      endif.

    cleanup.
      LEAVE_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_ACTIVATION ).
  endtry.
  LEAVE_MUTEX( IV_ID = C_MTX_ACTIVATION ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_39 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method ON_AFTER_ACTIVATED_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


  method on_expand_all_sub.
*expand node of given object and all sub nodes

    data:
      node type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      bo   type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.

    if object is bound.
      node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_entity( object ).
    elseif node_key is not initial.
      bo ?= node_key.
      node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
    endif.

    check node is bound.

    expand_all_sub( node ).

  endmethod.


  method on_focus_parent_requested.

    data:
      node   type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      parent type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
      bo     type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


* get current sub objects entry
    check me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col is bound.

    bo = me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->get_current_node( ).
    check bo is bound.

    node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
    check node is bound.

    parent ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_child( node ).
    check parent is bound.

* select parent
    me->select_node( selected_node = parent ).

  endmethod.


  method on_focus_sub_requested.

    data:
      node  type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      child type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
      bo    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


* get current sub objects entry
    check me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col is bound.

    bo = me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->get_current_node( ).
    check bo is bound.

    node = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( bo ).
    check node is bound.

* ensure node is expanded
    if node->is_expanded( ) = abap_false.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->expand_node( node->node_key ).
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->build_table( ).
    endif.

    child = me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_parent( node ).

* select sub
    me->select_node( selected_node = child ).

  endmethod.


  method on_history_state_restored.

    if me->is_on_overview_page( ) = abap_true and
       me->first_roundtrip_after_activate = abap_false.
      me->build_tree( mode = me->tree_properties-initial_select ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE.
  ENTER_UPDATE_MODE( ).
  try.
      SELECT_NODE( SELECTED_NODE = NODE ).
    cleanup.
      LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE( ).
  endtry.
  LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE( ).
endmethod.


  method on_root_col_exchanged.

* reset user filter activation/deactivation
    me->set_filter_deactivated_by_user( abap_false ).

  endmethod.


method ON_SELECTION_CHANGED.

  TYPED_CONTEXT->SELECTEDNODES->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->CLEAR( ).
  data(LR_SELECTED_NODES) = GET_SELECTED_NODES( ).
  data(LR_ITERATOR) = LR_SELECTED_NODES->GET_ITERATOR( ).
  data(LR_ENTITY) = LR_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ).
  while LR_ENTITY is bound.
    TYPED_CONTEXT->SELECTEDNODES->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY ).
    LR_ENTITY = LR_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ).
  endwhile.

  TYPED_CONTEXT->SELECTEDENTITIES->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->CLEAR( ).
  data(LR_SELECTED_ENTITIES) = GET_SELECTED_ENTITIES( ).
  data(LR_ENTITY_ITERATOR) = LR_SELECTED_ENTITIES->GET_ITERATOR( ).
  LR_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY_ITERATOR->GET_FIRST( ).
  while LR_ENTITY is bound.
    TYPED_CONTEXT->SELECTEDENTITIES->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( )->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY ).
    LR_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY_ITERATOR->GET_NEXT( ).
  endwhile.

  TYPED_COCO->RAISE_SELECTION_CHANGED( ).

endmethod.


  method on_select_node.
    data: node            type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
          iu_bo           type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          root_bo         type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          searched_entity type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
          found_node      type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
          iterator        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.

    if mode eq if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_mode_deselect_all.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->deselect_all( ).
    elseif node_key is not initial.
      iu_bo ?= node_key.
      node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_bo( iu_bo ).
      if node is bound.
        calculate_visible_row = abap_true.
        case mode.
          when if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_mode_select_next." Select Next Node with the same instance
            searched_entity = selection.

            found_node = iu_bo->find( iv_next_hit = abap_true iv_searched_entity = searched_entity ).
            if found_node is not bound.
              root_bo = iu_bo->get_root_node( ).
* search in further root objects
              iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
              iterator->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = root_bo ).  " set focus to root
              iu_bo = iterator->get_next_node( ).

              while iu_bo is bound.
                found_node = iu_bo->find( iv_searched_entity = searched_entity ).
                if found_node is bound.
                  exit.
                endif.
                iu_bo = iterator->get_next_node( ).
              endwhile.

            endif.

            if found_node is bound.
              node = me->ensure_node_is_visible( found_node ).
              select_node( selected_node = node ).
            endif.

          when  if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_mode_select_previous." Select Previous Node with the same instance

            searched_entity = selection.

            found_node = iu_bo->find( iv_previous_hit = abap_true iv_searched_entity = searched_entity ).
            if found_node is not bound.
              root_bo = iu_bo->get_root_node( ).
* search in previous root objects
              iterator ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ).
              iterator->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = root_bo ).  " set focus to root
              iu_bo = iterator->get_previous_node( ).

              while iu_bo is bound.
                found_node = iu_bo->find( iv_searched_entity = searched_entity ).
                if found_node is bound.
                  exit.
                endif.
                iu_bo = iterator->get_previous_node( ).
              endwhile.

            endif.

            if found_node is bound.
              node = me->ensure_node_is_visible( found_node ).
              select_node( selected_node = node ).
            endif.
          when others.
            me->select_node( selected_node = node  force_focus_col_rebuild = abap_true ).
        endcase.
      endif.
    elseif selection is bound.
      calculate_visible_row = abap_true.
      if it_selection_path is initial.  "if path is provided we assume the entity is not unique -> skip direct access
        node ?= me->typed_context->isuboltree->get_node_by_entity( selection ).
      endif.
      if node is not bound.
        node ?= me->ensure_entity_is_visible( entity = selection  it_selection_path = it_selection_path ).
      endif.
      if node is bound.
        me->select_node( selected_node = node  force_focus_col_rebuild = abap_true ).
      endif.
    endif.

    TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).

  endmethod.


  method on_tree_build_requested.

    if processed is bound.
      processed->* = abap_false.
    endif.

    if me->build_tree(
         selection                = selection
         mode                     = mode
         only_if_root_col_changed = only_if_root_col_changed
         it_selection_path        = it_selection_path ) = abap_true.

      if processed is bound.
        processed->* = abap_true.
      endif.

      case mode.
        when cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl=>co_mode_selection or
             cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl=>co_mode_select_first. " current page could be different
          calculate_visible_row = abap_true.
        when cl_iubotree_mainwindow_impl=>co_mode_reset_page.
          reset_after_restore = abap_true.
      endcase.

    endif.

  endmethod.


  method on_tree_save_requested.

    data:
      trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


    try.
        trx ?= me->typed_context->transaction->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
        if trx is bound and
          trx->check_save_needed( ) = abap_true and
          trx->check_save_possible( ) = abap_true.
          if trx->save( ) = abap_true.
            trx->commit( ).
          else.
            trx->revert( ).
          endif.
        endif.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.                      "#EC NO_HANDLER
    endtry.

  endmethod.


  method open_personalization_popup.

    super->open_personalization_popup(
      iv_event_name  = cond #(
                         when iv_event_name cs '\x23'
                           then replace( val = iv_event_name  sub = '\x23'  with = '#' )
                           else iv_event_name )
      htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

  endmethod.


  method op_node_clicked.

  DATA:      wico  TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_window.

  wico = me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
  IF wico IS BOUND.
    wico->call_outbound_plug( iv_outbound_plug   = 'NODE_CLICKED'
                              iv_data_collection = iv_data_collection )."#EC NOTEXT
  ENDIF.

  endmethod.


method PREPARE_CONFIGURATION_DESCR.
  " exchange view configuration descriptor by own wrapper
  data(LR_CONFIGURATION_DESCR) = new CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CFG_DESC(
    IR_CONFIG_DESC    = CONFIGURATION_DESCR
    IR_TREE_INSTANCE  = ME
    IR_TREE_SERVICE   = GET_TREE_SRV( )
    IV_PERSONALIZABLE = TREE_PROPERTIES-PERSONALIZABLE
  ).
  CONFIGURATION_DESCR = LR_CONFIGURATION_DESCR.
endmethod.


method PREPARE_PAGE_RESTORE_FLAG.
  if PAGE_VISIBLEFIRSTROW is not initial
    and PAGE_ROOTS is not initial
    and PAGE_ROOTS eq GET_ROOT_IDS( ).
    PAGE_RESTORE = ABAP_TRUE. " this flag is considered in SET_MODELS( )
  else.
    clear: PAGE_VISIBLEFIRSTROW, PAGE_ROOTS, PAGE_RESTORE.
  endif.
endmethod.


method PREPARE_SELECTION_MODE.
  " prepare for multi row selection mode
  if GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_FALSE.
    TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_SELECTION_MODE( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_SINGLE ).
  else.
    if GET_MULTISELECT( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
      TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_SELECTION_MODE( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_MULTI ).
    else.
      TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_SELECTION_MODE( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_NONE ).
    endif.
    TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->SET_COLLECTION( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL ).
    set handler TYPED_CONTEXT->SUBOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE    for TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE activation ABAP_FALSE.
    set handler TYPED_CONTEXT->ALLSUBOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE activation ABAP_FALSE.
    set handler TYPED_CONTEXT->PARENTOBJECTS->ON_NEW_FOCUS_NODE for TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE activation ABAP_FALSE.
  endif.
endmethod.


method PREPARE_TREE_ITERATOR.

  " create tree iterator

  data(LV_CLASS) = GET_TREE_ITERATOR_IMPL_CLASS( ).
  if LV_CLASS is initial.
    LV_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_ITERATOR_CLASS.
  endif.

  create object ITERATOR type (LV_CLASS)
    exporting
      IR_CONTEXT_NODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE
      IR_DISPLAY_MODE = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( )-DISPLAY_MODE.

  if ITERATOR is bound.
    ITERATOR->SET_TREE_SRV( TREE_SRV = GET_TREE_SRV( ) ).
    ITERATOR->SET_EVENT_SRV( TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method RAISE_AFTER_BUILD_TREE_EVENT.
  GET_COMP_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_COMPONENT_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL=>C_CE_AFTER_BUILD_TREE
  ).
  raise event AFTER_BUILD_TREE.
endmethod.


method RAISE_BEFORE_BUILD_TREE_EVENT.
  GET_COMP_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_COMPONENT_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL=>C_CE_BEFORE_BUILD_TREE
  ).
  raise event BEFORE_BUILD_TREE.
endmethod.


method RAISE_FILTER_CHANGE_EVENT.
  GET_COMP_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_COMPONENT_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL=>C_CE_FILTER_CHANGED
  ).
  raise event FILTER_CHANGED.
endmethod.


  method raise_message_handler_error.

    data:
      number type symsgno value 1,
      class  type string,
      rtti   type ref to cl_abap_objectdescr,
      dyn_lt type ref to if_bsp_wd_message_extension.


    if handler is bound.
      rtti ?= cl_abap_objectdescr=>describe_by_object_ref( handler ).
      class = rtti->absolute_name+7(30).
      condense class.
    elseif classname is not initial.
      class = classname.
    endif.


    data:
      msg_srv type ref to cl_bsp_wd_message_service,
      _v1     type symsgv,
      _v2     type symsgv,
      _v3     type symsgv,
      _v4     type symsgv.

    _v1 = method.
    _v2 = class.

    if v3 is initial and prof_id is not initial.
      _v3 = prof_id.
      number = 2.
    else.
      _v3 = v3.
    endif.

    if v4 is initial and node_id is not initial.
      _v4 = node_id.
      number = 2.
    else.
      _v4 = v4.
    endif.

    if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_webclient_active( ) = abap_true.
      msg_srv = cl_bsp_wd_message_service=>get_instance( ).
      if msg_srv is bound.
        if exc is bound.
          create object dyn_lt type lcl_dyn_longtext exporting io_exc = exc.
        endif.
        msg_srv->add_message(
          iv_msg_type       = 'E'
          iv_msg_id         = 'CRM_IU_TREE'
          iv_msg_number     = number
          iv_msg_v1         = _v1
          iv_msg_v2         = _v2
          iv_msg_v3         = _v3
          iv_msg_v4         = _v4
          iv_msg_level      = level
          iv_verification   = verification
          iv_important_info = important_info
          iv_dyn_longtext   = dyn_lt ).
      endif.
    endif.


  endmethod.


method RAISE_SORT_CHANGE_EVENT.
  GET_COMP_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_COMPONENT_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL=>C_CE_SORT_CHANGED
  ).
  raise event SORT_CHANGED.
endmethod.


method REGISTER_ROUNDTRIP_EVENTS ##NEEDED.
  if FUSE_ROUNDTRIP_EVENT is not initial.
    data(LR_MNGR) = CL_BSP_WD_ROUNDTRIP_EVENT_MGR=>GET_CURRENT( ).
    if IV_ACTIVE is not initial.
      LR_MNGR->REGISTER_EH( ME ).
    else.
      LR_MNGR->DEREGISTER_EH( ME ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method RENDER_COLUMN_PREVIEW.
  data(LR_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  if not LR_TREE_SERVICE->IS_COLUMN_PREVIEW_ACTIVE( ).
    return.
  endif.
  data(LR_ELEMENT) = CL_BSP_CALL_ELEMENT=>FACTORY(
    COMP_ID = GET_VIEWAREA_CONTENT_ID( 'cellObjPreview' )
    URL     = GET_VIEWAREA_CONTENT_URL( 'cellObjPreview' )
  ) ##NO_TEXT.
  data(LR_BEE_TABLE) = new CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE( ).
  LR_BEE_TABLE->ADD_HTML( LEVEL = 1 HTML = |<div id="thOverlayContent__cellPreview" style="display:none;">| ) ##NO_TEXT.
  LR_BEE_TABLE->ADD( LEVEL = 2 ELEMENT = LR_ELEMENT ).
  LR_BEE_TABLE->ADD_HTML( LEVEL = 1 HTML = |</div>| ) ##NO_TEXT.
  LR_BEE_TABLE->IF_BSP_BEE~RENDER( IR_PAGE_CONTEXT ).
endmethod.


method RENDER_LAYOUT.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_40 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  if IO_VIEW is not bound.
    return.  "no valid view instance provided
  endif.

  data(LO_PAGE_CONTEXT) = IO_VIEW->GET_PAGE_CONTEXT( ).
  if LO_PAGE_CONTEXT is not bound.
    return.  "no page context -> no rendering
  endif.

  if not RENDER_LAYOUT_SPEC(
    IR_VIEW         = IO_VIEW
    IR_PAGE_CONTEXT = LO_PAGE_CONTEXT
  ).

    try.
        " retrieve the view attributes
        data(LS_TAG) = GET_VIEW_ATTR_TAG_PROPERTIES( IR_VIEW = IO_VIEW ).
        data(LT_ACTION) = GET_VIEW_ATTR_ACTIONS( IR_VIEW = IO_VIEW ).
        data(LO_ISUBOLTREE) = GET_VIEW_ATTR_TREE( IR_VIEW = IO_VIEW ).
      catch CX_BSP_INV_ATTR_NAME.
        return.  "invalid attribute -> unknown view or invalid view layout version
    endtry.

    try.
        data LO_AREAFRAME type ref to CL_THTMLB_AREAFRAME.
        LO_AREAFRAME ?=
          LO_PAGE_CONTEXT->ELEMENT_AT_TOP_OF_STACK( )->GET_CLASS_NAMED_PARENT(
            CLASS_NAME  = |CL_THTMLB_AREAFRAME|
            MAX_LEVELS  = 2
            RAISE_ERROR = ABAP_FALSE ).

      catch CX_ROOT ##catch_all ##no_handler.
    endtry.

* check if BOL tree is used within an area frame and try to avoid duplicate personalize and download buttons
    if LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'TRUE' or LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = ABAP_TRUE or
       LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = 'TRUE' or LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = ABAP_TRUE.

      if LO_AREAFRAME is bound.
        if LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'TRUE'.
          data LV_AREAFRAME_PERS type ABAP_BOOL.
          LV_AREAFRAME_PERS = ABAP_TRUE.
          LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'FALSE'.
        endif.
        if LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = 'TRUE'.
          data LV_AREAFRAME_DOWN type ABAP_BOOL.
          LV_AREAFRAME_DOWN = ABAP_TRUE.
          LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = 'FALSE'.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.

* after advanced search query was executed this flag is set,
* this is wrong for this tree otherwise selection isn't working
    clear CL_THTMLB_TABLE_VIEW=>GV_RESET.

* prepare the bee table
    data LO_BEE_TABLE type ref to CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE.
    create object LO_BEE_TABLE.

* bee table level
    data LV_LEVEL type SYTABIX value 1.

* check if we need a grid
    if LS_TAG-CELLSPACING is not initial and LS_TAG-CELLSPACING <> '0'.
*   open grid
      LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
        LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
        ELEMENT = CL_THTMLB_GRID=>FACTORY(
                    ROWSIZE     = |1|
                    COLUMNSIZE  = |1|
                    CELLSPACING = LS_TAG-CELLSPACING ) ).
*   open grid cell (level 2)
      LV_LEVEL = LV_LEVEL + 1.
      LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
        LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
        ELEMENT = CL_THTMLB_GRID_CELL=>FACTORY(
                    ROWINDEX    = |1|
                    COLUMNINDEX = |1| ) ).
*   the actual tree table will be on level 3 in this case
      LV_LEVEL = LV_LEVEL + 1.
    endif.

* check if the area frame setter is necessary
    if LS_TAG-TOOLBAR_FOREIGN_USE = 'TRUE'.
      LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
        LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
        ELEMENT = CL_THTMLB_AREAFRAMESETTER=>FACTORY(
                    MAXBUTTONNUMBER       = LS_TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER
                    NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = LS_TAG-NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON
                    NOTABLEGRAPHICSBUTTON = 'TRUE'
                    TOOLBARBUTTONS        = LT_ACTION ) ).
      clear: LT_ACTION, LS_TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER.
    endif.

    data(LV_TAG_ID) = GENERATE_CELLERATOR_TAG_ID( ).

    " now continue with table/tree
    if LS_TAG-IS_TABLE = ABAP_TRUE.
      " it is a flat table
      LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
        LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
        ELEMENT = CL_CHTMLB_CONFIG_CELLERATOR=>FACTORY(
                    ACTIONS                    = LT_ACTION
                    ACTIONSMAXINROW            = LS_TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER
                    DESIGN                     = LS_TAG-DESIGN
                    DISPLAYMODE                = LS_TAG-DISPLAY_MODE
                    DOWNLOADTOEXCEL            = LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL
                    DRAGANDDROPITERATOR        = ME->DNDITERATOR
                    EDITMODE                   = LS_TAG-EDITMODE
                    ENABLETABLEGRAPHICS        = 'FALSE'
                    FILLUPEMPTYROWS            = LS_TAG-FILL_UP_EMPTY_ROWS
                    FIXEDHEADERS               = 'TRUE'
                    HEADERTEXT                 = LS_TAG-HEADERTEXT
                    ID                         = LV_TAG_ID
                    ITERATOR                   = ME->ITERATOR
                    ONROWSELECTION             = |nodeSelect|
                    PERSONALIZABLE             = LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE
                    RESET                      = LS_TAG-RESET
                    SCROLLROWCOUNT             = conv STRING( LS_TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT )
                    SCROLLROWCOUNTAUTOFIT      = 'TRUE'
                    SELECTEDROWINDEX           = LS_TAG-SELECTED_ROW_INDEX
                    SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE      = LS_TAG-SEL_TABLE
                    SELECTIONMODE              = LS_TAG-SEL_MODE
                    SHOWEMPTYTABLETEXT         = LS_TAG-SHOWEMPTYTABLETEXT
                    SHOWPERSONALIZEBUTTON      = LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE
                    TABLE                      = LO_ISUBOLTREE->TABLE
                    VERTICALSCROLLING          = 'TRUE'
                    VERTICALSCROLLINGMODE      = LS_TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE
                    VISIBLEFIRSTROW            = LS_TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW
                    VISIBLEROWCOUNT            = LS_TAG-ROW_COUNT
                    XML                        = LS_TAG-XML
                    _TABLE                     = |//ISUBOLTREE/Table|
                    NOHEADER                   = LS_TAG-NOHEADER
                    ) ).
    else.
      " it is a tree
      if IS_ACCESSIBILITY_MODE( ).
        " in accessibilty mode we use the standard config tree
        LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
          LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
          ELEMENT = CL_CHTMLB_CONFIG_TREE=>FACTORY(
                      ACTIONS               = LT_ACTION
                      ACTIONSMAXINROW       = LS_TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER
                      ALLROWSEDITABLE       = LS_TAG-ALLROWSEDITABLE
                      DESIGN                = LS_TAG-DESIGN
                      DISPLAYMODE           = LS_TAG-DISPLAYMODE
                      DOWNLOADTOEXCEL       = LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL
                      DRAGANDDROPITERATOR   = ME->DNDITERATOR
                      FILLUPEMPTYROWS       = LS_TAG-FILL_UP_EMPTY_ROWS
                      FILTERABLE            = LS_TAG-ALLOW_COLUMN_FILTER
                      FIXEDHEADERS          = 'TRUE'
                      HEADERTEXT            = LS_TAG-HEADERTEXT
                      HEIGHT                = LS_TAG-HEIGHT
                      ID                    = LV_TAG_ID
                      ITERATOR              = ME->ITERATOR
                      NODETABLE             = LO_ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB ##enh_ok
                      NOFRAME               = LS_TAG-NOFRAME
                      ONCLOSE               = LS_TAG-ONCLOSE
                      ONCOLLAPSENODE        = |nodeCollapse|
                      ONDECREASESIZE        = LS_TAG-ONDECREASESIZE
                      ONEXPANDNODE          = |nodeExpand|
                      ONINCREASESIZE        = LS_TAG-ONINCREASESIZE
                      ONROWSELECTION        = |nodeSelect|
                      " within the Utilities tree UHTMLB_CONFIG_TREE the
                      " paramter PERSONALIZABLE = 'MIXED' leads to PERSONALIZABLE = 'FALSE'
                      PERSONALIZABLE        = cond STRING(
                                                when LS_TAG-TOOLBAR_FOREIGN_USE = 'TRUE'
                                                  then 'FALSE'
                                                  else cond #(
                                                    when LV_AREAFRAME_PERS = ABAP_TRUE
                                                      then 'FALSE'
                                                      else LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE
                                                  )
                                              )
                      RESET                 = LS_TAG-RESET
                      SELECTIONMODE         = LO_ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE
                      SELECTEDROWINDEX      = LS_TAG-SELECTED_ROW_INDEX
                      SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = LS_TAG-SEL_TABLE
                      TABLE                 = LO_ISUBOLTREE->TABLE
                      TYPE                  = LS_TAG-TYPE
                      VERTICALSCROLLINGMODE = LS_TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE
                      VISIBLEFIRSTROW       = LS_TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW
                      VISIBLEROWCOUNT       = LS_TAG-ROW_COUNT
                      XML                   = LS_TAG-XML
                      _TABLE                = |//ISUBOLTREE/Table|
                      NOHEADER              = LS_TAG-NOHEADER
                      ) ).
      else.
        " this is the Utilities tree
        LO_BEE_TABLE->ADD(
          LEVEL   = LV_LEVEL
          ELEMENT = CL_UHTMLB_CONFIG_TREE=>FACTORY(
                      ACTIONS               = LT_ACTION
                      ACTIONSMAXINROW       = LS_TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER
                      ALLROWSEDITABLE       = LS_TAG-ALLROWSEDITABLE
                      DESIGN                = LS_TAG-DESIGN
                      DISPLAYMODE           = LS_TAG-DISPLAYMODE
                      DOWNLOADTOEXCEL       = LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL
                      DRAGANDDROPITERATOR   = ME->DNDITERATOR
                      FILLUPEMPTYROWS       = LS_TAG-FILL_UP_EMPTY_ROWS
                      FILTERABLE            = LS_TAG-ALLOW_COLUMN_FILTER
                      FIXEDHEADERS          = 'TRUE'
                      HEADERTEXT            = LS_TAG-HEADERTEXT
                      HEIGHT                = LS_TAG-HEIGHT
                      ID                    = LV_TAG_ID
                      ITERATOR              = ME->ITERATOR
                      NODETABLE             = LO_ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB ##enh_ok
                      NOFRAME               = LS_TAG-NOFRAME
                      ONCLOSE               = LS_TAG-ONCLOSE
                      ONCOLLAPSENODE        = |nodeCollapse|
                      ONDECREASESIZE        = LS_TAG-ONDECREASESIZE
                      ONEXPANDNODE          = |nodeExpand|
                      ONINCREASESIZE        = LS_TAG-ONINCREASESIZE
                      ONROWSELECTION        = |nodeSelect|
                      PERSONALIZABLE        = cond STRING(
                                                when LS_TAG-TOOLBAR_FOREIGN_USE = 'TRUE'
                                                  then cond #( when LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'TRUE' or
                                                                    LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = ABAP_TRUE or
                                                                    LV_AREAFRAME_PERS = ABAP_TRUE
                                                                 then 'MIXED' else 'FALSE' )
                                                  else cond #( when LV_AREAFRAME_PERS = ABAP_TRUE
                                                                 then 'MIXED' else LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE ) )
                      RESET                 = LS_TAG-RESET
                      SELECTIONMODE         = LO_ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE
                      SELECTEDROWINDEX      = LS_TAG-SELECTED_ROW_INDEX
                      SELECTEDROWINDEXTABLE = LS_TAG-SEL_TABLE
                      TABLE                 = LO_ISUBOLTREE->TABLE
                      TYPE                  = LS_TAG-TYPE
                      VERTICALSCROLLINGMODE = LS_TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE
                      VISIBLEFIRSTROW       = LS_TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW
                      VISIBLEROWCOUNT       = LS_TAG-ROW_COUNT
                      XML                   = LS_TAG-XML
                      _TABLE                = |//ISUBOLTREE/Table|
                      NOHEADER              = LS_TAG-NOHEADER
                      ) ).
      endif.
    endif.

    " set correct visible first row in request
    if LS_TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW > 0.
      IO_VIEW->GET_REQUEST( )->SET_FORM_FIELD(
        NAME  = |{ GENERATE_CELLERATOR_ID( ) }_visibleFirstRow|
        VALUE = LS_TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW ).
    endif.

    " now start the rendering process
    LO_BEE_TABLE->IF_BSP_BEE~RENDER( LO_PAGE_CONTEXT ).

    " finalize area frame handling
    if LO_AREAFRAME is bound.
      if LV_AREAFRAME_PERS = ABAP_TRUE.
        LO_AREAFRAME->HEADER-NOPERSONALIZEBUTTON = 'FALSE'.
      else.
        LO_AREAFRAME->HEADER-NOPERSONALIZEBUTTON = 'TRUE'.
      endif.
      if LV_AREAFRAME_DOWN = ABAP_TRUE.
        LO_AREAFRAME->HEADER-NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = 'FALSE'.
      else.
        LO_AREAFRAME->HEADER-NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = 'TRUE'.
      endif.
    elseif LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL is initial or LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = 'FALSE' or
           LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE is initial or LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'FALSE'.
      try.
          data LO_TAB_CONTAINER type ref to CL_THTMLB_TAB_CONTAINER.
          LO_TAB_CONTAINER ?=
            LO_PAGE_CONTEXT->ELEMENT_AT_TOP_OF_STACK( )->GET_CLASS_NAMED_PARENT(
              CLASS_NAME  = |CL_THTMLB_TAB_CONTAINER|
              RAISE_ERROR = ABAP_FALSE ).
          if LO_TAB_CONTAINER is bound.
            if LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL is initial or LS_TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL = 'FALSE'.
              LO_TAB_CONTAINER->NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = 'TRUE'.
            endif.
            if LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE is initial or LS_TAG-PERSONALIZABLE = 'FALSE'.
              LO_TAB_CONTAINER->NOPERSONALIZEBUTTON = 'TRUE'.
            endif.
          endif.
        catch CX_ROOT ##catch_all ##no_handler.
      endtry.
    endif.

    " add overlay
    RENDER_COLUMN_PREVIEW(
      IR_VIEW         = IO_VIEW
      IR_PAGE_CONTEXT = LO_PAGE_CONTEXT
    ).

  endif.

  " rendering successful
  RV_SUCCESS = ABAP_TRUE.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_41 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method RENDER_LAYOUT_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method RESTORE_SELECTION_ON_ACTIVE.
  if ( IS_OVERVIEW_PAGE eq ABAP_TRUE
    or TREE_PROPERTIES-INITIAL_SELECT is not initial )
    and TREE_PROPERTIES-NO_REFRESH_ON_RESTORE is initial
    and TREE_PROPERTIES-NO_REFRESH_ON_ACTIVATE is initial.

    BUILD_TREE( MODE = TREE_PROPERTIES-INITIAL_SELECT ).

    if ( IV_RESTORE = ABAP_TRUE or TREE_PROPERTIES-INITIAL_SELECT <> 'F' )
      and IR_COLLECTION is bound and IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) > 0. " restore selection after reentry.
      TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->RESTORE_SELECTION_ON_ACTIVE( IR_COLLECTION ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method SELECT_NODE.

  data:
    FOCUS1 type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
    FOCUS2 type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
    WICO   type ref to CL_BSP_WD_WINDOW,
    BONODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE,
    NODE01 type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN01,
    VROOT  type ABAP_BOOL,
    ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY,
    LR_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL.

* avoid recursive calls
  check SELECTING_ACTIVE = ABAP_FALSE.

  SELECTING_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
  try.

      ENTER_UPDATE_MODE( ).
      try.

          if SELECTED_NODE is bound.
            NODE = SELECTED_NODE.
          elseif not INDEX is initial.
            NODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( INDEX ).
          elseif not KEY is initial.
            NODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( KEY ).
          elseif SELECTED_NODE is supplied.
*   old focus might be deleted -> try to reselect first entry
            try.
                if LAST_SELECTION->ALIVE( ) = ABAP_FALSE.
                  data NEW_SELECTION type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.
                  NEW_SELECTION = LAST_SELECTION.
                  do.
                    if NEW_SELECTION->ALIVE( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
                      exit.
                    else.
                      NEW_SELECTION = NEW_SELECTION->GET_PARENT_NODE( ONLY_VISIBLE = ABAP_TRUE ).
                    endif.
                  enddo.
                  NODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_BO( NEW_SELECTION ).
                endif.
              catch CX_ROOT ##no_handler.                "#EC CATCH_ALL
            endtry.
          endif.

          clear LAST_SELECTION.

          if NODE is bound.

*   remove previous selection.
            TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DESELECT_ALL( ).
            NODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.


*   set node to virtual root?
            VROOT = VIRTUAL_ROOT.

*   ensure node is not hidden (by virtual root mechanism)
