            if TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->IS_NODE_HIDDEN( NODE ) <> ABAP_FALSE.
*     remove filters
              NODE01 ?= NODE.
              BONODE ?= NODE01->BO.
              BONODE->CHILDREN_FILTER_DISABLED = ABAP_TRUE.
              BONODE->INVALIDATE_CHILDREN( ).
*     set virtual root
              TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->RESET_VIRTUAL_ROOT( ).
              VROOT = ABAP_TRUE.
            endif.

*   also set to virtual root?
            if VROOT = ABAP_TRUE.
              TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_VIRTUAL_ROOT( NODE ).
            endif.

*   fill external collections with nodes on same hierarchy level
            if FORCE_FOCUS_COL_REBUILD = ABAP_TRUE or VROOT = ABAP_TRUE.
*     fill public component context nodes with new collections
              UPDATE_FOCUS_COL( NODE ).
            else.
              NODE01 ?= NODE.
*     at first check if target node is on same level in hierarchy
              FOCUS1 = TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ).
              FOCUS2 = TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->FIND( IV_BO = NODE01->BO ).
              if FOCUS2 is bound.
*       node on same level -> just publish via find method
                if FOCUS1 = FOCUS2.
                  TYPED_CONTEXT->FOCUSOBJECTS->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->PUBLISH_CURRENT( ). " find call before hasn't published current node
                endif.
              else.
*       fill public component context nodes with new collections
                UPDATE_FOCUS_COL( NODE ).
              endif.
            endif.

            NODE01 ?= NODE.
            BONODE ?= NODE01->BO.
            ENTITY = BONODE->GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).

*   inform embedding component about selection by calling outbound plug
            if NO_PUBLISHING = ABAP_FALSE.
              WICO = VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).
              if WICO is bound.
                if ENTITY is bound.
                  create object LR_COL type CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL.
                  LR_COL->ADD( ENTITY ).
                  WICO->CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG( IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG = 'NODE_SELECTED' IV_DATA_COLLECTION = LR_COL ). "#EC NOTEXT
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.

*   inform external event service subribers if requested
            if TYPED_COCO is bound and BONODE is bound.
              TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE->HANDLE_EVENT(
                EVENT_TYPE   = IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_HANDLER=>GC_SEL_EVENT_TYPE
                EVENT_ID     = |GENERIC|
                EVENT_ENTITY = ENTITY
                NODE_ID      = BONODE->GET_NODE_ID( )
                IO_NODE_ENTITY = BONODE ).
            endif.

          endif.

          LAST_SELECTION = BONODE.

          TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->DO_REFRESH_SELECTED_NODES( ).

        cleanup.
          LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE( ).
      endtry.
      LEAVE_UPDATE_MODE( ).

    cleanup.
      SELECTING_ACTIVE = ABAP_FALSE.
  endtry.
  SELECTING_ACTIVE = ABAP_FALSE.

endmethod.


method SET_CALLER_ID.
  MV_CALLER_ID = IV_CALLER_ID.
endmethod.


  method set_filter_deactivated_by_user.

    me->mv_filter_deactivated_by_user = iv_filter_deactivated_by_user.

    if me->typed_context is bound and
       me->typed_context->rootobjects is bound and
       me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper is bound.
      if me->mv_filter_deactivated_by_user = abap_false.
        set handler me->on_root_col_exchanged for me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper activation abap_false.
      else.
        set handler me->on_root_col_exchanged for me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper activation abap_true.
      endif.
    endif.

  endmethod.


method SET_FORCE_BUILD_TREE.
  FFORCE_BUILD_TREE = ABAP_TRUE.
endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_42 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

  data: TREE_SRV     type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE,
        OWN_CONFDESC type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CFG_DESC,
        ACTIONS      type ref to CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON_T,
        TAG          type CRM_ISUTREE_TAG_PROPERTIES,
        SEL_ROW      type SYTABIX,
        ROW_COUNT    type SYTABIX,
        LV_HEIGHT    type P length 4 decimals 2,
        CONFIG_DESCR type BSP_DLC_TABLE_DESCR.


  SUPER->SET_MODELS( VIEW ).

  if not SET_MODELS_SPEC( IR_VIEW = VIEW ).

    try.
* read tree service and set it to configuration descriptor and iterator
        TREE_SRV = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
        OWN_CONFDESC ?= CONFIGURATION_DESCR.
        OWN_CONFDESC->TREE_SERVICE = TREE_SRV.

        if ITERATOR is bound.
          ITERATOR->SET_TREE_SRV( TREE_SRV ).
          data LR_TREE_PROPERTIES type ref to CRM_ISUTREE_TREE_PROPERTIES.
          get reference of TREE_PROPERTIES into LR_TREE_PROPERTIES.
          ITERATOR->SET_TREE_PROPERTIES_REF( LR_TREE_PROPERTIES ).
        endif.

* read tree properties
        TAG-TREE_PROPS = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ). "TREE_PROPERTIES = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( ).
        TAG-MULTISELECT = GET_MULTISELECT( ).
        TAG-MULTISELECT_MODE = GET_MULTISELECT_MODE( ).
* table specific logic -> no hierarchy
        if TREE_SRV->IS_TABLE( ) eq ABAP_TRUE." render a table instead of a tree!
          TAG-IS_TABLE = ABAP_TRUE.

* only values NONE, SINGLE, MULTI are allowed
          if TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE eq TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_SINGLE.
            TAG-SEL_MODE = 'SINGLE'.
          elseif TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_MODE eq TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELMODE_MULTI.
            TAG-SEL_MODE = 'MULTI'.
          else.
            TAG-SEL_MODE = 'NONE'.
          endif.

          if TAG-DISPLAY_MODE eq ABAP_FALSE.
            TAG-EDITMODE = 'ALL'.
          endif.
        endif.

* get config xml
        TAG-XML = CONFIGURATION_DESCR->GET_CONFIG_DATA( ).
        CONFIG_DESCR = CL_BSP_DLC_TABLE_UTILITY=>CONF_XML_TO_ABAP( IV_XML = TAG-XML ).

        TAG-MODE = TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->PROFILE->GET_MODE( ).

        try.
            ROW_COUNT = CONFIG_DESCR-VISIBLE_ROWS.
            if TAG-MODE = 'R'.
* special handling for R Mode
              TAG-FILL_UP_EMPTY_ROWS = 'FALSE'.
*            row_count = row_count / 2.
            endif.
            if SELECTEDROWINDEX > 0.
              SEL_ROW = SELECTEDROWINDEX.
              clear SELECTEDROWINDEX.
            else.
              SEL_ROW = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
            endif.

* calculate visible first row if requested -> if row is selected from outside
            if SEL_ROW > 0 and CALCULATE_VISIBLE_ROW eq ABAP_TRUE.
*           we set the correct index so that also positioning in combination with scrolling will be possible if supported by WEBCUIF
              TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW = SEL_ROW.  " - ( sel_row - 1 ) mod row_count.

              PAGE_VISIBLEFIRSTROW = TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW.
              PAGE_VISIBLEROWCOUNT = ROW_COUNT.
              PAGE_ROOTS           = GET_ROOT_IDS( ).

              CALCULATE_VISIBLE_ROW = ABAP_FALSE.
            elseif PAGE_RESTORE eq ABAP_TRUE and PAGE_VISIBLEROWCOUNT eq ROW_COUNT. "after rentry to the view display same page as leaved before!!
              TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW = PAGE_VISIBLEFIRSTROW.
              clear: PAGE_RESTORE.
            endif.

          catch CX_ROOT.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
            TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW = '-1'.
        endtry.

* repair selected-row-index and selcted-row-table adjust to multiselect mode
        if TAG-MULTISELECT eq ABAP_TRUE.
          TAG-SEL_TABLE = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTION_TAB.
          if LINES( TAG-SEL_TABLE ) eq 1.
            read table TAG-SEL_TABLE index 1 into SEL_ROW.
            if SY-SUBRC = 0 and SEL_ROW = -1.
              clear TAG-SEL_TABLE.
              append 0 to TAG-SEL_TABLE.
            elseif SY-SUBRC = 0 and SEL_ROW > 0 and CALCULATE_VISIBLE_ROW eq ABAP_TRUE.
*           we set the correct index so that also positioning in combination with scrolling will be possible if supported by WEBCUIF
              TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW = SEL_ROW.  " - ( sel_row - 1 ) mod row_count.

              PAGE_VISIBLEFIRSTROW = TAG-VISIBLE_FIRST_ROW.
              PAGE_VISIBLEROWCOUNT = ROW_COUNT.
              PAGE_ROOTS           = GET_ROOT_IDS( ).

              CALCULATE_VISIBLE_ROW = ABAP_FALSE.
            endif.
          endif.
          clear TAG-SELECTED_ROW_INDEX.
        else.
          TAG-SELECTED_ROW_INDEX = TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SELECTED_INDEX.
          clear TAG-SEL_TABLE.
        endif.

        if TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT is initial.
          TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT = CONFIG_DESCR-VISIBLE_ROWS_BEF_SCROLL.
          if TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT is initial.
            TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT = TREE_SRV->GET_SCROLL_ROWS( ).
          endif.
        endif.

*    calculate the height
        if TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT is not initial and LINES( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB ) gt TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT.
          REQUEST->GET_USER_AGENT( importing USER_AGENT_TYPE = data(LV_BROWSER_TYPE) ).
          CL_THTMLB_CELLERATOR=>CALCULATE_ROW_HEIGHT( exporting IV_ROW_COUNT    = TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT
                                                                IV_BROWSER_TYPE = LV_BROWSER_TYPE
                                                      importing EV_HEIGHT_PX    = LV_HEIGHT ).

          LV_HEIGHT = LV_HEIGHT + ( LV_HEIGHT / TAG-SCROLLROWCOUNT ). "+ header/title height
          TAG-HEIGHT = LV_HEIGHT.
        endif.

        if RESET_AFTER_RESTORE eq ABAP_TRUE.
          TAG-RESET = 'TRUE'.
          clear RESET_AFTER_RESTORE.
        endif.

* handle display/edit mode and all-rows-editable
        if TAG-DISPLAY_MODE eq ABAP_FALSE.
          TAG-ALLROWSEDITABLE = 'TRUE'.
        else.
          TAG-DISPLAYMODE    = CL_CHTMLB_CONFIG_TREE=>GC_DISPLAYMODE_WITH_SELECTION.
        endif.

        if TAG-DOWNLOAD_EXCEL eq 'FALSE'.
          TAG-NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = 'TRUE'.
        else.
          TAG-NOEXCELDOWNLOADBUTTON = 'FALSE'.
        endif.

* handle increase/ decrease/ close hiearchy appearance
* by default there is no frame
        TAG-NOFRAME = ABAP_TRUE.

*     header requested by outer component?
        if TAG-SHOWFRAME = ABAP_TRUE.
          clear TAG-NOFRAME.
        endif.

        if TAG-ENABLE_CLOSE eq ABAP_TRUE.
          TAG-ONCLOSE = 'CLOSE'.
          clear TAG-NOFRAME. " clear no frame, otherwise icons are invisible
        endif.
        if TAG-INCREASE_DECREASE_MODE eq ABAP_TRUE.
          clear TAG-NOFRAME.
          INCREASE_ICON = BOOLC( TAG-ALREADY_INCREASED is initial ).
          if INCREASE_ICON eq ABAP_TRUE.
            TAG-ONINCREASESIZE = 'INCREASE'.
            TAG-ONDECREASESIZE = ''.
          else.
            TAG-ONINCREASESIZE = ''.
            TAG-ONDECREASESIZE = 'DECREASE'.
          endif.
        endif.

*     fake scrolling not supported in combination with one click actions
        if TREE_SRV is bound and
           TREE_SRV->IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE( IV_CHECK_ALL = ABAP_TRUE ) <> CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.
          TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE = 'NATIVE'.
        elseif TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE is initial.
          TAG-VERTICAL_SCROLLING_MODE = 'FAKE'.
        endif.

        TAG-DESIGN = TO_UPPER( TAG-DESIGN ).
        if TAG-DESIGN <> |TRANSPARENT|.
          TAG-DESIGN = |STANDARD|.
        endif.

        ACTIONS  = GET_ACTIONS( TAG-MODE ).
        VIEW->SET_ATTRIBUTE( NAME   = 'ACTIONS'
                             VALUE  = ACTIONS->* ).

        if ACTIONS->* is not initial and ACTIONS->*[ LINES( ACTIONS->* ) ]-ID = |showCustomizingProfile|.
          TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER = TAG-MAXBUTTONNUMBER + 1. "the customizing button doesn't count -> increase max number
        endif.

        VIEW->SET_ATTRIBUTE( NAME   = 'TAG'
                             VALUE  = TAG ).

        OWN_CONFDESC->SET_TAG_PROPERTIES( TAG ).

        data LX_ROOT type ref to CX_ROOT.
      catch CX_ROOT into LX_ROOT.                        "#EC CATCH_ALL
        RAISE_MESSAGE_HANDLER_ERROR( METHOD = 'SET_MODELS' HANDLER = ME
                                     PROF_ID = TREE_SRV->GET_PROFILE_ID( )
                                     EXC = LX_ROOT )."# EC NOTEXT
    endtry.

* clear mark for roundtrip within init on activation
    FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_AFTER_ACTIVATE = ABAP_FALSE.

* set visible columns to iterator
    if ITERATOR is bound.
      ITERATOR->SET_VISIBLE_COLUMNS( GET_VISIBLE_COLUMNS( ) ).
    endif.

* set drag and drop iterator if needed
    if DNDITERATOR is bound.
      data LV_DND_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL.
      LV_DND_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
    endif.
    clear DNDITERATOR.
* due to performance reasons we do not allow drag'n'drop while scroll mode is active in long lists
    if LINES( TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->NODE_TAB ) <= 50 or
           CONFIG_DESCR-PAGE_SCROLL_MODE <> 'S' and CONFIG_DESCR-VISIBLE_ROWS <= 50.  "paging/mixed mode
      data LV_DRAG_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL.
      data LV_DROP_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL.
      TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE->IS_DND_ACTIVE(
        importing
          EV_DRAG_ACTIVE = LV_DRAG_ACTIVE
          EV_DROP_ACTIVE = LV_DROP_ACTIVE ).
      if LV_DRAG_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE or LV_DROP_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
        DNDITERATOR = ITERATOR.
      endif.
    endif.
    if DNDITERATOR is bound.
      LV_DND_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
    endif.

* diabled delta handling if drag and drop was/is active
    if LV_DND_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
      if CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GET_DISABLE_DH( ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        raise event DISABLE_DH_NAVIGATION
          exporting
            VALIDITY = CL_AJAX_UTILITY=>GC_DH_NAV_BLOCK_ONCE.
      endif.
    endif.

* finalize roundtrip
    if TREE_SRV is bound.
      TREE_SRV->SET_FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_DONE( ).
    endif.

  endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_43 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE STATIC .

endmethod.


method SET_MODELS_SPEC ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES.
  if not SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_SPEC(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
    IT_NODE_IDS   = IT_NODE_IDS
  ).
    SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL(
      IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
      IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
      IT_NODE_IDS   = IT_NODE_IDS
    ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL.
  TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES(
    IR_ENTITIES = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_APPEND   = IV_APPEND
    IT_NODE_IDS = IT_NODE_IDS
  ).
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_ENTITIES_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES.
  if not SET_SELECTED_NODES_SPEC(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
  ).
    SET_SELECTED_NODES_INTERNAL(
      IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
      IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
    ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES_INTERNAL.
  TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SET_SELECTED_NODES(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_APPEND     = IV_APPEND
  ).
endmethod.


method SET_SELECTED_NODES_SPEC ##NEEDED.
  RV_HANDLED = ABAP_FALSE.
endmethod.


method SET_TREE_ENH_INTERFACE.
  FIF_TREE_ENH = IR_INTERFACE.
endmethod.


method SET_VIEW_ATTR_ACTIONS.
  IR_VIEW->SET_ATTRIBUTE( NAME = 'ACTIONS' VALUE = IT_VALUES ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method SET_VIEW_ATTR_TAG_PROPERTIES.
  IR_VIEW->SET_ATTRIBUTE( NAME = 'TAG' VALUE = IS_VALUES ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method SET_VIEW_ATTR_TREE.
  IR_VIEW->SET_ATTRIBUTE( NAME = 'ISUBOLTREE' VALUE = IR_VALUE ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method STORE_CURRENT_DATA_CONTEXTS.
*  ROOT_IDS   = GET_ROOT_IDS( ).
*  FILTER_IDS = GET_FILTER_IDS( ).
  FCURRENT_ROOT_IDS = GET_CURRENT_ROOT_IDS( ).
  FCURRENT_FILTER_IDS = GET_CURRENT_FILTER_IDS( ).
  SORT_STATE = ME->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->SORT_STATE.
endmethod.


  method UPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA.

    types:
      begin of TS_CONFIG_KEY,
        COMPONENT       type BSP_WD_COMPONENT_NAME,
        VIEWNAME        type O2PAGEEXT,
        ROLE_KEY        type BSP_DLC_ROLE_KEY,
        COMPONENT_USAGE type BSP_DLC_COMPONENT_USAGE,
        OBJECT_TYPE     type BSP_DLC_OBJECT_TYPE,
        OBJECT_SUB_TYPE type BSP_DLC_OBJECT_SUB_TYPE,
      end of TS_CONFIG_KEY.

    if FUPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA is initial.
      try.
          FUPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA = ABAP_TRUE.

          " update window configuration data
          data LO_WINDOW_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL.
          LO_WINDOW_CONTROLLER ?= VIEW_MANAGER->GET_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).
          if LO_WINDOW_CONTROLLER is bound.
            LO_WINDOW_CONTROLLER->UPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA( ).
          endif.

          " update my configuration data
          data(LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD) = value TS_CONFIG_KEY( ).
          data(LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW) = value TS_CONFIG_KEY( ).
          CONFIGURATION_DESCR->GET_CONFIG_KEY(
            importing
              EV_COMPONENT       = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-COMPONENT
              EV_VIEWNAME        = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-VIEWNAME
              EV_ROLE_KEY        = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-ROLE_KEY
              EV_COMPONENT_USAGE = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-COMPONENT_USAGE
              EV_OBJECT_TYPE     = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-OBJECT_TYPE
              EV_OBJECT_SUB_TYPE = LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD-OBJECT_SUB_TYPE
          ).
          COPY_CONFIG_KEYS_FROM_PARENT( ).
          CONFIGURATION_DESCR->GET_CONFIG_KEY(
            importing
              EV_COMPONENT       = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-COMPONENT
              EV_VIEWNAME        = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-VIEWNAME
              EV_ROLE_KEY        = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-ROLE_KEY
              EV_COMPONENT_USAGE = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-COMPONENT_USAGE
              EV_OBJECT_TYPE     = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-OBJECT_TYPE
              EV_OBJECT_SUB_TYPE = LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW-OBJECT_SUB_TYPE
          ).
          if LS_CONFIG_KEY_OLD <> LS_CONFIG_KEY_NEW.
            CONFIGURATION_DESCR->GET_CONFIG_DATA( ).
          endif.
        catch CX_ROOT ##CATCH_ALL.
          FUPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA = ABAP_FALSE.
      endtry.
      FUPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA = ABAP_FALSE.
    endif.

  endmethod.


  method update_focus_col.
    data: node_cn01 type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01.

    if node is supplied.
      if node is bound and me->GET_MULTISELECT( ) eq abap_true.
        node_cn01 ?= node.
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->focus_col->if_bol_bo_col~add( node_cn01->bo ).
      else.
        me->typed_context->isuboltree->update_focus_col( node ).
      endif.
    else.
      me->typed_context->isuboltree->update_focus_col( ).
    endif.

  endmethod.


method USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS.
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_FALSE.
  data(LR_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  if LR_TREE_SERVICE is bound.
    RV_RESULT = LR_TREE_SERVICE->USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

  TYPED_COCO = cast #( COMP_CONTROLLER ).

  " Caller ID
  DETERMINE_CALLER_ID( ).

  TYPED_COCO->TYPED_CONTEXT->EVENT_SERVICE->SET_BOL_TREE( ME ).

  REGISTER_ROUNDTRIP_EVENTS( IV_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE ).

  SUPER->WD_CREATE_CONTEXT( ).

endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.
  REGISTER_ROUNDTRIP_EVENTS( IV_ACTIVE = ABAP_FALSE ).
  SUPER->WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT( ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT definition
  public
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_BOL_ENTITY_ACCESS .
  interfaces IF_HTMLB_TABLEVIEW_ITERATOR .
  interfaces IF_THTMLB_DRAG_N_DROP_ITERATOR .
  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_ITERATOR .

  constants GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU value ' ' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants GC_OCA_AS_MENU_ON type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU value 'X' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants GC_OCA_AS_MENU_WITH_OCM type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU value 'Y' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_DEFAULT_TREE_ITERATOR_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME value 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants:
    begin of C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION,
      BUTTONS       Type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROF_OCA_MENU value ' ' ##NO_TEXT, " Show as buttons
      MENU          Type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROF_OCA_MENU value 'X' ##NO_TEXT, " Show as menu
      MENU_WITH_OCM Type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROF_OCA_MENU value 'Y' ##NO_TEXT, " Show as menu and show object related context menu
      TOOLBAR_OFF   Type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROF_OCA_MENU value 'N' ##NO_TEXT, " Do not show any toobar actions
    end of C_PROFILE_TOOLBAR_PRESENTATION .

  methods CREATE_LINK_BEE
    importing
      !IV_TEXT type CSEQUENCE
      !IV_ID type STRING
      !IV_LINK_ID type STRING
      !IV_ROW_INDEX type I
      !IR_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
    exporting
      !ER_LINK type ref to CL_THTMLB_LINK
      !ER_BEE type ref to IF_BSP_BEE .
  methods CREATE_TEXT_BEE
    importing
      !IV_TEXT type CSEQUENCE
      !IV_ID type STRING
      !IR_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
    exporting
      !ER_TEXT type ref to CL_THTMLB_TEXTVIEW
      !ER_BEE type ref to IF_BSP_BEE .
  class-methods SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_KEY type STRING
      !IO_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
      !IO_TREE_SRV type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
    returning
      value(RV_SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU) type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU .
  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !IR_CONTEXT_NODE type ref to CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TREE
      !IR_DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods SET_TREE_SRV
    importing
      !TREE_SRV type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .
  methods SET_BOLD
    importing
      !IV_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_BOLD) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods SET_EVENT_SRV
    importing
      !EVENT_SRV type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 .
  methods SET_VISIBLE_COLUMNS
    importing
      !IT_VISIBLE_COLUMN type CRMT_ATTR_NAME_TAB .
  class-methods GET_F4HELP_IMAGE
    importing
      !ID type STRING
    returning
      value(IMG) type ref to CL_THTMLB_IMAGE .
  class-methods GET_DISABLE_DH
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLE_DH) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods SET_TREE_PROPERTIES_REF
    importing
      !IR_TREE_PROPERTIES type ref to CRM_ISUTREE_TREE_PROPERTIES .
  class-methods SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU_VALUE_TO_PRIO
    importing
      !IV_VALUE type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type I .
  class-methods SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU_PRIO_TO_VALUE
    importing
      !IV_VALUE type I
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU .
protected section.

  data GR_ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR .
  data GR_CONTEXT_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00 .
  data TREE_SRV type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .
  data DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL .
  data EVENT_SERVICE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SRV .
  data TREE_PROPERTIES_REF type ref to CRM_ISUTREE_TREE_PROPERTIES .
  data MT_VISIBLE_COLUMN type CRMT_ATTR_NAME_TAB .

  methods GET_INPUT_FIELD
    importing
      !IV_ID type STRING
      !IV_COLUMN_KEY type STRING
      !IV_ROW_INDEX type I
      !IV_VALUE type CSEQUENCE
      !IV_DISABLED type CSEQUENCE
    returning
      value(RE_INPUTFIELD) type ref to CL_THTMLB_INPUTFIELD .
  methods GET_OCA_BEEHIVE
    importing
      !P_CELL_ID type STRING
      !P_COLUMN_KEY type STRING
      !IR_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
      !IV_VALUE type STRING
      !P_COLUMN_INDEX type I
      !IO_IMG type ref to CL_THTMLB_IMAGE optional
      !P_ROW_INDEX type SYTABIX optional
      !IV_OCA_AS_MENU type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU optional
    exporting
      !EV_OCA_ADDED type ABAP_BOOL
    changing
      !BEEHIVE type ref to CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE .
  methods RENDER_CELL_START_INTERNAL
    importing
      !P_TABLEVIEW_ID type STRING
      !P_CELL_ID type STRING
      !P_CELL_BINDING type STRING
      !P_ROW_INDEX type I
      !P_ROW_KEY type STRING
      !P_COLUMN_INDEX type I
      !P_COLUMN_KEY type STRING
      !P_ROW_DATA_REF type ref to DATA
      !P_EDIT_MODE type XFELD
    exporting
      !P_REPLACEMENT_BEE type ref to IF_BSP_BEE
    changing
      !P_STYLE type STRING optional
      !P_CLASS type STRING optional
      !P_ISREADONLY type XFELD optional
      !P_ISHIERCELL type XFELD optional .
  methods GET_OCA_BEEHIVE_INTERNAL
    importing
      !P_CELL_ID type STRING
      !P_COLUMN_KEY type STRING
      !IR_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
      !IV_VALUE type STRING
      !P_COLUMN_INDEX type I
      !IO_IMG type ref to CL_THTMLB_IMAGE optional
      !P_ROW_INDEX type SYTABIX optional
      !IV_OCA_AS_MENU type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU optional
    exporting
      !EV_OCA_ADDED type ABAP_BOOL
    changing
      !BEEHIVE type ref to CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE .
  class-methods ON_SKIN_CHANGE
    for event SKIN_CHANGE of CL_THTMLB_PERSONALIZATION .
  class-methods GET_IMAGE
    importing
      !ID type STRING
      !SRC type STRING
      !TOOLTIP type STRING optional
    returning
      value(IMG) type ref to CL_THTMLB_IMAGE .
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT IMPLEMENTATION.


method constructor.

  gr_context_node ?= ir_context_node.
  display_mode    = ir_display_mode.

endmethod.


method CREATE_LINK_BEE.
  data:
    LR_LINK    type ref to CL_THTMLB_LINK,
    LV_ICON    type STRING,
    LV_TOOLTIP type STRING.

  if IV_TEXT cs |sap-icon://|
     or IV_TEXT cs '|'
     or IV_TEXT cs '^'
     or COUNT( VAL = IV_TEXT REGEX = '.*@..(?:\\Q.*){0,1}@.*' ) > 0
     or IV_TEXT cs '<br>'.
    data(LR_BEE) = new CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE( ).
    ER_BEE = LR_BEE.
    data(LV_INDEX) = 1.
    data(LV_OFFSET) = 0.
    while LV_OFFSET < STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
      data(LV_POS) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = |sap-icon://| CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_OFFSET ).
      data(LV_POS2) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT REGEX = '@..(?:\\Q.*){0,1}@' CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_OFFSET ).
      if LV_POS2 >= 0 and ( LV_POS < 0 or LV_POS2 < LV_POS ).
        LV_POS = LV_POS2.
        data(LV_SAPGUI) = ABAP_TRUE.
      else.
        LV_SAPGUI = ABAP_FALSE.
      endif.
      if LV_INDEX > 1.
        LR_BEE->ADD_HTML( HTML = |&nbsp;| ).
      endif.
      if LV_POS < 0. " kein icon mehr
        LV_POS = STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
      endif.
      data(LV_LEN) = LV_POS - LV_OFFSET.
      data(LV_TEXT) = IV_TEXT+LV_OFFSET(LV_LEN).
      if LV_LEN > 0.
        split LV_TEXT at '|' into table data(LT_TEXT).
        delete LT_TEXT where TABLE_LINE is initial.
        loop at LT_TEXT into LV_TEXT.
          if SY-TABIX > 1.
            LR_BEE->ADD_HTML( HTML = |&nbsp;| ).
          endif.
          split LV_TEXT at '^' into LV_TEXT LV_TOOLTIP.
          replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
          if LV_TOOLTIP is initial.
            LV_TOOLTIP = LV_TEXT.
          endif.
          LR_LINK = CLG_THTMLB_LINK=>FACTORY(
            TEXT    = LV_TEXT
            ID      = |{ IV_ID }_{ LV_INDEX }|
            ONCLICK = IV_LINK_ID
            TOOLTIP = LV_TOOLTIP
          ).
          LR_LINK->REFERENCE = IV_ROW_INDEX.
          condense LR_LINK->REFERENCE.
          LR_BEE->ADD_BEE( BEE = LR_LINK ).
          if ER_LINK is initial.
            ER_LINK = LR_LINK.
          endif.
        endloop.
      endif.
      clear LV_ICON.
      if LV_SAPGUI is initial.
        data(LV_NPOS) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = | | CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_POS ).
        if LV_NPOS < 0.
          LV_NPOS = STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
        endif.
        LV_LEN = LV_NPOS - LV_POS.
        if LV_LEN > 0.
          LV_ICON = IV_TEXT+LV_POS(LV_LEN). " |sap-icon://home|.
          LV_TOOLTIP = ||.
          if LV_ICON cs '^'.
            split LV_ICON at '^' into LV_ICON LV_TOOLTIP.
            replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
          endif.
        endif.
      else.
        LV_POS = LV_POS + 1.
        LV_NPOS = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = |@| CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_POS ).
        if LV_NPOS > 0.
          LV_LEN = LV_NPOS - LV_POS.
          if LV_LEN > 0.
            LV_ICON = IV_TEXT+LV_POS(LV_LEN).
            split LV_ICON at '\Q' into LV_ICON LV_TOOLTIP.
            replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
            LV_ICON = |@{ LV_ICON }@|.
            LV_NPOS = LV_NPOS + 1.
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
      if LV_ICON is not initial.
        data: LR_IMAGE type ref to IF_BSP_BEE.
        call method ('CL_CRMS4_IU_IC_BOL_TREE')=>('CREATE_IMAGE')
          exporting
            ID      = |{ IV_ID }_{ LV_INDEX }|
            TOOLTIP = LV_TOOLTIP
            SRC     = LV_ICON
          receiving
            IMG     = LR_IMAGE.
        LR_BEE->ADD_BEE( BEE = LR_IMAGE ).
      endif.
      LV_INDEX = LV_INDEX + 1.
      LV_OFFSET = LV_NPOS.
    endwhile.
  else.
    ER_LINK = CLG_THTMLB_LINK=>FACTORY( TEXT = IV_TEXT ID = IV_ID ONCLICK = IV_LINK_ID TOOLTIP = IV_TEXT ).
    ER_LINK->REFERENCE = IV_ROW_INDEX.
    condense ER_LINK->REFERENCE.
    ER_BEE = ER_LINK.
  endif.
endmethod.


method CREATE_TEXT_BEE.
  data:
    LR_TEXT    type ref to CL_THTMLB_TEXTVIEW,
    LV_ICON    type STRING,
    LV_TOOLTIP type STRING.

  if IV_TEXT cs |sap-icon://|
     or IV_TEXT cs '|'
     or IV_TEXT cs '^'
     or COUNT( VAL = IV_TEXT REGEX = '.*@..(?:\\Q.*){0,1}@.*' ) > 0
     or IV_TEXT cs '<br>'.
    data(LR_BEE) = new CL_BSP_BEE_TABLE( ).
    ER_BEE = LR_BEE.
    data(LV_INDEX) = 1.
    data(LV_OFFSET) = 0.
    while LV_OFFSET < STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
      data(LV_POS) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = |sap-icon://| CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_OFFSET ).
      data(LV_POS2) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT REGEX = '@..(?:\\Q.*){0,1}@' CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_OFFSET ).
      if LV_POS2 >= 0 and ( LV_POS < 0 or LV_POS2 < LV_POS ).
        LV_POS = LV_POS2.
        data(LV_SAPGUI) = ABAP_TRUE.
      else.
        LV_SAPGUI = ABAP_FALSE.
      endif.
      if LV_INDEX > 1.
        LR_BEE->ADD_HTML( HTML = |&nbsp;| ).
      endif.
      if LV_POS < 0. " kein icon mehr
        LV_POS = STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
      endif.
      data(LV_LEN) = LV_POS - LV_OFFSET.
      data(LV_TEXT) = IV_TEXT+LV_OFFSET(LV_LEN).
      if LV_LEN > 0.
        split LV_TEXT at '|' into table data(LT_TEXT).
        delete LT_TEXT where TABLE_LINE is initial.
        loop at LT_TEXT into LV_TEXT.
          if SY-TABIX > 1.
            LR_BEE->ADD_HTML( HTML = |&nbsp;| ).
          endif.
          split LV_TEXT at '^' into LV_TEXT LV_TOOLTIP.
          replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
          if LV_TOOLTIP is initial.
            LV_TOOLTIP = LV_TEXT.
          endif.
          LR_TEXT = CL_THTMLB_TEXTVIEW=>FACTORY(
                TEXT    = LV_TEXT
                TOOLTIP = LV_TOOLTIP
          ).
          LR_BEE->ADD_BEE( BEE = LR_TEXT ).
          if ER_TEXT is initial.
            ER_TEXT = LR_TEXT.
          endif.
        endloop.
      endif.
      clear LV_ICON.
      if LV_SAPGUI is initial.
        data(LV_NPOS) = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = | | CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_POS ).
        if LV_NPOS < 0.
          LV_NPOS = STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
        endif.
        LV_LEN = LV_NPOS - LV_POS.
        if LV_LEN > 0.
          LV_ICON = IV_TEXT+LV_POS(LV_LEN). " |sap-icon://home|.
          LV_TOOLTIP = ||.
          if LV_ICON cs '^'.
            split LV_ICON at '^' into LV_ICON LV_TOOLTIP.
            replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
          endif.
        endif.
      else.
        LV_POS = LV_POS + 1.
        LV_NPOS = FIND( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = |@| CASE = ABAP_FALSE OFF = LV_POS ).
        if LV_NPOS > 0.
          LV_LEN = LV_NPOS - LV_POS.
          if LV_LEN > 0.
            LV_ICON = IV_TEXT+LV_POS(LV_LEN).
            split LV_ICON at '\Q' into LV_ICON LV_TOOLTIP.
            replace all occurrences of '_' in LV_TOOLTIP with | |.
            LV_ICON = |@{ LV_ICON }@|.
            LV_NPOS = LV_NPOS + 1.
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
      if LV_ICON is not initial.
        data: LR_IMAGE type ref to IF_BSP_BEE.
        call method ('CL_CRMS4_IU_IC_BOL_TREE')=>('CREATE_IMAGE')
          exporting
            ID      = |{ IV_ID }_{ LV_INDEX }|
            TOOLTIP = LV_TOOLTIP
            SRC     = LV_ICON
          receiving
            IMG     = LR_IMAGE.
        LR_BEE->ADD_BEE( BEE = LR_IMAGE ).
      endif.
      LV_INDEX = LV_INDEX + 1.
      LV_OFFSET = LV_NPOS.
    endwhile.
    if ER_TEXT is not initial and SET_BOLD( IR_ENTITY ).
      ER_TEXT->DESIGN = 'BOLD'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
    endif.
  else.
    ER_TEXT = CLG_THTMLB_TEXTVIEW=>FACTORY( TEXT = IV_TEXT ID = IV_ID TOOLTIP = IV_TEXT ).
    if SET_BOLD( IR_ENTITY ).
      ER_TEXT->DESIGN = 'BOLD'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
    endif.
    ER_BEE = ER_TEXT.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_disable_dh.

  rv_disable_dh = lcl_ctxt_menu=>get_disable_dh( ).

endmethod.


METHOD get_f4help_image.

  img = clg_thtmlb_image=>factory( id = id ).

  CONCATENATE cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event 'F4HELP' INTO img->onclick.

  cl_thtmlb_util=>get_icon_info(
    EXPORTING
      iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_inputhelp
    IMPORTING
      ev_icon_tooltip  = img->tooltip
      ev_icon_filename = img->src ).

  img->src = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_icon_url( img->src ).

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_IMAGE.

  IMG = CLG_THTMLB_IMAGE=>FACTORY(
    SRC     = SRC
    ID      = ID
    TOOLTIP = TOOLTIP ).                                    "#EC NOTEXT

  if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ) is not initial and CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>IS_FONTCODE( IV_VALUE = IMG->SRC ) is not initial.
    IMG->SRC = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>EXTRACT_FONTCODE( IV_VALUE = IMG->SRC ).
  elseif CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ) is not initial and CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>IS_NEW_ICONNAME( IV_ICON_NAME = IMG->SRC ) is not initial.
    IMG->SRC = CL_CRM_IU_ICON_TOOLS=>GET_ICON_FONTCODE( IV_ICON_NAME = IMG->SRC ).
  elseif IMG->SRC cs 'SHOPPING_CART_SMALL_REMOVE.GIF'.      "#EC NOTEXT
* special icon -> shopping cart remove
    IMG->SRC = '/SAP/BC/BSP/SAP/IUBSKH/SHOPPING_CART_SMALL_REMOVE.GIF'. "#EC NOTEXT
  elseif IMG->SRC ca './'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
*   validate image source
    IMG->SRC = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>VALIDATE_IMAGE_SOURCE( IMG->SRC ).
  else.
    IMG->SRC = CL_BSP_MIMES=>SAP_ICON(
                 ID     = IMG->SRC
                 IS_RTL = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>WITH_RIGHT_TO_LEFT( ) ).
  endif.

  IMG->SRC = CL_CRM_IU_IC_APPL=>GET_IMAGE_REPLACE_URL_HCB( IMG->SRC ).

endmethod.


method get_input_field.

  data: control_id type string.

  re_inputfield  = clg_thtmlb_inputfield=>factory( id = iv_id  value = iv_value disabled = iv_disabled ).

  if re_inputfield->disabled eq abap_false.
    re_inputfield->width    = '100%'.                          "#EC NOTEXT
  endif.

  control_id = gr_context_node->if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_name(
    attribute_path  = 'table'  "#EC NOTEXT
    component       = iv_column_key
    index           = iv_row_index
    ).

*  because of security reasons a so-called level2Check was indroduced by the framework, register for the level2Check so that setter method is called:

  gr_context_node->if_bsp_model~add_to_check_table( control_id = control_id ).

endmethod.


method GET_OCA_BEEHIVE.

enhancement-section CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_IT_01 spots CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_IT static .

  GET_OCA_BEEHIVE_INTERNAL(
    exporting
      P_CELL_ID      = P_CELL_ID
      P_COLUMN_KEY   = P_COLUMN_KEY
      IR_NODE        = IR_NODE
      IV_VALUE       = IV_VALUE
      P_COLUMN_INDEX = P_COLUMN_INDEX
      IO_IMG         = IO_IMG
      P_ROW_INDEX    = P_ROW_INDEX
      IV_OCA_AS_MENU = IV_OCA_AS_MENU
    importing
      EV_OCA_ADDED   = EV_OCA_ADDED
    changing
      BEEHIVE        = BEEHIVE
  ).

end-enhancement-section.

endmethod.


METHOD GET_OCA_BEEHIVE_INTERNAL.
  DATA: lt_oca         TYPE crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action_t,
        ls_oca         TYPE crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action,
        img            TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_image,
        link           TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_link,
        ent            TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
        event_id       TYPE crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id.
  DATA: lo_bee         TYPE REF TO if_bsp_bee.
  DATA: lo_element     TYPE REF TO if_bsp_element.
  DATA: lo_cust_exit   TYPE REF TO if_iu_ic_bol_tree.

  DATA: lr_event_handler_called TYPE REF TO abap_bool.

  DATA:
    ls_ctxt_menu        TYPE wcfs_thtmlb_action_menu_item,
    lo_ctxt_menu        TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_actionmenu,
    lo_actions          TYPE REF TO lcl_ctxt_menu,
    ls_tree_node_action TYPE cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn00=>ty_tree_node_action,
    lv_oca_as_menu      TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_oca_menu.


  ev_oca_added = abap_false.

* check if OCAs should be shown on node level
  IF me->tree_properties_ref IS BOUND AND
     ( me->tree_properties_ref->toolbar_oca = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_only OR
       me->tree_properties_ref->toolbar_oca = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_only_btns OR
       me->tree_properties_ref->toolbar_oca = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service=>co_toolbar_oca_only_menu ).
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

* check for one click actions:
  IF iv_oca_as_menu IS SUPPLIED.
    lv_oca_as_menu = iv_oca_as_menu.
  ELSE.
    lv_oca_as_menu = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>show_oca_as_menu(
                       iv_column_key = p_column_key
                       io_node       = ir_node
                       io_tree_srv   = me->tree_srv ).
  ENDIF.

  lt_oca = ir_node->get_oca_table( ).
  IF lt_oca IS NOT INITIAL.
*     loop over all one click actions
    LOOP AT lt_oca INTO ls_oca.
*  render one click action only if active
      IF p_column_key EQ ir_node->get_oca_column_key( ls_oca-id ).
        ent = ir_node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
        event_id = ls_oca-id.

        ls_oca-active = abap_false.

        case event_id.
          when '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT#'  ##no_text.
            if ir_node->is_hidden( ) = abap_false and
               ir_node->is_virtual_root( ) = abap_false.
              data lo_parent_node_visible type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
              lo_parent_node_visible = ir_node->get_visible_parent_node( ).
              if lo_parent_node_visible is bound.
                ls_oca-active = abap_true.
*               special handling if the RESET is missing -> at least the invisible parent needs the reset!
                read table lt_oca transporting no fields with key id = '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT_RESET#'  ##no_text.
                if sy-subrc <> 0.
                  ls_oca-active = abap_false.
                  data lo_parent_node_temp type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
                  lo_parent_node_temp = ir_node->get_parent_node( ).
                  while lo_parent_node_temp is bound and lo_parent_node_temp <> lo_parent_node_visible.
                    data lt_oca_temp type crmt_thtmlb_one_click_action_t.
                    lt_oca_temp = lo_parent_node_temp->get_oca_table( ).
                    read table lt_oca_temp transporting no fields with key id = '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT_RESET#'  ##no_text.
                    if sy-subrc = 0.
                      ls_oca-active = abap_true.
                      exit.
                    endif.
                  endwhile.
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.
          when '#TREE_VIRTUAL_ROOT_RESET#'  ##no_text.
            if ir_node->is_hidden( ) = abap_false and
               ir_node->is_virtual_root( ) = abap_true.
              ls_oca-active = abap_true.
            endif.
          when others.
            CREATE DATA lr_event_handler_called.

            ls_oca-active = me->event_service->is_event_active( event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_oca_event_type
                                                                event_id     = event_id
                                                                event_entity = ent
                                                                ir_event_handler_called = lr_event_handler_called
                                                                io_node_entity = ir_node ).
        endcase.

        CHECK ls_oca-active = abap_true.

        ev_oca_added = abap_true.

        CONCATENATE cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event ls_oca-id INTO ls_oca-id.

        IF ls_oca-icon IS NOT INITIAL.
          img = get_image( src     = ls_oca-icon
                           id      = p_cell_id ).           "#EC NOTEXT

          IF ls_oca-tooltip IS NOT INITIAL.
            img->tooltip  = cl_thtmlb_section508_utils=>get_button_tooltip_text( ls_oca-tooltip ).
          ELSEIF ls_oca-text IS NOT INITIAL.
            img->tooltip  = cl_thtmlb_section508_utils=>get_button_tooltip_text( ls_oca-text ).
          ENDIF.

          img->onclick  = ls_oca-id.

          lo_bee = img.

*         allow re-rendering by application
          IF ir_node->get_render_cell( ) EQ abap_true.
            lo_cust_exit = ir_node->get_cust_exit( ).
            IF lo_cust_exit IS BOUND.

*             conditional breakpoint
*             // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*             // or
*             // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
              ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                     SUBKEY 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Render cell)'
                     CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                 iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_render
                                 iv_prof_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-prof_id
                                 iv_pres_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-pres_id
                                 iv_node_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-node_id
                                 iv_col_id      = ir_node->get_pres_col_4_name( |{ p_column_key }| )-col_id
                                 iv_row_index   = ir_node->get_ui_row_index( )
                                 iv_col_index   = ir_node->get_ui_col_index( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

              TRY.
                  lo_cust_exit->render_cell(
                    EXPORTING
                      iv_value           = iv_value
                      iv_cell_id         = p_cell_id
                      iv_column_index    = p_column_index
                      iv_column_key      = p_column_key
                      iv_dsiplay_mode    = me->display_mode
                      iv_oca_id          = substring_after(
                                             val = ls_oca-id
                                             sub = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event )
                      tree_event_service = me->event_service
                      tree_entity        = ir_node
                      context_node_model = gr_context_node
                      iv_row_index       = p_row_index
                    CHANGING
                      bsp_bee = lo_bee ).
                  try.
*                     ensure bee is still a BSP element -> bee tables are not supported!
                      data lo_bsp_element type ref to if_bsp_element.
                      lo_bsp_element ?= lo_bee.
                    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
                      lo_bee = img.
                  endtry.
                CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method.
*                 method not implemented.
                  DATA lx_root TYPE REF TO cx_root.
                CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.
                  cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                    method = 'RENDER_CELL' handler = lo_cust_exit
                    prof_id = ir_node->get_prof_id( ) node_id = ir_node->get_node_id( )
                    exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

              ENDTRY.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.

          IF lv_oca_as_menu <> gc_oca_as_menu_off.
            IF lo_ctxt_menu IS NOT BOUND.
              lo_ctxt_menu = cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>factory(
                               id  = p_cell_id
                               id_postfix = '_MENU'
                               for = p_cell_id ).
              lo_actions = lcl_ctxt_menu=>get_instance(
                  io_img    = io_img
                  io_menu   = lo_ctxt_menu
                  io_entity = ir_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
                             iv_ocm    = boolc( lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ) ).
              lo_ctxt_menu->actiondescriptor = lo_actions.
              IF beehive IS NOT BOUND.
                CREATE OBJECT beehive type lcl_bee_hive.
              ENDIF.
              beehive->add( lo_ctxt_menu ).
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.

          IF lo_ctxt_menu IS BOUND.

            CLEAR ls_ctxt_menu.
            TRY.
                DATA img_bee LIKE img.
                img_bee ?= lo_bee.
                img = img_bee.
              CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
            ENDTRY.
            ls_ctxt_menu-icon_src       = img->src.
            ls_ctxt_menu-text           = img->tooltip.
            ls_ctxt_menu-onclientselect = img->onclientclick.
            ls_ctxt_menu-onselect       = img->onclick.
            ls_ctxt_menu-type           = if_bsp_wd_action_descriptor=>gc_type_generic_action.
            lo_actions->add( ls_ctxt_menu ).

          ELSE.

            lo_element ?= lo_bee.

            IF beehive IS NOT BOUND.
              CREATE OBJECT beehive type lcl_bee_hive.
            ENDIF.
            beehive->add( lo_element ).

          ENDIF.

        ELSEIF ls_oca-text IS NOT INITIAL.
          link = clg_thtmlb_link=>factory( text      = ls_oca-text
                                           id        = p_cell_id
                                           onclick   = ls_oca-id
                                           tooltip   = ls_oca-tooltip ).

          lo_bee = link.

          IF ir_node->get_render_cell( ) EQ abap_true.
            lo_cust_exit = ir_node->get_cust_exit( ).
            IF lo_cust_exit IS BOUND.

*             conditional breakpoint
*             // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*             // or
*             // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
              ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                     SUBKEY 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Render cell)'
                     CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                 iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_render
                                 iv_prof_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-prof_id
                                 iv_pres_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-pres_id
                                 iv_node_id     = ir_node->get_hier( )-node_id
                                 iv_col_id      = ir_node->get_pres_col_4_name( |{ p_column_key }| )-col_id
                                 iv_row_index   = ir_node->get_ui_row_index( )
                                 iv_col_index   = ir_node->get_ui_col_index( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

              TRY.
                  lo_cust_exit->render_cell(
                    EXPORTING
                      iv_value           = iv_value
                      iv_cell_id         = p_cell_id
                      iv_column_index    = p_column_index
                      iv_column_key      = p_column_key
                      iv_dsiplay_mode    = me->display_mode
                      iv_oca_id          = substring_after(
                                             val = ls_oca-id
                                             sub = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_oca_event )
                      tree_event_service = me->event_service
                      tree_entity        = ir_node
                      context_node_model = gr_context_node
                    CHANGING
                      bsp_bee = lo_bee ).
                  try.
*                     ensure bee is still a BSP element -> bee tables are not supported!
                      lo_bsp_element ?= lo_bee.
                    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
                      lo_bee = link.
                  endtry.
                CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .
*                 method not implemented.
                CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.
                  cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                    method = 'RENDER_CELL' handler = lo_cust_exit
                    prof_id = ir_node->get_prof_id( ) node_id = ir_node->get_node_id( )
                    exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT
              ENDTRY.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.


          IF lv_oca_as_menu <> gc_oca_as_menu_off.
            IF lo_ctxt_menu IS NOT BOUND.
              lo_ctxt_menu = cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>factory(
                               id  = p_cell_id
                               id_postfix = '_MENU'
                               for = p_cell_id ).
              lo_actions = lcl_ctxt_menu=>get_instance(
                  io_img    = io_img
                  io_menu   = lo_ctxt_menu
                  io_entity = ir_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
                             iv_ocm    = boolc( lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ) ).
              lo_ctxt_menu->actiondescriptor = lo_actions.
              IF beehive IS NOT BOUND.
                CREATE OBJECT beehive type lcl_bee_hive.
              ENDIF.
              beehive->add( lo_ctxt_menu ).
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.

          IF lo_ctxt_menu IS BOUND.

            CLEAR ls_ctxt_menu.
            TRY.
                DATA link_bee LIKE link.
                link_bee ?= lo_bee.
                link = link_bee.
              CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
            ENDTRY.
            ls_ctxt_menu-text           = link->text.
            ls_ctxt_menu-onclientselect = link->onclientclick.
            ls_ctxt_menu-onselect       = link->onclick.
            ls_ctxt_menu-type           = if_bsp_wd_action_descriptor=>gc_type_generic_action.
            lo_actions->add( ls_ctxt_menu ).

          ELSE.

            lo_element ?= lo_bee.

            IF beehive IS NOT BOUND.
              CREATE OBJECT beehive type lcl_bee_hive.
            ENDIF.
            beehive->add( lo_element ).

          ENDIF.

        ENDIF.
      ENDIF." column key
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDIF.

* add action menu if no OCAs active but the Object Context Menu should be shown
* // (only for the first visible column)
  IF p_column_index = 1 AND
     lo_ctxt_menu IS NOT BOUND AND
     lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
    lo_ctxt_menu = cl_thtmlb_actionmenu=>factory(
                     id  = p_cell_id
                     id_postfix = '_MENU'
                     for = p_cell_id ).
    lo_actions = lcl_ctxt_menu=>get_instance(
        io_img    = io_img
        io_menu   = lo_ctxt_menu
        io_entity = ir_node->get_wrapped_entity( )
                   iv_ocm    = boolc( lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ) ).
    lo_ctxt_menu->actiondescriptor = lo_actions.
    IF beehive IS NOT BOUND.
      CREATE OBJECT beehive type lcl_bee_hive.
    ENDIF.
    beehive->add( lo_ctxt_menu ).
  ENDIF.

  IF lv_oca_as_menu <> gc_oca_as_menu_off.
    IF io_img IS BOUND AND beehive IS BOUND AND lo_ctxt_menu IS NOT BOUND.
      beehive->add( io_img ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

* store action provider
  IF lo_actions IS BOUND.
    ls_tree_node_action-component = p_column_key.
    ls_tree_node_action-index     = p_row_index.
    ls_tree_node_action-provider  = lo_actions.
    ls_tree_node_action-dynamic_content = boolc( lr_event_handler_called IS BOUND AND lr_event_handler_called->* = abap_true OR
                                                 lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ).
    if lo_actions is bound.
      lo_actions->set_dynamic_content( ls_tree_node_action-dynamic_content ).
    endif.
    INSERT ls_tree_node_action INTO TABLE me->gr_context_node->tree_node_action_tab.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method if_htmlb_tableview_iterator~get_column_definitions.
  gr_iterator = gr_context_node->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
  clear me->gr_context_node->tree_node_action_tab.
endmethod.


METHOD if_htmlb_tableview_iterator~render_cell_start.

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_IT_02 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_IT STATIC .

  RENDER_CELL_START_INTERNAL(
    exporting
      P_TABLEVIEW_ID    = P_TABLEVIEW_ID
      P_CELL_ID         = P_CELL_ID
      P_CELL_BINDING    = P_CELL_BINDING
      P_ROW_INDEX       = P_ROW_INDEX
      P_ROW_KEY         = P_ROW_KEY
      P_COLUMN_INDEX    = P_COLUMN_INDEX
      P_COLUMN_KEY      = P_COLUMN_KEY
      P_ROW_DATA_REF    = P_ROW_DATA_REF
      P_EDIT_MODE       = P_EDIT_MODE
    importing
      P_REPLACEMENT_BEE = P_REPLACEMENT_BEE
    changing
      P_STYLE           = P_STYLE
      P_CLASS           = P_CLASS
      P_ISREADONLY      = P_ISREADONLY
      P_ISHIERCELL      = P_ISHIERCELL
  ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_htmlb_tableview_iterator~render_row_start.

  IF gr_iterator IS NOT BOUND.
    gr_iterator = gr_context_node->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
  ELSE.
    gr_iterator->get_by_index( iv_index = p_row_index ).
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method if_thtmlb_drag_n_drop_iterator~render_header_dnd_behaviors.
endmethod.


method if_thtmlb_drag_n_drop_iterator~render_objects_dnd_behaviors.

* activate drag and drop if requested
  if me->event_service is bound.
    data lo_tree_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
    lo_tree_node ?= me->gr_context_node->get_bo_by_index( iv_row_index ).
    if lo_tree_node is bound.
      data lv_drag_active type abap_bool.
      data lv_drop_active type abap_bool.
      me->event_service->is_dnd_active(
        exporting
          io_tree_node   = lo_tree_node
        importing
          ev_drag_active = lv_drag_active
          ev_drop_active = lv_drop_active ).
      if lv_drag_active = abap_true or lv_drop_active = abap_true.
        data ls_behavior type crm_thtmlb_behavior_structure.
        ls_behavior-behaviorid = 'BOLTreeDragAndDrop'.             "#EC NOTEXT
        ls_behavior-flavor     = cl_bsp_dlc_config_util=>c_dnd_default_flavor.
        ls_behavior-issource   = lv_drag_active.
        ls_behavior-istarget   = lv_drop_active.
        if lv_drop_active = abap_true.
          ls_behavior-effect_cross_control  = 'MOVE'.
          ls_behavior-effect_inside_control = 'MOVE'.
        else.
          ls_behavior-effect_cross_control  = 'NONE'.
          ls_behavior-effect_inside_control = 'NONE'.
        endif.
        append ls_behavior to ev_behavior.
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method on_skin_change  ##needed.
*  obsolete
endmethod.


METHOD RENDER_CELL_START_INTERNAL.

  DATA:
    lv_attr_value  TYPE string,
    lv_attr_value2 TYPE string,
    lv_col_image   TYPE name_komp,
    lv_edit_col    TYPE name_komp,
    lv_edit_flag   TYPE crmt_flag_1,
    lv_event_id    TYPE crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id,
    lv_image       TYPE string,
    lv_is_link     TYPE abap_bool,
    lv_link_id     TYPE string,
    lv_oca_as_menu TYPE crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_oca_menu,
    lv_tmp         TYPE string,
    lr_image       TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_image,
    lr_beehive     TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_bee_table,
    lr_cust_exit   TYPE REF TO if_iu_ic_bol_tree,
    lr_entity      TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    lr_link        TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_link,
    lr_input_field TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_inputfield,
    lr_node_cn01   TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn01,
    lr_text        TYPE REF TO cl_thtmlb_textview,
    lr_wrapped     TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
    lx_root        TYPE REF TO cx_root,
    lv_oca_added   type abap_bool,
    lo_bee         type ref to IF_BSP_BEE.

  lr_node_cn01 ?= gr_context_node->get_node_by_index( iv_index = p_row_index ).

  if lr_node_cn01 is not bound or lr_node_cn01->bo is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  lr_entity ?= lr_node_cn01->bo.

* do nothing if custom P/V-getters are implemented
  IF me->gr_context_node->get_p_t_table(
       component       = p_column_key
       iv_index        = p_row_index
       iv_property     = if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype
       iv_display_mode = boolc( p_edit_mode = abap_false ) ) = |#|.
*   let the node lr_entity know, in which line it will be shown
    lr_entity->set_ui_row_index( p_row_index ).
    lr_entity->set_ui_col_index( p_column_index ).

*   find the corresponding presentation values of the column
    lr_entity->get_cell_info(
      EXPORTING
        iv_col_key   = p_column_key
      IMPORTING
        ev_edit_flag = lv_edit_flag
        ev_col_img   = lv_col_image
        ev_col_edit  = lv_edit_col
        ev_is_link   = lv_is_link
        ev_link_id   = lv_link_id ).

*   check whethe lr_link is active
    IF lv_is_link EQ abap_true.
      lr_wrapped = lr_entity->get_wrapped_entity( ).
*     check whether lr_link is active
      lv_event_id = lv_link_id.

      lv_is_link = me->event_service->is_event_active(
        event_type   = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_link_event_type
        event_id     = lv_event_id
        event_entity = lr_wrapped
        io_node_entity = lr_entity ).

      CONCATENATE cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>gc_link_event lv_link_id INTO lv_link_id.
    ENDIF.

    IF p_column_index = 1.
      lv_link_id = 'nodeClick'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDIF.

*   check if OCA should be shown as menu
    lv_oca_as_menu = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>show_oca_as_menu(
      iv_column_key = p_column_key
      io_node       = lr_entity
      io_tree_srv   = me->tree_srv ).

*   edit mode or just display?
    IF  me->display_mode EQ abap_false
    AND lv_edit_flag     EQ abap_true.
*     check for one click actions:
      get_oca_beehive(
        EXPORTING
          p_cell_id      = p_cell_id
          p_column_key   = p_column_key
          ir_node        = lr_entity
          iv_value       = lv_attr_value
          p_column_index = p_column_index
          p_row_index    = p_row_index
          iv_oca_as_menu = lv_oca_as_menu
        importing
          ev_oca_added   = lv_oca_added
        CHANGING
          beehive        = lr_beehive ).

      TRY.
        lv_tmp = lv_edit_col.
        lv_attr_value = lr_node_cn01->get_s_struct( lv_tmp ).
      ENDTRY.

      lr_input_field = me->get_input_field(
        iv_id         = p_cell_id
        iv_column_key = p_column_key
        iv_row_index  = p_row_index
        iv_value      = lv_attr_value
        iv_disabled   = lr_entity->is_property_readonly( lv_edit_col ) ).

      IF lr_beehive IS BOUND.
        lr_beehive->add( lr_input_field ).
        p_replacement_bee = lr_beehive.
      ELSE.
        p_replacement_bee = lr_input_field.
      ENDIF.
    ELSE.
*     get attribute values
      TRY.
        lv_attr_value = lr_node_cn01->get_s_struct( p_column_key ).
      ENDTRY.

*     show image?
      IF NOT lv_col_image IS INITIAL.
        lv_image = lr_entity->get_property_as_string( lv_col_image ).

        IF NOT lv_image IS INITIAL.
          CREATE OBJECT lr_beehive type lcl_bee_hive.

*         check for alternative icon tooltip
          TRY.
              lv_attr_value2 = lr_node_cn01->get_s_struct( |COL_{ p_column_key+3 }_IMG_TOOLTIP| ).
            CATCH cx_root ##catch_all.                  "#EC NO_HANDLER
          ENDTRY.

          IF lv_attr_value2 IS INITIAL.
            lv_attr_value2 = lv_attr_value.
          ENDIF.

          lr_image = get_image(
            src     = lv_image
            id      = p_cell_id
            tooltip = lv_attr_value2 ).                     "#EC NOTEXT

          IF lv_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_off.
            lr_beehive->add( lr_image ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

*     check for one click actions
      get_oca_beehive(
        EXPORTING
          p_cell_id      = p_cell_id
          p_column_key   = p_column_key
          ir_node        = lr_entity
          iv_value       = lv_attr_value
          p_column_index = p_column_index
          io_img         = lr_image
          p_row_index    = p_row_index
          iv_oca_as_menu = lv_oca_as_menu
        importing
          ev_oca_added   = lv_oca_added
        CHANGING
          beehive        = lr_beehive ).

      IF lv_is_link EQ abap_true.
*       render link
        IF lv_attr_value IS INITIAL.
          lv_attr_value = '...'.                            "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDIF.

        if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
          CREATE_LINK_BEE(
            EXPORTING
              IV_TEXT      = lv_attr_value
              IV_ID        = p_cell_id
              IV_LINK_ID   = lv_link_id
              IV_ROW_INDEX = p_row_index
              IR_ENTITY    = LR_ENTITY
            IMPORTING
              ER_LINK      = LR_LINK
              ER_BEE       = LO_BEE
          ).
        else.
          lr_link = clg_thtmlb_link=>factory(
          text      = lv_attr_value
          id        = p_cell_id
          onclick   = lv_link_id
          tooltip   = lv_attr_value ).

        lr_link->reference = p_row_index.
        CONDENSE lr_link->reference.
*          CONCATENATE col_lr_link lr_link->reference INTO lr_link->reference SEPARATED BY '/'. "#EC NOTEXT

          lo_bee = lr_link.
        endif.

*       allow re-rendering by application
        IF lv_oca_added = abap_true and lr_entity->get_render_cell( ) = abap_true.
          lr_cust_exit = lr_entity->get_cust_exit( ).
          IF lr_cust_exit IS BOUND.

*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Render cell)'
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_render
                               iv_prof_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-prof_id
                               iv_pres_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-pres_id
                               iv_node_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-node_id
                               iv_col_id      = lr_entity->get_pres_col_4_name( |{ p_column_key }| )-col_id
                               iv_row_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_row_index( )
                               iv_col_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_col_index( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            TRY.
                lr_cust_exit->render_cell(
                  EXPORTING
                    iv_value           = lv_attr_value
                    iv_cell_id         = p_cell_id
                    iv_column_index    = p_column_index
                    iv_column_key      = p_column_key
                    iv_dsiplay_mode    = me->display_mode
                    tree_event_service = event_service
                    tree_entity        = lr_entity
                    context_node_model = gr_context_node
                    iv_row_index       = p_row_index
                  CHANGING
                    bsp_bee            = lo_bee ).
              CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .           "#EC NO_HANDLER
              CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                      "#EC CATCH_ALL
                cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                  method  = 'RENDER_CELL'
                  handler = lr_cust_exit
                  prof_id = lr_entity->get_prof_id( )
                  node_id = lr_entity->get_node_id( )
                  exc     = lx_root ).                            "#EC NOTEXT
            ENDTRY.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.

        IF lr_beehive IS BOUND.
          if lo_bee is bound.
            lr_beehive->add_bee( bee = lo_bee ).
          else.
            lr_beehive->add( lr_link ).
          endif.
          p_replacement_bee = lr_beehive.
        ELSE.
          if lo_bee is bound.
            p_replacement_bee = lo_bee.
          else.
            p_replacement_bee = lr_link.
          endif.
        ENDIF.

      ELSE. "render lr_text
        if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
          CREATE_TEXT_BEE( EXPORTING IV_TEXT = lv_attr_value IV_ID = p_cell_id IR_ENTITY = LR_ENTITY IMPORTING ER_TEXT = LR_TEXT ER_BEE = LO_BEE ).
        else.
          lr_text = clg_thtmlb_textview=>factory( text    = lv_attr_value
                                               id      = p_cell_id
                                               tooltip = lv_attr_value ).

*       if lr_entity is created via template -> set design to BOLD
          IF set_bold( lr_entity ) EQ abap_true.
            lr_text->design = 'BOLD'.                         "#EC NOTEXT
          ENDIF.

          lo_bee = lr_text.
        endif.
*       allow re-rendering by application
        IF lv_oca_added = abap_true and lr_entity->get_render_cell( ) = abap_true.
          lr_cust_exit = lr_entity->get_cust_exit( ).
          IF lr_cust_exit IS BOUND.

*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Render cell)'
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_render
                               iv_prof_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-prof_id
                               iv_pres_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-pres_id
                               iv_node_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-node_id
                               iv_col_id      = lr_entity->get_pres_col_4_name( |{ p_column_key }| )-col_id
                               iv_row_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_row_index( )
                               iv_col_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_col_index( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            TRY.
                lr_cust_exit->render_cell(
                  EXPORTING
                    iv_value           = lv_attr_value
                    iv_cell_id         = p_cell_id
                    iv_column_index    = p_column_index
                    iv_column_key      = p_column_key
                    iv_dsiplay_mode    = me->display_mode
                    tree_event_service = event_service
                    tree_entity        = lr_entity
                    context_node_model = gr_context_node
                    iv_row_index       = p_row_index
                  CHANGING
                    bsp_bee            = lo_bee ).
              CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .           "#EC NO_HANDLER
              CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                      "#EC CATCH_ALL
                cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                  method  = 'RENDER_CELL'
                  handler = lr_cust_exit
                  prof_id = lr_entity->get_prof_id( )
                  node_id = lr_entity->get_node_id( )
                  exc     = lx_root ).                            "#EC NOTEXT
            ENDTRY.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.

        IF lr_beehive IS BOUND.
          if lo_bee is bound.
            lr_beehive->add_bee( bee = lo_bee ).
          else.
            lr_beehive->add( lr_text ).
          endif.
          p_replacement_bee = lr_beehive.
        ELSE.
          if lo_bee is bound.
            p_replacement_bee = lo_bee.
          else.
            p_replacement_bee = lr_text.
          endif.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

* re-render cell
  IF lv_oca_added = abap_false and lr_entity->get_render_cell( ) EQ abap_true.
    lr_cust_exit = lr_entity->get_cust_exit( ).

    IF lr_cust_exit IS BOUND.
*     conditional breakpoint
*     // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*     // or
*     // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
      ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
             SUBKEY 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Render cell)'
             CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                         iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_render
                         iv_prof_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-prof_id
                         iv_pres_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-pres_id
                         iv_node_id     = lr_entity->get_hier( )-node_id
                         iv_col_id      = lr_entity->get_pres_col_4_name( |{ p_column_key }| )-col_id
                         iv_row_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_row_index( )
                         iv_col_index   = lr_entity->get_ui_col_index( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

      TRY.
          lr_cust_exit->render_cell(
            EXPORTING
              iv_value           = lv_attr_value
              iv_cell_id         = p_cell_id
              iv_column_index    = p_column_index
              iv_column_key      = p_column_key
              iv_dsiplay_mode    = me->display_mode
              tree_event_service = event_service
              tree_entity        = lr_entity
              context_node_model = gr_context_node
              iv_row_index       = p_row_index
            CHANGING
              bsp_bee            = p_replacement_bee ).
        CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .           "#EC NO_HANDLER
        CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                      "#EC CATCH_ALL
          cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
            method  = 'RENDER_CELL'
            handler = lr_cust_exit
            prof_id = lr_entity->get_prof_id( )
            node_id = lr_entity->get_node_id( )
            exc     = lx_root ).                            "#EC NOTEXT
      ENDTRY.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

* add overlay
  if p_replacement_bee is bound and
     cl_crm_isu_feature=>is_active( if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_preview_overlay ) = abap_true and
     me->tree_srv->is_column_preview_active( p_column_key ) = abap_true.

    try.
        lr_beehive ?= p_replacement_bee.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    endtry.

    if lr_beehive is not bound.
      lr_beehive = new lcl_bee_hive( ).
      lr_beehive->add_bee( bee = p_replacement_bee ).
      p_replacement_bee = lr_beehive.
    endif.

    data lv_html type string.
    call method cl_thtmlbx_overlay=>('GET_BINDPREVIEW_STRING')
      exporting
        iv_id         = p_cell_id
        iv_overlay_id = |thOverlayContent__cellPreview|
      receiving
        rv_string     = lv_html.
    lr_beehive->add_html( html = lv_html ).
  endif.

ENDMETHOD.


method set_bold.


  data:
    entity type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.


  check iv_entity is bound.

  entity = iv_entity->get_wrapped_entity( ).

  check entity is bound.

* mark (in-)persistence only for specific objects
  case entity->get_name( ).
    when 'ConnectionObject' or
         'Premise' or
         'PointOfDelivery' or
         'ServiceLocation' or
         'ServiceObject'.                                   "#EC NOTEXT

*     bold if not saved yet
      if entity->my_manager_entry is bound and
         entity->get_transaction( ) is bound and
         entity->is_persistent( ) eq abap_false.
        rv_bold = abap_true.
      endif.

  endcase.


endmethod.


method set_event_srv.

  create object me->event_service exporting srv = event_srv.

endmethod.


method set_tree_properties_ref.

  me->tree_properties_ref = ir_tree_properties.

endmethod.


method SET_TREE_SRV.

  me->tree_srv = tree_srv.

endmethod.


method set_visible_columns.

  me->mt_visible_column = it_visible_column.

endmethod.


method show_oca_as_menu.

  data:
    lv_column_key type name_komp.


* at least the EhP2-switch has to be active for OCA as menu or Utilities EhP1 has to be active
*  if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>is_ehp2_active( ) = abap_true.
*   now we check if the menu functionality is activated by customizing
    rv_show_oca_as_menu = io_tree_srv->is_oca_menu_active( ).
    case rv_show_oca_as_menu.
      when gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
        "       final state -> nothing to do
      when gc_oca_as_menu_on.
        lv_column_key = iv_column_key.
        if iv_column_key is not initial and
           ( io_tree_srv->is_column_oca_menu_active( iv_column_key ) = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm or
             io_node is bound and io_node->get_pres_col_4_name( lv_column_key )-col_oca_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm ).
          rv_show_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
        endif.
      when gc_oca_as_menu_off.
        if iv_column_key is not initial.
          rv_show_oca_as_menu = io_tree_srv->is_column_oca_menu_active( iv_column_key ).
          case rv_show_oca_as_menu.
            when gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
              rv_show_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
            when gc_oca_as_menu_on.
              if io_node is bound.
                lv_column_key = iv_column_key.
                if io_node->get_pres_col_4_name( lv_column_key )-col_oca_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                  rv_show_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                endif.
              endif.
            when gc_oca_as_menu_off.
              if io_node is bound.
                lv_column_key = iv_column_key.
                rv_show_oca_as_menu = io_node->get_pres_col_4_name( lv_column_key )-col_oca_menu.
              endif.
          endcase.
        endif.
    endcase.
*   no context menu for folders
    if rv_show_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm and
       io_node is bound and
       io_node->is_folder( ) = abap_true.
      rv_show_oca_as_menu = gc_oca_as_menu_on.
    endif.
*  endif.

endmethod.


method SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU_PRIO_TO_VALUE.
  case IV_VALUE.
    when 1.
      RV_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.
    when 2.
      RV_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_ON.
    when 3.
      RV_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_WITH_OCM.
    when others.
      RV_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.
  endcase.
endmethod.


method SHOW_OCA_AS_MENU_VALUE_TO_PRIO.
  clear RV_RESULT.
  case IV_VALUE.
    when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_OFF.
      RV_RESULT = 1.
    when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_ON.
      RV_RESULT = 2.
    when CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IT=>GC_OCA_AS_MENU_WITH_OCM.
      RV_RESULT = 3.
    when others.
      RV_RESULT = 1.
  endcase.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY_WRAPPER
  create protected

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CONTROLLER
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_NODE_PROXY
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_TREE_VIEW
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_UI_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_KEY .
  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER .
  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_NODE .

  types:
    begin of TOCA_PARAM,
      SEQUENCE type crmt_iu_ic_oca_param_sequ,
      PARAMETER_KIND type crmt_iu_ic_oca_param_kind,
      PARAMETER_NAME type crmt_iu_ic_oca_param_name,
      IS_FIXED type crmt_iu_ic_oca_param_is_fixed,
      VALUE_PATH type crmt_iu_ic_oca_param_val_path,
    end of TOCA_PARAM .
  types:
    TOCA_PARAMS type SORTED TABLE OF TOCA_PARAM with unique key SEQUENCE with NON-UNIQUE SORTED key PARAMETER_KIND COMPONENTS PARAMETER_KIND .
  types:
    begin of TOCA.
    include type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TS_OCA_ENTRY as TS_OCA_ENTRY.
  types:
    PARAMETERS type TOCA_PARAMS,
    end of TOCA .
  types:
    TOCAS type STANDARD TABLE OF TOCA .
  types:
    begin of TS_NODE_PATH,
      SEQUENCE type I,
      NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID.
      include type CRMT_GENIL_OBJ_INSTANCE as INSTANCE.
  types:
    end of TS_NODE_PATH .
  types:
    TT_NODE_PATHS type sorted table of TS_NODE_PATH with unique key SEQUENCE .
  types:
    TT_TREE_NODE_INSTANCES type hashed table of ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE with unique key TABLE_LINE .

  methods GET_TREE_SRV
    returning
      value(RR_TREE_SERVICE) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .
  methods GET_RESOLVER
    returning
      value(RR_RESOLVER) type ref to OBJECT .
  class-methods SPLIT_AT_AND_NOTE_BRACKET
    importing
      !IV_SEPARATORS type CSEQUENCE default ` `
      !IV_TEXT type CSEQUENCE
    returning
      value(RT_PARTS) type STRINGTAB .

  data HIDDEN_INCLUDING_SUB_NODES type ABAP_BOOL .

private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE IMPLEMENTATION.


method are_children_filtered.

  result = me->children_filtered.

endmethod.


method ARE_CHILDREN_VALID.

  result = me->children_valid.

endmethod.


method check_initially_expanded.

  data:
    node_id          type string,
    max_siblings     type i,
    max_children     type i,
    lines            type i,
    children         type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    parent           type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    obj_id           type crmt_genil_object_id,
    key_16           type comt_product_guid,
    keys             type ecrm_isu_si_guids16.

* result will be false from second call on
  if me->initial_expanding_done = abap_false.

    me->initial_expanding_done = abap_true.

*   dynamic check first
    try.
        data(lv_initially_expanded) =
          cast if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh( me->get_cust_exit( ) )->is_initially_expanded(
                 io_node = me
                 entity = me->wrapped_entity
                 hier   = me->hier  ).
        case lv_initially_expanded.
          when abap_true.
            me->expanded = abap_true.
            return.
          when abap_false.
            me->expanded = abap_false.
            return.
          when others.
*           in all other cases proceed with standard / customizing based logic
        endcase.
      catch cx_root. "#EC NEEDED
*      in case of exception (missing implementation etc.) proceed with standard / customizing based logic
    endtry.

    node_id      = me->get_node_id( ).
    max_siblings = me->get_max_siblings( ).
    max_children = me->get_max_children( ).

    if max_siblings = no_expand or max_children = no_expand.
*     at least we check if there could be children by customizing
      me->get_child_nodes( check_is_leaf_only = abap_true ).
      if me->is_leaf = abap_true.
        me->expanded = abap_true.
      endif.
      return.
    endif.

*   read siblings of the entity (same node_id)
*   do not expand if there are too much siblings
    parent = me->get_parent_node( ).
    if parent is bound.
      children = parent->get_child_nodes( ).
      if children is bound and children->size( ) > max_siblings.
        me->expanded = abap_false.
      else.
        me->expanded = abap_true.
      endif.
    else.
      if iv_num_roots > max_siblings.
        me->expanded = abap_false.

        if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_CLOUD_ONLY( ).
*       special Handling Connection Object => Performance Big Result List
          if ME->GET_NAME( ) eq CL_CRM_IUIL_TO_QUERY=>CO_CO.
            OBJ_ID = ME->GET_KEY( ).
            CL_CRM_ISU_IL_TOOLS=>GET_KEY_FROM_ID(
              exporting
                ID  = OBJ_ID
              importing
                KEY = KEY_16 ).
