*         has premise?
            CL_ECRM_ISU_SI_SEARCH=>GET_T_PREMISES_FOR_CONNOBJ(
              exporting
                IV_PR_OBJECT_GUID_16 = KEY_16
              importing
                ET_PRM_KEYS_16       = KEYS ).
            if KEYS is initial.
*           zero Childs -> expand
              ME->EXPANDED = ABAP_TRUE.
            endif.
            return.
          endif.
        endif.

      else.
*       no parent -> overviews -> expand
        me->expanded = abap_true.
      endif.
    endif.

    if me->expanded = abap_true.
*     read the childs of the entity
      children = me->get_child_nodes( ).
      if children is bound.
        lines = children->size( ).
      endif.

*     do not expand if too many children
      if lines > max_children.
        me->expanded = abap_false.
      endif.
    else.
*     expand nodes that have zero childs
      me->get_child_nodes( check_is_leaf_only = abap_true ).
      if me->is_leaf = abap_true.
        me->expanded = abap_true.
      endif.
    endif.

  endif.

endmethod.


method check_potential_child_types.

  rv_result = abap_true.

  if it_child_type is initial and iv_child_type is initial or me->tree_srv is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

    rv_result = abap_false.

* check if the buffer is already filled, if not fill it for the complete profile once
  if me->tree_srv->mr_potential_child_types is not bound.
    create data me->tree_srv->mr_potential_child_types.

    field-symbols <ls_child_type> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gty_child_type.
    data:
      begin of ls_node_id,
        node_id          type crmt_node_id,
        parent_node_id   type crmt_node_id,
        recursion        type abap_bool,
        child_types_refs like table of ref to <ls_child_type>-child_types,
      end of ls_node_id.

*   let's start with the root nodes
    field-symbols <ls_hier> type crm_isutree_hier.
    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <ls_hier>
      where prof_id = me->tree_srv->prof_id and parent_node_id is initial.  "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
      data lt_node_id like hashed table of ls_node_id with unique key node_id parent_node_id recursion.
      clear ls_node_id.
      ls_node_id-node_id        = me->hier-node_id.
      ls_node_id-parent_node_id = me->hier-parent_node_id.
      ls_node_id-recursion      = abap_false.
      insert ls_node_id into table lt_node_id.
    endloop.

    field-symbols <ls_node_id> like ls_node_id.
    loop at lt_node_id assigning <ls_node_id>.  "#EC CI_HASHSEQ

      read table me->tree_srv->mr_potential_child_types->* assigning <ls_child_type>
        with table key node_id = <ls_node_id>-node_id  parent_node_id = <ls_node_id>-parent_node_id.
      if sy-subrc <> 0 or <ls_node_id>-recursion = abap_true.
        if sy-subrc <> 0.
          data ls_child_type type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gty_child_type.
          ls_child_type-node_id        = <ls_node_id>-node_id.
          ls_child_type-parent_node_id = <ls_node_id>-parent_node_id.
          insert ls_child_type into table me->tree_srv->mr_potential_child_types->* assigning <ls_child_type>.
        endif.

        loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <ls_hier>
          where prof_id = me->tree_srv->prof_id and parent_node_id = <ls_node_id>-node_id.  "#EC CI_SORTSEQ

          if <ls_hier>-bol_type is not initial.
            insert <ls_hier>-bol_type into table <ls_child_type>-child_types.
          endif.

          data lr_child_types like ref to <ls_child_type>-child_types.
          loop at <ls_node_id>-child_types_refs into lr_child_types.
            insert <ls_hier>-bol_type into table lr_child_types->*.
          endloop.

          clear ls_node_id.
          ls_node_id-node_id        = <ls_hier>-node_id.
          ls_node_id-parent_node_id = <ls_hier>-parent_node_id.
          ls_node_id-recursion      = <ls_node_id>-recursion.

          append lines of <ls_node_id>-child_types_refs to ls_node_id-child_types_refs.

          get reference of <ls_child_type>-child_types into lr_child_types.
          append lr_child_types to ls_node_id-child_types_refs.

          insert ls_node_id into table lt_node_id.
          if sy-subrc <> 0 and ls_node_id-recursion = abap_false.
*           here we found a recursive node -> add all entries of recursive node
            ls_node_id-recursion = abap_true.
            insert ls_node_id into table lt_node_id.
          endif.

        endloop.
      endif.

    endloop.
  endif.

* now read the buffered value
  read table me->tree_srv->mr_potential_child_types->* assigning <ls_child_type>
    with table key node_id = me->hier-node_id  parent_node_id = me->hier-parent_node_id.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
*   now let's check if the requested type(s) are potential child types of this node
      if iv_child_type is not initial.
        read table <ls_child_type>-child_types transporting no fields
          with table key table_line = iv_child_type.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          rv_result = abap_true.
          return.
        endif.
      endif.
    field-symbols <lv_child_type> type crmt_ext_obj_name.
    loop at it_child_type assigning <lv_child_type>.
        read table <ls_child_type>-child_types transporting no fields
          with table key table_line = <lv_child_type>.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          rv_result = abap_true.
          return.
        endif.
      endloop.
  endif.

endmethod.


method class_constructor.
  set handler on_bol_reset_triggered for all instances.
endmethod.


method CL_NODE_PATHS_TO_NODE_PATH.
  clear RV_PATH.
  loop at IT_PATHS assigning field-symbol(<PATH>).
    if <PATH>-NODE_ID ca `\:()`
      or <PATH>-NAMESPACE ca `\:()`
      or <PATH>-OBJECT_NAME ca `\:()`
      or conv STRING( <PATH>-OBJECT_ID ) ca `\:()` ##NO_TEXT.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
    endif.
    if SY-TABIX <= 1.
      RV_PATH = |{ <PATH>-NODE_ID }({ <PATH>-NAMESPACE }:{ <PATH>-OBJECT_NAME }:{ conv STRING( <PATH>-OBJECT_ID ) })|.
    else.
      RV_PATH = |{ RV_PATH }\\{ <PATH>-NODE_ID }({ <PATH>-NAMESPACE }:{ <PATH>-OBJECT_NAME }:{ conv STRING( <PATH>-OBJECT_ID ) })|.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method CL_NODE_PATH_TO_NODE_PATHS.

  constants:
    C_REGEX type STRING value '([^\\\(\)]){1,}\(([^\\\(\)\:]){0,}\:([^\\\(\)\:]){1,}\:([^\\\(\)\:]){1,}\)'.

  data LV_SEQUENCE type I.

  clear RT_PATHS.
  find all occurrences of regex C_REGEX in IV_PATH results data(LT_RESULTS).
  loop at LT_RESULTS assigning field-symbol(<R>).
    LV_SEQUENCE = LV_SEQUENCE + 1.
    insert value #(
      SEQUENCE    = LV_SEQUENCE
      NODE_ID     = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_PATH OFF = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 1 ]-OFFSET LEN = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 1 ]-LENGTH )
      NAMESPACE   = cond #( when <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 2 ]-OFFSET >= 0 then SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_PATH OFF = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 2 ]-OFFSET LEN = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 2 ]-LENGTH ) )
      OBJECT_NAME = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_PATH OFF = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 3 ]-OFFSET LEN = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 3 ]-LENGTH )
      OBJECT_ID   = conv #( SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_PATH OFF = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 4 ]-OFFSET LEN = <R>-SUBMATCHES[ 4 ]-LENGTH ) )
    ) into table RT_PATHS.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method CREATE_INSTANCE.

  if TREE_SRV is bound.
    data(LV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS) = TREE_SRV->GET_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS(
      IV_DEFAULT_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS
    ).
  endif.
  if LV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS is initial.
    LV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS.
  endif.

  create object NODE type (LV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS)
    exporting IV_WRAPPED_ENTITY = ENTITY.

  NODE->HIER = HIER.

  NODE->PRES      = TREE_SRV->GET_PRES( HIER-PRES_ID ).
  NODE->PRES_COLS = TREE_SRV->GET_PRES_COLUMNS( HIER-PRES_ID ).

  NODE->PARENT_NODE = PARENT_NODE.

  NODE->TREE_SRV = TREE_SRV.

endmethod.


method create_related_entity.

  rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->create_related_entity(
                iv_relation_name = iv_relation_name ).

endmethod.


method disable_children_filter.

* application must not disable the filter if filter is user controlled
  if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_filter_mode( ) is initial.
    me->children_filter_disabled = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method enable_children_filter.

  me->children_filter_disabled = abap_false.

endmethod.


method EXECUTE.

CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->EXECUTE
  EXPORTING
    IV_METHOD_NAME = iv_method_name
    IT_PARAM       = it_param
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT      = rv_result
    .

endmethod.


method EXPAND.

  RV_RESULT = IS_EXPANDED( ).
  if RV_RESULT is not initial.
    return.
  endif.

  data(LR_NODE_PROXY) = TREE_SRV->GET_NODE_PROXY( IR_TREE_NODE = ME ).
  if LR_NODE_PROXY is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  if not HAS_CHILDREN( ).
    LR_NODE_PROXY->IS_LEAF = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

  TREE_SRV->TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->EXPAND_NODE( LR_NODE_PROXY->NODE_KEY ).
  TREE_SRV->TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).

  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( IS_EXPANDED( ) ).

endmethod.


method find.
  data: col_name type name_komp,
        col      type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
        child    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.

  data: child_col     type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
        bo            type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
        already_found type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
        child_found   type abap_bool,
        tree_node     type ref to if_bsp_wd_tree_node,
        ent           type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.

  if iv_next_hit eq abap_false and iv_previous_hit eq abap_false.
    if iv_searched_entity is bound.
      if iv_searched_entity eq me->wrapped_entity.
        rv_node = me.
      endif.
    else.
      loop at it_col into col_name.
        if iv_string cs '*'.
          if me->get_property_as_string( col_name ) cp iv_string.
            rv_node = me.
          endif.
        else.
          if me->get_property_as_string( col_name ) cs iv_string.
            rv_node = me.
          endif.
        endif.
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

  if rv_node is bound.
    return.
  endif.

  if iv_previous_hit is not supplied.
* search in children
    if iv_searched_entity is bound." we now the entity name so search only in relevant children
      ent ?= iv_searched_entity.
      col = me->get_child_nodes( searched_entity_name = ent->get_name( ) ).
    else.
      col = me->get_child_nodes( ).
    endif.
    child ?= col->get_first( ).
    while child is bound.
      rv_node = child->find( iv_string = iv_string it_col = it_col iv_searched_entity = iv_searched_entity ).
      if rv_node is bound.
        return.
      endif.
      child ?= col->get_next( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.

  if iv_next_hit eq abap_true.
* search in next siblings, then in next siblings of parent, then of grand parent, then.....
* get path from target entity to root and put it to the to do list

    already_found = me.

    bo = already_found->get_parent_node( only_visible = abap_true ).
    while bo is bound.

* search in children
      if iv_searched_entity is bound." we now the entity name so search only in relevant children
        ent ?= iv_searched_entity.
        child_col = bo->get_child_nodes( searched_entity_name = ent->get_name( ) ).
      else.
        child_col = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
      endif.

      child ?= child_col->get_first( ).
      while child is bound.

        if child_found eq abap_true.
          rv_node = child->find( iv_string = iv_string it_col = it_col iv_searched_entity = iv_searched_entity ).
          if rv_node is bound.
            exit.
          endif.
        elseif child eq already_found.
          child_found = abap_true.
        endif.

        child ?= child_col->get_next( ).
      endwhile.
      clear child_found.

      if rv_node is bound.
        exit.
      endif.

      already_found = bo.
      bo = bo->get_parent_node( only_visible = abap_true ).
    endwhile.
  elseif iv_previous_hit eq abap_true.
* search in previous siblings, then in previous siblings of parent, then of grand parent, then.....
* get path from target entity to root and put it to the to do list
    already_found = me.

    bo = already_found->get_parent_node( only_visible = abap_true ).
    while bo is bound.
      child_col = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
      child ?= child_col->get_last( ).
      while child is bound.

        if child_found eq abap_true.
          rv_node = child->find( iv_string = iv_string it_col = it_col iv_searched_entity = iv_searched_entity ).
          if rv_node is bound.
            exit.
          endif.
        elseif child eq already_found.
          child_found = abap_true.
        endif.

        child ?= child_col->get_previous( ).
      endwhile.
      clear child_found.

      if rv_node is bound.
        exit.
      endif.

      already_found = bo.
      bo = bo->get_parent_node( only_visible = abap_true ).
    endwhile.
    if rv_node is not bound and already_found is bound and already_found ne me. " The last possible previous is the root object
      rv_node = already_found->find( iv_string = iv_string it_col = it_col iv_searched_entity = iv_searched_entity iv_previous_hit = abap_false iv_next_hit = abap_false ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_all_child_nodes.

  create object child_nodes type lcl_all_child_nodes_col
    exporting
      iv_wrapped_entities   = wrapped_entities
      io_parent_node        = me
      iv_filter_entity_name = filter_entity_name
      it_filter_entity_name = filter_entity_names
      iv_buffer_only        = buffer_only
      iv_has_nvp_container  = has_nvp_container.

endmethod.


method get_all_child_nodes_int.

  field-symbols:
    <inst> type ty_instance.


  loop at instances assigning <inst>
    where caller_id   =  caller_id and
          parent_node =  parent_node and
          node        <> exception.         "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    child_nodes->add( <inst>-node ).
    get_all_child_nodes_int(
      exception   = exception
      parent_node = <inst>-node
      child_nodes = child_nodes
      caller_id   = caller_id ).
  endloop.

endmethod.


method get_all_child_nodes_recursive.

  data:
    col  type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  if filter_entity_name is initial or
     me->check_potential_child_types( filter_entity_name ) = abap_true.
    col = me->get_child_nodes( buffer_only = buffer_only ).
  endif.
  if col is bound.
    node ?= col->get_first( ).
    while node is bound.
      if node <> exception.
        if has_nvp_container = abap_false or node->data_container is bound.
          data lv_filter type abap_bool.
          lv_filter = abap_false.
          if filter_entity_name is not initial.
            read table filter_entity_name transporting no fields binary search with key table_line = node->get_name( ).
            if sy-subrc <> 0.
              lv_filter = abap_true.
            endif.
          endif.
          if lv_filter = abap_false.
            if wrapped_entities = abap_true.
              child_nodes->add( node->get_wrapped_entity( ) ).
            else.
              child_nodes->add( node ).
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.
        node->get_all_child_nodes_recursive(
          wrapped_entities   = wrapped_entities
          child_nodes        = child_nodes
          exception          = exception
          filter_entity_name = filter_entity_name
          buffer_only        = buffer_only
          has_nvp_container  = has_nvp_container ).
      endif.
      node ?= col->get_next( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_cell_info.
  data: ls_col type crmt_isutree_prco,
        lv_col_name  type name_komp.

  lv_col_name = iv_col_key.
  ls_col      = get_pres_col_4_name( lv_col_name ).

  ev_edit_flag = ls_col-flag_edit.
  ev_is_link   = ls_col-col_link.
  ev_link_id   = ls_col-col_link_id.

  if ev_link_id is initial.
    ev_link_id = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_link_event_type." set link_id to 'LINK' if no special link_id is customized
  endif.

  if ls_col-col_path_edit is initial.
    clear ev_edit_flag.
  endif.

  if ev_col_edit is requested or ev_col_img is requested.
    replace 'COL' with 'COL_' into lv_col_name.
    concatenate lv_col_name '_EDIT' into ev_col_edit.
    concatenate lv_col_name '_IMG'  into ev_col_img.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_child_nodes.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_ND_01 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_ND STATIC .

  data:
    lx_exc type ref to cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree.


  if me->children_valid = abap_false.
    clear: me->children, me->hidden_children.
  endif.

  if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
    if me->is_leaf = abap_false.
      if me->children_valid = abap_true and me->children is bound.
        me->is_leaf = boolc( me->children->size( ) = 0 ).
      else.
        try.
            me->tree_srv->get_child_nodes(
              node               = me
              check_is_leaf_only = abap_true ).
          catch cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree into lx_exc.
            if lx_exc->textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>tree_node_is_leaf.
              me->is_leaf = abap_true.
            else.
*             conditional breakpoint
*             // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*             // or
*             // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
              assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                     subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occurred'
                     condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                 iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                                 iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                                 iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                                 iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT
              raise exception lx_exc.
            endif.
        endtry.
      endif.
    endif.
    return.
  endif.


*  if me->is_leaf = abap_false and  "a leaf doesn't have childre -> no read necessary
  if ( me->is_leaf = abap_false or ( me->is_leaf = abap_true and me->children_valid = false ) ) and
     ( buffer_only = abap_false or  "buffer_only not set -> read children
       buffer_only = 'R' and me->parent_node is bound ).  "buffer_only set for root nodes -> child nodes will be processed

    try.

        if me->children_valid = abap_false.
          create object me->hidden_children type cl_crm_bol_unique_bo_col.
          me->hidden_children->activate_autocleanup( ).
          me->children = me->tree_srv->get_child_nodes(
                           node                 = me
                           searched_entity_name = searched_entity_name
                           check_limits_only    = abap_false
                           hidden_child_nodes   = me->hidden_children ).
          if hidden_child_nodes is bound and me->hidden_children->size( ) > 0.
            hidden_child_nodes->add_collection( me->hidden_children ).
          endif.
*         children stay not valid, because only relevant hierarchy nodes were loaded or
*         // if only limits were checked
          if searched_entity_name is initial. " and
             "( me->children is bound or check_limits_only = abap_false ).
            me->children_valid = abap_true.
*           check all filters are correctly set for root node (not necessary for already filtered nodes)
            if me->parent_node is not bound and me->is_filter_node( ) = abap_false.
              me->tree_srv->apply_filters( collection = me->children  force = abap_true ).
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.

      catch cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree into lx_exc.

        if lx_exc->textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>tree_node_is_leaf.

          me->is_leaf = abap_true.

        else.

*         conditional breakpoint
*         // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*         // or
*         // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
          assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                 subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occurred'
                 condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                             iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                             iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                             iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                             iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

          raise exception lx_exc.

        endif.

    endtry.

  endif.

  if me->children is not bound.
    create object me->children type cl_crm_bol_unique_bo_col.
  endif.

  child_nodes = me->children->get_copy( ).

* filter result collection by given entity name
  if filter_entity_name is not initial.
    cl_crm_iu_col_tools=>filter_col_by_object_name(
      io_collection  = child_nodes
      iv_object_name = filter_entity_name ).
  endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_ND_02 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_ND .

endmethod.


method get_cust_exit.

  if me->hier-class is not initial.
    try.
        rv_cust_exit = me->tree_srv->get_impl_class_instance( me->hier-class ).
      catch cx_root.
* class is not implementing the inteface IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE?
    endtry.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_hidden_status.

  result = me->hidden_status.

endmethod.


method get_hier.

  rs_hier = me->hier.

endmethod.


method get_instance.

  data:
    inst type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>ty_instance.

  if hier-recursive <> abap_false and
    parent_node is bound and
    parent_node->is_entity_recursive( ir_ent = entity is_hier = hier ) eq abap_true.
    return.
  endif.

  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances into inst
    with table key entity      = entity
                   hier        = hier
                   parent_node = parent_node
                   caller_id   = caller_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
*   ensure entity is alive!
************note 2445928*****
    if entity is not bound or
       cl_crm_iu_bol_entity=>is_entity_alive( entity ) <> abap_true.
      return.
    endif.
    inst-entity      = entity.
    inst-hier        = hier.
    inst-parent_node = parent_node.
    inst-caller_id   = caller_id.
    inst-node = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>create_instance(
      entity      = entity
      hier        = hier
      parent_node = parent_node
      tree_srv    = tree_srv
    ).
    insert inst into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances.
    set handler inst-node->on_tree_node_entity_deleted for inst-node activation abap_true.
  endif.

  node = inst-node.

  if node->tree_srv <> tree_srv.
    node->tree_srv = tree_srv.
  endif.

  if parent_node is bound and parent_node->children_filter_disabled = abap_true.
    node->children_filter_disabled = abap_true.
    node->invalidate_children( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_KEY.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_KEY
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method get_mapped_attr_name.

  rv_target_attr_name = iv_my_attr_name.

endmethod.


method get_mapped_pres_entry.

  data: ls_col    type crmt_isutree_prco.

  ls_col = get_pres_col_4_name( iv_name = iv_name  iv_alt_pres_id = iv_alt_pres_id ).

  if ls_col is not initial.

    if iv_name cs 'A'.
      rv_entry = ls_col-col_path_b.
    elseif iv_name cs 'B'.
      rv_entry = ls_col-col_path_c.
    elseif iv_name cs '_IMG_TOOLTIP'.
      rv_entry = ls_col-COL_TOOLTIP.
    elseif iv_name cs '_IMG'.
      rv_entry = ls_col-col_img.
    elseif iv_name cs '_EDIT'.
      rv_entry = ls_col-col_path_edit.
    else.
      rv_entry = ls_col-col_path_a.
    endif.

  else.

**   conditional breakpoint
**   // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
**   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
**   // or
**   // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
**   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
*    assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
*           subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
*           condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
*                       iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
*                       iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

    raise exception type cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.

  endif.

endmethod.


method get_max_children.

  max_children = me->hier-max_children.

endmethod.


method get_max_siblings.

  max_siblings = me->hier-max_siblings.

endmethod.


method GET_MESSAGE_CONTAINER.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_MESSAGE_CONTAINER
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method get_name.

  rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->get_name( ).

endmethod.


method GET_NODE_ID.

  node_id = me->hier-node_id.

endmethod.


method GET_NODE_PATH.
  RV_PATH = CL_NODE_PATHS_TO_NODE_PATH( IT_PATHS = GET_NODE_PATHS( IV_ONLY_VISIBLE = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE ) ).
endmethod.


method GET_NODE_PATHS.

  clear RT_PATHS.

  data(LR_ENTITY) = GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY( ).
  data(LV_NODE_ID) = GET_NODE_ID( ).
  if LR_ENTITY is bound and LV_NODE_ID is not initial.
    try.
        data(LR_PARENT) = GET_PARENT_NODE( ONLY_VISIBLE = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE ).
        if LR_PARENT is bound.
          RT_PATHS = LR_PARENT->GET_NODE_PATHS( IV_ONLY_VISIBLE = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE ).
          data(LV_SEQUENCE) = RT_PATHS[ LINES( RT_PATHS ) ]-SEQUENCE.
        endif.
        LV_SEQUENCE = LV_SEQUENCE + 1.
        insert value #(
          SEQUENCE    = LV_SEQUENCE
          NODE_ID     = LV_NODE_ID
          NAMESPACE   = LR_ENTITY->GET_NAMESPACE( )
          OBJECT_NAME = LR_ENTITY->GET_NAME( )
          OBJECT_ID   = LR_ENTITY->GET_KEY( )
        ) into table RT_PATHS.
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND ##NO_HANDLER.
        clear RT_PATHS.
    endtry.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_OCA.
  RESULT = TREE_SRV->GET_OCA( PROF_ID = HIER-PROF_ID NODE_ID = HIER-NODE_ID OCA_ID = OCA_ID ).
endmethod.


method get_oca_column_key.

  data: oca_def type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>TS_OCA_ENTRY, " crmt_isutree_oca,
        index   type int1.

  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>oca_tab into oca_def
    with key prof_id = hier-prof_id
             node_id = hier-node_id
             id      = oca_id.
  if sy-subrc eq 0.
    if oca_def-col_id is initial.
      oca_def-col_id = 1.
    endif.

    col_key = index = oca_def-col_id.
    concatenate 'COL' col_key into col_key.
    condense col_key.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_OCA_TABLE.
  RT_ACTIONS = TREE_SRV->GET_OCA_TABLE( exporting IV_NODE_ID = HIER-NODE_ID importing ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS ).
endmethod.


method GET_PARENT.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_PARENT
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method get_parent_node.


  if only_visible eq abap_true and me->parent_node is bound and me->parent_node->is_hidden( ) <> abap_false.
*   parent is hidden so read next level
    parent_node = me->parent_node->get_parent_node( only_visible ).
  else.
    parent_node = me->parent_node.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_PARENT_NODES.
  RR_PARENT_NODES = new #( ).
  data(LR_PARENT_NODE) = GET_PARENT_NODE( ONLY_VISIBLE = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE ).
  while LR_PARENT_NODE is bound.
    RR_PARENT_NODES->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_PARENT_NODE ).
    LR_PARENT_NODE = LR_PARENT_NODE->GET_PARENT_NODE( ONLY_VISIBLE = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE ).
  endwhile.
endmethod.


method GET_PARENT_RELATION.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_PARENT_RELATION
  IMPORTING
    EV_RELATION_NAME  = EV_RELATION_NAME
    EV_RELATION_IS_11 = EV_RELATION_IS_11
    .
endmethod.


METHOD get_presentation.

  rv_pres = me->pres.

ENDMETHOD.


method get_pres_col_4_name.

  data: lv_col_id type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_id.

  if iv_name(5) cs '_'.
    try.
        lv_col_id = iv_name+4(2).
      catch cx_sy_conversion_no_number.
        lv_col_id = iv_name+4(1).
    endtry.
  else.
    try.
        lv_col_id = iv_name+3(2).
      catch cx_sy_conversion_no_number.
        lv_col_id = iv_name+3(1).
    endtry.
  endif.

  if iv_alt_pres_id is not initial and iv_alt_pres_id <> me->hier-pres_id.
    read table pres_cols into rs_result with key KEY components pres_id = iv_alt_pres_id  col_id = lv_col_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      rs_result-pres_id = me->hier-pres_id.
      return.
    endif.
*   read column info for alternative presentation ID
    data lt_alt_pres_col type crmt_isutree_prco_tab.
    lt_alt_pres_col = me->tree_srv->get_pres_columns( pres_id = iv_alt_pres_id  iv_load = abap_true ).
    read table lt_alt_pres_col into rs_result with key KEY components pres_id = iv_alt_pres_id col_id = lv_col_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and rs_result is not initial.
*     adjust buffer entry
      delete pres_cols where pres_id = me->hier-pres_id and col_id = lv_col_id.
      insert rs_result into table pres_cols.
      rs_result-pres_id = me->hier-pres_id.
      insert rs_result into table pres_cols.
    endif.
  else.
    read table pres_cols into rs_result with key KEY components pres_id = me->hier-pres_id  col_id = lv_col_id.
    if sy-subrc ne 0.
      clear rs_result.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_prof_id.

  prof_id = me->hier-prof_id.

endmethod.


method get_property_single.

  data: attr_changed type abap_bool,
        cust_exit    type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree,
        lt_value     type table of string,
        lv_value     type string,
        lv_left      type string,
        lv_right     type string,
        lv_result    type string,
        lv_alt_pres_id type crmt_pres_id.

  field-symbols: <value> type any.


* conditional breakpoint
* // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
* // or
* // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
  assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
         subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Read Attribute'
         condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                     iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_read_attr
                     iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                     iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id
                     iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                     iv_col_id      = me->get_pres_col_4_name( iv_attr_name )-col_id
                     iv_row_index   = me->ui_row_index
                     iv_col_index   = me->ui_col_index
                     iv_attr_name   = iv_attr_name ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT


* result is string in any case (at least an empty one)
  create data rv_result type string.
  assign rv_result->* to <value>.

  check not iv_attr_name is initial.

* shortcut for BRRplus tooltips
  if iv_attr_name cs 'IMG_TOOLTIP'.
    assign me->mt_brf_icon_tooltip[ attr_name = substring_before( val = iv_attr_name  sub = '_TOOLTIP' ) ] to field-symbol(<ls_brf_icon_tooltip>).
    if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_brf_icon_tooltip>-tooltip is not initial.
      <value> = <ls_brf_icon_tooltip>-tooltip.
      return.
    endif.
  endif.

  IF me->hier-change_pres = abap_true AND NOT me->hier-class IS INITIAL.
    cust_exit = me->tree_srv->get_impl_class_instance( me->hier-class ).
    if cust_exit is bound.
*     customer exit!
      try.

*         conditional breakpoint
*         // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*         // or
*         // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
          assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                 subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Read Attribute)'
                 condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                             iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_attr
                             iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                             iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id
                             iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                             iv_col_id      = me->get_pres_col_4_name( iv_attr_name )-col_id
                             iv_row_index   = me->ui_row_index
                             iv_col_index   = me->ui_col_index
                             iv_attr_name   = iv_attr_name ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

          data lv_attr_name type name_komp.
          lv_attr_name = iv_attr_name.
          if iv_attr_name cp |*_EDIT|.
            lv_attr_name = substring_before( val = iv_attr_name  sub = |_EDIT| ).
          endif.

          cust_exit->get_attribute(
            exporting
              node         = me
              entity       = me->wrapped_entity
              attr_name    = lv_attr_name
              hier         = me->hier
              expanded     = me->expanded
            importing
              value        = <value>
              attr_changed = attr_changed
              ev_alternative_pres_id = lv_alt_pres_id ).

*        catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .
**         method not implemented.
        data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
        catch cx_root into lx_root.
*         conditional breakpoint
*         // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*         // or
*         // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
          assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                 subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                 condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                             iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                             iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

          cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
            method = 'GET_ATTRIBUTE' handler = cust_exit
            prof_id = me->get_prof_id( ) node_id = me->get_node_id( )
            exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

          clear <value>.
      endtry.
    endif.
  endif.


* no customer value -> proceed
  if attr_changed = abap_true.
    condense <value>.
    return.
  endif.

  try.
      <value> = me->get_mapped_pres_entry( iv_name = iv_attr_name  iv_alt_pres_id = lv_alt_pres_id ).
    catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
*     no presentation field -> delegate request to wrapped entity
      try.
          rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~get_property( iv_attr_name ).
        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
          create data rv_result type string.
      endtry.
      return.
  endtry.


  check <value> is not initial.

  <value> = GET_VALUE_BY_PATH( IV_PATH = <value> IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).

** check for extended value path
*  IF <value> CS '@/' OR <value> CS '@OTR/' OR <value> CS '@TEXT/' OR <value> CS '@BRF/' OR <value> CS '@#'.
*    lv_value = <value>.
*
*    while lv_value cs '@'.
*
*      split lv_value at '@' into lv_left lv_right.
*
*      if lv_right cs '@'.
*
*        split lv_right at '@' into lv_value lv_right.
*
*        lv_value = me->get_property_single_internal( iv_value = lv_value  iv_attr_name = iv_attr_name ).
*
*      else.
*
**       parsing error? (open @ without closing @)
*        lv_value = me->get_property_single_internal( iv_value = lv_right   iv_attr_name = iv_attr_name ).
*
*      endif.
*
*      concatenate lv_result lv_left lv_value into lv_result respecting blanks.
*
*      lv_value = lv_right.
*
*    endwhile.
*
*    if lv_value is not initial.
*      concatenate lv_result lv_value into lv_result respecting blanks.
*    endif.
*
*    <value> = lv_result.
*  else.
*    data: lr_incomplete type ref to data,
*          lr_guid type ref to data,
*          lr_package type ref to data,
*          lv_txt type j_txt30,
*          lv_isuitem type checkbox.
*    field-symbols: <fs_incomp> type checkbox,
*                   <fs_guid> type crmt_object_guid,
*                   <fs_pack> type checkbox.
*    if ( me->wrapped_entity->get_name( ) = if_crm_iu_bol_con=>co_order_item_entity_name ) and
*      <value> = '//ISUCONTRACT_ID'.
*      lv_isuitem = 'X'.
*    endif.
*
*    <value> = me->get_property_single_internal( iv_value = <value>  iv_attr_name = iv_attr_name ).
*
*    if <value> is initial and lv_isuitem = 'X'.
*      lr_incomplete = me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~get_property( 'IS_INCOMPLETE' ).
*      lr_guid       = me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~get_property( 'GUID' ).
*      lr_package    = me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~get_property( 'IS_PACKAGE' ).
*      assign lr_incomplete->* to <fs_incomp>.
*      assign lr_guid->* to <fs_guid>.
*      assign lr_package->* to <fs_pack>.
*      if <fs_incomp> = 'X' and <fs_pack> = ' '.
**        lv_txt = cl_crm_isu_order_info_su=>get_status_text(
**                   iv_item_type = ' '
**                   iv_status = 'I2417' ).
*        CALL METHOD cl_crm_isu_order_info_su=>get_rel_status
*          EXPORTING
*            iv_guid        = <fs_guid>
*          IMPORTING
*            ev_status_text = lv_txt.
*        <value> = lv_txt(10).
*      endif.
*    endif.
*  endif.
*
*  condense <value>.

endmethod.


method get_property_single_internal.

  data:
    lt_alias      type table of string,
    lv_alias_pack type string,
    lv_alias_id   type string,
    lv_alias      type string,
    lv_path       type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_path,
    lv_index      type sytabix.

  data:
    lv_brf_func_name  type if_fdt_types=>name,
    lt_brf_exec_param type abap_parmbind_tab,
    ls_brf_exec_param type abap_parmbind,
    lr_ent            type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    lv_object_name    type crmt_ext_obj_name,
    lv_object_id      type crmt_genil_object_id.

  rv_result = iv_value.

* show string, OTR or BOL attribute value?
  if rv_result(1) eq '/' or ( rv_result cs '@' and count( val = rv_result regex = '@..(\\Q.*){0,1}@' ) = 0 ).
*   show BOL attribute
    lv_path = rv_result.
    rv_result = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_xpath_property_as_string(
                source = me->wrapped_entity
                path   = lv_path ).

  elseif strlen( rv_result ) > 4 and rv_result(4) eq 'OTR/'.
*   show OTR
    split rv_result at '/' into table lt_alias.
    delete lt_alias where table_line is initial.
    lv_index = lines( lt_alias ) - 1.
    read table lt_alias into lv_alias_pack index lv_index.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      if lv_index > 2. " OTR NAMESPACE PACKAGE ALIASID
        subtract 1 from lv_index.
        read table lt_alias into lv_alias index lv_index. " namespace
        concatenate '/' lv_alias '/' lv_alias_pack into lv_alias_pack.
        add 1 to lv_index.
      endif.
      add 1 to lv_index.
      read table lt_alias into lv_alias_id index lv_index.
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        concatenate lv_alias_pack lv_alias_id into lv_alias separated by '/'.
        system-call otr get_text_by_alias language sy-langu
               id lv_alias nr '0001' text into rv_result. "#EC CI_SYSTEMCALL
      endif.
    endif.
  elseif strlen( rv_result ) > 5 and rv_result(5) eq 'TEXT/'.

    split rv_result at '/' into lv_alias lv_path.

    rv_result = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_xpath_property_as_string(
                  source = me->wrapped_entity
                  path   = lv_path
                  text   = abap_true ).

* Start of BRF Handling
  elseif strlen( rv_result ) > 4 and rv_result(4) eq 'BRF/'.

    lv_brf_func_name = substring_after( val = rv_result  sub = '/'  occ = -1 ).
    if lv_brf_func_name is not initial.
      clear rv_result.
*     we also allow the short form "BRF/123356"
      if lv_brf_func_name co '0123456789 '.
        lv_brf_func_name = 'UTTP_' && lv_brf_func_name.
      endif.
      data(lv_brf_func_id) = cl_crm_isu_brf_tools=>get_ftd_func_uuid( lv_brf_func_name ).
      if lv_brf_func_id is not initial.
        try.
*           list of available context parameters
            cl_fdt_function_process=>get_context_list(
              exporting
                iv_function_id      = lv_brf_func_id
                iv_timestamp        = value #( )
                iv_trace_generation = abap_false
              importing
                et_context_list     = data(lt_brf_context_param) ).
            loop at lt_brf_context_param assigning field-symbol(<ls_brf_context_param>).
              case <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                when 'IU_PROF_ID'.
                  clear ls_brf_exec_param.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-name = <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-value = new if_fdt_types=>element_text( hier-prof_id ).
                  insert ls_brf_exec_param into table lt_brf_exec_param.
                when 'IU_PRES_ID'.
                  clear ls_brf_exec_param.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-name = <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-value = new if_fdt_types=>element_text( hier-pres_id ).
                  insert ls_brf_exec_param into table lt_brf_exec_param.
                when 'IU_COLUMN_ID'.
                  clear ls_brf_exec_param.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-name = <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-value = new if_fdt_types=>element_text( iv_attr_name ).
                  insert ls_brf_exec_param into table lt_brf_exec_param.
                when 'IU_OBJECT_NAME'.
                  clear ls_brf_exec_param.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-name = <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                  lr_ent ?= get_wrapped_entity( ).
                  lv_object_name = lr_ent->get_name( ).
                  ls_brf_exec_param-value = new if_fdt_types=>element_text( lv_object_name ).
                  insert ls_brf_exec_param into table lt_brf_exec_param.
                when 'IU_OBJECT_ID'.
                  clear ls_brf_exec_param.
                  ls_brf_exec_param-name = <ls_brf_context_param>-name.
                  lr_ent ?= get_wrapped_entity( ).
                  lv_object_id = lr_ent->get_key( ).
                  ls_brf_exec_param-value = new if_fdt_types=>element_text(
                                              cl_crm_isu_brf_helpers=>convert_genil_id_to_brf_text( lv_object_id ) ).
                  insert ls_brf_exec_param into table lt_brf_exec_param.
              endcase.
            endloop.
*           result object
            cl_fdt_function_process=>get_data_object_reference(
              exporting
                iv_function_id = lv_brf_func_id
                iv_data_object = '_V_RESULT'
              importing
                er_data        = data(lr_brf_result) ).
            if lr_brf_result is bound.
              assign lr_brf_result->* to field-symbol(<ls_brf_result>).
            endif.
            cl_crm_isu_brf_tools=>process_function(
              exporting
                iv_function_id = lv_brf_func_id
                iv_appl_usage  = 'TP'
              importing
                ea_result      = <ls_brf_result>
              changing
                ct_name_value  = lt_brf_exec_param ).
            if iv_attr_name cs 'IMG'.
              assign component 'IUR_ICON' of structure <ls_brf_result> to field-symbol(<lv_brf_result_icon>).
              if sy-subrc = 0.
                rv_result = <lv_brf_result_icon>.
                if rv_result is not initial and rv_result na './'.
*                 default -> WebUI icons
                  data(lv_icon_src) = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
                                        iv_icon_name = rv_result
                                        iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
                  if lv_icon_src is not initial.
                    rv_result = lv_icon_src.
                  else.
*                   could be a SAP GUI icon
                    lv_icon_src = cl_bsp_mimes=>sap_icon(
                                    id     = rv_result
                                    is_rtl = cl_crm_iu_ic_appl=>with_right_to_left( ) ).
                    if lv_icon_src is not initial.
                      rv_result = lv_icon_src.
                    endif.
                  endif.
                endif.
              endif.
*             fetch tooltip also
              delete table me->mt_brf_icon_tooltip with table key attr_name = iv_attr_name.
              assign component 'IUR_ICON_TOOLTIP_' && cl_crm_isu_brf_tools=>gv_sylangu_iso of structure <ls_brf_result> to field-symbol(<lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip>).
              if sy-subrc = 0 and <lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip> is not initial.
                insert value #( attr_name = iv_attr_name  tooltip = <lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip> ) into table me->mt_brf_icon_tooltip.
              else.
                assign component 'IUR_ICON_TOOLTIP' of structure <ls_brf_result> to <lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip>.
                if sy-subrc = 0 and <lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip> is not initial.
                  insert value #( attr_name = iv_attr_name  tooltip = <lv_brf_result_icon_tooltip> ) into table me->mt_brf_icon_tooltip.
                endif.
              endif.
            else.
              assign component 'IUR_VALUE_' && cl_crm_isu_brf_tools=>gv_sylangu_iso of structure <ls_brf_result> to field-symbol(<lv_brf_result_value>).
              if sy-subrc = 0 and <lv_brf_result_value> is not initial.
                rv_result = <lv_brf_result_value>.
              else.
                assign component 'IUR_VALUE' of structure <ls_brf_result> to <lv_brf_result_value>.
                if sy-subrc = 0.
                  rv_result = <lv_brf_result_value>.
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.
          catch cx_fdt.
        endtry.
      endif.
    endif.
*   End of BRF Handling

  elseif strlen( rv_result ) = 9 and to_upper( rv_result(9) ) = '#CHILDREN'.
    try.
        rv_result = condense( me->get_child_nodes( )->size( ) ).
      catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        clear rv_result.
    endtry.
  elseif strlen( rv_result ) = 12 and to_upper( rv_result(12) ) = '#ALLCHILDREN'.
    try.
        rv_result = condense( me->get_all_child_nodes( )->size( ) ).
      catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        clear rv_result.
    endtry.
  elseif IV_ATTR_NAME <> '~FROM_METHOD~'.
    data(LR_RESOLVER) = GET_RESOLVER( ).
    if LR_RESOLVER is bound.
      RV_RESULT = GET_VALUE_FROM_METHOD(
        IV_PATH      = RV_RESULT
        IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
        IT_VALUES    = value #( )
      ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_related_entities.

  rv_result =  me->wrapped_entity->get_related_entities(
                 iv_relation_name = iv_relation_name
                 iv_mode          = iv_mode
                 iv_owned_only    = iv_owned_only ).

endmethod.


method get_related_entities_for_hier.

  ro_result = me->tree_srv->get_related_entities(
                source                = me->get_wrapped_entity( )
                path                  = is_hier-parent_node_rel
                hier                  = is_hier
                io_parent_node_entity = me ).

endmethod.


method get_related_entity.

  rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->get_related_entity(
                iv_relation_name = iv_relation_name
                iv_mode          = iv_mode ).

endmethod.


method GET_RENDER_CELL.

  render_cell = me->hier-render_cell.

endmethod.


method GET_RESOLVER.
  clear RR_RESOLVER.
  data(LR_TREE_SERVICE) = GET_TREE_SRV( ).
  if LR_TREE_SERVICE is bound and LR_TREE_SERVICE->TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    RR_RESOLVER = LR_TREE_SERVICE->TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_RESOLVER( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_ROOT.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_ROOT
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method get_root_node.

  data:
    parent_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  root_node = me.

  while root_node is bound.
    parent_node = root_node->get_parent_node( ).
    if parent_node is bound.
      root_node = parent_node.
    else.
      exit.
    endif.
  endwhile.

endmethod.


method GET_TRANSACTION.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->GET_TRANSACTION
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_SRV.
  RR_TREE_SERVICE = TREE_SRV.
endmethod.


method get_ui_col_index.

  rv_ui_col_index = me->ui_col_index.

endmethod.


method get_ui_row_index.

  rv_ui_row_index = me->ui_row_index.

endmethod.


method GET_VALUE_BY_PATH.
  data:
*    lt_value     type table of string,
    LV_VALUE       type STRING,
    LV_LEFT        type STRING,
    LV_RIGHT       type STRING,
    LV_RESULT      type STRING,
    LV_ALT_PRES_ID type CRMT_PRES_ID.

  check IV_PATH is not initial.
  assign RV_RESULT to field-symbol(<VALUE>).
  <VALUE> = IV_PATH.
* check for extended value path
  if line_exists( IT_VALUES[ NAME = IV_PATH ] ).
    <VALUE> = IT_VALUES[ NAME = IV_PATH ]-VALUE.
  elseif IV_ATTR_NAME <> '~FROM_METHOD~' and COUNT( VAL = <VALUE> REGEX = |.*\\(.*\\)| CASE = ABAP_FALSE ) = 1.
    <VALUE> = GET_VALUE_FROM_METHOD( IV_PATH = <VALUE>  IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME IT_VALUES = IT_VALUES ).
  elseif <VALUE> cs '@/' or <VALUE> cs '@OTR/' or <VALUE> cs '@TEXT/' or <VALUE> cs '@BRF/' or <VALUE> cs '@#'.
    LV_VALUE = <VALUE>.

    while LV_VALUE cs '@'.

      split LV_VALUE at '@' into LV_LEFT LV_RIGHT.

      if LV_RIGHT cs '@'.

        split LV_RIGHT at '@' into LV_VALUE LV_RIGHT.

        LV_VALUE = ME->GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE_INTERNAL( IV_VALUE = LV_VALUE  IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).

      else.

*       parsing error? (open @ without closing @)
        LV_VALUE = ME->GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE_INTERNAL( IV_VALUE = LV_RIGHT   IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
        clear LV_RIGHT.

      endif.

      concatenate LV_RESULT LV_LEFT LV_VALUE into LV_RESULT respecting blanks.

      LV_VALUE = LV_RIGHT.

    endwhile.

    if LV_VALUE is not initial.
      concatenate LV_RESULT LV_VALUE into LV_RESULT respecting blanks.
    endif.

    <VALUE> = LV_RESULT.
  else.
    data: LR_INCOMPLETE type ref to DATA,
          LR_GUID       type ref to DATA,
          LR_PACKAGE    type ref to DATA,
          LV_TXT        type J_TXT30,
          LV_ISUITEM    type CHECKBOX.
    field-symbols: <FS_INCOMP> type CHECKBOX,
                   <FS_GUID>   type CRMT_OBJECT_GUID,
                   <FS_PACK>   type CHECKBOX.
    if ( ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY->GET_NAME( ) = IF_CRM_IU_BOL_CON=>CO_ORDER_ITEM_ENTITY_NAME ) and
      <VALUE> = '//ISUCONTRACT_ID'.
      LV_ISUITEM = 'X'.
    endif.

    <VALUE> = ME->GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE_INTERNAL( IV_VALUE = <VALUE>  IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).

    if <VALUE> is initial and LV_ISUITEM = 'X'.
      LR_INCOMPLETE = ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY->IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY( 'IS_INCOMPLETE' ).
      LR_GUID       = ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY->IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY( 'GUID' ).
      LR_PACKAGE    = ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY->IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY( 'IS_PACKAGE' ).
      assign LR_INCOMPLETE->* to <FS_INCOMP>.
      assign LR_GUID->* to <FS_GUID>.
      assign LR_PACKAGE->* to <FS_PACK>.
      if <FS_INCOMP> = 'X' and <FS_PACK> = ' '.
*        lv_txt = cl_crm_isu_order_info_su=>get_status_text(
*                   iv_item_type = ' '
*                   iv_status = 'I2417' ).
        call method CL_CRM_ISU_ORDER_INFO_SU=>GET_REL_STATUS
          exporting
            IV_GUID        = <FS_GUID>
          importing
            EV_STATUS_TEXT = LV_TXT.
        <VALUE> = LV_TXT(10).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

  condense <VALUE>.

endmethod.


method GET_VALUE_FROM_METHOD.
  check IV_PATH is not initial.
  assign RV_RESULT to field-symbol(<VALUE>).
  <VALUE> = IV_PATH.
  try .
      if CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
        call method ('CL_CRMS4_IU_MISC')=>('GET_VALUE_FROM_METHOD')
          exporting
            IR_BOL_ENTITY    = WRAPPED_ENTITY
            IV_PATH          = IV_PATH
            IV_ATTR_NAME     = IV_ATTR_NAME
            IT_VALUES        = IT_VALUES
            IR_BOL_TREE_NODE = ME
          receiving
            RV_RESULT        = RV_RESULT.
      endif.
    catch CX_ROOT.
  endtry.
  condense <VALUE>.
endmethod.


method get_visible_parent_node.

  if me->parent_node is bound and me->parent_node->is_hidden( ) <> abap_false.
    parent_node = me->parent_node->get_visible_parent_node( ).
  else.
    parent_node = me->parent_node.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_WRAPPED_ENTITY.

  WRAPPED_ENTITY = me->WRAPPED_ENTITY.

endmethod.


method has_children.

  try.
      rv_result = boolc( me->is_leaf = abap_false and me->get_child_nodes( )->size( ) > 0 ).
    catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY.
* delegate non-internal column names directly to the wrapped entity
  if ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY is bound and
     ( IV_ATTR_NAME(3) <> 'COL' or IV_ATTR_NAME+3(1) na '_1234567890' ).
    try.
        RV_RESULT = ME->WRAPPED_ENTITY->IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
        if RV_RESULT is bound.
          return.
        endif.
      catch CX_CRM_CIC_PARAMETER_ERROR.
    endtry.
  endif.

  data: LV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP,
        LR_PROPERTY  type ref to DATA.

  field-symbols: <VALUE>  type ANY,
                 <RESULT> type ANY.

  if IV_ATTR_NAME cs '_EDIT'. " or IV_ATTR_NAME cs '_IMG'.
    RV_RESULT = ME->GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  else.
    "COL_<COL_INDEX>[_<TYPE>]
    "TYPE: SPACE = Text; IMG = Icon; IMG_TOOLTIP = Tooltip
    data:
      LV_COL_FORMAT type STRING,
      LV_TYPE       type STRING value 'TEXT'.
    LV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME.
    if LV_ATTR_NAME(3) = 'COL' and LV_ATTR_NAME+3(1) <> '_'. " not CL_ABAP_MATCHER=>MATCHES( PATTERN = |COL_.*| TEXT = LV_ATTR_NAME IGNORE_CASE = ABAP_TRUE ).
      replace 'COL' with 'COL_' into LV_ATTR_NAME.
    endif.
    if LV_ATTR_NAME cp 'COL_*_IMG'."CL_ABAP_MATCHER=>MATCHES( PATTERN = |COL_[0-9]*_IMG| TEXT = LV_ATTR_NAME IGNORE_CASE = ABAP_TRUE ).
      LV_TYPE = 'ICON'.
    elseif LV_ATTR_NAME cp 'COL_*_IMG_TOOLTIP'. "CL_ABAP_MATCHER=>MATCHES( PATTERN = |COL_[0-9]*_IMG_TOOLTIP| TEXT = LV_ATTR_NAME IGNORE_CASE = ABAP_TRUE ).
      LV_TYPE = 'TOOLTIP'.
    endif.
    data(LS_PRES_COL) = GET_PRES_COL_4_NAME( IV_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
    case LV_TYPE.
      when 'ICON'.
        LV_COL_FORMAT = LS_PRES_COL-COL_ICON_CALC.
        if LV_COL_FORMAT is initial.
          LV_COL_FORMAT = |&1|.
        endif.
      when 'TOOLTIP'.
        LV_COL_FORMAT = LS_PRES_COL-COL_TOOLTIP.
        if LV_COL_FORMAT is initial.
          LV_COL_FORMAT = |&1|.
        endif.
*        replace '_IMG_TOOLTIP' with '' into LV_ATTR_NAME.
      when others.
        LV_COL_FORMAT = LS_PRES_COL-COL_FORMAT.
        if LV_COL_FORMAT is initial.
          LV_COL_FORMAT = |&1 &2 &3|.
        endif.
    endcase.
    create data LR_PROPERTY type STRING.
    assign LR_PROPERTY->* to <RESULT>.
    RV_RESULT = ref #( <RESULT> ).
    data: LV_VALUE type STRING.
    data: LT_VALUES type CRMT_NAME_VALUE_PAIR_TAB.
    data(LR_A) = GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE( |{ LV_ATTR_NAME }| ).
    assign LR_A->* to field-symbol(<LV_A>).
    data(LR_B) = GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE( |{ LV_ATTR_NAME }A| ).
    assign LR_B->* to field-symbol(<LV_B>).
    data(LR_C) = GET_PROPERTY_SINGLE( |{ LV_ATTR_NAME }B| ).
    assign LR_C->* to field-symbol(<LV_C>).
    LT_VALUES = value #( ( NAME = '&1' VALUE = <LV_A> ) ( NAME = '&2' VALUE = <LV_B> ) ( NAME = '&3' VALUE = <LV_C> ) ).
*    split LV_COL_FORMAT at SPACE into table data(LT_PARTS).
    data(LT_PARTS) = SPLIT_AT_AND_NOTE_BRACKET( IV_TEXT = LV_COL_FORMAT ).
    loop at LT_PARTS into data(LV_PART).
      case LV_PART.
        when '&1'.
          LV_VALUE = <LV_A>.
        when '&2'.
          LV_VALUE = <LV_B>.
        when '&3'.
          LV_VALUE = <LV_C>.
        when others.
          LV_VALUE = GET_VALUE_BY_PATH( IV_PATH = LV_PART IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME IT_VALUES = LT_VALUES ).
      endcase.
      <RESULT> = |{ <RESULT> } { LV_VALUE }|.
    endloop.
    condense <RESULT>.
    if LV_TYPE = 'TEXT' and LS_PRES_COL-COL_PATH_IF_EMPTY is not initial and <RESULT> is initial.
      <RESULT> = GET_VALUE_BY_PATH( IV_PATH = LS_PRES_COL-COL_PATH_IF_EMPTY IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
    endif.
  endif.

  if RV_RESULT is not bound.
    create data RV_RESULT type STRING.
  endif.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING.

  data: LV_PROPERTY_REF type ref to DATA.
  field-symbols: <PROPERTY> type any.

  LV_PROPERTY_REF = GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  assign LV_PROPERTY_REF->* to <PROPERTY>.
  if SY-SUBRC = 0.
    CONVERT_TO_STRING( exporting IV_VALUE  = <PROPERTY>
                       importing EV_RESULT = RV_RESULT ).
  else.
    data: LV_STR type STRING.
    LV_STR = IV_ATTR_NAME.
    raise exception type CX_CRM_CIC_PARAMETER_ERROR
      exporting
        CLASS = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE'
        METH  = 'GET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING'
        VALUE = LV_STR.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE.
  data: LV_PROPERTY_REF type ref to DATA.
  field-symbols: <PROPERTY> type any.

  LV_PROPERTY_REF = GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  assign LV_PROPERTY_REF->* to <PROPERTY>.
  if SY-SUBRC = 0.
    EV_RESULT = <PROPERTY>.
  else.
    data: LV_STR type STRING.
    LV_STR = IV_ATTR_NAME.
    raise exception type CX_CRM_CIC_PARAMETER_ERROR
      exporting
        CLASS = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE'
        METH  = 'GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE'
        VALUE = LV_STR.
  endif.
endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_property_access~is_property_readonly.

  data:

  comp    type name_komp,
  path1   type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_path,
  path2   type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_path,
  pathtab type table of crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_path,
  index   type sytabix,
  targets type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
  target  type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
  entity  type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.


  try.
      path1 = me->get_mapped_pres_entry( iv_attr_name ).
    catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
      try.
          rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->IS_PROPERTY_READONLY( iv_attr_name ).
        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
          rv_result = abap_true.
          return.
      endtry.
  endtry.

  try.

      shift path1 left deleting leading '/'.                "#EC NOTEXT

      if path1 ns '/'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        comp = path1.
        rv_result = me->wrapped_entity->is_property_readonly( comp ).
      else.
        split path1 at '/' into table pathtab.              "#EC NOTEXT
        index =  lines( pathtab ).
        read table pathtab into comp index index.
        delete pathtab index index.
        loop at pathtab into path1.
          if path2 is initial.
            path2 = path1.
          else.
            concatenate path2 path1 into path2 separated by '/'."#EC NOTEXT
          endif.
        endloop.
        targets = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_xpath_related_entities( source = me->wrapped_entity  path = path2 ).
        entity ?= targets->get_first( ).
        rv_result = entity->is_property_readonly( comp ).
      endif.

    catch cx_root.
      rv_result = abap_true.
  endtry.








endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_property_access~set_property.

  types: begin of ty_xpath,
          element(100),
         end   of ty_xpath,
         ty_xpath_tab type table of ty_xpath initial size 0.

  data: lv_attr_name     type name_komp,
        lv_entry         type string,
        lt_xpath         type ty_xpath_tab,
        lv_num_lines     type i,
        lv_last_relation type i,
        lv_relname       type crmt_relation_name,
        lv_entity1       type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
        lv_entity2       type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.


  field-symbols: <xpath> type ty_xpath.



  data: attr_changed type abap_bool,
        cust_exit    type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh,
        lt_value     type table of string,
        lv_value     type string,
        lv_left      type string,
        lv_right     type string,
        lv_result    type string.



* conditional breakpoint
* // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
* // or
* // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
  assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
         subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Set Attribute'
         condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                     iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_set_attr
                     iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                     iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id
                     iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                     iv_col_id      = me->get_pres_col_4_name( iv_attr_name )-col_id
                     iv_row_index   = me->ui_row_index
                     iv_col_index   = me->ui_col_index
                     iv_attr_name   = iv_attr_name ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT


  check not iv_attr_name is initial.

  if me->hier-change_pres = abap_true and not me->hier-class is initial.
*   customer exit!
    try.

        cust_exit ?= me->tree_srv->get_impl_class_instance( me->hier-class ).
        if cust_exit is bound.

*         conditional breakpoint
*         // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*         // or
*         // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
          assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                 subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Set Attribute)'
                 condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                             iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_setattr
                             iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                             iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id
                             iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                             iv_col_id      = me->get_pres_col_4_name( iv_attr_name )-col_id
                             iv_row_index   = me->ui_row_index
                             iv_col_index   = me->ui_col_index
                             iv_attr_name   = iv_attr_name ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

          cust_exit->set_attribute(
            exporting
              node         = me
              entity       = me->wrapped_entity
              attr_name    = substring_before( val = iv_attr_name  sub = |_EDIT| )
              hier         = me->hier
              expanded     = me->expanded
              value        = iv_value
            receiving
              attr_changed = attr_changed ).

        endif.

       catch cx_sy_move_cast_error cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method.
*         method not implemented.
       data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
       catch cx_root into lx_root.
*        conditional breakpoint
*        // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*        // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*        // or
*        // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*        // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
         assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                            iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                            iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

         cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
           method = 'SET_ATTRIBUTE' handler = cust_exit
           prof_id = me->get_prof_id( ) node_id = me->get_node_id( )
           exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

      endtry.
  endif.


* no customer value -> proceed
  check attr_changed = abap_false.



* get attribute name from presentation customizing:

  try.
      lv_entry = me->get_mapped_pres_entry( iv_attr_name ).
    catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
*     no presentation field -> delegate request to wrapped entity
      try.
          me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~set_property( iv_attr_name = iv_attr_name iv_value = iv_value ).
        catch cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.

      endtry.
      return.
  endtry.


  split lv_entry at '/' into table lt_xpath.
  delete lt_xpath where element is initial.
  describe table lt_xpath lines lv_num_lines.

  case lv_num_lines.
    when 0.
    when 1.
      read table lt_xpath index 1 assigning <xpath>.
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        translate <xpath>-element to upper case.
        lv_attr_name = <xpath>-element.
        try.
            me->wrapped_entity->if_bol_bo_property_access~set_property( iv_attr_name = lv_attr_name
                                                                        iv_value     = iv_value ).
          catch cx_crm_genil_model_error.
        endtry.
      endif.
    when others.
      lv_last_relation = lv_num_lines - 1.
      lv_entity1 = me->wrapped_entity.
      loop at lt_xpath assigning <xpath> from 1 to lv_last_relation.
        lv_relname = <xpath>-element.
        try.
            if ( lv_relname = 'root' ). "EC NOTEXT
              lv_entity2 = lv_entity1->get_root( ).
            else.
              lv_entity2 = lv_entity1->get_related_entity( lv_relname ).
            endif.
          catch cx_crm_genil_model_error.
            clear lv_entity1.
            exit.
        endtry.
        lv_entity1 = lv_entity2.
      endloop.
      read table lt_xpath index lv_num_lines assigning <xpath>.

      if sy-subrc = 0 and lv_entity1 is bound.
        translate <xpath>-element to upper case.
        lv_attr_name = <xpath>-element.
        try.
            lv_entity1->if_bol_bo_property_access~set_property( iv_attr_name = lv_attr_name
                                                                        iv_value     = iv_value ).
          catch cx_crm_genil_model_error.
        endtry.
      endif.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~SET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING.
  data: LV_PROPERTY_REF type ref to DATA,
        LV_DATA_REF     type ref to DATA.
  field-symbols: <OLD_VALUE> type any,
                 <NEW_VALUE> type any.

* get old value
  LV_PROPERTY_REF = GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  assign LV_PROPERTY_REF->* to <OLD_VALUE>.

* create data element for new value
  create data LV_DATA_REF like <OLD_VALUE>.
  assign LV_DATA_REF->* to <NEW_VALUE>.

  CONVERT_FROM_STRING( exporting IV_STRING = IV_VALUE
                       importing EV_VALUE  = <NEW_VALUE> ).

  SET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                IV_VALUE     = <NEW_VALUE> ).

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~get_value.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    me->data_container->get_value(
      exporting
        iv_name  = iv_name
      importing
        ev_value = ev_value ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~get_value_as_string.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    rv_value = me->data_container->get_value_as_string( iv_name ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~get_value_list.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    rt_value = me->data_container->get_value_list( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~get_value_ref.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    rr_value_ref = me->data_container->get_value_ref( iv_name ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~reset.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    me->data_container->reset( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~set_value.

  if me->data_container is not bound.
    me->data_container = cl_crm_iu_nvp_data_container=>get_instance( ).
  endif.

  if me->data_container is bound.
    me->data_container->set_value(
      iv_name  = iv_name
      iv_value = iv_value ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method invalidate_children.

  data:
    node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  me->children_valid = abap_false.

  if me->children is bound.
    node ?= me->children->get_first( ).
    while node is bound.
      node->invalidate_children( ).
      node ?= me->children->get_next( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_changeable.

  rv_changeable = me->wrapped_entity->is_changeable( ).

endmethod.


method is_children_filter_disabled.

  result = me->children_filter_disabled.

endmethod.


method is_entity_recursive.

  if me->hier-node_id = is_hier-node_id and me->wrapped_entity = ir_ent.
    result = abap_true.
  elseif parent_node is bound.
    result = parent_node->is_entity_recursive( ir_ent = ir_ent is_hier = is_hier ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_expanded.

  me->check_initially_expanded( iv_num_roots ).

  result = me->expanded.

endmethod.


method is_filter_node.

* undefined means no filter at all
  rv_is_filter_node = abap_undefined.

  if me->tree_srv is bound and me->tree_srv->filter is bound and me->tree_srv->filter->is_active( ) = abap_true.
    rv_is_filter_node = me->tree_srv->filter->is_filter_node( me ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_focus.

  result = me->focus.

endmethod.


method is_folder.

  if me->hier-folder = abap_true.
    result = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_hidden.

  result = me->hier-hidden.

  if static_check = abap_true.
    return.
  endif.

  if result = abap_false and me->hidden_status > 0.
    if me->hidden_including_sub_nodes = abap_true.
      result = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
    else.
      result = abap_true.
    endif.
    return.
  endif.

  if result = abap_false.
    case me->is_hidden_by_custom_exit( ).
      when abap_true.
        result = abap_true.
      when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
        result = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
    endcase.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_hidden_by_custom_exit.

  data: cust_exit        type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree.

* initial result is ABAP_UNDEFINED, only if custom exit is called the value will change
  result = abap_undefined.

  if me->hier-change_hidden = abap_true.
*   now with the flag only the result is FALSE as default
    result = abap_false.
*   now let the class decide
    if me->hier-class is not initial.
      cust_exit = me->tree_srv->get_impl_class_instance( me->hier-class ).
      if cust_exit is bound.
*       customer exit!

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Check if node is hidden)'
               condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_hidden
                           iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                           iv_pres_id     = me->hier-pres_id
                           iv_node_id     = me->hier-node_id
                           iv_row_index   = me->ui_row_index ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        try.
            result = to_upper( cust_exit->is_hidden(
                                 entity = me->wrapped_entity
                                 hier   = me->hier
                                 io_node_entity = me ) ).
          data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
          catch cx_root into lx_root.

*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                   condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_prof_id     = me->hier-prof_id
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method = 'IS_HIDDEN' handler = cust_exit
              prof_id = me->get_prof_id( ) node_id = me->get_node_id( )
              exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

        endtry.
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_initial_expand_suppressed.

  if me->get_max_children( ) = no_expand or me->get_max_siblings( ) = no_expand.
    rv_initial_expand_suppressed = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IS_SEND_ACTIVE.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->IS_SEND_ACTIVE
  RECEIVING
    RV_RESULT = rv_result
    .
endmethod.


method is_virtual_root.

  result = me->virtual_root.

endmethod.


method IS_VISIBLE.

  if IS_HIDDEN( ).
    return.
  endif.

  " get collecion with all visible [hidden = false] parent nodes
  data(LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES) = GET_PARENT_NODES( IV_ONLY_VISIBLE = ABAP_TRUE ).

  data(LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE) = LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES->GET_LAST_NODE( ).
  " not bound: no visible parent nodes exists -> means that the node in any case is visible
  " bound: are all visible parent nodes expanded?
  while LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE is bound.
    if not LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE->IS_EXPANDED( ).
      " one of our visible parent nodes is not expanded -> node is invisible -> we are done here
      return.
    endif.
    LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE = LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES->GET_PREVIOUS_NODE( ).
  endwhile.

  " Hooray the node is visible
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.

endmethod.


method LOCK.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->LOCK
  EXPORTING
    IV_REREAD  = iv_reread
  RECEIVING
    RV_SUCCESS = rv_success
    .
endmethod.


method MAKE_VISIBLE.

  RV_RESULT = IS_VISIBLE( ).

  " node is already visible
  if RV_RESULT is not initial.
    return.
  endif.

  " get collecion with all visible [hidden = false] parent nodes
  data(LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES) = GET_PARENT_NODES( IV_ONLY_VISIBLE = ABAP_TRUE ).

  " expand all visible parent nodes beginning from the root node
  data(LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE) = LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES->GET_LAST_NODE( ).
  while LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE is bound.
    if not LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE->IS_EXPANDED( ).
      LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE->EXPAND( ).
    endif.
    LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODE = LR_VISIBLE_PARENT_NODES->GET_PREVIOUS_NODE( ).
  endwhile.

  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( IS_VISIBLE( ) ).

endmethod.


method on_bol_reset_finished.
  me->children_valid = abap_false.

  set handler me->on_bol_reset_finished for cl_crm_bol_entity=>core activation abap_false.

  me->wrapped_entity = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity(
                         name = me->restore_entity_name
                         id   = me->restore_entity_key ).
  if me->wrapped_entity is bound.
    set handler me->on_wrapped_entity_deleted for me->wrapped_entity activation abap_true.
*   update instance table with new reference wrapped entity
    data inst like line of instances.
    data inst_tab like table of inst.
    loop at instances into inst where node = me and entity <> me->wrapped_entity. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      delete table instances
        with table key entity      = inst-entity
                       hier        = inst-hier
                       parent_node = inst-parent_node
                       caller_id   = inst-caller_id.
      inst-entity = me->wrapped_entity.
      append inst to inst_tab.
    endloop.
    loop at inst_tab into inst.
      insert inst into table instances.
    endloop.
  else.
    raise event deleted.
  endif.

endmethod.


method on_bol_reset_triggered.
  field-symbols: <inst> type ty_instance.

  loop at instances assigning <inst>.                   "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <inst>-node->children_valid = abap_false.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method on_tree_node_entity_deleted.

  set handler me->on_tree_node_entity_deleted for me activation abap_false.

  delete instances where node = me.                     "#EC CI_HASHSEQ

endmethod.


method on_wrapped_entity_deleted.

  field-symbols:
    <ref_col> type ty_reset_survival_ref_col.


* while BOL reset try to restore the wrapped entity after BOL reset finished (only in non IC mode)
  if me->reset_survival_ref_col_tab is not initial and cl_crm_bol_entity=>core->reset_running = abap_true.
    loop at me->reset_survival_ref_col_tab assigning <ref_col>.
      if <ref_col>-ref is bound and <ref_col>-ref->get( ) is bound.
        try.
            me->restore_entity_name = me->wrapped_entity->get_name( ).
            me->restore_entity_key  = me->wrapped_entity->get_key( ).
          catch cx_root.                                        "#EC NEEDED
            clear me->restore_entity_name.
            clear me->restore_entity_key.
        endtry.
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.
  endif.

  if me->restore_entity_name is initial or me->restore_entity_key is initial.
    clear me->restore_entity_name.
    clear me->restore_entity_key.
    super->on_wrapped_entity_deleted( ).
*   invalidate parent node's children since they will have to be reread after BOL reset
    if me->parent_node is bound.
      me->parent_node->children_valid = abap_false.
    endif.
  else.
    set handler me->on_bol_reset_finished for cl_crm_bol_entity=>core activation abap_true.
    set handler me->on_wrapped_entity_deleted for me->wrapped_entity activation abap_false.
    clear me->wrapped_entity.
  endif.

endmethod.


method publish_deletion.

  raise event deleted.

endmethod.


method remove_from_parent_on_filtered.

  check me->parent_node is bound.

* remove node from parent
  me->parent_node->children->remove( me ).

* if parent now has no further children -> remove it also
  if me->parent_node->children->size( ) = 0.
    me->parent_node->remove_from_parent_on_filtered( ).
  endif.

  delete table me->tree_srv->pending_filters with table key table_line = me->get_key( ).

endmethod.


method REREAD.
CALL METHOD me->wrapped_entity->REREAD
    .
endmethod.


method set_children_filtered.

  if me->children_filtered = abap_false and filtered <> abap_false.
    insert me->get_key( ) into table me->tree_srv->pending_filters.
  elseif me->children_filtered <> abap_false and filtered = abap_false.
    delete table me->tree_srv->pending_filters with table key table_line = me->get_key( ).
  endif.

  me->children_filtered = filtered.

endmethod.


method set_expanded.

  me->expanded = active.

* after manual setting of expander, the initial check must not be executed again
  me->initial_expanding_done = abap_true.

endmethod.


method set_focus.

  data:
    bo  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


  check me->focus <> active.

  me->focus = active.

* focus has to be unique below one visible parent
  check active = abap_true.

  bo = me->get_visible_parent_node( ).
  check bo is bound.

  col = bo->get_child_nodes( ).
  check col is bound.

  bo ?= col->get_first( ).
  while bo is bound.
    if bo <> me.
      bo->set_focus( abap_false ).
    endif.
    bo ?= col->get_next( ).
  endwhile.

endmethod.


method set_reset_survival_mode.

  data:
    ref_col type ty_reset_survival_ref_col.


  check ir_ref_col is bound.

  call 'OBJMGR_GET_INFO'
    id 'OPNAME' field 'GET_OBJID'
