    id 'OBJ'    field ir_ref_col
    id 'OBJID'  field ref_col-id.                         "#EC CI_CCALL

  if iv_activation = abap_true.
    create object ref_col-ref exporting oref = ir_ref_col.
    insert ref_col into table me->reset_survival_ref_col_tab.
    if sy-subrc <> 0.
      modify table me->reset_survival_ref_col_tab from ref_col.
    endif.
  else.
    delete table me->reset_survival_ref_col_tab with table key id = ref_col-id.
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_ui_col_index.

  me->ui_col_index = iv_ui_col_index.

endmethod.


method set_ui_row_index.

  me->ui_row_index = iv_ui_row_index.

endmethod.


method set_virtual_root.

  data:
    bo          type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    children    type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    my_children type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    inc         type i,
    root_path   type hashed table of ref to if_bol_bo_property_access with unique default key.


  check me->virtual_root <> active.

  me->virtual_root = active.

  if active = abap_true.
    inc = 1.
  else.
    inc = -1.
  endif.

  add inc to me->tree_srv->virtual_root_count.

* select all nodes except my children and me
  data parent_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
  data root_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.
  root_node = me.
  while root_node is bound.
    parent_node = root_node->get_parent_node( ).
    if parent_node is bound.
      root_node = parent_node.
      insert parent_node into table root_path.
    else.
      exit.
    endif.
  endwhile.

  bo = root_node.

  check bo is bound.
  add inc to bo->hidden_status.
  result = abap_true.
  create object children type cl_crm_bol_unique_bo_col.
  get_all_child_nodes_int(
    exception   = me
    child_nodes = children
    caller_id   = me->tree_srv->caller_id ).
  bo ?= children->get_first( ).
  while bo is bound.
    add inc to bo->hidden_status.
*   all nodes which are not part of the root path can be hidden including their sub nodes
    if bo->hidden_status > 0.
      read table root_path transporting no fields with table key table_line = bo.
      if sy-subrc <> 0.
        bo->hidden_including_sub_nodes = abap_true.
      else.
        bo->hidden_including_sub_nodes = abap_false.
      endif.
    else.
      bo->hidden_including_sub_nodes = abap_false.
    endif.
    bo ?= children->get_next( ).
  endwhile.

* expand node automatically if set as virtual root
  if active = abap_true.
    if me->expanded = abap_false.
*     store info that node was expanded by virtual root to be able to collapse it automatically after reset
      me->expanded_for_virtual_root = abap_true.
      me->expanded = abap_true.
    endif.
  elseif me->expanded_for_virtual_root = abap_true.
*   if node was collapsed before it was automaticall expanded on virtual root
    me->expanded = abap_false.
    me->expanded_for_virtual_root = abap_false.
  endif.

endmethod.


method SKIN_CHANGED.

  " adjust the filenames of the icons
  loop at instances assigning FIELD-SYMBOL(<inst>).                   "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <inst>-node->pres_cols = <inst>-node->tree_srv->get_pres_columns( <inst>-node->hier-pres_id ).
  endloop.

endmethod.


method SPLIT_AT_AND_NOTE_BRACKET.
  if IV_TEXT ns '('.
    split IV_TEXT at IV_SEPARATORS into table RT_PARTS.
    return.
  endif.
  data(LV_BRACKET_COUNT) = 0.
  data(LV_TEXTLENGTH) = STRLEN( IV_TEXT ).
  data(LV_POSITION) = 0.
  data(LV_PARAM) = ||.
  data(LV_SEPS) = cond STRING( when IV_SEPARATORS is initial then ` ` else IV_SEPARATORS ) && '('.
  data(LV_SEARCH_OFF) = LV_POSITION.
  while LV_POSITION < LV_TEXTLENGTH.
    data(LV_I) = FIND_ANY_OF( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = LV_SEPS OFF = LV_SEARCH_OFF ).
    if LV_I >= 0.
      if IV_TEXT+LV_I(1) = '('.
        LV_BRACKET_COUNT = LV_BRACKET_COUNT + 1.
        while LV_BRACKET_COUNT > 0.
          LV_I = FIND_ANY_OF( VAL = IV_TEXT SUB = '()' OFF = LV_I + 1 ).
          if LV_I >= 0.
            if IV_TEXT+LV_I(1) = '('.
              LV_BRACKET_COUNT = LV_BRACKET_COUNT + 1.
            else.
              LV_BRACKET_COUNT = LV_BRACKET_COUNT - 1.
            endif.
          else.
            LV_PARAM = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_TEXT OFF = LV_POSITION ).
            LV_POSITION = LV_TEXTLENGTH.
            insert LV_PARAM into table RT_PARTS.
            exit.
          endif.
        endwhile.
        if LV_BRACKET_COUNT = 0.
          "LV_PARAM = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_TEXT OFF = LV_POSITION LEN = LV_I - LV_POSITION + 1 ).
          LV_SEARCH_OFF = LV_I + 1.
        endif.
      else.
        LV_PARAM = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_TEXT OFF = LV_POSITION LEN = LV_I - LV_POSITION ).
        LV_POSITION = LV_I + 1.
        LV_SEARCH_OFF = LV_POSITION.
        insert LV_PARAM into table RT_PARTS.
      endif.
    else.
      LV_PARAM = SUBSTRING( VAL = IV_TEXT OFF = LV_POSITION ).
      LV_POSITION = LV_TEXTLENGTH.
      insert LV_PARAM into table RT_PARTS.
    endif.
  endwhile.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .

  events FOCUS_CHANGED
    exporting
      value(FOCUS_BO) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .

  class-methods CHECK_COL_CONTENT_DIFFERS
    importing
      !IO_COL_A type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
      !IO_COL_B type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
    returning
      value(RV_CONTENT_DIFFERS) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods INVALIDATE_NODE_CHILDREN .
  methods CONSTRUCTOR .
  methods GET_AS_BO_COLLECTION
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods GET_CURRENT_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_FIRST_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_LAST_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_NEXT_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_PREVIOUS_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods GET_STANDARD_COPY
    returning
      value(RO_COPY) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  class-methods CONTAINS_FILTER_NODES
    importing
      !IO_NODE_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
    returning
      value(RV_CONTAINS_FILTER_NODES) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods CONTAINS_HIDDEN_NODES
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods ADD_NODES_COLLECTION
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .

  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD_COLLECTION
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~CLEAR
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~FIND
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~GET_COPY
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~INSERT
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~SET_RESET_SURVIVAL_MODE
    redefinition .
  methods IF_BOL_BO_COL~SORT
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  types:
    begin of GTYPE_INDEX_LINE,
         INDEX     type SYINDEX.
include type CRMT_BOL_COL_ENTRY as OBJECT.
types:   C_VALUE   type STRING,
         DATE      type D,
         INTEGER   type I,
         TIME      type T,
         PACKED8_0 type P length 8 decimals 0,
         PACKED8_2 type P length 8 decimals 2,
         FLOAT     type F,
       end of GTYPE_INDEX_LINE .
  types:
    GTYPE_INDEX_TAB type standard table of GTYPE_INDEX_LINE with non-unique default key .
  types:
    begin of TY_MAP,
      node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
      name type crmt_ext_obj_name,
      id type crmt_genil_object_id,
    end of ty_map .
  types:
    TY_MAP_TAB type standard table of ty_map with non-unique default key .

  data STANDARD_COPY_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL .
  data SORT_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL .
  data RESET_SURVIVAL_MODE type ABAP_BOOL .
  data AUTO_REMOVE type ABAP_BOOL .
  data MAP_TAB type TY_MAP_TAB .

  methods ON_FOCUS_CHANGED
    for event FOCUS_CHANGED of IF_BOL_BO_COL
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .
  methods QUICKSORT
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !IV_SORT_ORDER type CHAR1
      !IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION type ABAP_BOOL
      !IV_SORT_CALLBACK type ref to IF_BOL_COL_SORTING
    changing
      !CT_SORT_TAB type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB .
  class-methods GET_RELATED_OBJECT
    importing
      !IV_SOURCE type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS
      !IT_PATH type CRMT_RELATION_NAME_TAB
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS .
  methods SORT_INTERNAL
    importing
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !IV_SORT_ORDER type CHAR1
      !IV_STABLE type ABAP_BOOL
      !IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION type ABAP_BOOL
      !IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT type STRING
    changing
      !CT_SORT_TAB type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB .
  methods PARTITION
    importing
      !IV_PIVOT type DATA
      !IV_ATTR_NAME type NAME_KOMP
      !IV_SORT_ORDER type CHAR1
      !IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION type ABAP_BOOL
      !IV_SORT_CALLBACK type ref to IF_BOL_COL_SORTING
      !IT_SORT_TAB type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB
    exporting
      !ET_LOW type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB
      !ET_HIGH type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB .

  methods GET_NEW_INSTANCE
    redefinition .
  methods ON_ENTITY_DELETED
    redefinition .
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL IMPLEMENTATION.


method ADD_NODES_COLLECTION.
  if IV_COLLECTION is bound and IV_COLLECTION is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL.
    data(LR_NODE_COL) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL( IV_COLLECTION ).
    data(LR_NODE) = LR_NODE_COL->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
    while LR_NODE is bound.
      IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_NODE ).
      LR_NODE = LR_NODE_COL->GET_NEXT_NODE( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.
endmethod.


method check_col_content_differs.

  if io_col_a is not bound or
     io_col_b is not bound or
     io_col_a = io_col_b.
    return.  "nothing to compare or collection identical
  endif.

  try.
      data(lo_col_a) = cast cl_crm_bol_bo_col( io_col_a ).
      data(lo_col_b) = cast cl_crm_bol_bo_col( io_col_b ).
      if lo_col_a->entity_list <> lo_col_b->entity_list.
        if lines( lo_col_a->entity_list ) <> lines( lo_col_b->entity_list ).
          rv_content_differs = abap_true.
        else.
          data(lt_entity_list_b) = lo_col_b->entity_list.
          loop at lo_col_a->entity_list assigning field-symbol(<ls_entity>).
            read table lt_entity_list_b with key bo = <ls_entity>-bo transporting no fields.
            if sy-subrc = 0.
              delete lt_entity_list_b index sy-tabix.
            else.
              rv_content_differs = abap_true.
              return.
            endif.
          endloop.
        endif.
      endif.
    catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method constructor.

  super->constructor( ).

  set handler me->on_focus_changed for me.

  me->if_bol_bo_col~activate_autocleanup( ).

endmethod.


method contains_filter_nodes.

  data:
    lo_tree_node_col type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col,
    lo_col_iterator  type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
    lo_node          type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  if io_node_col is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  try.
      lo_tree_node_col ?= io_node_col.
      loop at lo_tree_node_col->map_tab assigning <map> where node is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
*       if node has further children it cannot be a filter node
        if <map>-node->has_children( ) = abap_true.
          rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_undefined.
          return.
        endif.
        case <map>-node->is_filter_node( ).
          when abap_true.
            rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_true.
            return.
          when abap_undefined.
*           undefined means no filter active
            rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_undefined.
*           theoretically their could be nodes from another tree but we are optimistic
            return.
        endcase.
      endloop.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
      lo_col_iterator = io_node_col->get_iterator( ).
      if lo_col_iterator is bound.
        try.
            lo_node ?= lo_col_iterator->get_first( ).
            while lo_node is bound.
*             if node has further children it cannot be a filter node
              if lo_node->has_children( ) = abap_true.
                rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_undefined.
                return.
              endif.
              case lo_node->is_filter_node( ).
                when abap_true.
                  rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_true.
                  return.
                when abap_undefined.
*                 undefined means no filter active
                  rv_contains_filter_nodes = abap_undefined.
*                 theoretically their could be nodes from another tree but we are optimistic
                  return.
              endcase.
              lo_node ?= lo_col_iterator->get_next( ).
            endwhile.
          catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        endtry.
      endif.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method CONTAINS_HIDDEN_NODES.
  loop at MAP_TAB assigning field-symbol(<MAP>) where NODE is bound.
    if <MAP>-NODE->IS_HIDDEN( ).
      RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.
      return.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_AS_BO_COLLECTION.
  RR_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_CONV=>GET_INSTANCE( IR_COLLECTION = ME )->GET_AS_BO_COLLECTION( ).
endmethod.


method get_current_node.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  read table me->map_tab assigning <map> index me->tabix.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
    rv_result = <map>-node.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_first_node.

  if me->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = 1 ) is bound.
    rv_result = get_current_node( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_last_node.

  if me->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = me->tab_size ) is bound.
    rv_result = get_current_node( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_new_instance.

  if me->standard_copy_active = abap_true.
    create object rv_result type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
  else.
    create object rv_result type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_next_node.

  if me->tabix < me->tab_size and
     me->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = me->tabix + 1 ) is bound.
    rv_result = get_current_node( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_previous_node.

  if me->tabix > 1 and
     me->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = me->tabix - 1 ) is bound.
    rv_result = get_current_node( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_RELATED_OBJECT.
  data: LV_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY.

  if IT_PATH is not initial.
    try.
        LV_ENTITY ?= IV_SOURCE.

        field-symbols: <RELATION> type CRMT_RELATION_NAME.
        loop at IT_PATH assigning <RELATION>.
          LV_ENTITY = LV_ENTITY->GET_RELATED_ENTITY( IV_RELATION_NAME = <RELATION> ).
        endloop.
        RV_RESULT = LV_ENTITY.
      catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
        raise exception type CX_BOL_EXCEPTION.
      catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.                        "#EC NOHANDLER
*       related object does not exist -> ignore
    endtry.
  else.
    RV_RESULT = IV_SOURCE.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_standard_copy.

  me->standard_copy_active = abap_true.

  try.
      ro_copy = me->if_bol_bo_col~get_copy( ).
    catch cx_root.
      clear ro_copy.
  endtry.

  me->standard_copy_active = abap_false.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~add.

  data:
    map type ty_map,
    ent type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.


  try.
      map-node ?= iv_entity.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
      return.
  endtry.

  read table me->map_tab transporting no fields with key node = map-node.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    ent = map-node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
    if ent is bound.
      map-name   = ent->get_name( ).
      map-id     = ent->get_key( ).
      append map to me->map_tab.
      if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
        map-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
          iv_activation = abap_true
          ir_ref_col    = me ).
      endif.
      super->if_bol_bo_col~add(
        iv_entity    = ent
        iv_set_focus = iv_set_focus ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD_COLLECTION.

  data:
    COL           type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL.

  field-symbols:
    <ENTRY> type CRMT_BOL_COL_ENTRY.

  check IV_COLLECTION is bound.
  if IV_COLLECTION is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL.
    ADD_NODES_COLLECTION( IV_COLLECTION = IV_COLLECTION ).
  else.
    COL ?= IV_COLLECTION.
    loop at COL->ENTITY_LIST assigning <ENTRY>.
      if <ENTRY>-BO is bound.
        ME->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( <ENTRY>-BO ).
      endif.
    endloop.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~clear.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  super->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).

* deregister survival mode if necessary
  if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
    loop at me->map_tab assigning <map> where node is bound.
      <map>-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
        iv_activation = abap_false
        ir_ref_col    = me ).
    endloop.
  endif.

  clear me->map_tab.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~find.

  data:
    node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    ent  type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  if iv_index is supplied.
    rv_result = super->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = iv_index ).
  elseif iv_bo is bound.
    try.
        node ?= iv_bo.
        read table me->map_tab transporting no fields with key node = node.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          rv_result = super->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_index = sy-tabix ).
        endif.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        rv_result = super->if_bol_bo_col~find( iv_bo = iv_bo ).
    endtry.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~get_copy.

  data:
    node_col type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.


  rv_result = super->if_bol_bo_col~get_copy( ).

  try.
      node_col ?= rv_result.
      node_col->map_tab             = me->map_tab.
      node_col->auto_remove         = me->auto_remove.
      node_col->reset_survival_mode = me->reset_survival_mode.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
*     we are in standard copy mode -> just return standard copy
  endtry.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~insert.

  data:
    ent type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    map type ty_map.


  try.
      map-node ?= iv_bo.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
      return.
  endtry.

  read table me->map_tab transporting no fields with key node = map-node.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    ent = map-node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
    if ent is bound.
      map-name   = ent->get_name( ).
      map-id     = ent->get_key( ).
      insert map into me->map_tab index iv_index.
      if sy-subrc <> 0.
        raise exception type cx_bol_exception
          exporting
            textid = cx_bol_exception=>coll_index_out_of_range.
      else.
        if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
          map-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
            iv_activation = abap_true
            ir_ref_col    = me ).
        endif.
        super->if_bol_bo_col~insert(
          iv_bo        = ent
          iv_index     = iv_index
          iv_set_focus = iv_set_focus ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~remove.

  data:
    bo_node type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    ent     type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    map     type ty_map.


  if me->auto_remove = abap_true.

    super->if_bol_bo_col~remove( iv_bo ).

  elseif iv_bo is bound.

    try.
        bo_node ?= iv_bo.
        read table me->map_tab transporting no fields with key node = bo_node.
        if sy-subrc = 0.


*  *****************************************************************
*  **  copy from standard coding --> needed for single deletion  ***
*  *****************************************************************

    data: LV_TABIX  type SYTABIX,
          LV_BO     type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
          LV_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY,
          LV_EXC      type ref to CX_BOL_EXCEPTION,
          LV_REMOVED  type ABAP_BOOL,
          LV_FOCUS_BO type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
          ls_entry    type CRMT_BOL_COL_ENTRY.


          lv_tabix = sy-tabix.

          delete map_tab index lv_tabix.

          if ME->PENDING_OPERATIONS_EXIST = ABAP_TRUE.
            ME->FINISH_PENDING_OPERATIONS( ).
          endif.

          LV_REMOVED = ABAP_FALSE.
          LV_FOCUS_BO = ME->if_bol_bo_col~GET_CURRENT( ).

*         Conditional Breakpoint
          assert id CRMUIF_CONDITIONAL_BREAKPOINTS
                 subkey 'BOL Collection - Remove Entity/Business Object'
                 condition CL_COND_BREAKPOINT_MANAGER=>ASSERT2(
                               IV_PROVIDER = CL_CRM_BOL_CORE=>COND_BREAKPOINT_PROVIDER_ID
                               IV_BREAK_EVENT = 'COLLECTION_REMOVE_BO'
                               IV_OBJECT_TO_CHECK = IV_BO
                               ) = ABAP_TRUE.                     "#EC NOTEXT

          read table ME->ENTITY_LIST index lv_tabix into ls_entry.
          if SY-SUBRC = 0.
*           delete entry
            delete ME->ENTITY_LIST index LV_TABIX.
            if SY-SUBRC = 0.
              LV_REMOVED = ABAP_TRUE.
              subtract 1 from ME->TAB_SIZE.
*             correct focus if necessary
              if ME->TABIX > LV_TABIX.
                subtract 1 from ME->TABIX.
              elseif ME->MULTI_SELECT = ABAP_FALSE and ME->TABIX = LV_TABIX.
                if ME->TABIX > 1 or ME->ENTITY_LIST is initial.
*                 focus entity deleted -> set new focus
                  subtract 1 from ME->TABIX.
                else.
*                 deleted focus entity was index 1 -> focus goes to prior second, which is now first
                endif.
              elseif ME->TABIX > ME->TAB_SIZE.
*               can only happen in multi select mode -> keep TABIX in range
                ME->TABIX = ME->TAB_SIZE.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.

          if LV_REMOVED = ABAP_TRUE.
*           publish removal and deregister event handler
            raise event IF_BOL_BO_COL~BO_DELETED exporting BO = ls_entry-bo.
            if ME->IF_BOL_BO_COL~AUTOCLEANUP = ABAP_TRUE.
              try.
                  LV_ENTITY ?= ls_entry-bo.
*                 only deregister if entity instance was last in collection
                  read table me->entity_list transporting no fields with key bo = ls_entry-bo.
                  if sy-subrc <> 0.
                    set handler ON_ENTITY_DELETED for LV_ENTITY activation SPACE.
                  endif.
                catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
              endtry.
            endif.

*           check if focus has changed
            LV_BO = ME->if_bol_bo_col~GET_CURRENT( ).
            if LV_BO ne LV_FOCUS_BO.
              try.
                  raise event IF_BOL_BO_COL~FOCUS_CHANGED exporting FOCUS_BO = LV_BO.
                catch CX_BOL_EXCEPTION into LV_EXC.
                  if LV_EXC->TEXTID = CX_BOL_EXCEPTION=>ENTITY_ALREADY_FREED.
*                   new focus BO is an deleted entity -> clean up
                    lv_bo = me->get_current_node( ).
                    ME->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( LV_BO ).
                  else.
                    raise exception LV_EXC.
                  endif.
              endtry.
            endif.

            if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
              bo_node->set_reset_survival_mode(
                iv_activation = abap_false
                ir_ref_col    = me ).
            endif.

          endif.

        endif.

      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    endtry.

  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~set_reset_survival_mode.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  if me->check_reset_compliance( ) eq abap_true.
    super->if_bol_bo_col~set_reset_survival_mode( iv_activate ).
    me->if_bol_bo_col~activate_autocleanup( ).
*   activate survival mode for tree nodes (only in non IC mode)
    if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_ic_active( ) = abap_false.
      me->reset_survival_mode = iv_activate.
      loop at me->map_tab assigning <map> where node is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
        <map>-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
          iv_activation = me->reset_survival_mode
          ir_ref_col    = me ).
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_col~sort.

*** ADJUSTMENT OF STANDARD LOGIC ***

  data:
    lt_map type ty_map_tab.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  if ME->PENDING_OPERATIONS_EXIST = ABAP_TRUE.
    ME->FINISH_PENDING_OPERATIONS( ).
  endif.

  data: begin of LV_ENTRY,
          bO type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
          SELECTED type CRMT_GENIL_BOOLEAN,
        end of lv_entry,
        LS_INDEX_LINE type GTYPE_INDEX_LINE,
        LT_INDEX      type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB,
        LT_BO         like standard table of lv_entry,
        LV_FOCUS_OBJ  type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS.

  check TAB_SIZE > 1.

* store current focus object
  LV_FOCUS_OBJ = IF_BOL_BO_COL~GET_CURRENT( ).

  try.

*     exchange entity list by tree node list if COL* is requested
      if iv_attr_name cp |COL*|.
        data lt_entity_list like me->entity_list.
        lt_entity_list = me->entity_list.
        field-symbols <ls_entity_list> like line of lt_entity_list.
        loop at me->entity_list assigning <ls_entity_list>.
          field-symbols <ls_map> type ty_map.
          read table me->map_tab assigning <ls_map> index sy-tabix.
          <ls_entity_list>-bo = <ls_map>-node.
        endloop.
      endif.

      if IV_SORT_CALLBACK is bound.
*       build index tab for sorting
        loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
          LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX  = SY-TABIX.
          LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT = LV_ENTRY.
          append LS_INDEX_LINE to LT_INDEX.
        endloop.
*       sort
        call method QUICKSORT
          exporting
            IV_ATTR_NAME         = IV_ATTR_NAME
            IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
            IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
            IV_SORT_CALLBACK     = IV_SORT_CALLBACK
          changing
            CT_SORT_TAB          = LT_INDEX.
      else.
        call method SORT_INTERNAL
          exporting
            IV_ATTR_NAME         = IV_ATTR_NAME
            IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
            IV_STABLE            = IV_STABLE
            IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
            IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT  = IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT
          changing
            CT_SORT_TAB          = LT_INDEX.
      endif.

*     restore entity list after sort
      if lt_entity_list is not initial.
        me->entity_list = lt_entity_list.
      endif.

*     rebuild entity_tab
      loop at LT_INDEX into LS_INDEX_LINE.
        read table ME->ENTITY_LIST index LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX into LV_ENTRY.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          append LV_ENTRY to LT_BO.
        else.
*         some went wrong in this sort -> exceptional exit
          raise exception type CX_BOL_EXCEPTION.
        endif.
        read table ME->map_tab index LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX assigning <map>.
        if SY-SUBRC = 0.
          append <map> to LT_map.
        else.
*         some went wrong in this sort -> exceptional exit
          raise exception type CX_BOL_EXCEPTION.
        endif.
      endloop.

      if LT_BO is not initial.
        ME->ENTITY_LIST = LT_BO.
      else.
*       there was nothing to sort -> entity list remains unchanged
      endif.
      if LT_map is not initial.
        ME->map_tab = LT_map.
      else.
*       there was nothing to sort -> entity list remains unchanged
      endif.

*     set focus of sorted collection to prior focus object
      IF_BOL_BO_COL~FIND( IV_BO = LV_FOCUS_OBJ ).

*     set sort state
      ME->IF_BOL_BO_COL~SORT_STATE-SORT_ATTR = IV_ATTR_NAME.
      ME->IF_BOL_BO_COL~SORT_STATE-SORT_ORDER = IV_SORT_ORDER.

    cleanup.

      if lt_entity_list is not initial.
        me->entity_list = lt_entity_list.
      endif.

  endtry.

endmethod.


method invalidate_node_children.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  loop at me->map_tab assigning <map> where node is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <map>-node->invalidate_children( ).
  endloop.

endmethod.


method on_entity_deleted.

  data:
    core type ref to cl_crm_bol_core,
    map  type ty_map.

  field-symbols:
    <map> type ty_map.


  core = cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( ).
  if core->reset_running = abap_true.
    if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
      loop at me->map_tab assigning <map>.
        <map>-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
          iv_activation = abap_false
          ir_ref_col    = me ).
      endloop.
    endif.
    clear me->map_tab.
  else.
    if sender is bound.
      map-name = sender->get_name( ).
      map-id   = sender->get_key( ).
      loop at me->map_tab assigning <map> where name = map-name and id = map-id.
        if me->reset_survival_mode = abap_true.
          <map>-node->set_reset_survival_mode(
            iv_activation = abap_false
            ir_ref_col    = me ).
        endif.
        delete me->map_tab.
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

  me->auto_remove = abap_true.

  super->on_entity_deleted( sender ).

  me->auto_remove = abap_false.

endmethod.


method on_focus_changed.

  data:
    bo type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


  if focus_bo is not bound.
    raise event focus_changed exporting focus_bo = bo.
  else.
    bo = me->get_current_node( ).
    if bo is bound.
      raise event focus_changed exporting focus_bo = bo.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method PARTITION .
  data: LV_VALUE type ref to DATA.
  field-symbols: <LINE> type GTYPE_INDEX_LINE,
                 <DATA> type DATA.

  clear ET_LOW.
  clear ET_HIGH.

* loop from second line -> first line is pivot!
  loop at IT_SORT_TAB assigning <LINE> from 2.
    if IV_ATTR_NAME ne IF_BOL_COL_SORTING=>CUSTOM.
      if IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = ABAP_FALSE.
        LV_VALUE = <LINE>-OBJECT-BO->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
      else.
        field-symbols: <TEXT> type STRING.
        create data LV_VALUE type STRING.
        assign LV_VALUE->* to <TEXT>.
        <TEXT> = <LINE>-OBJECT-BO->GET_PROPERTY_TEXT( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
      endif.
    else.
      get reference of <LINE>-OBJECT into LV_VALUE.
    endif.
    assign LV_VALUE->* to <DATA>.
    if SY-SUBRC = 0.
      if IV_SORT_CALLBACK->IS_A_GREATER_B( IV_A = IV_PIVOT IV_B = <DATA> ) = ABAP_TRUE.
        if IV_SORT_ORDER = if_bol_bo_col~SORT_ASCENDING.
          append <LINE> to ET_LOW.
        else.
          append <LINE> to ET_HIGH.
        endif.
      else.
        if IV_SORT_ORDER = if_bol_bo_col~SORT_ASCENDING.
          append <LINE> to ET_HIGH.
        else.
          append <LINE> to ET_LOW.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method QUICKSORT .
  data: LV_PIVOT type ref to DATA,
        LT_LOW   type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB,
        LT_HIGH  type GTYPE_INDEX_TAB,
        LV_LINE  type GTYPE_INDEX_LINE.
  field-symbols: <PIVOT> type DATA.

  read table CT_SORT_TAB index 1 into LV_LINE.
  if SY-SUBRC = 0.
*   choose pivot
    if IV_ATTR_NAME ne IF_BOL_COL_SORTING=>CUSTOM.
      if IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = ABAP_FALSE.
        LV_PIVOT = LV_LINE-OBJECT-BO->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
      else.
        field-symbols: <TEXT> type STRING.
        create data LV_PIVOT type STRING.
        assign LV_PIVOT->* to <TEXT>.
        <TEXT> = LV_LINE-OBJECT-BO->GET_PROPERTY_TEXT( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
      endif.
    else.
      get reference of LV_LINE-OBJECT into LV_PIVOT.
    endif.

*   partition problem
    assign LV_PIVOT->* to <PIVOT>.
    call method PARTITION
      exporting
        IV_PIVOT             = <PIVOT>
        IV_ATTR_NAME         = IV_ATTR_NAME
        IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
        IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
        IV_SORT_CALLBACK     = IV_SORT_CALLBACK
        IT_SORT_TAB          = CT_SORT_TAB
      importing
        ET_LOW               = LT_LOW
        ET_HIGH              = LT_HIGH.
*   sort partitions
    call method QUICKSORT
      exporting
        IV_ATTR_NAME         = IV_ATTR_NAME
        IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
        IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
        IV_SORT_CALLBACK     = IV_SORT_CALLBACK
      changing
        CT_SORT_TAB          = LT_LOW.
    call method QUICKSORT
      exporting
        IV_ATTR_NAME         = IV_ATTR_NAME
        IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
        IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
        IV_SORT_CALLBACK     = IV_SORT_CALLBACK
      changing
        CT_SORT_TAB          = LT_HIGH.

*   build result
    clear CT_SORT_TAB.
    append lines of LT_LOW to CT_SORT_TAB.
    append LV_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
    append lines of LT_HIGH to CT_SORT_TAB.
  endif.
endmethod.


method SORT_INTERNAL .
  data: LV_ENTRY      type CRMT_BOL_COL_ENTRY,
        LS_INDEX_LINE type GTYPE_INDEX_LINE,
        "LT_BO         type CRMT_ENTITY_TAB,
        LV_FOCUS_OBJ  type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
        LV_VALREF     type ref to DATA,
        LV_VALTYPE    type CHAR1,
        LV_DECIMALS   type I,
        LV_SORTFIELD  type NAME_KOMP,
        LV_BO         type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS.
  field-symbols: <VALUE> type any.

  read table ME->ENTITY_LIST index 1 into LV_ENTRY.
  check SY-SUBRC = 0.

* sorting on related object?
  data: LT_RELATIONS type CRMT_RELATION_NAME_TAB.
  if IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT is not initial.
    split IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT at '/' into table LT_RELATIONS.
  endif.
  do.
    data: LV_INDEX type SYTABIX value 1.
    LV_BO = ME->GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                    IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
    if LV_BO is bound.
      exit.
    else.
*     current object of collection has no related object -> try next
      add 1 to LV_INDEX.
      read table ME->ENTITY_LIST index LV_INDEX into LV_ENTRY.
      if SY-SUBRC = 0.
        LV_BO = LV_ENTRY-BO.
      else.
*       no related object exists -> nothing to sort!
        return.
      endif.
    endif.
  enddo.

  if IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = ABAP_FALSE.
    LV_VALREF = LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  else.
    field-symbols: <TEXT> type STRING.
    create data LV_VALREF type STRING.
    assign LV_VALREF->* to <TEXT>.
    <TEXT> = LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_TEXT( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
  endif.
  if LV_VALREF is bound.
    assign LV_VALREF->* to <VALUE>.
    describe field <VALUE> type LV_VALTYPE.
    try.
        case LV_VALTYPE.
          when CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_DATE.
*           build sort table
            loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
              LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                          IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
              if LV_BO is bound.
                LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                              importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-DATE ).
              else.
                clear LS_INDEX_LINE-DATE.
              endif.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
              append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
            endloop.
            LV_SORTFIELD = 'DATE'.
          when CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_TIME.
*           build sort table
            loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
              LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                          IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
              if LV_BO is bound.
                LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                              importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-TIME ).
              else.
                clear LS_INDEX_LINE-TIME.
              endif.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
              append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
            endloop.
            LV_SORTFIELD = 'TIME'.
          when CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_PACKED.
*           build sort table
            describe field <VALUE> decimals LV_DECIMALS.
            case LV_DECIMALS.
              when 0.
                loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
                  LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                              IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
                  if LV_BO is bound.
                    LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                                  importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_0 ).
                  else.
                    clear LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_0.
                  endif.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
                  append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
                endloop.
                LV_SORTFIELD = 'PACKED8_0'.
              when 2.
                loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
                  LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                              IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
                  if LV_BO is bound.
                    LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                                  importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_2 ).
                  else.
                    clear LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_2.
                  endif.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
                  append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
                endloop.
                LV_SORTFIELD = 'PACKED8_2'.
              when others.
*               not correct, but sorts somehow in the right direction
                loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
                  LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                              IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
                  if LV_BO is bound.
                    LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                                  importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_0 ).
                  else.
                    clear LS_INDEX_LINE-PACKED8_0.
                  endif.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
                  append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
                endloop.
                LV_SORTFIELD = 'PACKED8_0'.
            endcase.
          when CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_FLOAT.
*           build sort table
            loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
              LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                          IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
              if LV_BO is bound.
                LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                              importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-FLOAT ).
              else.
                clear LS_INDEX_LINE-FLOAT.
              endif.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
              append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
            endloop.
            LV_SORTFIELD = 'FLOAT'.
          when CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_INT or CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_INT1 or CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=>TYPEKIND_INT2.
*           build sort table
            loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
              LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                          IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
              if LV_BO is bound.
                LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE( exporting IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME
                                              importing EV_RESULT    = LS_INDEX_LINE-INTEGER ).
              else.
                clear LS_INDEX_LINE-INTEGER.
              endif.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
              append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
            endloop.
            LV_SORTFIELD = 'INTEGER'.
          when others.
*           build sort table
            loop at ME->ENTITY_LIST into LV_ENTRY.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-INDEX    = SY-TABIX.
              LV_BO = GET_RELATED_OBJECT( IV_SOURCE = LV_ENTRY-BO
                                          IT_PATH   = LT_RELATIONS ).
              if LV_BO is bound.
                data: LV_DATA_REF type ref to DATA.
                field-symbols: <DATA> type any.
                if IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = ABAP_FALSE.
                  LV_DATA_REF = LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY( IV_ATTR_NAME ).
                  assign LV_DATA_REF->* to <DATA>.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-C_VALUE  = <DATA>.
                else.
                  LS_INDEX_LINE-C_VALUE = LV_BO->GET_PROPERTY_TEXT( IV_ATTR_NAME = IV_ATTR_NAME ).
                endif.
              else.
                clear LS_INDEX_LINE-C_VALUE.
              endif.
              LS_INDEX_LINE-OBJECT   = LV_ENTRY.
              append LS_INDEX_LINE to CT_SORT_TAB.
            endloop.
            LV_SORTFIELD = 'C_VALUE'.
        endcase.

*       sort
        if IV_STABLE = ABAP_TRUE.
          if IV_SORT_ORDER = IF_BOL_BO_COL=>SORT_ASCENDING.
            if LV_SORTFIELD = 'C_VALUE'.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB stable by (LV_SORTFIELD) as text.
            else.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB stable by (LV_SORTFIELD).
            endif.
          elseif IV_SORT_ORDER = IF_BOL_BO_COL=>SORT_DESCENDING.
            if LV_SORTFIELD = 'C_VALUE'.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB stable by (LV_SORTFIELD) descending as text.
            else.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB stable by (LV_SORTFIELD) descending.
            endif.
          endif.
        else.
          if IV_SORT_ORDER = IF_BOL_BO_COL=>SORT_ASCENDING.
            if LV_SORTFIELD = 'C_VALUE'.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB by (LV_SORTFIELD) as text.
            else.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB by (LV_SORTFIELD).
            endif.
          elseif IV_SORT_ORDER = IF_BOL_BO_COL=>SORT_DESCENDING.
            if LV_SORTFIELD = 'C_VALUE'.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB by (LV_SORTFIELD) descending as text.
            else.
              sort CT_SORT_TAB by (LV_SORTFIELD) descending.
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.
      catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
    endtry.
  endif.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.


class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PREVIEW definition
  public
  final
  create private

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PREVIEW
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
  type-pools ABAP .

  constants CO_PREVIEW_COMPONENT_NAME type STRING value 'IUBOTRCP' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_PREVIEW_WINDOW_NAME type STRING value 'MainWindow' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_PROFILE_PARAM_NAME type STRING value 'prof_id' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_SIM_PARAM_NAME type STRING value 'sim' ##NO_TEXT.

  class-methods CALCULATE_PREVIEW_URL
    importing
      !PROF_ID type STRING optional
    preferred parameter PROF_ID
    returning
      value(URL) type STRING .
  class-methods EXECUTE_CUSTOMIZING_PREVIEW
    importing
      !PROF_ID type STRING optional .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class ZL_BOLTREE_START
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PREVIEW
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PREVIEW IMPLEMENTATION.


method calculate_preview_url.

  data:
    lv_appl_model type ref to if_bsp_wd_appl_model.


  cl_bsp_wd_appl_model=>get_appl_model(
    exporting
      iv_bsp_appl   = 'BSPWD_CMP_TEST'                      "#EC NOTEXT
      iv_model_type = 'CL_BSP_WD_APPL_MODEL_DDIC'           "#EC NOTEXT
    receiving
      rv_model      = lv_appl_model
    exceptions
      failed        = 1 ).
  check sy-subrc = 0.

  url = lv_appl_model->get_start_url( ).
  concatenate url '&url-content=' co_preview_component_name '/' co_preview_window_name into url. "#EC NOTEXT

  if not prof_id is initial.
    data lv_prof_id type string.
    lv_prof_id = prof_id.
    replace all occurrences of '&' in lv_prof_id with '-_-_-amp-_-_-'.
    concatenate url '&' co_profile_param_name '=' lv_prof_id into url. "#EC NOTEXT
  endif.

endmethod.


method execute_customizing_preview.

  data: lv_urlc type text255.

  lv_urlc = calculate_preview_url( prof_id ).

  call function 'CALL_BROWSER'
    exporting
      url        = lv_urlc
      new_window = abap_true
    exceptions
      others     = 1.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE definition
  public
  create protected

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CONFIGDESCR
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CONTROLLER
                 IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_NODE
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_IMPL .
  interfaces IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_DOCU .
  interfaces IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_PARAM .
  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .

  types:
    begin of ty_profgrp,
      prof_id type crmt_tree_profile,
      prof_desc type crmt_iu_prof_desc,
      ui_icon type CRMT_IU_IC_ICON_NAME,
      ui_text_active type crmt_boolean,
      ui_text type crmt_iu_prof_desc,
      ui_tooltip type crmt_iu_prof_desc,
    end of ty_profgrp .
  types:
    TY_PROFGRP_TAB type standard table of ty_profgrp with non-unique default key .
  types:
    ty_hier_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF crm_isutree_hier with non-unique key prof_id parent_node_id sequence .
  types:
    begin of ty_prof.
      include type crm_isutree_prof.
      types:
      is_table type abap_bool,
      COL_OCA_MENU_ALL type ref to CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU,
      HIERACHY_ENTRIES type TY_HIER_TAB,
    end of ty_prof .
  types:
    begin of ty_profgrp_buf,
      profgrp_id type crmt_iu_boltree_profgrp_id,
      prof_tab type ty_profgrp_tab,
    end of ty_profgrp_buf .
  types:
    ty_pres_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF crm_isutree_pres with unique key pres_id .
  types:
    ty_profgrp_buf_tab type hashed table of ty_profgrp_buf with unique key profgrp_id .
  types:
    ty_col_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF crm_isutree_prco with unique key pres_id col_id .
  types:
    ty_pcol_tab_pub type sorted table of crmt_isutree_pcol with unique key prof_id col_id .
  types:
    begin of TS_OCA_ENTRY.
      include type CRMT_ISUTREE_OCA as CRMT_ISUTREE_OCA.
  types:
      COLUMN_KEY type string,
      ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOLEAN,
      SEQUENCE_ALL type string,
      RELATION_PATH_ALL type string,
    end of TS_OCA_ENTRY .
  types:
    ty_prot_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF crm_isutree_prot with unique key prof_id .
  types:
    TY_OCA_TAB type sorted table of TS_OCA_ENTRY with unique key PROF_ID NODE_ID SEQUENCE_ALL SEQUENCE ID .
  types:
    ty_prof_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF ty_prof with unique key prof_id .
  types:
    begin of TS_OCAP_ENTRY.
      include type CRM_ISUTREE_OCAP as CRM_ISUTREE_OCAP.
  types:
    end of TS_OCAP_ENTRY .
  types:
    ty_pcol_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF CRMT_ISUTREE_PCOL with unique key prof_id col_id .
  types:
    TY_OCAP_TAB type sorted table of TS_OCAP_ENTRY with unique key PROF_ID NODE_ID ID SEQUENCE .
  types:
    begin of TS_OCA_ACTION,
      PROF_ID type crmt_tree_profile,
      NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID,
      OCA_TAB type TY_OCA_TAB,
      ACTIONS type CRMT_THTMLB_ONE_CLICK_ACTION_T,
    end of TS_OCA_ACTION .
  types:
    TT_OCA_ACTIONS type sorted table of TS_OCA_ACTION with unique key PROF_ID NODE_ID .
  types:
    begin of TS_HIERARCHY_ITEM,
      LEVEL          type I,
      NODE_ID        type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-NODE_ID,
      PARENT_NODE_ID type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-PARENT_NODE_ID,
      SEQUENCE       type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-SEQUENCE,
      BOL_TYPE       type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-BOL_TYPE,
      RECURSIVE      type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-RECURSIVE,
    end of TS_HIERARCHY_ITEM .
  types:
    TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS type hashed table of TS_HIERARCHY_ITEM
                            with unique key NODE_ID .
  types:
    begin of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH_NODE,
      NODE_ID   type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-NODE_ID,
      SEQUENCE  type I,
      BOL_TYPE  type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-BOL_TYPE,
      RECURSIVE type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-RECURSIVE,
      IS_ROOT   type ABAP_BOOL,
      IS_TARGET type ABAP_BOOL,
    end of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH_NODE .
  types:
    TT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_NODES type hashed table of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH_NODE
                                with unique key NODE_ID
                                with unique sorted key SEQUENCE components SEQUENCE
                                with non-unique sorted key IS_ROOT components IS_ROOT
                                with non-unique sorted key IS_TARGET components IS_TARGET .
  types:
    begin of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH,
      ID    type I,
      NODES type TT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_NODES,
    end of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH .
  types:
    TT_BOL_TYPE_PATHS type hashed table of TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH
                           with unique key ID .
  types:
    begin of TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM,
      BOL_TYPE type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-BOL_TYPE,
      PATHS    type TT_BOL_TYPE_PATHS,
    end of TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM .
  types:
    TT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS type hashed table of TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM
                           with unique key BOL_TYPE .
  types:
    TT_NODE_IDS type hashed table of CRMT_NODE_ID with unique key TABLE_LINE .

  constants GC_DEFAULT_FILTER_ON type IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_PARAM=>GTY_PARAM_VALUE value 'DEFAULT_FILTER_ON' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants GC_DEFAULT_FILTER_OFF type IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_PARAM=>GTY_PARAM_VALUE value 'DEFAULT_FILTER_OFF' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants GC_FILTER_OFF type IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_PARAM=>GTY_PARAM_VALUE value 'FILTER_OFF' ##NO_TEXT.

     end of C_TREE_MODE .

    returning

    returning

    importing

    exporting
      !ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS type TY_OCA_TAB
    returning

  methods IS_COLUMN_HIDDEN
    importing

    returning
      value(RV_HIDDEN) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods SET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER
    importing
      !IV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods GET_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER
    returning
      value(RV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_COLUMN_PREVIEW_ACTIVE
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING optional
    returning
      value(RV_PREVIEW) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods GET_COL_ID_BY_COLUMN_NAME
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_COL_ID) type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_COL_ID .
  methods IS_COLUMN_FILTERABLE
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_FILTERABLE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_COLUMN_SORTABLE
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_SORTABLE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_COLUMN_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE
    importing
      !IV_COLUMN_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_ACTIVE) type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU .
  methods IS_FILTER_ACTIVE
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_FILTER_AVAILABLE
    importing
      !IV_AVAILABLE_AND_FILTERED type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_OCA_MENU_ACTIVE
    importing
      !IV_CHECK_ALL type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RV_ACTIVE) type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_OCA_MENU .
  methods IS_TABLE
    returning
      value(RV_IS_TABLE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_VIRTUAL_ROOT_ACTIVE
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods REMOVE_FILTER_ENTITY
    importing
      !ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY .
  methods SET_FILTER_ACTIVE
    importing
      !ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_TRUE .
  methods DELETE_PENDING_FILTERS .
  methods SET_FILTER_COLLECTION
    importing
      !COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods SET_FILTER_ENTITY
    importing
      !ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY .
  methods GET_PROFILE_ID
    returning
      value(RV_PROFILE_ID) type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE .
  methods GET_PROFILE_GROUP_ID
    returning
      value(RV_PROFGRP_ID) type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROFGRP_ID .
  class-methods IS_PROFILE_IN_PROFILE_GROUP
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID type CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_PROFGRP_ID
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE
    returning
      value(RV_RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  class-methods GET_FILTER_MODE
    returning
      value(RV_FILTER_MODE) type IF_CRM_ISU_FEATURE_PARAM=>GTY_PARAM_VALUE .
  methods SET_FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_START .
  methods GET_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE
    importing
      !IV_BOL_TYPE type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-BOL_TYPE
      !IT_NODE_IDS type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TT_NODE_IDS optional
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>TT_TREE_NODE_INSTANCES .
  methods GET_NODES_BY_NODE_ID
    importing
      !IV_NODE_ID type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-NODE_ID
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>TT_TREE_NODE_INSTANCES .
  methods GET_NODES_BY_PARENT_NODE_ID
    importing
      !IV_PARENT_NODE_ID type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-PARENT_NODE_ID
      !IT_NODE_IDS type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TT_NODE_IDS optional
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>TT_TREE_NODE_INSTANCES .
  methods SELECT_NODES_BY_ENTITIES
    importing
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_ENTITY_COL
      !IV_MAKE_VISIBLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IT_NODE_IDS type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TT_NODE_IDS optional
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .
  methods GET_NODES_BY_ENTITIES
    importing
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_ENTITY_COL
      !IT_NODE_IDS type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TT_NODE_IDS optional
      !IV_ONLY_VISIBLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_MAKE_VISIBLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .
  methods FILTER_NODES_VISIBILITY_STATE
    importing
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .
  methods FILTER_NODES_HIDDEN_STATE
    importing
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL .
  methods GET_BOL_TYPES
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type TT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS .
  methods GET_BOL_TYPE
    importing
      !IV_OBJECT_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME
    returning
      value(RS_RETURN) type TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM .
  methods GET_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS .
protected section.

  types:
    begin of TY_INSTANCE,
      PROF_ID   type CHAR10,
      CALLER_ID type STRING,
      INSTANCE  type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE,
    end of TY_INSTANCE .
  types:
    TY_INSTANCES type hashed table of TY_INSTANCE with unique key PROF_ID CALLER_ID .
  types:
*  types:
*    ty_oca_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF CRMT_ISUTREE_OCA with unique key prof_id node_id sequence id .
*  types:
*    ty_ocap_tab TYPE sorted TABLE OF crm_isutree_ocap with unique key prof_id node_id id sequence .
    begin of TY_IMPL_CLASS,
      CLSNAME  type SEOCLSNAME,
      INSTANCE type ref to IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE,
    end of TY_IMPL_CLASS .
  types:
    TY_IMPL_CLASS_TAB type hashed table of TY_IMPL_CLASS with unique key CLSNAME .
  types:
    begin of GTY_CHILD_TYPE ,
      NODE_ID        type CRMT_NODE_ID,
      PARENT_NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID,
      CHILD_TYPES    type hashed table of CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME with unique key TABLE_LINE,
    end of GTY_CHILD_TYPE .
  types:
    GTY_CHILD_TYPE_TAB type hashed table of GTY_CHILD_TYPE with unique key NODE_ID PARENT_NODE_ID .

  data FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME value C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data:
    PROFGRP_TAB type hashed table of CRM_ISUTREE_GRPV with unique key PROFGRP_ID .
  data:
    PENDING_FILTERS type hashed table of CRMT_GENIL_OBJECT_ID with unique key TABLE_LINE .
  data PARAM_CONTAINER type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER .
  data FIF_TREESRV_ENH type ref to IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREESRV_ENH .
  data OCA_ACTIONS type TT_OCA_ACTIONS .
  data MR_POTENTIAL_CHILD_TYPES type ref to GTY_CHILD_TYPE_TAB .
  constants CO_DEFAULT_NUMBER_ROWS type CRMT_NUMB_ROWS value 16 ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_INITIAL_PROFILE type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE value '_EMPTY' ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data COL_TAB type TY_COL_TAB .
  class-data EHP1_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL value ABAP_UNDEFINED ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data EHP2_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL value ABAP_UNDEFINED ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data HIER_TAB type TY_HIER_TAB .
  class-data INSTANCES type TY_INSTANCES .
  class-data OCA_TAB type TY_OCA_TAB .
  class-data OCAP_TAB type TY_OCAP_TAB .
  class-data PCOL_TAB type TY_PCOL_TAB .
  class-data PRES_TAB type TY_PRES_TAB .
  class-data PROFGRP_BUF_TAB type TY_PROFGRP_BUF_TAB .
  class-data PROF_TAB type TY_PROF_TAB .
  class-data PROT_TAB type TY_PROT_TAB .
  data CALLER_ID type STRING .
  data COLUMNS type TY_PCOL_TAB_PUB .
  data EVENT_SERVICE type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 .
  data IMPL_CLASS_TAB type TY_IMPL_CLASS_TAB .
  data PROF_ID type CHAR10 .
  data VIRTUAL_ROOT_COUNT type SYTABIX .
  constants CO_HIDDEN_INCLUDING_SUB_NODES type CHAR1 value 'Y' ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data GV_USER_NAME type SYUNAME .
  class-data GV_ROLE type CRMT_UI_PROFILE .
  class-data GV_NO_GROUP_PERS type ABAP_BOOL .
  data MV_FILTER_DEACTIVATED_BY_USER type ABAP_BOOL .
  data MV_FIRST_ROUNDTRIP_DONE type ABAP_BOOL value ABAP_UNDEFINED ##NO_TEXT.
  data MO_ROOT_OBJECT_COL type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  data GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS type TT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS .
  data GT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS type TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS .

  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !PROF_ID type CHAR10
      !CALLER_ID type STRING
      !CONTROLLER type ref to CL_BSP_CONTROLLER2 optional
      !IR_TREE_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL optional .
  methods CREATE_TREE_NODE_INSTANCE
    importing
      !IR_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !IR_PARENT_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
      !IS_HIERARCHY type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER
      !IR_TREE_SERVICE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
      !IV_CALLER_ID type STRING
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE .
  methods DO_HIER_SORT_CHILDENTITIES
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE
      !IV_NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods INITIALIZE
    importing
      !IV_PROF_ID type CHAR10
      !IV_CALLER_ID type STRING
      !IR_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_BSP_CONTROLLER2
      !IR_TREE_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL
      !IV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME default C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS .
  methods DO_HIER_SORT_ENTITIES
    importing
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
      !IV_SORT_BY type CRM_SI_WB_H_SORT_BY
      !IV_SORT_ORDER type CRM_SI_WB_H_SORT_ORDER default IF_BOL_BO_COL=>SORT_ASCENDING
      !IV_STABLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IR_SORT_CALLBACK type ref to IF_BOL_COL_SORTING optional .
  methods DO_HIER_SORT_ROOTENTITIES
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE
      !IV_NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID
      !IR_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods LOAD_COMPONENT_SET .
  methods SETUP_INSTANCE
    importing
      !IV_FIRST_SETUP type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods GET_CHILD_NODES_INTERNAL
    importing
      !NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
      !SEARCHED_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME optional
      !CHECK_LIMITS_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !CHECK_IS_LEAF_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE

    returning

  methods GET_CHILD_NODES
    importing
      !NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
      !SEARCHED_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME optional
      !CHECK_LIMITS_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !CHECK_IS_LEAF_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !HIDDEN_CHILD_NODES type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional
    returning
      value(CHILD_NODES) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods SET_TREE_CONTROLLER
    importing
      !IR_TREE_CONTROLLER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  methods GET_RELATED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL
    importing
      !SOURCE type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !PATH type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PATH
      !HIER type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER
      !IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    returning
      value(TARGET) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods GET_RELATED_ENTITIES
    importing
      !SOURCE type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !PATH type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PATH
      !HIER type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER
      !IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    returning
      value(TARGET) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods ADD_TREE_NODES
    importing
      !IR_TARGET_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
      !IR_SOUCRE_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
      !IV_APPEND type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_TRUE
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  methods GET_ROOT_NODES_INTERNAL
    importing
      !COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL
      !IR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST type ref to ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
  class-methods ADJUST_COL_ENTRIES
    changing
      !CT_COL type TY_COL_TAB .
  class-methods ADJUST_OCA_ENTRIES
    changing
      !CT_OCA type TY_OCA_TAB .
  methods SET_EVENT_SERVICE
    importing
      !IO_EVENT_SERVICE type ref to IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE .
  methods ON_REL_FILTER_PREP_REQUESTED
    for event REQUEST_FILTER_PREPARATION of IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE
    importing
      !SENDER
      !IO_RELATION_FILTER
      !IS_TREE_HIER
      !IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY .
  class-methods LOAD_PROFILE_CUST
    importing
      !IV_PROFILE_ID type CRMT_TREE_PROFILE .
  class-methods ON_BOL_RESET_FINISHED
    for event RESET_FINISHED of CL_CRM_BOL_CORE .
  methods CHECK_SEARCHED_IS_CHILD
    importing
      !CURRENT_HIER type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER
      !SEARCHED_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME
      !IR_CHECKED_NODE_IDS type ref to DATA optional
    returning
      value(IS_CHILD) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods GET_IMPL_CLASS_INSTANCE
    importing
      !CLSNAME type SEOCLSNAME
    returning
      value(INSTANCE) type ref to IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE .
  methods GET_PRES
    importing
      !PRES_ID type CRMT_PRES_ID
    returning

  methods GET_PRES_COLUMNS
    importing
      !PRES_ID type CRMT_PRES_ID
      !IV_LOAD type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RESULT) type CRMT_ISUTREE_PRCO_TAB .
  methods LOAD .
  methods REFRESH_IMPL_CLASS_INSTANCES
    importing
      !IV_RESET type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE .
  class-methods ON_SKIN_CHANGE
    for event SKIN_CHANGE of CL_THTMLB_PERSONALIZATION .
  methods BUILT_BOL_TYPES
    returning
      value(RT_RETURN) type TT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS .
  methods BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS

    importing
      !IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS type TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
      !IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM type TS_HIERARCHY_ITEM
      !IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM type ref to TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM .
  methods INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_REC
    importing
      !IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS type TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
      !IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM type TS_HIERARCHY_ITEM
      !IV_TARGET_NODE_ID type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-NODE_ID optional
      !IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM type ref to TS_BOL_TYPE_ITEM
      !IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH type ref to TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH .
  methods INT_BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
    importing
      !IV_PARENT_NODE_ID type CRMT_PNODE_ID
      !IV_LEVEL type I
    changing
      !CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS type TT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS .
  methods FIND_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE_PATH
    importing
      !IS_PATH type TS_BOL_TYPE_PATH
      !IT_NODE_IDS type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>TT_NODE_IDS optional
      !IV_ONLY_VISIBLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_MAKE_VISIBLE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
      !IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .
private section.

  data FILTER type ref to LCL_FILTER .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE IMPLEMENTATION.


method add_filter_collection.

  check collection is bound.

  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~add_collection( collection ).

endmethod.


method add_filter_entity.

  check entity is bound.

* we use import paramenter IV_SET_FOCUS to pass root filter information
  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~add( iv_entity = entity  iv_set_focus = root_filter ).

endmethod.


method ADD_TREE_NODES.

  RR_RESULT = IR_TARGET_COLLECTION.

  if RR_RESULT is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  if IV_APPEND is initial.
    RR_RESULT->CLEAR( ).
  endif.

  if IR_SOUCRE_COLLECTION is not bound or IR_SOUCRE_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.

  data(LR_COLLECTION) = IR_SOUCRE_COLLECTION.
  if LR_COLLECTION is instance of CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL.
    LR_COLLECTION = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_COL( LR_COLLECTION )->GET_AS_BO_COLLECTION( ).
  endif.

  data(LR_NODE) = cast CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE( LR_COLLECTION->GET_FIRST( ) ).
  while LR_NODE is bound.
    RR_RESULT->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_NODE ).
    LR_NODE = cast #( LR_COLLECTION->GET_NEXT( ) ).
  endwhile.

endmethod.


method ADJUST_COL_ENTRIES.

* support PNG based skins
  data(lv_skin) = to_upper( cl_thtmlb_util=>get_current_skin( ) ).
  if lv_skin = 'CORBU' or
     lv_skin = 'BLUE CRYSTAL' or
     to_upper( cl_crm_thtmlb_skin_expl_tools=>get_filetype_for_skin( lv_skin ) ) = 'PNG'.
      LOOP AT ct_col ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<col>) WHERE col_img CS `.gif` AND col_img NS '/'. "#EC NOTEXT
        <col>-col_img = replace( val = <col>-col_img sub = `.gif` with = `.png` ). "#EC NOTEXT
      ENDLOOP.
  else.
      LOOP AT ct_col ASSIGNING <col> WHERE col_img CS `.png` AND col_img NS '/'. "#EC NOTEXT
        <col>-col_img = replace( val = <col>-col_img sub = `.png` with = `.gif` ). "#EC NOTEXT
      ENDLOOP.
  endif.

endmethod.


method ADJUST_OCA_ENTRIES.

* support PNG based skins
  data(lv_skin) = to_upper( cl_thtmlb_util=>get_current_skin( ) ).
  if lv_skin = 'CORBU' or
     lv_skin = 'BLUE CRYSTAL' or
     lv_skin = 'BELIZE' or
     to_upper( cl_crm_thtmlb_skin_expl_tools=>get_filetype_for_skin( lv_skin ) ) = 'PNG'.
      LOOP AT ct_oca ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<oca>) WHERE icon CS `.gif` AND icon NS '/'. "#EC NOTEXT
        <oca>-icon = replace( val = <oca>-icon sub = `.gif` with = `.png` ). "#EC NOTEXT
      ENDLOOP.
  else.
      LOOP AT ct_oca ASSIGNING <oca> WHERE icon CS `.png` AND icon NS '/'. "#EC NOTEXT
        <oca>-icon = replace( val = <oca>-icon sub = `.png` with = `.gif` ). "#EC NOTEXT
      ENDLOOP.
  endif.

endmethod.


method apply_filters.

  data:
    node_key    type crmt_genil_object_id,
    all_nodes   type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col,
    childs      type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    node        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node.


* in filter mode read all subobjects and check filters
  if  ( me->pending_filters is not initial or force = abap_true )
  and collection is bound
  and me->filter->is_active( ) = abap_true.
*   collect all tree nodes
    childs = collection->get_copy( ).
    try.
        all_nodes ?= childs.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        create object all_nodes.
        all_nodes->if_bol_bo_col~add_collection( childs ).
    endtry.
    node ?= all_nodes->get_first_node( ).

    while node is bound.
      childs = node->get_child_nodes( buffer_only = 'R' ).  "only for root nodes we read from buffer, other nodes will be checked
      all_nodes->if_bol_bo_col~add_collection( childs ).
      node ?= all_nodes->get_next_node( ).
    endwhile.

    node ?= all_nodes->get_last_node( ).

    while node is bound.
      if node->are_children_filtered( ) = abap_true.
*       remove node in case it has no further children or there are only non filter node children
        if ( node->children->size( ) = 0 or
             cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col=>contains_filter_nodes( node->children ) = abap_false ) and
           ( node->hidden_children is not bound or node->hidden_children->size( ) = 0 or
             cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col=>contains_filter_nodes( node->hidden_children ) = abap_false ).
*         remove node from result
          collection->remove( node ).
*         remove node from parent
          node->remove_from_parent_on_filtered( ).
          filters_applied = abap_true.
        endif.
        node_key = node->get_key( ).
        delete table me->pending_filters with table key table_line = node_key.
      endif.

      node ?= all_nodes->get_previous_node( ).
    endwhile.
  endif.

endmethod.


method BUILT_BOL_TYPES.
  clear RT_RETURN.
  if GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS is initial.
    data(LT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS) = GET_HIERARCHY_ITEMS( ).
    loop at LT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS assigning field-symbol(<HIERARCHY_ITEM>) where BOL_TYPE is not initial.
      if not LINE_EXISTS( GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS[ BOL_TYPE = <HIERARCHY_ITEM>-BOL_TYPE ] ).
        insert value #(
          BOL_TYPE = <HIERARCHY_ITEM>-BOL_TYPE
        ) into table GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS.
      endif.
      data(LR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM) = ref #( GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS[ BOL_TYPE = <HIERARCHY_ITEM>-BOL_TYPE ] ).
      INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH(
        IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS = LT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
        IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM  = <HIERARCHY_ITEM>
        IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM   = LR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM
      ).
    endloop.
  endif.
  RT_RETURN = GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS.
endmethod.


method BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.
  clear RT_RETURN.
  if GT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS is initial.
    INT_BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS(
      exporting
        IV_PARENT_NODE_ID  = value #( )
        IV_LEVEL           = 0
      changing
        CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS = GT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
    ).
  endif.
  RT_RETURN = GT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.
endmethod.


method check_searched_is_child.

  types lty_checked_node_ids type hashed table of crmt_node_id with unique key table_line.
  data lr_checked_node_ids type ref to lty_checked_node_ids.

  field-symbols:
   <hier> type crm_isutree_hier.

  if current_hier-bol_type eq searched_entity_name.
    is_child = abap_true.
    return.
  endif.

  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <hier>
    where prof_id = current_hier-prof_id and parent_node_id = current_hier-node_id.
*   avoid recursions by tracking already checked node IDs
    if ir_checked_node_ids is bound.
      lr_checked_node_ids ?= ir_checked_node_ids.
    else.
      create data lr_checked_node_ids.
    endif.
    insert <hier>-node_id into table lr_checked_node_ids->*.
    check sy-subrc = 0.
    is_child = check_searched_is_child(
                 current_hier         = <hier>
                 searched_entity_name = searched_entity_name
                 ir_checked_node_ids  = lr_checked_node_ids ).
  endloop.

endmethod.


method class_constructor.

  set handler cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>on_bol_reset_finished for all instances activation abap_true.
  set handler cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>on_skin_change activation abap_true.


* special handling for IC
  if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_ic_active( ) = abap_true.
    lcl_event_handler=>startup( ).
  endif.

  gv_user_name     = cl_abap_syst=>get_user_name( ).
  gv_role          = cl_crm_ui_profile=>get_instance( )->get_profile( ).
  "gv_no_group_pers = boolc( cl_crm_isu_switch_check=>is_crm_ut_prod_enh_2_active( ) = abap_false ).

endmethod.


method clear_filter.

  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).

endmethod.


method CONSTRUCTOR.

  " moved to method INITIALIZE

*  data:
**    core   type ref to cl_crm_bol_core,
*    CALLER type STRING,
*    WINDOW type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL,
*    VIEW   type ref to CL_BSP_WD_VIEW_CONTROLLER.
*
*  field-symbols:
*    <PROF> type TY_PROF.
*
*  if IR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
*    TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER.
*  endif.
*
*  if PROF_ID is initial.
**   conditional breakpoint
**   // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
**   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
**   // or
**   // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
**   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
*    assert id CRMUIF_CONDITIONAL_BREAKPOINTS
*           subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
*           condition CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP_BT=>ASSERT(
*                       IV_BREAK_EVENT = IF_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GC_EVENT_BT_EXCEPTION ) = ABAP_TRUE. "#EC NOTEXT
**   get controller path (if caller_id is tree component ID)
*    if CONTROLLER is bound and CALLER_ID is not initial.
*      try.
*          WINDOW ?= CONTROLLER.
*          VIEW ?= WINDOW->GET_HOST_VIEW( ).
*          if VIEW is bound.
*            CALLER = |{ VIEW->APPLICATION_NAME case = upper } -> { WINDOW->GET_COMPONENT_USAGE_NAME( ) }|.
*          endif.
*        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.                    "#EC NO_HANDLER
*      endtry.
*    endif.
*    if CALLER is initial.
*      CALLER = CALLER_ID.
*    endif.
*    raise exception type CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE
*      exporting
*        TEXTID = CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>PROFILE_INITIAL
*        VAL1   = |{ CALLER }|.
*  endif.
*
*  ME->PROF_ID = PROF_ID.
*
** load profile customizing settings
*  me->load( ).
*
** store caller reference id
*  ME->CALLER_ID = CALLER_ID.
*
** prepare tree filter
*  create object me->filter.
*
** load genil component set
*  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab assigning <prof>
*    with table key prof_id = me->prof_id.
*  if sy-subrc = 0 and not <prof>-genil_compset is initial.
*    core = cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( ).
*    if core is bound.
*      core->load_component_set( <prof>-genil_compset ).
*    endif.
*  endif.

endmethod.


method CREATE_TREE_NODE_INSTANCE.
  if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
    RR_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>GET_INSTANCE(
      ENTITY       = IR_ENTITY
      PARENT_NODE  = IR_PARENT_NODE
      HIER         = IS_HIERARCHY
      TREE_SRV     = IR_TREE_SERVICE
      CALLER_ID    = IV_CALLER_ID
    ).
  endif.
  try.
      call method (FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS)=>GET_INSTANCE
        exporting
          ENTITY      = IR_ENTITY
          PARENT_NODE = IR_PARENT_NODE
          HIER        = IS_HIERARCHY
          TREE_SRV    = IR_TREE_SERVICE
          CALLER_ID   = IV_CALLER_ID
        receiving
          NODE        = RR_RESULT.
    catch CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ERROR.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endtry.
endmethod.


METHOD delete_pending_filters.

  CLEAR me->pending_filters.

ENDMETHOD.


method DO_HIER_SORT_CHILDENTITIES ##NEEDED.
  if USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS( ) is not initial
    or IV_PROFILE_ID is initial
    or IV_NODE_ID is initial
    or IR_COLLECTION is not bound
    or IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.
  data(LS_HIER) = GET_HIERARCHY_DETAILS(
    IV_PROFILE_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID
    IV_NODE_ID    = IV_NODE_ID
  ).
  DO_HIER_SORT_ENTITIES(
    IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_SORT_BY    = LS_HIER-SORT_BY
    IV_SORT_ORDER = LS_HIER-SORT_ORDER
  ).
endmethod.


method DO_HIER_SORT_ENTITIES.
  if IV_SORT_BY is initial
    or IV_SORT_ORDER is initial
    or IR_COLLECTION is not bound
    or IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.
  data(LV_ATTR_NAME) = value NAME_KOMP( ).
  data(LV_PATH) = value STRING( ).
  data(LV_SORT_BY) = REPLACE( VAL = IV_SORT_BY PCRE = `\/\/` OCC = 0 CASE = ABAP_FALSE WITH = `\/` ) ##NO_TEXT.
  LV_SORT_BY = REPLACE( VAL = LV_SORT_BY PCRE = `^\s*\/*` OCC = 0 CASE = ABAP_FALSE WITH = `` ) ##NO_TEXT.
  LV_SORT_BY = REPLACE( VAL = LV_SORT_BY PCRE = `\s*$` OCC = 0 CASE = ABAP_FALSE WITH = `` ) ##NO_TEXT.
  if COUNT( VAL = LV_SORT_BY PCRE = `\/` CASE = ABAP_FALSE ) > 0 ##NO_TEXT.
    LV_PATH = SUBSTRING_BEFORE( VAL = LV_SORT_BY  PCRE = `\/`  OCC = -1 ) ##NO_TEXT.
    LV_ATTR_NAME = SUBSTRING_AFTER( VAL = LV_SORT_BY  PCRE = `\/`  OCC = -1 ) ##NO_TEXT.
  else.
    LV_ATTR_NAME = LV_SORT_BY.
  endif.
  if LV_ATTR_NAME is initial.
    return.
  endif.
  IR_COLLECTION->SORT(
    IV_ATTR_NAME         = LV_ATTR_NAME
    IV_SORT_ORDER        = IV_SORT_ORDER
    IV_PATH_2_SUBOBJECT  = LV_PATH
    IV_STABLE            = IV_STABLE
    IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION = IV_USE_TEXT_RELATION
    IV_SORT_CALLBACK     = IR_SORT_CALLBACK
  ).
endmethod.


method DO_HIER_SORT_ROOTENTITIES ##NEEDED.
  if USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS( ) is not initial
    or IV_PROFILE_ID is initial
    or IV_NODE_ID is initial
    or IR_COLLECTION is not bound
    or IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.
endmethod.


method FILTER_NODES_HIDDEN_STATE.

  RR_RESULT = IR_COLLECTION.

  data(LR_NODE) = RR_RESULT->GET_LAST_NODE( ).
  while LR_NODE is bound.
    if LR_NODE->IS_HIDDEN( ).
      RR_RESULT->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( IV_BO = LR_NODE ).
    endif.
    LR_NODE = RR_RESULT->GET_PREVIOUS_NODE( ).
  endwhile.

endmethod.


method FILTER_NODES_VISIBILITY_STATE.

  RR_RESULT = IR_COLLECTION.

  data(LR_NODE) = RR_RESULT->GET_LAST_NODE( ).
  while LR_NODE is bound.
    if not LR_NODE->IS_VISIBLE( ).
      RR_RESULT->IF_BOL_BO_COL~REMOVE( IV_BO = LR_NODE ).
    endif.
    LR_NODE = RR_RESULT->GET_PREVIOUS_NODE( ).
  endwhile.

endmethod.


method FIND_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE_PATH.

  RR_RESULT = new CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL( ).

  " is target node id of the path not in filter node id's -> we are finished here
  if IT_NODE_IDS is not initial.
    data(LV_TARGET_NODE_ID) = value #( IS_PATH-NODES[ key IS_TARGET components IS_TARGET = ABAP_TRUE ] default SPACE ).
    if LV_TARGET_NODE_ID is initial
      or not LINE_EXISTS( IT_NODE_IDS[ TABLE_LINE = LV_TARGET_NODE_ID ] ).
      return.
    endif.
  endif.

  " loop over all path nodes
  loop at IS_PATH-NODES assigning field-symbol(<PATH_NODE>) using key SEQUENCE.

    " nodes should be made visible?
    if IV_MAKE_VISIBLE is not initial.
      " we need the node proxy's -> so we have to rebuilt the node proxy's table
      " we do this when the target node has been reached, the node hierarchy should be loaded up to here.
      if <PATH_NODE>-IS_TARGET is not initial.
        TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
      endif.
    endif.

    data(LT_NODES) = GET_NODES_BY_NODE_ID( IV_NODE_ID = <PATH_NODE>-NODE_ID ).
    loop at LT_NODES assigning field-symbol(<NODE>).
      if <PATH_NODE>-IS_TARGET is initial.
        <NODE>->GET_CHILD_NODES( ).
      else.
        " nodes should be made visible?
        if IV_MAKE_VISIBLE is not initial.
          <NODE>->MAKE_VISIBLE( ).
        endif.
        " handle visible nodes only if requested
        if IV_ONLY_VISIBLE is initial or <NODE>->IS_VISIBLE( ).
          RR_RESULT->ADD( IV_ENTITY = <NODE> ).
        endif.
        " handle first hit only if requested
        if IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial and RR_RESULT->SIZE( ) > 0.
          return.
        endif.
      endif.
    endloop.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method FIND_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE_PATHS.

  data LR_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE.

  RR_RESULT = new CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL( ).

  data(LS_BOL_TYPE) = GET_BOL_TYPE( IV_OBJECT_NAME = IV_OBJECT_NAME ).

  " is object type part of the tree node hierarchy
  if LS_BOL_TYPE is initial.
    return.
  endif.

  " get tree nodes by BOL type paths
  loop at LS_BOL_TYPE-PATHS assigning field-symbol(<PATH>).
    RR_RESULT->ADD_COLLECTION(
      IV_COLLECTION = FIND_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE_PATH(
        IS_PATH           = <PATH>
        IT_NODE_IDS       = IT_NODE_IDS
        IV_ONLY_VISIBLE   = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE
        IV_MAKE_VISIBLE   = IV_MAKE_VISIBLE
        IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY = IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY
      )
    ).
