    " handle first hit only if requested
    if IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial and RR_RESULT->SIZE( ) > 0.
      return.
    endif.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method GET_BOL_TYPE.
  data(LT_BOL_TYPES) = GET_BOL_TYPES( ).
  RS_RETURN = value #( LT_BOL_TYPES[ BOL_TYPE = IV_OBJECT_NAME ] optional ).
endmethod.


method GET_BOL_TYPES.
  RT_RETURN = BUILT_BOL_TYPES( ).
endmethod.


method get_child_nodes.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_05 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_06 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  CHILD_NODES = GET_CHILD_NODES_INTERNAL(
    NODE                 = NODE
    SEARCHED_ENTITY_NAME = SEARCHED_ENTITY_NAME
    CHECK_LIMITS_ONLY    = CHECK_LIMITS_ONLY
    CHECK_IS_LEAF_ONLY   = CHECK_IS_LEAF_ONLY
    HIDDEN_CHILD_NODES   = HIDDEN_CHILD_NODES
  ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_01 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_CHILD_NODES_INTERNAL.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_13 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  data:
    parent_node_id      type char10,
    child_node          type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    childs              type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    child               type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    sub_childs          type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    impl_class          type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree,
    lt_hier_tab    TYPE TABLE OF crm_isutree_hier,
    lv_attr        TYPE name_komp,
    lv_rel         TYPE string.

  field-symbols:
    <hier> type crm_isutree_hier.


  create object child_nodes type cl_crm_bol_unique_bo_col.
  child_nodes->activate_autocleanup( ).

  if node->is_children_filter_disabled( ) = abap_false.
    node->set_children_filtered( abap_false ).
  endif.

  parent_node_id = node->get_node_id( ).

* for recursions we have to sort again by sequence
  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <hier> where prof_id = me->prof_id and
    ( parent_node_id = parent_node_id or node_id = parent_node_id and recursive = abap_true ). "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
    append <hier> to lt_hier_tab.
  endloop.

  sort lt_hier_tab by sequence node_id.

  loop at lt_hier_tab assigning <hier>.

* if we are in find mode, check only relevant hierarchy nodes
    if searched_entity_name is not initial and
       check_searched_is_child( current_hier = <hier> searched_entity_name = searched_entity_name ) eq abap_false.
      continue.
    endif.

    clear childs.

    if <hier>-folder = abap_true.

      child = node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
      if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
        child_node = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>get_instance(
                       entity      = child
                       parent_node = node
                       hier        = <hier>
                       tree_srv    = me
                       caller_id   = me->caller_id ).
      endif.
      CHILD_NODE = CREATE_TREE_NODE_INSTANCE(
        IR_ENTITY       = CHILD
        IR_PARENT_NODE  = NODE
        IS_HIERARCHY    = <HIER>
        IR_TREE_SERVICE = ME
        IV_CALLER_ID    = CALLER_ID
      ).
      if child_node is bound.
        case child_node->is_hidden( ).
          when co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
            if hidden_child_nodes is bound.
              hidden_child_nodes->add( child_node ).
            endif.
          when abap_true.
            if hidden_child_nodes is bound.
              hidden_child_nodes->add( child_node ).
            endif.
            if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
              child_node->get_child_nodes(
                hidden_child_nodes = hidden_child_nodes
                check_is_leaf_only = check_is_leaf_only ).
              if child_node->is_leaf = abap_false.
                return.  "there are children -> we are done
              endif.
            else.
              sub_childs = child_node->get_child_nodes( hidden_child_nodes = hidden_child_nodes ).
            if sub_childs is bound.
              child_nodes->add_collection( sub_childs ).
            endif.
            endif.
          when others.
            if child_node->is_initial_expand_suppressed( ) = abap_true or
               child_node->is_hidden_by_custom_exit( ) = abap_false.
              if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
                return.  "there are children -> we are done
              endif.
              child_nodes->add( child_node ).
            else.
              sub_childs = child_node->get_child_nodes( check_limits_only = abap_false ).
              if sub_childs is bound and sub_childs->size( ) > 0.
                if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
                  return.  "there are children -> we are done
                endif.
                child_nodes->add( child_node ).
              else.
                if hidden_child_nodes is bound.
                  hidden_child_nodes->add( child_node ).
                endif.
              endif.
            endif.
        endcase.
      endif.

    else.

      if <hier>-change_rel eq abap_true and <hier>-class is not initial.

*       if relation should be changed -> do that
        try.
            child = node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
            impl_class = me->get_impl_class_instance( <hier>-class ).

*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Read Relation)'
                   condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_rel
                               iv_node_id     = <hier>-node_id
                               iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                               iv_pres_id     = <hier>-pres_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            data lv_children_exist type abap_bool.
            lv_children_exist = abap_false.

            impl_class->get_children(
              exporting
                node         = node
                entity       = child
                child_hier   = <hier>
                check_children_exist_only = check_is_leaf_only
              importing
                child_nodes  = childs
                children_exist = lv_children_exist ).

*           skip further processing is children exist
            if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true and lv_children_exist = abap_true.
              return.
            endif.

          catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial."#EC NO_HANDLER
* impl class not istantiated
          catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method .
* method not implemented.
          data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
          catch cx_root into lx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                   condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT
            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method = 'GET_CHILDREN' handler = impl_class
              prof_id = me->prof_id node_id = <hier>-node_id
              exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

        endtry.
      elseif not <hier>-parent_node_rel is initial.
        child = node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
        childs = me->get_related_entities( source = child path = <hier>-parent_node_rel hier = <hier> io_parent_node_entity = node ).
      endif.

*     check filters if provided
      if node->is_children_filter_disabled( ) = abap_false.
        data lv_filtered type abap_bool.
        lv_filtered = abap_false.
        data lo_childs type ref to if_bol_bo_col.
        lo_childs = childs.
        if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
          me->filter->filter(
          exporting
            parent_node = node
            source      = lo_childs
            hier        = <hier>
            hier_tab    = hier_tab
          importing
              result      = childs ).
        else.
          me->filter->filter(
            exporting
              parent_node = node
              source      = lo_childs
              hier        = <hier>
              hier_tab    = hier_tab
            importing
              filtered    = lv_filtered
            result      = childs ).
        if lv_filtered = abap_true.
          node->set_children_filtered( abap_true ).
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.

      DO_HIER_SORT_CHILDENTITIES(
        IV_PROFILE_ID = <HIER>-PROF_ID
        IV_NODE_ID    = <HIER>-NODE_ID
        IR_COLLECTION = CHILDS
      ).

      if childs is bound.

        child ?= childs->get_first( ).
        while child is bound.
          if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
            child_node = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>get_instance(
                           entity      = child
                           parent_node = node
                           hier        = <hier>
                           tree_srv    = me
                           caller_id   = me->caller_id ).
          endif.
          CHILD_NODE = CREATE_TREE_NODE_INSTANCE(
            IR_ENTITY       = CHILD
            IR_PARENT_NODE  = NODE
            IS_HIERARCHY    = <HIER>
            IR_TREE_SERVICE = ME
            IV_CALLER_ID    = CALLER_ID
          ).
          if child_node is bound.
*           if the child node is hidden per customizing -> return children of the node
            case child_node->is_hidden( ).
              when co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
                if hidden_child_nodes is bound.
                  hidden_child_nodes->add( child_node ).
                endif.
              when abap_true.
                if hidden_child_nodes is bound.
                  hidden_child_nodes->add( child_node ).
                endif.
                if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
                  child_node->get_child_nodes(
                    hidden_child_nodes = hidden_child_nodes
                    check_is_leaf_only = check_is_leaf_only ).
                  if child_node->is_leaf = abap_false.
                    return.  "there are children -> we are done
                  endif.
                else.
                  sub_childs = child_node->get_child_nodes( hidden_child_nodes = hidden_child_nodes ).
                  if sub_childs is bound.
                    child_nodes->add_collection( sub_childs ).
                  endif.
                endif.
              when others.
                if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true.
                  return.  "there are children -> we are done
                endif.
                child_nodes->add( child_node ).
            endcase.
          endif.
          child ?= childs->get_next( ).
        endwhile.

      endif.

    endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_15 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  endloop.

* node doesn't children -> inform caller by raising exception
  if check_is_leaf_only = abap_true and child_nodes->size( ) = 0.
    raise exception type cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree
      exporting
        textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>tree_node_is_leaf.
  endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_14 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method get_columns.
  data: ls_prof type ty_prof,
        lt_col  type crmt_isutree_adjusted_column_t,
        ls_col  type crmt_isutree_adjusted_column.

  field-symbols: <result> type crmt_isutree_pcol,
                 <adjust> type crmt_isutree_adjusted_column.

  if reread eq abap_true or me->columns is initial.
    result = pcol_tab.
    delete result where prof_id ne me->prof_id.         "#EC CI_SORTSEQ

* check whether columns needs to be adjusted by parent component
    read table me->prof_tab with table key prof_id = me->prof_id into ls_prof.
    if sy-subrc is initial and ls_prof-change_cols eq abap_true and me->event_service is bound.
      loop at result assigning <result>.
        move-corresponding <result> to ls_col.
        append ls_col to lt_col.
      endloop.
      me->event_service->adjust_columns( changing ct_columns = lt_col ).

      loop at result assigning <result>.
        read table lt_col assigning <adjust> with table key col_id = <result>-col_id.
        if sy-subrc eq 0.
          <result>-title = <adjust>-title.
        else.
          delete result.
        endif.
      endloop.

    endif.
*   inform caller if columns were changed
    if ir_cols_changed is bound.
      if me->columns <> result.
        ir_cols_changed->* = abap_true.
      else.
        ir_cols_changed->* = abap_false.
      endif.
    endif.
    me->columns = result.
  else.
    result = me->columns.
  endif.


endmethod.


method GET_COLUMN_PROPERTY ##NEEDED.
  case IV_PROPERTY.
    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_SORTABLE.
      RV_VALUE = IS_COLUMN_SORTABLE( IV_COLUMN_NAME = IV_COLUMN_NAME ).
    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_DISABLE_FILTER.
      RV_VALUE = BOOLC( IS_COLUMN_FILTERABLE( IV_COLUMN_NAME = IV_COLUMN_NAME ) is initial ).
  endcase.
*  case IV_PROPERTY.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_FIELDTYPE.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_PICKLIST.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_MULTIPICKLIST.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_INPUT.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_CHECKBOX.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_LINK.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_EINPUT.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_EVENT_LINK.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_RADIO.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_TEXT.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_IMAGE.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_OCA.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_TEXTAREA.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_PASSWORD.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_TIMEPICKER.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_COMMUNICATIONLINK.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_PROGRESSINDICATOR.
**      RV_VALUE = CL_BSP_DLC_VIEW_DESCRIPTOR=>FIELD_TYPE_PROGRESSBAR.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_DISABLE_FILTER.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_DETAIL_LINK.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_SERVER_EVENT.
**      RV_VALUE = 'CHECKBOX_SERVER_EVENT'.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_ONCLICK.
**      RV_VALUE = 'CHECKBOX_SERVER_EVENT'.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_TOOLTIP.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_GROUP.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_BGCOLOR.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_RADIO_COLS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_TEXTAREA_ROWS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_TEXTAREA_COLS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_TIMEPICKER_RANGE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_SORTABLE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_LINK_DESIGN.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_TEXT_DIRECTION.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_DISABLE_GRAPHIC.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_CHANNEL_SERVICE_CLASS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_CHANNEL_ADDRESS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_CHANNEL_TYPE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_FOCUS.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_DISABLE_SMART_VALUE_HELP.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_INPUT_HELP_MANDATORY.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_INPUT_MANDATORY.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_USE_COLLECTION_SORTING.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_PICKLIST_CUSTOM_SORTING.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_PROGRESSBAR_COLOR.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_PROGRESSBAR_DISPLAYVALUE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_PROGRESSBAR_PERCENTVALUE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_PROGRESSBAR_SHOWVALUE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_REGOVERLAY.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_SEMANTIC_COLOR.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_INPUTTYPE.
*    when IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>FP_CUSTOM_CSS.
*  endcase.
endmethod.


method GET_COL_ID_BY_COLUMN_NAME.
  RV_COL_ID = IV_COLUMN_NAME+3.
endmethod.


method get_default_profile_by_group.

  data:
    lt_prof type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ty_profgrp_tab.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_prof> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ty_profgrp.


* determine profiles of tree profile group
  lt_prof = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_profiles_by_group( iv_profile_group_id ).

* check default group
  if gv_no_group_pers = abap_false and lt_prof is not initial.
    data(ls_group) = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_profile_group_details( iv_profile_group_id ).
    assign component |PROFGRP_DFLT| of structure ls_group to field-symbol(<lv_dflt>).
    if sy-subrc = 0.
*     validate profile ID
      if <lv_dflt> is not initial and line_exists( lt_prof[ prof_id = <lv_dflt> ] ).
        rv_default_prof_id = <lv_dflt>.
        return.
      endif.
    else.
      gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
    endif.
  endif.

* return the assigned profile with lowest sequence
  read table lt_prof assigning <ls_prof> index 1.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
    rv_default_prof_id = <ls_prof>-prof_id.
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_filter_deactivated_by_user.

  rv_filter_deactivated_by_user = me->mv_filter_deactivated_by_user.

endmethod.


method get_filter_mode.

  statics sr_filter_mode type ref to if_crm_isu_feature_param=>gty_param_value.
  if sr_filter_mode is not bound.
    sr_filter_mode = new #( ).
*   retrieve filter mode
     if cl_crm_isu_feature=>is_active( if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght ) = abap_true.
       case to_upper( cl_crm_isu_feature=>get_param(
                        iv_feature_id = if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght
                        iv_param_id   = if_crm_isu_feature_param=>gc_param_01 ) ).
         when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_default_filter_off.
           sr_filter_mode->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_default_filter_off.
         when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_filter_off.
           sr_filter_mode->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_filter_off.
         when others.
           sr_filter_mode->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_default_filter_on.
       endcase.
     endif.
  endif.

  rv_filter_mode = sr_filter_mode->*.

endmethod.


method GET_HIERARCHY_DETAILS.
  data(LS_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_DETAILS( IV_PROFILE_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID ).
  RS_RESULT = value #( LS_PROFILE-HIERACHY_ENTRIES[ PROF_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID ] default value #( ) ).
endmethod.


method GET_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.
  RT_RETURN = BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS( ).
endmethod.


method get_impl_class_instance.

  data:
    name  type seoclsname,
    entry type ty_impl_class.


  check not clsname is initial.

  name = to_upper( clsname ).

  read table me->impl_class_tab into entry with table key clsname = name.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    entry-clsname = name.
    try.
        try.
            create object entry-instance type (name)
              exporting
                io_param_container = me->param_container.
          catch cx_sy_dyn_call_error.
            create object entry-instance type (name).
        endtry.
      data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
      catch cx_root into lx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
               condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_prof_id     = me->prof_id
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
          classname = name method = |CONSTRUCTOR|
          prof_id = me->prof_id
          exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT
        return.
    endtry.
    if entry-instance is bound.
      set handler me->on_rel_filter_prep_requested for entry-instance activation abap_true.
      entry-instance->mv_prof_id = me->prof_id.
    endif.
    insert entry into table me->impl_class_tab.
  endif.

  instance = entry-instance.

endmethod.


method GET_INSTANCE.

  data(LV_CLASS) = IV_TREE_SERVICE_IMPL_CLASS.
  if LV_CLASS is initial.
    LV_CLASS = C_DEFAULT_TREE_SERVICE_CLASS.
  endif.

  " initial profiles are not supported
  data(LV_PROF_ID) = PROF_ID.
  if LV_PROF_ID is initial.
    LV_PROF_ID = CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>CO_INITIAL_PROFILE.
  endif.

  " check for buffered entry
  try.
      data(LR_INST) = ref #( INSTANCES[ CALLER_ID = CALLER_ID PROF_ID = LV_PROF_ID ] ).
    catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
      data(LV_NEW_INSTANCE) = ABAP_TRUE.
      " first call -> create new instance!
      create data LR_INST.
      LR_INST->PROF_ID   = LV_PROF_ID.
      LR_INST->CALLER_ID = CALLER_ID.
      if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
        create object LR_INST->INSTANCE
          exporting
            PROF_ID            = LV_PROF_ID
            CALLER_ID          = CALLER_ID
            CONTROLLER         = CONTROLLER
            IR_TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER.
      endif.
      create object LR_INST->INSTANCE type (LV_CLASS)
        exporting
          PROF_ID            = LV_PROF_ID
          CALLER_ID          = CALLER_ID
          CONTROLLER         = CONTROLLER
          IR_TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER.
      LR_INST->INSTANCE->INITIALIZE(
        IV_PROF_ID              = LV_PROF_ID
        IV_CALLER_ID            = CALLER_ID
        IR_CONTROLLER           = CONTROLLER
        IR_TREE_CONTROLLER      = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER
        IV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS = IV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS
      ).
      insert LR_INST->* into table INSTANCES reference into LR_INST.
  endtry.

  LR_INST->INSTANCE->SET_EVENT_SERVICE( EVENT_SERVICE ).
  LR_INST->INSTANCE->SET_TREE_CONTROLLER( IR_TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER ).
  LR_INST->INSTANCE->SETUP_INSTANCE( IV_FIRST_SETUP = LV_NEW_INSTANCE ).

  INSTANCE = LR_INST->INSTANCE.

endmethod.


method get_name_column.

  data:
  ls_pcol     type crmt_isutree_pcol,
  lv_col_id   type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_id.

  lv_col_id = iv_column_name+3.

  read table me->columns into ls_pcol with table key prof_id = me->prof_id col_id = lv_col_id.

  if sy-subrc eq 0.
    rv_column_name = ls_pcol-title.
  else.
    rv_column_name = ''.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE.
  loop at CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>INSTANCES assigning field-symbol(<INSTANCE>)
    where CALLER_ID     = CALLER_ID
      and HIER-PROF_ID  = GET_PROFILE_ID( )
      and HIER-BOL_TYPE = IV_BOL_TYPE.
    if not LINE_EXISTS( RT_RETURN[ TABLE_LINE = <INSTANCE>-NODE ] ).
      if IT_NODE_IDS is initial or LINE_EXISTS( IT_NODE_IDS[ TABLE_LINE = <INSTANCE>-NODE->GET_NODE_ID( ) ] ).
        insert <INSTANCE>-NODE into table RT_RETURN.
      endif.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_NODES_BY_ENTITIES.

  RR_RESULT = new #( ).

  if IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) = 0.
    return.
  endif.

  if not CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_HELP=>CONTAINS_ONLY_BOL_ENTITIES( IR_COLLECTION = IR_COLLECTION ).
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  data(LR_RESULT) = cast IF_BOL_BO_COL( new CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL( ) ).

  try.
      data(LR_COLLECTION_GROUPING) = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_GRP=>GET_INSTANCE( IR_COLLECTION = cast #( IR_COLLECTION ) ).
      data(LT_GROUPS) = LR_COLLECTION_GROUPING->GROUP_COLLECTION( ).
      loop at LT_GROUPS assigning field-symbol(<GROUP>).
        LR_RESULT->ADD_COLLECTION(
          IV_COLLECTION = FIND_NODES_BY_BOL_TYPE_PATHS(
            IV_OBJECT_NAME    = <GROUP>-OBJECT_NAME
            IT_NODE_IDS       = IT_NODE_IDS
            IV_ONLY_VISIBLE   = IV_ONLY_VISIBLE
            IV_MAKE_VISIBLE   = IV_MAKE_VISIBLE
            IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY = IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY
          )
        ).
      endloop.
    catch CX_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BASE.
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endtry.

  " filter tree nodes by BOL entities
  LR_RESULT = CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_HELP=>FILTER_BY_ENTITIES(
    IR_COLLECTION                 = LR_RESULT
    IR_FILTER                     = IR_COLLECTION
    IV_FILTER_ON_EMPTY_COLLECTION = ABAP_TRUE
  ).

  " handle first hit only if requested
  if IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial and LR_RESULT->SIZE( ) > 0.
    data(LR_NODE) = LR_RESULT->GET_FIRST( ).
    LR_RESULT->CLEAR( ).
    if LR_NODE is bound.
      LR_RESULT->ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_NODE ).
    endif.
  endif.

  " convert to tree node collection
  RR_RESULT = cast #(
    CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_COL_CONV=>GET_INSTANCE(
      IR_COLLECTION = LR_RESULT
    )->GET_AS_TREE_NODE_COLLECTION( )
  ).

endmethod.


method GET_NODES_BY_NODE_ID.
  loop at CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>INSTANCES assigning field-symbol(<INSTANCE>)
    where CALLER_ID    = CALLER_ID
      and HIER-PROF_ID = GET_PROFILE_ID( )
      and HIER-NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID.
    if not LINE_EXISTS( RT_RETURN[ TABLE_LINE = <INSTANCE>-NODE ] ).
      insert <INSTANCE>-NODE into table RT_RETURN.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_NODES_BY_PARENT_NODE_ID.
  loop at CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>INSTANCES assigning field-symbol(<INSTANCE>)
    where CALLER_ID           = CALLER_ID
      and HIER-PROF_ID        = GET_PROFILE_ID( )
      and HIER-PARENT_NODE_ID = IV_PARENT_NODE_ID.
    if not LINE_EXISTS( RT_RETURN[ TABLE_LINE = <INSTANCE>-NODE ] ).
      if IT_NODE_IDS is initial or LINE_EXISTS( IT_NODE_IDS[ TABLE_LINE = <INSTANCE>-NODE->GET_NODE_ID( ) ] ).
        insert <INSTANCE>-NODE into table RT_RETURN.
      endif.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_NODE_PROXY.
  if IR_TREE_NODE is not bound
    or TREE_CONTROLLER is not bound
    or TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT is not bound
    or TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE is not bound.
    return.
  endif.
  RR_RESULT = TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_BO(
    BO                    = IR_TREE_NODE
    IV_NO_FALLBACK_SEARCH = ABAP_TRUE
  ).
endmethod.


METHOD get_number_rows.

  DATA: ls_prof_tab LIKE LINE OF prof_tab.


  READ TABLE prof_tab INTO ls_prof_tab WITH table KEY prof_id = prof_id.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0 and ls_prof_tab-number_rows > 0.

    rv_rows = ls_prof_tab-number_rows.

  ELSE.

    rv_rows = co_default_number_rows.

  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_OCA.
  clear RESULT.
  try.
      data(LS_OCA_ENTRY) = OCA_TAB[ PROF_ID = PROF_ID NODE_ID = NODE_ID ID = OCA_ID ].
      RESULT = corresponding #( LS_OCA_ENTRY ).
      RESULT-PARAMETERS = corresponding #( filter #( OCAP_TAB where PROF_ID = PROF_ID and NODE_ID = NODE_ID and ID = OCA_ID ) ).
    catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND.
      clear RESULT.
  endtry.
endmethod.


method GET_OCA_COLUMN_KEY.
  data LV_INDEX type INT1.
  data(LV_COL_ID) = IV_COL_ID.
  if LV_COL_ID is initial.
    LV_COL_ID = 1.
  endif.
  LV_INDEX = LV_COL_ID.
  RV_VALUE = CONDENSE( VAL = |COL{ LV_INDEX }| ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method GET_OCA_TABLE.
  clear: RT_ACTIONS, ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS.
  if IV_NODE_ID is not initial.
    read table OCA_ACTIONS reference into data(LR_OCA_ACTIONS) with table key PROF_ID = PROF_ID NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID.
    if SY-SUBRC is not initial.
      ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = GET_TREENODE_OCA_TABLE( IV_NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID ).
      RT_ACTIONS = value #( for <OCA_ENTRY> in ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS ( GET_THTMLB_ACTION_DEFINITION( <OCA_ENTRY> ) ) ).
      insert value #( PROF_ID = PROF_ID NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID OCA_TAB = ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS ACTIONS = RT_ACTIONS ) into table OCA_ACTIONS.
    else.
      ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = LR_OCA_ACTIONS->OCA_TAB.
      RT_ACTIONS = LR_OCA_ACTIONS->ACTIONS.
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_param_container.

  ro_param_container = me->param_container.

endmethod.


method get_pres.

  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pres_tab into result
    with table key pres_id = pres_id.

endmethod.


method get_pres_columns.
  data ls_result type crmt_isutree_prco.
  field-symbols: <col> type crm_isutree_prco.

  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab
      assigning <col> where pres_id = pres_id.
    move-corresponding <col> to ls_result ##ENH_OK.
    insert ls_result into table result.
  endloop.

  if result is initial and iv_load = abap_true.
    data lt_col type ty_col_tab.
    select * from crm_isutree_prco into corresponding fields of table lt_col where pres_id = pres_id.
    cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>adjust_col_entries( changing ct_col = lt_col ).
    insert lines of lt_col into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab.
    result = get_pres_columns( pres_id ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method get_profiles_by_group.

  data:
    lr_profgrp_buf        type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ty_profgrp_buf,
    ls_profile            type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ty_profgrp,
    ls_prot               type crm_isutree_prot,
    lt_profgrp_assignment type standard table of crm_isutree_grpa with non-unique default key.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_profgrp_assignment> type crm_isutree_grpa.


  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>profgrp_buf_tab reference into lr_profgrp_buf
    with table key profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
*   create buffer entry
    create data lr_profgrp_buf.
    lr_profgrp_buf->profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
    insert lr_profgrp_buf->* into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>profgrp_buf_tab reference into lr_profgrp_buf.
*   fetch DB entries for requested profile group
    select * from crm_isutree_grpa into table lt_profgrp_assignment
      where profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and lt_profgrp_assignment is not initial.
      sort lt_profgrp_assignment by sequence.
      loop at lt_profgrp_assignment assigning <ls_profgrp_assignment>.
        move-corresponding <ls_profgrp_assignment> to ls_profile.
*       check buffer
        read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prot_tab into ls_prot
          with table key prof_id = ls_profile-prof_id.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          ls_profile-prof_desc = ls_prot-prof_desc.
        else.
*         get description from DB
          select single * from crm_isutree_prot into ls_prot
            where prof_id = ls_profile-prof_id and language = sy-langu.
          ls_prot-prof_id = ls_profile-prof_id.
*         buffer result
          insert ls_prot into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prot_tab.
          ls_profile-prof_desc = ls_prot-prof_desc.
        endif.
*       if description is not available: provide ID as description
        if ls_profile-prof_desc is initial.
          ls_profile-prof_desc = |<{ ls_profile-prof_id }>|.
        endif.
*       get ui texts
*        if cl_crm_isu_switch_check=>is_crm_ut_prod_enh_2_active( ) = abap_true.
          try.
              select single ui_text ui_tooltip from ('CRM_ISUTREE_GRAT') into corresponding fields of ls_profile
                  where profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id and prof_id = ls_profile-prof_id and language = sy-langu.
            catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
          endtry.
*        endif.
*       insert entry into buffer storage
        append ls_profile to lr_profgrp_buf->prof_tab.
        clear ls_profile.
      endloop.
    else.
      raise exception type cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree
        exporting
          textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>profile_group_empty
          val1   = |{ iv_profile_group_id }|.
    endif.
  endif.

  rt_profile = lr_profgrp_buf->prof_tab.

endmethod.


method GET_PROFILE_DETAILS.
  clear RS_PROFILE.
  try.
      RS_PROFILE = PROF_TAB[ PROF_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID ].
      RS_PROFILE-HIERACHY_ENTRIES = filter #( HIER_TAB where PROF_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID ).
    catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND ##NO_HANDLER.
      clear RS_PROFILE.
  endtry.
endmethod.


method get_profile_group_details.

  data:
    lr_profgrp type ref to crm_isutree_grpv.


  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>profgrp_tab reference into lr_profgrp
    with table key profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    create data lr_profgrp.
    select single * from crm_isutree_grp into corresponding fields of lr_profgrp->*
      where profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and lr_profgrp->* is not initial.
      select single * from crm_isutree_grpt into corresponding fields of lr_profgrp->*
        where profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id and language = sy-langu.
      lr_profgrp->profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
*     check personalization
      if gv_no_group_pers = abap_false.
        assign component |PROFGRP_PERS| of structure lr_profgrp->* to field-symbol(<lv_pers>).
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          if <lv_pers> = abap_true.
            try.
                data lv_pers_prof_id type crmt_tree_profile.
                select single prof_id from ('CRM_ISUTREE_GRPP') into lv_pers_prof_id
                  where username = gv_user_name and role = gv_role and profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
                if sy-subrc = 0.
*                 validate profile ID
                  data(lt_prof) = get_profiles_by_group( iv_profile_group_id ).
                  if line_exists( lt_prof[ prof_id = lv_pers_prof_id ] ).
                    assign component |PROFGRP_DFLT| of structure lr_profgrp->* to field-symbol(<lv_dflt>).
                    if sy-subrc = 0.
                      <lv_dflt> = lv_pers_prof_id.
                    else.
                      gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
                    endif.
                  else.
*                   profile no longer assigned to group -> remove personalization
                    delete from ('CRM_ISUTREE_GRPP')
                      where username = gv_user_name and role = gv_role and profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id.
                    if sy-subrc = 0.
                      call function 'DB_COMMIT'.
                    endif.
                  endif.
                endif.
              catch cx_root  ##catch_all.
                gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
            endtry.
          endif.
        else.
          gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
        endif.
      endif.
      insert lr_profgrp->* into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>profgrp_tab reference into lr_profgrp.
    else.
*     raise exception -> profile group not defined!
      raise exception type cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree
        exporting
          textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>profile_group_not_defined
          val1   = |{ iv_profile_group_id }|.
    endif.
  endif.

  rs_profile_group = lr_profgrp->*.

endmethod.


method GET_PROFILE_GROUP_ID.
  data(LR_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE) = TREE_CONTROLLER->GET_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE( ).
  if LR_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE is bound.
    RV_PROFGRP_ID = LR_PROFILE_CONTEXT_NODE->GET_PROFGRP_ID( ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_PROFILE_ID.
  RV_PROFILE_ID = PROF_ID.
endmethod.


method GET_RELATED_ENTITIES.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_08 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .


ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_07 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  TARGET = GET_RELATED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL(
    SOURCE                = SOURCE
    PATH                  = PATH
    HIER                  = HIER
    IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY = IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY
  ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_09 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_RELATED_ENTITIES_INTERNAL.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_10 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  data:
    PATH1   type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PATH,
    PATH2   type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PATH,
    PATH3   type CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PATH,
    REL     type CRMT_RELATION_NAME,
    CHILDS  type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
    GCHILDS type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
    ENTITY  type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY,
    FILTER  type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_RELATION_FILTER.

  try.
      if COUNT( VAL = PATH REGEX = |.*\\[.*\\].*| CASE = ABAP_FALSE ) > 0.
        TARGET = SOURCE->GET_RELATED_ENTITIES_BY_BPATH( IV_BPATH_STATEMENT = conv #( PATH ) ).
      else.
        PATH1 = PATH.
        shift PATH1 left deleting leading '/'.              "#EC NOTEXT
        split PATH1 at '/' into PATH1 PATH2.                "#EC NOTEXT
        shift PATH2 left deleting leading '/'.              "#EC NOTEXT
        PATH3 = PATH1.
        translate PATH3 to lower case.
        if PATH3 = 'root'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
          ENTITY = SOURCE->GET_ROOT( ).
          if ENTITY is bound.
            create object CHILDS
              type
              CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY_COL.
            CHILDS->ADD( ENTITY ).
          endif.
        elseif PATH3 = 'parent'.                            "#EC NOTEXT
          ENTITY = SOURCE->GET_PARENT( ).
          if ENTITY is bound.
            create object CHILDS
              type
              CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY_COL.
            CHILDS->ADD( ENTITY ).
          endif.
        elseif PATH3 = 'self'.                              "#EC NOTEXT
          create object CHILDS
            type
            CL_CRM_BOL_BO_COL.
          CHILDS->ADD( SOURCE ).
        else.
          REL = PATH1.
          if HIER-USE_FILTER eq ABAP_TRUE and EVENT_SERVICE is bound.
            FILTER = CL_CRM_BOL_RELATION_FILTER=>GET_INSTANCE( IV_RELATION_NAME = REL ).
            EVENT_SERVICE->PREPARE_RELATION_FILTER( FILTER = FILTER HIER = HIER IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY = IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY ).
          endif.
          CHILDS = CL_CRM_ISU_IL_TOOLS=>GET_RELATED_ENTITIES_WO_READ(
                     IO_SOURCE_ENTITY = SOURCE
                     IV_RELATION_NAME = REL
                     IO_FILTER        = FILTER ).
        endif.
        if PATH2 is initial.
*       final step
          TARGET = CHILDS.
        elseif CHILDS is bound.
*       more to do -> get grandchilds
          ENTITY ?= CHILDS->GET_FIRST( ).
          while ENTITY is bound.
            GCHILDS = GET_RELATED_ENTITIES( SOURCE = ENTITY  PATH = PATH2 HIER = HIER IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY = IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY ).
            if TARGET is bound.
              if GCHILDS is bound.
                TARGET->ADD_COLLECTION( GCHILDS ).
              endif.
            else.
              TARGET = GCHILDS.
            endif.
            ENTITY ?= CHILDS->GET_NEXT( ).
          endwhile.
        endif.
      endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_12 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

      TARGET = CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY_COL_UT=>CONVERT( TARGET ). "make distinct result

    catch CX_ROOT into data(LX_ROOT).                    "#EC CATCH_ALL
*     conditional breakpoint
*     // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*     // or
*     // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
      assert id CRMUIF_CONDITIONAL_BREAKPOINTS
             subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
             condition CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP_BT=>ASSERT(
                         IV_PROF_ID     = HIER-PROF_ID
                         IV_BREAK_EVENT = IF_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GC_EVENT_BT_EXCEPTION ) = ABAP_TRUE. "#EC NOTEXT

      CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL=>RAISE_MESSAGE_HANDLER_ERROR(
        CLASSNAME = 'CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE'
        METHOD    = 'GET_RELATED_ENTITIES'
        PROF_ID   = HIER-PROF_ID
        NODE_ID   = HIER-NODE_ID
        EXC       = LX_ROOT ).

      clear TARGET.
  endtry.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_11 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ROOT_NODES.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_04 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

ENHANCEMENT-SECTION CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_19 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  RESULT = GET_ROOT_NODES_INTERNAL(
    COLLECTION            = COLLECTION
    IR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST = IR_HIDDEN_NODES_EXIST
  ).

END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_02 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method GET_ROOT_NODES_INTERNAL.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_16 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

  data:
    root_node  type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node,
    root_col   type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    rentity    type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    entity     type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    it         type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
    roots      type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    childs     type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    impl_class type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree,
    rem_roots  type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
    rem_rootsc type abap_bool,
    rem_root   type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    filt_objn  type crmt_ext_obj_name,
    filt_objn1 type crmt_ext_obj_name,
    filt_objns type hashed table of crmt_ext_obj_name with unique key table_line.

  data:
    impl_class_enh type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh,
    prep_col       type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    prep_nodes     type hashed table of crmt_node_id with unique key table_line.

  field-symbols:
    <hier> type crm_isutree_hier,
    <inst> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>ty_instance.


  check collection is bound.

* clear pending filter table for a new tree build request
  clear me->pending_filters.

* check if root object collection changed within this roundtrip (MO_ROOT_OBJECT_COL will be cleared at RT end)
  if me->mo_root_object_col is bound.
    data(lv_root_object_col_changed) = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col=>check_col_content_differs(
                                         io_col_a = collection
                                         io_col_b = me->mo_root_object_col ).
  endif.

* store root object collection until next GET_ROOT_NODES call within same roundtrip
  me->mo_root_object_col = collection.

* check filters
  me->filter->filter( exporting source = collection  importing result = root_col ).

* invalidate current nodes
  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances assigning <inst>
    where hier-prof_id = me->prof_id and caller_id = me->caller_id.                    "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <inst>-node->children_valid = abap_false.
    <inst>-node->children_filtered = abap_false.
    <inst>-node->children_filter_disabled = abap_false.
    " if first roundtrip is not complete we reprocess the initial expanding on every GET_ROOT_NODES request
    if lv_root_object_col_changed = abap_true and <inst>-node->initial_expanding_done = abap_true.
      <inst>-node->initial_expanding_done = abap_false.
    endif.
  endloop.

  create object result type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node_col.
  result->activate_autocleanup( ).

* invalidate custom implementations
  me->refresh_impl_class_instances( ).

* more than one root
  it = root_col->get_iterator( ).

  rentity ?= it->get_first( ).

  while rentity is bound.

    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <hier>
      where prof_id = me->prof_id and parent_node_id = space.

      clear roots.

      try.
*         check for relation pre-processing
          if <hier>-prepare_rel = abap_true and <hier>-class is not initial.
*           node already processed?
            insert <hier>-node_id into table prep_nodes.
            if sy-subrc = 0.
              impl_class = me->get_impl_class_instance( <hier>-class ).
              impl_class_enh ?= impl_class.
              if impl_class_enh is bound.

*               conditional breakpoint
*               // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*               // or
*               // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
                assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                       subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Read Relation)'
                       condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                   iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_rel
                                   iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                                   iv_pres_id     = <hier>-pres_id
                                   iv_node_id     = <hier>-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT


                try.

*                   prepare collection of parent entities
                    prep_col = root_col->get_copy( ).

*                   now let the implementation class prepare the relation
                    impl_class_enh->prepare_children(
                      entities   = prep_col
                      child_hier = <hier> ).

                  catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method.
*                   method not implemented.
                  data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
                  catch cx_root into lx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL
*                   conditional breakpoint
*                   // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*                   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*                   // or
*                   // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*                   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
                    assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                           subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                           condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                       iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                                       iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT
                    cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                      method = 'PREPARE_CHILDREN' handler = impl_class
                      prof_id = me->prof_id node_id = <hier>-node_id
                      exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT

                endtry.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
        catch cx_sy_move_cast_error."#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.

      try.
          if <hier>-change_rel eq abap_true and <hier>-class is not initial.
*           if relation should be changed -> do that
            impl_class = me->get_impl_class_instance( <hier>-class ).
            try.

*               conditional breakpoint
*               // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*               // or
*               // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
                assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                       subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Read Relation)'
                       condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                   iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_rel
                                   iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                                   iv_pres_id     = <hier>-pres_id
                                   iv_node_id     = <hier>-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

                impl_class->get_children(
                  exporting
                    entity      = rentity
                    child_hier  = <hier>
                  importing
                    child_nodes = roots ).
              catch cx_sy_ref_is_initial."#EC NO_HANDLER
* impl class not istantiated
              catch cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_method."#EC NO_HANDLER
* method not implemented.
              catch cx_root into lx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL
*               conditional breakpoint
*               // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*               // or
*               // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*               // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
                assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                       subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
                       condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                   iv_prof_id     = <hier>-prof_id
                                   iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT
                cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                  method = 'GET_CHILDREN' handler = impl_class
                  prof_id = me->prof_id node_id = <hier>-node_id
                  exc = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT
            endtry.
          elseif not <hier>-parent_node_rel is initial.
            roots = me->get_related_entities( source = rentity  path = <hier>-parent_node_rel hier = <hier> ).
          endif.
        catch cx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL
          clear roots.
      endtry.

      if roots is bound.
*       set all remaining original roots of same type to filter
        if rem_roots is not bound.
          filt_objn = rentity->get_name( ).
          read table filt_objns transporting no fields with table key table_line = filt_objn.
          if sy-subrc <> 0.
*           check if filter object is defined statically in current tree profile hierarchy
            read table hier_tab transporting no fields with key prof_id = me->prof_id  bol_type = filt_objn.
            if sy-subrc = 0.  "if object type is not part of hierarchy we do not need filtering
              rem_roots = it->get_copy( ).
            if rem_roots is bound.
              rem_root ?= rem_roots->get_current( ).
              while rem_root is bound.
                filt_objn1 = rem_root->get_name( ).
                if filt_objn1 = filt_objn.
                  me->add_filter_entity( entity = rem_root  root_filter = abap_true ).
                  insert filt_objn into table filt_objns.
                else.
                  read table filt_objns transporting no fields with table key table_line = filt_objn1.
                  if sy-subrc <> 0.
                    rem_rootsc = abap_true.
                  endif.
                endif.
                rem_root ?= rem_roots->get_next( ).
              endwhile.
              endif.
            endif.
          endif.
          if rem_rootsc = abap_true.
            rem_rootsc = abap_false.
            clear rem_roots.
          endif.
        endif.
      else.
        create object roots type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
        roots->add( rentity ).
      endif.

      DO_HIER_SORT_ROOTENTITIES(
        IV_PROFILE_ID = <HIER>-PROF_ID
        IV_NODE_ID    = <HIER>-NODE_ID
        IR_COLLECTION = ROOTS
      ).

      entity ?= roots->get_first( ).
      while entity is bound.
        if <hier>-bol_type is initial or entity->get_name( ) = <hier>-bol_type.
          if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
            root_node = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>get_instance(
                          entity    = entity
                          hier      = <hier>
                          tree_srv  = me
                          caller_id = me->caller_id ).
          endif.
          ROOT_NODE = CREATE_TREE_NODE_INSTANCE(
            IR_ENTITY       = ENTITY
            IS_HIERARCHY    = <HIER>
            IR_TREE_SERVICE = ME
            IV_CALLER_ID    = CALLER_ID
          ).
          if root_node is bound.
*           hidden from customizing
            case root_node->is_hidden( ).
              when co_hidden_including_sub_nodes.
                if ir_hidden_nodes_exist is bound.
                  ir_hidden_nodes_exist->* = abap_true.
                endif.
              when abap_true.
                if ir_hidden_nodes_exist is bound.
                  ir_hidden_nodes_exist->* = abap_true.
                endif.
                childs = root_node->get_child_nodes( ).
                entity ?= childs->get_first( ).
                while entity is bound.
                  result->add( entity ).
                  entity ?= childs->get_next( ).
                endwhile.
              when others.
                result->add( root_node ).
            endcase.
          endif.
        endif.
        entity ?= roots->get_next( ).
      endwhile.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_20 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

    endloop.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_18 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

    rentity ?= it->get_next( ).
  endwhile.


* check all filters are correctly set
  me->apply_filters( collection = result  force = abap_true ).

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_17 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


METHOD GET_SCROLL_ROWS.

  DATA: ls_prof_tab LIKE LINE OF prof_tab.


  READ TABLE prof_tab INTO ls_prof_tab WITH table KEY prof_id = prof_id.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0 and ls_prof_tab-scroll_row_count > 0.

    rv_rows = ls_prof_tab-scroll_row_count.

  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_TBA_TABLE.
  clear: RT_ACTIONS, ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS.
  ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS = GET_TOOLBAR_OCA_TABLE( ).
  RT_ACTIONS = value #( for <OCA_ENTRY> in ET_OCA_DEFINITIONS ( GET_THTMLB_ACTION_DEFINITION( <OCA_ENTRY> ) ) ).
endmethod.


method GET_THTMLB_ACTION_DEFINITION.
  clear RS_ACTION.
  RS_ACTION = corresponding #( IS_OCA_DEFINITION ).
  "RS_ACTION-ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
endmethod.


method GET_TOOLBAR_OCA_TABLE.
  clear RT_ACTIONS.
  RT_ACTIONS = filter #( OCA_TAB where PROF_ID = PROF_ID and NODE_ID = conv #( SPACE ) ).
endmethod.


method GET_TREENODE_OCA_TABLE.
  clear RT_ACTIONS.
  if IV_NODE_ID is not initial.
    RT_ACTIONS = filter #( OCA_TAB where PROF_ID = PROF_ID and NODE_ID = IV_NODE_ID ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method GET_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  if FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS is not initial.
    RV_CLASS = FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  elseif IV_DEFAULT_CLASS is not initial.
    RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
  else.
    RV_CLASS = C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS.
  endif.
endmethod.


method get_visible_columns.

  data:
    col_id_idx type sytabix.

  field-symbols:
    <pcol> type crmt_isutree_pcol.

  loop at me->columns assigning <pcol> where hidden = abap_false.  "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
    col_id_idx = <pcol>-col_id.
    append col_id_idx to result.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method get_width_column.

  data: ls_pcol   type crmt_isutree_pcol,
        lv_col_id type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_id.

  lv_col_id = iv_column_name+3.
  read table pcol_tab into ls_pcol with table key prof_id = prof_id col_id = lv_col_id.
  if sy-subrc eq 0.
    rv_width = ls_pcol-width.
  else.
    rv_width = 0.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_crm_isu_feature_docu~get_description.

  clear ev_description.

  case iv_feature_id.
    when if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght.
      ev_description = cl_wd_utilities=>get_otr_text_by_alias(
                         alias      = 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/IU_BOL_TREE_RES_FLTR_HLGHT_DESCR'
                         language   = iv_language ).

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_brf_pres.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language iv_language.
      endif.
      ev_description = text-tpt.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language sy-langu.
      endif.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_preview_overlay.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language iv_language.
      endif.
      ev_description = text-pot.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language sy-langu.
      endif.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_obj_wb_hier_sort.
      IF iv_language IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_language <> sy-langu.
        SET LANGUAGE iv_language.
      ENDIF.
      ev_description = TEXT-des.
      IF iv_language IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_language <> sy-langu.
        SET LANGUAGE sy-langu.
      ENDIF.

  ENDCASE.

endmethod.


method if_crm_isu_feature_docu~get_documentation.

  clear ev_documentation.

  case iv_feature_id.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght.
      ev_documentation = cl_wd_utilities=>get_otr_text_by_alias(
                           alias      = 'CRM_IU_IC_BOLTREE/IU_BOL_TREE_RES_FLTR_HLGHT_DOCU'
                           language   = iv_language ).

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_brf_pres.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language iv_language.
      endif.
      ev_documentation = text-tpd.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language sy-langu.
      endif.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_preview_overlay.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language iv_language.
      endif.
      ev_documentation = text-pod.
      if iv_language is not initial and iv_language <> sy-langu.
        set language sy-langu.
      endif.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_obj_wb_hier_sort.
      IF iv_language IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_language <> sy-langu.
        SET LANGUAGE iv_language.
      ENDIF.
      ev_documentation = TEXT-doc.
      IF iv_language IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_language <> sy-langu.
        SET LANGUAGE sy-langu.
      ENDIF.

  ENDCASE.

endmethod.


method if_crm_isu_feature_impl~is_feature_available.

  ev_feature_available = abap_false.

  case iv_feature_id.

    when if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght.

      ev_feature_available = abap_true.

    when if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_brf_pres.

*     available if the application usage class exists
      try.
          data lr_test type ref to data.
          create data lr_test type ('CL_CRM_ISU_BRF_APPL_USAGE_TP=>IF_CRM_ISU_BRF_APPL_USAGE~GTY_GENERATION_PARAMETERS').
          create data lr_test type ('CRMT_IU_BOLTREE_COL_ICON_LONG').
          ev_feature_available = abap_true.
        catch cx_root  ##no_handler  ##catch_all.
      endtry.

    when if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_preview_overlay.

*     available if the application usage class exists
      try.
          create data lr_test type ('CRMT_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_PREVIEW').
          field-symbols <lv_preview> type any.
          assign IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>('FP_REGOVERLAY') to <lv_preview>.
          if sy-subrc = 0 and <lv_preview> = 'regoverlay'.
            data ls_pcol type crm_isutree_pcol.
            field-symbols <lv_pcol_preview> type any.
            assign component 'PREVIEW' of structure ls_pcol to <lv_pcol_preview>.
            if sy-subrc = 0.
              ev_feature_available = abap_true.
            endif.
          endif.
        catch cx_root  ##no_handler  ##catch_all.
      endtry.

    WHEN if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_obj_wb_hier_sort.
      ev_feature_available = abap_true.

  ENDCASE.

endmethod.


method if_crm_isu_feature_param~get_param_values.

  clear et_param_value.

  case iv_feature_id.

    when if_crm_isu_feature=>gc_iu_bol_tree_res_fltr_hlght.

      case iv_param_id.

        when if_crm_isu_feature_param=>gc_param_01.

          data ls_param_value type if_crm_isu_feature_param=>gty_param_value_entry.
          ls_param_value-value   = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_default_filter_on.
          ls_param_value-text    = text-fla.
          if ls_param_value-text is initial.
            ls_param_value-text = 'Activate filter initially'  ##no_text.
          endif.
          ls_param_value-default = abap_true.
          append ls_param_value to et_param_value.

          ls_param_value-value   = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_default_filter_off.
          ls_param_value-text    = text-fld.
          if ls_param_value-text is initial.
            ls_param_value-text = 'Deactivate filter initially'  ##no_text.
          endif.
          ls_param_value-default = abap_false.
          append ls_param_value to et_param_value.

          ls_param_value-value   = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>gc_filter_off.
          ls_param_value-text    = text-flo.
          if ls_param_value-text is initial.
            ls_param_value-text = 'Deactivate filter permanently'  ##no_text.
          endif.
          ls_param_value-default = abap_false.
          append ls_param_value to et_param_value.

        when if_crm_isu_feature_param=>gc_param_02.

          ls_param_value-value   = abap_false.
          ls_param_value-text    = text-fao.
          if ls_param_value-text is initial.
            if sy-langu = 'D'.
              ls_param_value-text = 'Filter auf alle Objekte anwenden: nur Filterobjekte inkl. Subhierarchie sichtbar'  ##no_text.
            else.
              ls_param_value-text = 'Apply filter to all objects: only filter objects including sub hierarchy visible'  ##no_text.
            endif.
          endif.
          ls_param_value-default = abap_true.
          append ls_param_value to et_param_value.

          ls_param_value-value   = abap_true.
          ls_param_value-text    = text-ffo.
          if ls_param_value-text is initial.
            if sy-langu = 'D'.
              ls_param_value-text = 'Filter nur auf Filterobjekte anwenden: parallele Zweige anderer Objekte sichtbar'  ##no_text.
            else.
              ls_param_value-text = 'Apply filter only to filter objects: parallel branches of other objects visible'  ##no_text.
            endif.
          endif.
          ls_param_value-default = abap_false.
          append ls_param_value to et_param_value.

      endcase.

  endcase.

endmethod.


method INITIALIZE ##NEEDED.

  clear GT_BOL_TYPE_ITEMS.
  clear GT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.

  if IR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER.
  endif.

  FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS = IV_TREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  if FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS is initial.
    FTREE_NODE_IMPL_CLASS = C_DEFAULT_TREE_NODE_CLASS.
  endif.

  if IV_PROF_ID is initial.
*   conditional breakpoint
*   // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*   // or
*   // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
    assert id CRMUIF_CONDITIONAL_BREAKPOINTS
           subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
           condition CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP_BT=>ASSERT(
                       IV_BREAK_EVENT = IF_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GC_EVENT_BT_EXCEPTION ) = ABAP_TRUE ##NO_TEXT.
*   get controller path (if caller_id is tree component ID)
    if IR_CONTROLLER is bound and IV_CALLER_ID is not initial.
      try.
          data(LR_WINDOW) = cast CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL( IR_CONTROLLER ).
          data(LR_VIEW) = cast CL_BSP_WD_VIEW_CONTROLLER( LR_WINDOW->GET_HOST_VIEW( ) ).
          if LR_VIEW is bound.
            data(LV_CALLER) = |{ LR_VIEW->APPLICATION_NAME case = upper } -> { LR_WINDOW->GET_COMPONENT_USAGE_NAME( ) }| ##NO_TEXT.
          endif.
        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.                    "#EC NO_HANDLER
      endtry.
    endif.
    if LV_CALLER is initial.
      LV_CALLER = IV_CALLER_ID.
    endif.
    raise exception type CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE
      exporting
        TEXTID = CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE=>PROFILE_INITIAL
        VAL1   = |{ LV_CALLER }|.
  endif.

  "
  PROF_ID = IV_PROF_ID.

  " store caller reference id
  CALLER_ID = IV_CALLER_ID.

  " load profile customizing settings
  LOAD( ).

  " prepare tree filter
  create object FILTER.

  " load genil component set
  LOAD_COMPONENT_SET( ).

  BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS( ).
  BUILT_BOL_TYPES( ).

endmethod.


method INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH.
  insert value #(
    ID = LINES( IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM->PATHS ) + 1
  ) into table IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM->PATHS reference into data(LR_BOL_TYPE_PATH).
  INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_REC(
    IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS = IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
    IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM  = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM
    IV_TARGET_NODE_ID  = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-NODE_ID
    IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM   = IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM
    IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH   = LR_BOL_TYPE_PATH
  ).
endmethod.


method INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_REC.
  if IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-PARENT_NODE_ID is not initial.
    if not LINE_EXISTS( IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS[ NODE_ID = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-PARENT_NODE_ID ] ).
      raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
    endif.
    INT_BUILT_BOL_TYPE_PATH_REC(
      IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS = IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
      IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM  = IT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS[ NODE_ID = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-PARENT_NODE_ID ]
      IV_TARGET_NODE_ID  = IV_TARGET_NODE_ID
      IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM   = IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM
      IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH   = IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH
    ).
  endif.
  insert value #(
    NODE_ID   = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-NODE_ID
    SEQUENCE  = LINES( IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH->NODES ) + 1
    BOL_TYPE  = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-BOL_TYPE
    RECURSIVE = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-RECURSIVE
    IS_ROOT   = BOOLC( IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-PARENT_NODE_ID is initial )
    IS_TARGET = BOOLC( IV_TARGET_NODE_ID = IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-NODE_ID
     and IS_HIERARCHY_ITEM-BOL_TYPE = IR_BOL_TYPE_ITEM->BOL_TYPE )
  ) into table IR_BOL_TYPE_PATH->NODES.
endmethod.


method INT_BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.
  data(LV_LEVEL) = IV_LEVEL + 1.
  data(LV_SEQUENCE) = value CRM_ISUTREE_HIER-SEQUENCE( ).
  loop at HIER_TAB assigning field-symbol(<HIERARCHY_ENTRY>)
      where PROF_ID        = PROF_ID
        and PARENT_NODE_ID = IV_PARENT_NODE_ID.
    if not LINE_EXISTS( CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS[ NODE_ID = <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-NODE_ID ] ).
      LV_SEQUENCE = LV_SEQUENCE + 1.
      insert value #(
        LEVEL          = LV_LEVEL
        NODE_ID        = <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-NODE_ID
        PARENT_NODE_ID = <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-PARENT_NODE_ID
        SEQUENCE       = LV_SEQUENCE
        BOL_TYPE       = cond #(
                           when <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-BOL_TYPE is not initial
                           then CL_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_MISC=>GET_OBJECT_MATCH_NAMES(
                                  IV_OBJECT_NAME = conv #( <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-BOL_TYPE )
                                )-OBJECT_NAME
                           else <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-BOL_TYPE
                         )
        RECURSIVE      = <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-RECURSIVE
      ) into table CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS.
      if SY-SUBRC is initial.
        INT_BUILT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS(
          exporting
            IV_PARENT_NODE_ID  = <HIERARCHY_ENTRY>-NODE_ID
            IV_LEVEL           = LV_LEVEL
          changing
            CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS = CT_HIERARCHY_ITEMS
        ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method IS_COLUMN_FILTERABLE.
  if not USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS( ).
    RV_FILTERABLE = ABAP_TRUE.
  else.
    RV_FILTERABLE = ABAP_FALSE.
    try.
        data(LS_COLUMN) = PCOL_TAB[ PROF_ID = GET_PROFILE_ID( ) COL_ID = GET_COL_ID_BY_COLUMN_NAME( IV_COLUMN_NAME ) ].
        assign component 'FILTERABLE' of structure LS_COLUMN to field-symbol(<FILTERABLE>).
        if SY-SUBRC is initial and <FILTERABLE> is assigned.
          RV_FILTERABLE = BOOLC( <FILTERABLE> is not initial ).
        endif.
      catch CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND ##NO_HANDLER.
    endtry.
  endif.
endmethod.


method is_column_hidden.

  data:
    ls_pcol     type crmt_isutree_pcol,
    lv_col_id   type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_id.

  lv_col_id = iv_column_name+3.
  read table pcol_tab into ls_pcol with table key prof_id = prof_id col_id = lv_col_id.
  if sy-subrc eq 0.
    rv_hidden = ls_pcol-hidden.
  else.
    rv_hidden = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_column_oca_menu_active.

  data:
    ls_pcol     type crmt_isutree_pcol,
    lv_col_id   type crmt_iu_ic_bol_tree_col_id.

  lv_col_id = iv_column_name+3.
  read table pcol_tab into ls_pcol with table key prof_id = prof_id col_id = lv_col_id.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
    rv_active = ls_pcol-col_oca_menu.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_column_preview_active.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_pcol> type crmt_isutree_pcol,
    <lv_preview> type any.


  if iv_column_name is initial.
    loop at pcol_tab assigning <ls_pcol> where prof_id = prof_id.
      assign component 'PREVIEW' of structure <ls_pcol> to <lv_preview>.
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        if <lv_preview> = abap_true.
          rv_preview = abap_true.
          exit.
        endif.
      else.
        exit.
      endif.
    endloop.
  else.
    read table pcol_tab assigning <ls_pcol> with table key prof_id = prof_id col_id = iv_column_name+3.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      assign component 'PREVIEW' of structure <ls_pcol> to <lv_preview>.
      if sy-subrc = 0 and <lv_preview> = abap_true.
        rv_preview = abap_true.
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_column_sortable.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_pcol> type crmt_isutree_pcol.


  if me->is_table( ) = abap_true.
*   for tables sorting is always possible
    rv_sortable = abap_true.
  else.
*   for trees check customizing settings
    read table pcol_tab assigning <ls_pcol> with table key prof_id = prof_id col_id = iv_column_name+3.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and <ls_pcol>-sortable = abap_true.
      rv_sortable = abap_true.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_ehp1_active.

  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = CL_CRM_ISU_SWITCH_CHECK=>CO_SWITCH_CRM_UT_ER_1 ).
**Decoupling of CRM-IM*
*  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = CL_CRM_IPM_SWITCH_CHECK=>GC_EHP1 ).
**Decoupling of CRM-IM*
  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = 'CRM_ETC_EHP1' ) ##NO_TEXT.
  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = 'CRM_WASTE_1' ) ##NO_TEXT.

  if not CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
*   tree EHP1 is active if one of the corresponding users is active
    if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active = abap_undefined.
*     Utilities
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active = cl_crm_isu_switch_check=>is_crm_ut_er_1_active( ).
      if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active <> abap_true.
**Decoupling of CRM-IM*
*       IPM
*        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active = cl_crm_ipm_switch_check=>is_ehp1_active( ).
**Decoupling of CRM-IM*
        if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active <> abap_true.
*         ETC
          cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active = cl_webcuif_switch=>is_switch_active( 'CRM_ETC_EHP1' ). "#EC NOTEXT
          if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active <> abap_true.
*           Waste
            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active = cl_webcuif_switch=>is_switch_active( 'CRM_WASTE_1' ). "#EC NOTEXT
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
    endif.
  else.
    CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>EHP1_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

  result = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp1_active.


endmethod.


method is_ehp2_active.

  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = CL_CRM_ISU_SWITCH_CHECK=>CO_SWITCH_CRM_UT_ER_1 ).
  CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>SWITCH_REQUEST( exporting IV_SWITCHID = CL_CRM_SFW_EHP2_SWITCH_CHECK=>CO_UT_XC_2 ).

  if not CL_CRM_IU_COMPATIBILITY=>IS_ON_PREMISE( ).
*   tree EHP2 is active if one of the corresponding users is active
    if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp2_active = abap_undefined.
*     Utilities Cross Component
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp2_active =
        cl_crm_sfw_ehp2_switch_check=>is_switch_active( cl_crm_sfw_ehp2_switch_check=>co_ut_xc_2 ).
*     Utilities ER1 (special case)
      if cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp2_active = abap_false.
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp2_active = cl_crm_isu_switch_check=>is_crm_ut_er_1_active( ).
      endif.
    endif.
  else.
    CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>EHP2_ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

  result = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ehp2_active.

endmethod.


method is_filter_active.

  result = me->filter->is_active( ).

endmethod.


method is_filter_available.

  result = me->filter->is_available( ).

  if result = abap_true and iv_available_and_filtered = abap_true.
    result = me->filter->is_filtered( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_oca_menu_active.

  field-symbols:
   <prof> type ty_prof.


  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab assigning <prof>
    with table key prof_id = me->prof_id.
  if sy-subrc = 0.
    if iv_check_all = abap_true.
*     check also column and row definitions if any menu is active
      if <prof>-col_oca_menu_all is not bound.
        create data <prof>-col_oca_menu_all.
        <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = <prof>-col_oca_menu.
        if <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* <> cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
*         check columns
          field-symbols <ls_pcol> type crmt_isutree_pcol.
          loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pcol_tab assigning <ls_pcol> where prof_id = me->prof_id.
            case <ls_pcol>-col_oca_menu.
              when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                exit.  "final state
              when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_on.
                <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_on.
              when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_off.
*               ignore
            endcase.
          endloop.
          if <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* <> cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
*           check rows
            field-symbols <ls_hier> type crm_isutree_hier.
            loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab assigning <ls_hier> where prof_id = me->prof_id and pres_id is not initial.
              data lt_pres_id type hashed table of crmt_pres_id with unique key table_line.
              insert <ls_hier>-pres_id into table lt_pres_id.
              check sy-subrc = 0.  "check only once per pres id
              field-symbols <ls_col> type crm_isutree_prco.
              loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab assigning <ls_col> where pres_id = <ls_hier>-pres_id.
                case <ls_col>-col_oca_menu.
                  when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                    <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                    exit.  "final state
                  when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_on.
                    <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_on.
                  when cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_off.
*                   ignore
                endcase.
              endloop.
              if <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->* = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_it=>gc_oca_as_menu_with_ocm.
                exit.  "final state
              endif.
            endloop.
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
      rv_active = <prof>-col_oca_menu_all->*.
    else.
      rv_active = <prof>-col_oca_menu.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IS_PROFILE_IN_PROFILE_GROUP.
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_FALSE.
  data(LT_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILES_BY_GROUP( IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID = IV_PROFILE_GROUP_ID ).
  RV_RESULT = BOOLC( LINE_EXISTS( LT_PROFILE[ PROF_ID = IV_PROFILE_ID ] ) ).
endmethod.


method is_table.

* check if profile will result into a flat table by customizing settings
  rv_is_table = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>is_table_by_cust( me->prof_id ).

endmethod.


method is_table_by_cust.

  data:
    hier type crm_isutree_hier.

  field-symbols:
    <prof> type ty_prof.


* ensure profile customizing is loaded
  cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>load_profile_cust( iv_profile_id ).

  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab assigning <prof>
    with table key prof_id = iv_profile_id.
* <prof> has to be assigned because of LOAD_PROFILE_CUST -> otherwise major issue -> DUMP
  if <prof>-is_table = abap_undefined.
*   set default value
    rv_is_table = <prof>-is_table = abap_false.
*   check if more than one visible hierarchy level is possible
    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab into hier
      where prof_id = iv_profile_id and
            hidden = abap_false and
            ( parent_node_id is not initial or recursive <> abap_false ). "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
      do.
        if hier-recursive <> abap_false.
          return.
        endif.
        read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab into hier
          with key prof_id = hier-prof_id  node_id = hier-parent_node_id.
        if sy-subrc = 0 and hier-hidden = abap_false.
*         second hierarchy level found -> leave this function and return ABAP_FALSE
          return.
        elseif sy-subrc <> 0.
*         no further hierarchy level found -> continue with next entry
          exit.
        endif.
      enddo.
    endloop.
*   if we reach this point no second hierarchy level was found and the tree appears as table
    rv_is_table = <prof>-is_table = abap_true.
  else.
    rv_is_table = <prof>-is_table.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IS_VIRTUAL_ROOT_ACTIVE.

  if me->virtual_root_count > 0.
    result = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method load.

* load static customizing settings into buffer
  load_profile_cust( me->prof_id ).

endmethod.


method LOAD_COMPONENT_SET ##NEEDED.
  " load genil component set
  read table PROF_TAB assigning field-symbol(<PROF>) with table key PROF_ID = PROF_ID.
  if SY-SUBRC = 0 and <PROF>-GENIL_COMPSET is not initial.
    data(LR_CORE) = CL_CRM_BOL_CORE=>GET_INSTANCE( ).
    if LR_CORE is bound.
      LR_CORE->LOAD_COMPONENT_SET( <PROF>-GENIL_COMPSET ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.


method load_profile_cust.

  data:
    prof     type ty_prof,
    prot     type crm_isutree_prot,
    pres_tab type table of crm_isutree_pres,
    hier_tab type table of crm_isutree_hier,
    hier_ta2 type table of crm_isutree_hier,
    oca_tab  type table of crmt_isutree_oca,
    col_tab  type table of crm_isutree_prco,
    pcol_tab type table of crmt_isutree_pcol.

  field-symbols:
    <pres> type crm_isutree_pres,
    <oca>  type crmt_isutree_oca,
    <col>  type crm_isutree_prco,
    <pcol> type crmt_isutree_pcol.


* load profile
  read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab transporting no fields
    with table key prof_id = iv_profile_id.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
*   get profile details
    select single * from crm_isutree_prof into corresponding fields of prof where prof_id = iv_profile_id.
    if sy-subrc <> 0.
*     conditional breakpoint
*     // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*     // or
*     // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
      assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
             subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Exception occured'
             condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
