                         iv_prof_id     = iv_profile_id
                         iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT
      raise exception type cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree
        exporting
          textid = cx_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree=>profile_not_defined
          val1   = |{ iv_profile_id }|.
    endif.
    prof-is_table = abap_undefined.
    insert prof into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab.
*   get profile texts
    select single * from crm_isutree_prot into prot
      where prof_id = iv_profile_id and language = sy-langu.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      insert prot into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prot_tab.
    endif.

* select profile columns
    select * from crm_isutree_pcol into corresponding fields of table pcol_tab where prof_id = iv_profile_id ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      loop at pcol_tab assigning <pcol> ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS.
        select single title from crm_isutree_pcot into (<pcol>-title)
          where prof_id  = <pcol>-prof_id and
                col_id   = <pcol>-col_id and
                language = sy-langu.
        insert <pcol> into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pcol_tab.
      endloop.
    endif.

*   select hierarchy nodes for profile
    select * from crm_isutree_hier into table hier_tab where prof_id = iv_profile_id.
    if sy-subrc = 0.

*     check for dynamic hierarchy entries
      field-symbols <hier> type crm_isutree_hier.
      loop at hier_tab assigning <hier> where parent_node_id is initial and class is not initial.
        data classes_processed type hashed table of crmt_class with unique key table_line.
        insert <hier>-class into table classes_processed.
        check sy-subrc = 0.  "avoid multiple calls for same class
        try.
            data impl_class type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree.
            create object impl_class type (<hier>-class).
            data impl_class_hier type ref to if_iu_ic_bol_tree_hier.
            impl_class_hier ?= impl_class.
            data hier_tab_dyn type table of crm_isutree_hier.
            if hier_tab_dyn is initial.
              hier_tab_dyn = hier_tab.
            endif.
            impl_class_hier->adjust_hier_entries(
              exporting
                iv_profile_id = iv_profile_id
              changing
                ct_hier       = hier_tab_dyn ).
          catch cx_root.
        endtry.
      endloop.

      if hier_tab_dyn is not initial and hier_tab_dyn <> hier_tab.
        hier_tab = hier_tab_dyn.
*       check if potential dynamic recursions exist  (A->B->C->D->B->C...  -> B is recursive because it has two different parent node IDs)
        data hier_tab_dyn_recursion type sorted table of crm_isutree_hier with non-unique key node_id.
        insert lines of hier_tab into table hier_tab_dyn_recursion.
        loop at hier_tab assigning <hier>.
          data hier_node_id_tab_recursive type hashed table of crmt_node_id with unique key table_line.
          read table hier_node_id_tab_recursive transporting no fields with table key table_line = <hier>-node_id.
          if sy-subrc = 0.
            assert <hier>-recursive <> abap_true.  "combination of static and dynamic recursion is not supported!
            <hier>-recursive = 'M'.  "mark as potential multi-level recursion
          else.
            data hier_node_id_count type sytabix.
            hier_node_id_count = 0.
            loop at hier_tab_dyn_recursion transporting no fields where node_id = <hier>-node_id.
              hier_node_id_count = hier_node_id_count + 1.
              if hier_node_id_count > 1.
                assert <hier>-recursive <> abap_true.  "combination of static and dynamic recursion is not supported!
                <hier>-recursive = 'M'.  "mark as potential multi-level recursion
                insert <hier>-node_id into table hier_node_id_tab_recursive.
                exit.
              endif.
            endloop.
          endif.
        endloop.
      endif.

*     remove statically hidden leafs from hierarchy (they are not relevant for any processing)
      data lv_hier_count type sytabix.
      while lv_hier_count <> lines( hier_tab ).
        lv_hier_count = lines( hier_tab ).
        loop at hier_tab assigning <hier> where hidden = abap_true.
          read table hier_tab transporting no fields with key parent_node_id = <hier>-node_id.
          if sy-subrc <> 0.
            delete hier_tab.  "remove hidden leaf
          endif.
        endloop.
      endwhile.

      insert lines of hier_tab into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab.

      hier_ta2 = hier_tab." save for ocas below

*   load presentations
      if hier_tab is not initial.
        sort hier_tab by pres_id.
        delete adjacent duplicates from hier_tab comparing pres_id.
        select * from crm_isutree_pres into table pres_tab
          for all entries in hier_tab
          where pres_id = hier_tab-pres_id.
      endif.
      loop at pres_tab assigning <pres>.
        insert <pres> into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pres_tab.
      endloop.

* load presentation columns
      if pres_tab is not initial.
        select * from crm_isutree_prco into table col_tab
         for all entries in pres_tab
         where pres_id = pres_tab-pres_id.
      endif.
      loop at col_tab assigning <col>.
        insert <col> into table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab.
      endloop.

*     load OCAs
      if hier_ta2 is not initial.
        select * from crm_isutree_oca into corresponding fields of table oca_tab
          for all entries in hier_ta2
          where prof_id = hier_ta2-prof_id and ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS
                ( node_id = hier_ta2-node_id or node_id = space ).
      endif.
      loop at oca_tab assigning <oca>.
        select single text tooltip title description from crm_isutree_ocat into (<oca>-text, <oca>-tooltip, <oca>-title, <oca>-description)
          where prof_id = <oca>-prof_id and
                node_id = <oca>-node_id and
                id      = <oca>-id      and
                langu   = sy-langu.
        if <oca>-col_id is initial.
*         assign OCA to first visible column
          data lv_first_col_id type numc2.
          if lv_first_col_id is initial.
            sort pcol_tab by sequence col_id.
            loop at pcol_tab assigning <pcol> where hidden = abap_false.
              lv_first_col_id = <pcol>-col_id.
              exit.
            endloop.
            if lv_first_col_id is initial.
              lv_first_col_id = 1.
            endif.
          endif.
          <oca>-col_id = lv_first_col_id.
        endif.
        data(LR_OCA_ENTRY) = new TS_OCA_ENTRY( corresponding #( <OCA> ) ).
        LR_OCA_ENTRY->COLUMN_KEY = GET_OCA_COLUMN_KEY( IV_COL_ID = LR_OCA_ENTRY->COL_ID ).
        LR_OCA_ENTRY->ACTIVE = ABAP_TRUE.
        LR_OCA_ENTRY->SEQUENCE_ALL = LR_OCA_ENTRY->SEQUENCE.
        insert LR_OCA_ENTRY->* into table CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE=>OCA_TAB.
      endloop.

      select *
        from CRM_ISUTREE_OCAP
       where PROF_ID = @IV_PROFILE_ID
     appending corresponding fields of table @OCAP_TAB.

*     support CURBU skin, initial call
      on_skin_change( ).

    endif.
  endif.

ENHANCEMENT-POINT CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV_03 SPOTS CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_BOL_TREE_SRV STATIC .

endmethod.


method on_bol_reset_finished.

  if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_ic_active( ) = abap_true.
*   in IC mode we can reset everything
    cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>reset( ).
  else.
*   in non-IC mode we only automatically reset service instances that have no active
    cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>reset( only_unused = abap_true ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method on_rel_filter_prep_requested.

  if me->event_service is bound and io_relation_filter is bound.
    try.
        me->event_service->prepare_relation_filter(
          filter                = io_relation_filter
          hier                  = is_tree_hier
          io_parent_node_entity = io_parent_node_entity ).
      data lx_root type ref to cx_root.
      catch cx_root into lx_root."#EC CATCH_ALL
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
          method  = |REQUEST_FILTER_PREPARATION|
          handler = sender
          prof_id = is_tree_hier-prof_id node_id = is_tree_hier-node_id
          exc = lx_root ).
    endtry.
  endif.

endmethod.


method ON_SKIN_CHANGE.

  ADJUST_COL_ENTRIES( changing CT_COL = COL_TAB ).

  ADJUST_OCA_ENTRIES( changing CT_OCA = OCA_TAB ).

  " adjust all tree nodes:
  CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE=>SKIN_CHANGED( ).

endmethod.


method refresh_impl_class_instances.

  field-symbols:
    <entry> type ty_impl_class.


* conditional breakpoint
* // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
* // or
* // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
* // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
  assert id crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
         subkey 'Utilities BOL Tree: Impl Class (Refresh)'
         condition cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                     iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_impl_class_refresh
                     iv_prof_id     = me->prof_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

  loop at me->impl_class_tab assigning <entry> where instance is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <entry>-instance->refresh( ).
    if iv_reset = abap_true.
      set handler me->on_rel_filter_prep_requested for <entry>-instance activation abap_false.
    endif.
  endloop.

  if iv_reset = abap_true.
    clear me->impl_class_tab.
  endif.

endmethod.


method remove_filter_entity.

  check entity is bound.

  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~remove( entity ).

endmethod.


method reset.

  data:
    prof like line of cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab.

  field-symbols:
    <instance>  type ty_instance,
    <node_inst> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>ty_instance,
    <pres>      type crm_isutree_pres.


  if prof_id is initial or lines( cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab ) = 1.
    if prof_id is not initial.
      read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab transporting no fields
        with table key prof_id = prof_id.
      check sy-subrc = 0.
      if only_unused = abap_true.
        check cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances is initial.
      endif.
    endif.
*   for unused determination we switch to single mode if tree nodes exist
    if only_unused = abap_true and cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances is not initial.
      loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab into prof.
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>reset( prof_id = prof-prof_id  only_unused = abap_true ).
      endloop.
    else.
*     refresh everything
      loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>instances assigning <instance>.
        <instance>-instance->refresh_impl_class_instances( iv_reset = abap_true ).
      endloop.
      loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances assigning <node_inst>.
        <node_inst>-node->publish_deletion( ).
      endloop.
      clear:
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pres_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prot_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pcol_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>oca_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ocap_tab,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>instances,
        cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances.
    endif.
  else.
*   check if profile is used (if tree nodes exist)
    if only_unused = abap_true.
      read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances transporting no fields
        with key hier-prof_id = prof_id.                "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      check sy-subrc <> 0.
    endif.
*   refresh only provided profile
    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>instances assigning <instance> where prof_id = prof_id. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      <instance>-instance->refresh_impl_class_instances( iv_reset = abap_true ).
    endloop.
    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances assigning <node_inst> where hier-prof_id = prof_id. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      <node_inst>-node->publish_deletion( ).
    endloop.
    delete:
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab  where prof_id = prof_id,
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prof_tab  where prof_id = prof_id,
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>prot_tab  where prof_id = prof_id,
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pcol_tab  where prof_id = prof_id,
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>oca_tab   where prof_id = prof_id,
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>ocap_tab  where prof_id = prof_id,
     cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>instances where prof_id = prof_id, "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
      cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances    where hier-prof_id = prof_id. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
*   special case for presentations (might be used in other profiles)
    loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pres_tab assigning <pres>.
      read table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>hier_tab transporting no fields
        with key pres_id = <pres>-pres_id.              "#EC CI_SORTSEQ
      if sy-subrc <> 0.
        delete cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>col_tab where pres_id = <pres>-pres_id.
        delete table cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>pres_tab with table key pres_id = <pres>-pres_id.
      endif.
    endloop.
  endif.

endmethod.


method reset_all_virtual_root_nodes.

  field-symbols <ls_node_inst> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>ty_instance.
  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances assigning <ls_node_inst>
    where hier-prof_id = me->prof_id and caller_id = me->caller_id and node is bound and
        ( node->virtual_root               <> abap_false or
          node->hidden_status              <> 0          or
          node->hidden_including_sub_nodes <> abap_false or
          node->expanded_for_virtual_root  <> abap_false ).  "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    <ls_node_inst>-node->virtual_root               = abap_false.
    <ls_node_inst>-node->hidden_status              = 0.
    <ls_node_inst>-node->hidden_including_sub_nodes = abap_false.
    <ls_node_inst>-node->expanded_for_virtual_root  = abap_false.
    rv_reset = abap_true.
  endloop.

  if me->virtual_root_count <> 0.
    me->virtual_root_count = 0.
    rv_reset = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method reset_instance.

  field-symbols:
    <node_inst> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>ty_instance.

  me->refresh_impl_class_instances( iv_reset = abap_true ).

  loop at cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node=>instances assigning <node_inst>
    where hier-prof_id = me->prof_id and caller_id = me->caller_id. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    if iv_keep_node_instances = abap_true.
      <node_inst>-node->if_crm_iu_nvp_data_container~reset( ).
      IF <node_inst>-node->get_name( ) = 'IsuSDDoc'.
        IF <node_inst>-node->get_property_as_string( iv_attr_name = 'ACTIVITY_STATUS' ) IS NOT INITIAL.
          <node_inst>-node->set_property_as_string( iv_attr_name = 'ACTIVITY_STATUS'
                                                    iv_value     = ' ' ).
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      <node_inst>-node->publish_deletion( ).
    endif.
  endloop.

  if me->param_container is bound.
    me->param_container->reset( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method SELECT_NODES_BY_ENTITIES.

  if TREE_CONTROLLER->IS_SELCTION_MODE_NONE( ).
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  if TREE_CONTROLLER->IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( )
    and IR_COLLECTION->SIZE( ) > 1 .
    raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
  endif.

  " get all tree nodes for that entities
  data(LR_TREENODES) = GET_NODES_BY_ENTITIES(
    IR_COLLECTION     = IR_COLLECTION
    IT_NODE_IDS       = IT_NODE_IDS
    IV_ONLY_VISIBLE   = ABAP_FALSE
    IV_MAKE_VISIBLE   = ABAP_FALSE
    IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY = ABAP_FALSE
  ).

  " make found tree nodes visible
  if IV_MAKE_VISIBLE is not initial and LR_TREENODES->IF_BOL_BO_COL~SIZE( ) > 0.
    " we need the node proxy's -> so we have to rebuilt the node proxy's table
    "TREE_CONTROLLER->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->BUILD_TABLE( ).
    TREE_CONTROLLER->MAKE_NODES_VISIBLE(
      IR_COLLECTION     = LR_TREENODES
      IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY = BOOLC(
        TREE_CONTROLLER->IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( )
        or IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial
      )
    ).
  endif.

  " filter only visible nodes
  LR_TREENODES = FILTER_NODES_VISIBILITY_STATE( IR_COLLECTION = LR_TREENODES ).

  " take first node if tree in single selection mode
  if LR_TREENODES->IF_BOL_BO_COL~SIZE( ) > 1
    and ( TREE_CONTROLLER->IS_SELCTION_MODE_SINGLE( )
    or IV_FIRST_HIT_ONLY is not initial ).
    data(LR_NODE) = LR_TREENODES->GET_FIRST_NODE( ).
    LR_TREENODES->IF_BOL_BO_COL~CLEAR( ).
    if LR_NODE is bound.
      LR_TREENODES->IF_BOL_BO_COL~ADD( IV_ENTITY = LR_NODE ).
    endif.
  endif.

  TREE_CONTROLLER->SET_SELECTED_NODES( IR_COLLECTION = LR_TREENODES ).

endmethod.


method SETUP_INSTANCE ##NEEDED.
endmethod.


method set_default_profile_by_group.

  if gv_no_group_pers = abap_false.
*   ensure group is loaded
    cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_profile_group_details( iv_profile_group_id ).
    assign cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>profgrp_tab[ profgrp_id = iv_profile_group_id ] to field-symbol(<ls_group>).
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      assign component |PROFGRP_PERS| of structure <ls_group> to field-symbol(<lv_pers>).
      if sy-subrc = 0.
        if <lv_pers> = abap_true.
*         determine profiles of tree profile group
          data(lt_prof) = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_profiles_by_group( iv_profile_group_id ).
*         set default group
          if lt_prof is not initial and line_exists( lt_prof[ prof_id = iv_default_prof_id ] ).
            assign component |PROFGRP_DFLT| of structure <ls_group> to field-symbol(<lv_dflt>).
            if sy-subrc = 0.
*             set profile ID
              if <lv_dflt> <> iv_default_prof_id.
                <lv_dflt> = iv_default_prof_id.
                try.
                    data lr_pers type ref to data.
                    create data lr_pers type ('CRM_ISUTREE_GRPP').
                    assign lr_pers->* to field-symbol(<ls_pers>).
                    assign component |USERNAME| of structure <ls_pers> to field-symbol(<lv_username>).
                    <lv_username> = gv_user_name.
                    assign component |ROLE| of structure <ls_pers> to field-symbol(<lv_role>).
                    <lv_role> = gv_role.
                    assign component |PROFGRP_ID| of structure <ls_pers> to field-symbol(<lv_profgrp_id>).
                    <lv_profgrp_id> = iv_profile_group_id.
                    assign component |PROF_ID| of structure <ls_pers> to field-symbol(<lv_prof_id>).
                    <lv_prof_id> = iv_default_prof_id.
                    modify ('CRM_ISUTREE_GRPP') from <ls_pers>.
                    if sy-subrc = 0.
                      call function 'DB_COMMIT'.
                    endif.
                  catch cx_root  ##catch_all.
                    gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
                endtry.
              endif.
            else.
              gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.
      endif.
    else.
      gv_no_group_pers = abap_true.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_event_service.

  data:
    lo_impl_class type ref to cl_iu_ic_bol_tree.

  field-symbols:
    <ls_impl_class> type ty_impl_class.


  if io_event_service is bound and me->event_service = io_event_service.
    return.
  endif.

  if io_event_service is bound.
    me->event_service ?= io_event_service.
  endif.

* prepare parameter container
  if me->event_service is bound and me->event_service->mo_param_container is bound..
    me->param_container = cl_crm_iu_nvp_data_container=>get_instance( me->event_service->mo_param_container ).
  else.
    me->param_container = cl_crm_iu_nvp_data_container=>get_instance( ).
  endif.

  if me->param_container is bound.
  loop at me->impl_class_tab assigning <ls_impl_class> where instance is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    try.
        lo_impl_class ?= <ls_impl_class>-instance.
        lo_impl_class->mo_param_container = me->param_container.
      catch cx_sy_move_cast_error."#EC NO_HANDLER
    endtry.
  endloop.
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_filter_active.

  if active = abap_true.
    me->filter->set_active( ).
  else.
    me->filter->set_inactive( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_filter_collection.

  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).

  if collection is bound.
    me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~add_collection( collection ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_filter_deactivated_by_user.

  me->mv_filter_deactivated_by_user = iv_filter_deactivated_by_user.

endmethod.


method set_filter_entity.

  me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~clear( ).

  if entity is bound.
    me->filter->if_bol_bo_col~add( entity ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_first_roundtrip_done.

  me->mv_first_roundtrip_done = abap_true.

  clear me->mo_root_object_col.

endmethod.


method set_first_roundtrip_start.

  if me->mv_first_roundtrip_done = abap_undefined.
    me->mv_first_roundtrip_done = abap_false.
  endif.

  clear me->mo_root_object_col.

endmethod.


method SET_TREE_CONTROLLER.
  if IR_TREE_CONTROLLER is bound.
    TREE_CONTROLLER = IR_TREE_CONTROLLER.
  else.
    clear TREE_CONTROLLER.
  endif.
endmethod.


method SET_TREE_SERVICE_ENH_INTERFACE.
  FIF_TREESRV_ENH = IR_INTERFACE.
endmethod.


method USE_EXTENDED_TREE_FUNCTIONS.
  RV_RESULT = ABAP_FALSE.
  data(LS_PROFILE) = GET_PROFILE_DETAILS( IV_PROFILE_ID = GET_PROFILE_ID( ) ).
  if LS_PROFILE-PROF_ID is not initial.
    assign component 'USEEXTHNDL' of structure LS_PROFILE to field-symbol(<USEEXTHNDL>).
    if SY-SUBRC is initial and <USEEXTHNDL> is assigned.
      RV_RESULT = BOOLC( <USEEXTHNDL> is not initial ).
    endif.
  endif.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_TRX definition
  public
  final
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK .

public section.

  interfaces IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS .
  interfaces IF_BOL_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT .
  interfaces IF_BSP_WD_STATE_CONTEXT .

  methods ACTIVATE_IBASE_HANDLING
    importing
      !ACTIVATION type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_TRUE .
  class-methods GET_INSTANCE
    importing
      !IO_COLLECTION_WRAPPER type ref to CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
      !IO_OWNER type ref to CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER .
  methods IS_LOCKED
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !OWNER type ref to OBJECT .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_TRX
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_TRX
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  type-pools ABAP .
  data IBASE_HANDLING type ABAP_BOOL .
  data TRX type ref to IF_BOL_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT .
  data OWNER type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .

  methods GET_TRX
    importing
      !ONLY_IF_LOCK_SET type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ref to IF_BOL_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT .
  methods ON_TX_FINISHED
    for event TX_FINISHED of IF_BOL_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT
    importing
      !INSTANCE .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_TRX IMPLEMENTATION.


method activate_ibase_handling.

  me->ibase_handling = activation.

endmethod.


method constructor.

  me->owner ?= owner.

endmethod.


method get_instance.

  data:
    trx         type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_trx,
    ib_handling type abap_bool.


  if io_collection_wrapper is not bound or io_owner is not bound.
    return.
  endif.

  trx ?= io_collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
  if trx is bound.
    ib_handling = trx->ibase_handling.
  endif.

  create object trx
    exporting
      owner = io_owner.

  io_collection_wrapper->clear( ).
  io_collection_wrapper->add( trx ).

  trx->activate_ibase_handling( ib_handling ).

endmethod.


method get_trx.

  data:
    ctxt     type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_ctxt,
    tx_node  type ref to if_bol_transaction_context,
    tx_col   type ref to cl_crm_bol_custom_tx_ctxt,
    lock_set type abap_bool,
    lo_node_col type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    lv_ent_name type crmt_ext_obj_name, " note 2599428
    lo_node     type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.

  field-symbols:
    <tree_node_rel> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn00=>ty_tree_node_rel.


  if me->trx is bound.
    tx_col ?= me->trx.
  else.
    create object tx_col.
    me->trx = tx_col.
    set handler me->on_tx_finished for me->trx activation abap_true.
  endif.

  if me->owner is bound.
    ctxt = me->owner->get_typed_context( ).
    if ctxt is bound.

      loop at ctxt->isuboltree->tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> where parent_tree_node is not bound.
        lo_node_col = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node->get_all_child_nodes( wrapped_entities = abap_true ).
*       fill collection by reading first entry
        lo_node_col->find( iv_index = 1 ).
*       add root node at first position
        lo_node_col->insert( iv_bo = <tree_node_rel>-bo_node  iv_index = 1  iv_set_focus = abap_true ).
*       now iterate the complete tree hierarchy to read ALL open transactions
        lo_node ?= lo_node_col->get_first( ).
        while lo_node is bound.

          if only_if_lock_set = abap_true and lock_set = abap_false.
            lock_set = lo_node->is_locked( ).
          endif.

          tx_node = lo_node->get_transaction( ).
          lv_ent_name = tx_node->get_name( ). " note 2599428
          IF lv_ent_name <> 'BTOrder'
            AND lv_ent_name <> 'BuilHeader'.
            tx_col->add_tx_context( tx_node ). " note 2599428
          ENDIF.
          if me->ibase_handling = abap_true.
*           add special related objects
            data: guid type guid_16.
            data: entity type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.
            entity = lo_node.
            if entity is bound.
              case entity->get_name( ).
                when 'ConnectionObject' or 'PointOfDelivery'. "#EC NOTEXT
*                 get Object GUID
                  cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_key_from_entity(
                    exporting
                      entity = lo_node
                    importing
                      key    = guid ).
*                 convert to GUID CompC
                  cl_ecrm_isu_si_search_details=>get_v_ibin_keys(
                    exporting
                      iv_pr_object_guid_16 = guid
                    importing
                      ev_guid_compc_16     = guid ).
                  entity = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity(
                             name = 'IBComponent'
                             key  = guid
                             mode = cl_crm_bol_entity=>buffer_only ).
                  if entity is bound.
                    if only_if_lock_set = abap_true and lock_set = abap_false.
                      lock_set = lo_node->is_locked( ).
                    endif.
                    tx_node = entity->get_transaction( ).
                    if tx_node is bound.
                      tx_col->add_tx_context( tx_node ).
                    endif.
                  endif.
              endcase.
            endif.
          endif.
          lo_node ?= lo_node_col->get_next( ).
        endwhile.

      endloop.

    endif.
  endif.

  if only_if_lock_set = abap_false or lock_set = abap_true.
    result = tx_col.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTIES.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_AS_VALUE.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_TEXT.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~GET_PROPERTY_TEXTS.
endmethod.


method if_bol_bo_property_access~is_property_hidden.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~IS_PROPERTY_MANDATORY.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~IS_PROPERTY_READONLY.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~SET_PROPERTIES.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~SET_PROPERTY.
endmethod.


method IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS~SET_PROPERTY_AS_STRING.
endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~check_save_needed.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    rv_result = trx->check_save_needed( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~check_save_possible.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound and
     trx->check_save_needed( ) = abap_true.
    rv_result = trx->check_save_possible( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~commit.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    rv_commit_work_succeeded = trx->commit( iv_keep_locks ).
  else.
    rv_commit_work_succeeded = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~get_id.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    trx->get_id( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~get_name.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    trx->get_name( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_BOL_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT~GET_NAMESPACE.
endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~revert.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    trx->revert( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~rollback.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound.
    trx->rollback( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bol_transaction_context~save.

  data:
    trx type ref to if_bol_transaction_context.


  trx = me->get_trx( ).
  if trx is bound and
     ( iv_force_save = abap_true or
       trx->check_save_needed( ) = abap_true ) and
     trx->check_save_possible( ) = abap_true.
    rv_success = trx->save( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_state_context~get_message_filter.

  data:
    entity type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    ctxt    type ref to cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_ctxt.

  field-symbols:
    <tree_node_rel> type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn00=>ty_tree_node_rel.


  rv_filter = iv_filter.

  if rv_filter is not bound.
    create object rv_filter.
  endif.

  if me->owner is bound.
    ctxt = me->owner->get_typed_context( ).
    if ctxt is bound.
      loop at ctxt->isuboltree->tree_node_rel_tab assigning <tree_node_rel> where bo_entity is bound. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
        entity ?= <tree_node_rel>-bo_entity.
        rv_filter->set_entity_4_filter( entity ).
        entity = entity->get_root( ).
        if entity is bound.
          rv_filter->set_entity_4_filter( entity ).
        endif.
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method is_locked.

  if me->get_trx( only_if_lock_set = abap_true ) is bound.
    result = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method on_tx_finished.

  if me->trx is bound.
    set handler me->on_tx_finished for me->trx activation abap_false.
    clear me->trx.
    raise event if_bol_transaction_context~tx_finished.
    raise event if_bol_transaction_context~after_tx_finished.
  endif.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.


class CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_VAL_NODE definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_CRM_IU_BOL_ENTITY
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_CNDBRK .

public section.

  class-methods GET_INSTANCE
    importing
      !IS_STRUCTURE type ANY optional
      !IO_PARENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY optional
    returning
      value(RO_VALUE_NODE) type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY .

  methods GET_PARENT
    redefinition .
protected section.
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_VAL_NODE IMPLEMENTATION.


method get_instance.

  field-symbols:
    <data> type any.


* the method will create a new instance of the value node
* // a data structure can be provided which will define also the
* // structure for the attributes used in presentation mapping of Tree Customizing
* // if no structure is provided the default structure BSP_WD_DROPDOWN_LINE with KEY/VALUE field is used

* ensure component is loaded
  cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( )->load_component_set( 'EMPTY' ). "#EC NOTEXT
  cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( )->load_component( 'IUBOTC' ). "#EC NOTEXT

  ro_value_node ?= cl_crm_iu_bol_object_factory=>create_entity(
                     object_name   = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>CO_OBJ_VALUENODE
                     object_key    = cl_crm_isu_guid=>create_16( )
                     do_not_buffer = abap_true
                     parent_entity = io_parent_entity ).    "#EC NOTEXT

  if ro_value_node is bound and is_structure is not initial.
    create data ro_value_node->container_proxy->data_ref->attribute_ref like is_structure.
    assign ro_value_node->container_proxy->data_ref->attribute_ref->* to <data>.
    <data> = is_structure.
  endif.

endmethod.


METHOD get_parent.
  IF me->parent_entity <> me.
    rv_result = me->parent_entity.
  ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_VIEW_CONTROLLER
  create public .

public section.

*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods EH_ONBRF_FUNC_CLICKED
    importing
      !HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT optional
      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .
  methods EH_ONSELECT
    importing
      !HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT optional
      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .
  methods EH_ONSORT
    importing
      !HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT optional
      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .

  methods DO_HANDLE_DATA
    redefinition .
  methods DO_HANDLE_EVENT
    redefinition .
  methods DO_INIT_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT
    redefinition .
  methods SET_MODELS
    redefinition .
  methods WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants VIEW type STRING value 'Columns.htm'. "#EC NOTEXT
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view. "decomment to activate locale view"


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* Eventhandler dispatching

    case htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

*     Added by wizard
      when 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'.                              "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onbrf_func_clicked( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'select'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSelect(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'sort'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSort(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
  endmethod.


method DO_INIT_CONTEXT.

*   set initial selection mode for all tables




endmethod.


method DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT.

*   build all dummy tables


    typed_context->COLUMN->build_table( ).



endmethod.


  method EH_ONBRF_FUNC_CLICKED.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'

  endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.


    data: lv_event TYPE REF TO cl_htmlb_event_tableview.

    lv_event ?= htmlb_event.

    me->typed_context->COLUMN->eh_on_row_selection(
       iv_htmlb_event    = lv_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONSORT.


    me->typed_context->COLUMN->eh_on_sort(
       iv_htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'NODE'                                     "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->NODE ).


    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'PRES'                                     "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->PRES ).


    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'COLUMN'                                   "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->COLUMN ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustPres'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS
    for event NEW_FOCUS of CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    entity ?= focus_bo.
    TRY.
        lv_collection = entity->get_related_entities(
               iv_relation_name = 'IsuBolTreeCustNodePres' ).

      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN02 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV
  create public .

public section.

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN02
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustPresCol' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods GET_P_COL_IMG
    importing
      !IV_PROPERTY type STRING
      !IV_INDEX type I optional
      !IV_DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning
      value(RV_VALUE) type STRING .
  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS
    for event NEW_FOCUS of CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .
  methods GET_P_COL_PATH_A
    importing
      !IV_PROPERTY type STRING

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN02 IMPLEMENTATION.


method get_p_col_img.

  case iv_property.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      try.
          if me->get_bo_by_index( iv_index = iv_index  iv_change_focus = abap_false )->get_property_as_string( 'COL_IMG' ) cs 'BRF/'.
            rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_event_link.
          endif.
        catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
      endtry.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_onclick.
      rv_value = 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'.
  endcase.

endmethod.


METHOD GET_P_COL_PATH_A.

  CASE iv_property.
    WHEN if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      try.
          if me->get_bo_by_index( iv_index = iv_index  iv_change_focus = abap_false )->get_property_as_string( 'COL_PATH_A' ) cs 'BRF/'.
            rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_event_link.
          endif.
        catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
      endtry.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_onclick.
      rv_value = 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'.
  ENDCASE.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD GET_P_COL_PATH_B.

  CASE iv_property.
    WHEN if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      try.
          if me->get_bo_by_index( iv_index = iv_index  iv_change_focus = abap_false )->get_property_as_string( 'COL_PATH_B' ) cs 'BRF/'.
            rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_event_link.

        catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
      endtry.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_onclick.
      rv_value = 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'.
  ENDCASE.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD GET_P_COL_PATH_C.

  CASE iv_property.
    WHEN if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      try.
          if me->get_bo_by_index( iv_index = iv_index  iv_change_focus = abap_false )->get_property_as_string( 'COL_PATH_C' ) cs 'BRF/'.
            rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_event_link.
          endif.
        catch cx_root  ##catch_all  ##no_handler.
      endtry.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_onclick.
      rv_value = 'BRF_FUNC_CLICKED'.
  ENDCASE.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF line.

    include type CRM_ISUTREE_PRCO.

    TYPES:

           END OF line.

    CREATE DATA rv_sample TYPE line.

endmethod.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    entity ?= focus_bo.
    TRY.
        lv_collection = entity->get_related_entities(
               iv_relation_name = 'IsuBolTreeCustPresCol' ).

      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.


class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data NODE type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN00 read-only .
  data PRES type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01 read-only .
  data COLUMN type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN02 read-only .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods CREATE_NODE .
  methods CREATE_PRES .
  methods CREATE_COLUMN .

  methods CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES
    redefinition .
  methods CONNECT_NODES
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.

    IF me->NODE IS BOUND AND
       me->PRES IS BOUND.
      coll_wrapper = ME->NODE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
      SET HANDLER ME->PRES->on_new_focus
                  FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.
    ENDIF.

    IF me->PRES IS BOUND AND
       me->COLUMN IS BOUND.
      coll_wrapper = ME->PRES->get_collection_wrapper( ).
      SET HANDLER ME->COLUMN->on_new_focus
                  FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_COLUMN.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN02'

        model_id       = 'COLUMN' ).                        "#EC NOTEXT
    COLUMN ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      PRES->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      COLUMN->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes


    CREATE_NODE( ).



    CREATE_PRES( ).



    CREATE_COLUMN( ).



endmethod.


method CREATE_NODE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN00'

        model_id       = 'NODE' ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
    NODE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/MainWindow'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'NODE'
    iv_node_2_bind = NODE  ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_PRES.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_CN01'

        model_id       = 'PRES' ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
    PRES ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      NODE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      PRES->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.


class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
protected section.

  methods EH_ONBRF_FUNC_CLICKED
    redefinition .
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_COLUMNS_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method eh_onbrf_func_clicked.

  cl_thtmlb_util=>get_event_info(
    exporting
      iv_event  = htmlb_event_ex
    importing
      ev_column = data(lv_column)
      ev_index  = data(lv_index) ).

  if lv_index > 0 and lv_column is not initial.
    data(lo_pres_col) = me->typed_context->column->get_bo_by_index(
                          iv_index        = lv_index
                          iv_change_focus = abap_false ).
    if lo_pres_col is bound.

      try.
          data(lv_brf_func_name) = lo_pres_col->get_property_as_string( conv #( lv_column ) ).
          if lv_brf_func_name cs 'BRF/'.
            condense lv_brf_func_name.
            lv_brf_func_name = substring_after( val = lv_brf_func_name  sub = 'BRF/' ).
            condense lv_brf_func_name.
            while lv_brf_func_name is not initial and lv_brf_func_name(1) = '/'.
              lv_brf_func_name = lv_brf_func_name+1.
              condense lv_brf_func_name.
            endwhile.
            if lv_brf_func_name is not initial.
              do strlen( lv_brf_func_name ) times.
                data(lv_str_index) = sy-index - 1.
                case lv_brf_func_name+lv_str_index(1).
                  when ' ' or '@'.
                    lv_brf_func_name = lv_brf_func_name(lv_str_index).
                    exit.
                  when others.
                endcase.
              enddo.
              condense lv_brf_func_name.
            endif.
            if lv_brf_func_name co '0123456789'.
              lv_brf_func_name = 'UTTP_' && conv crmt_isu_brf_fn_number( lv_brf_func_name ).
            endif.
            data(lv_brf_func_id) = cl_crm_isu_brf_tools=>get_ftd_func_uuid( conv #( lv_brf_func_name ) ).
          endif.
        catch cx_root  ##catch_all.
          clear lv_brf_func_id.
      endtry.

      if lv_brf_func_id is not initial.
        cl_crm_iu_brf_popup_service=>get_instance( )->open_brf_rule_popup(
          iv_brf_rule        = lv_brf_func_id
          io_comp_controller = me->comp_controller
          iv_usage_name      = |CUBRFRuleEditor| ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_VIEW_CONTROLLER
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  methods CONSTRUCTOR .
  methods IP_DEFAULT
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data TYPED_CONTEXT type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT .

  methods DO_HANDLE_DATA
    redefinition .
  methods DO_HANDLE_EVENT
    redefinition .
  methods SET_MODELS
    redefinition .
  methods WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants VIEW type STRING value 'Detail.htm'. "#EC NOTEXT
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view.


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.

* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.


endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT.
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'DEFAULT'

endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

  view->set_attribute(
      name   = 'node' "#EC NOTEXT
      value  = typed_context->node ).


  view->set_attribute(
      name   = 'pres' "#EC NOTEXT
      value  = typed_context->pres ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_BOL_TYP.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustPres not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOL_TYP' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustPres/BOL_TYP not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustPres not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'FLAG_2_EDIT' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustPres/FLAG_2_EDIT not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation

*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

method GET_M_BOL_TYP.


  DATA: attr    TYPE CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME.

  DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

  GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

  metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'BOL_TYP'  "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.

endmethod.


method GET_PRES_ID.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustPres not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'PRES_ID' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustPres/PRES_ID not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    entity ?= focus_bo.
    TRY.
        lv_collection = entity->get_related_entities(
               iv_relation_name = 'IsuBolTreeCustNodePres' ).

      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->collection_wrapper->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.


method SET_BOL_TYP.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOL_TYP' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'BOL_TYP'."#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'BOL_TYP' "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

  ENDIF.

endmethod.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'FLAG_1_EDIT' "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

  ENDIF.

endmethod.


method SET_FLAG_2_EDIT.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'FLAG_2_EDIT' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'FLAG_2_EDIT'."#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'FLAG_2_EDIT' "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

  ENDIF.

endmethod.

    DATA:

class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  data NODE type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CN00 read-only .
  data PRES type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CN01 read-only .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods CREATE_NODE .
  methods CREATE_PRES .

  methods CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES
    redefinition .
  methods CONNECT_NODES
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.

     coll_wrapper = ME->node->get_collection_wrapper( ).
     SET HANDLER ME->pres->on_new_focus
                 FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes

    CREATE_node( ).


    CREATE_pres( ).



endmethod.


method CREATE_NODE.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CN00'

        model_id       = 'node' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    node ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

  me->owner->do_context_node_binding(
    IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = cl_bsp_wd_controller=>co_type_window
    IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = 'NODE'
    IV_NODE_2_BIND      = node ).

endmethod.


method CREATE_PRES.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_DETAIL_CN01'

        model_id       = 'pres' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    pres ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      node->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      pres->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINVIEWSET_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method do_replace_initial_view.

  data:
    wico type ref to cl_iubotrcp_mainwindow_impl.


  replace_viewname = super->do_replace_initial_view(
                       viewarea = viewarea
                       viewname = viewname ).

  if viewarea = 'detail' and viewname = 'IUBOTRCP/empty'.   "#EC NOTEXT
    wico ?= me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
    if wico->typed_context->node->collection_wrapper->get_current( ) is bound.
      replace_viewname = 'IUBOTRCP/Detail'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state_descr~get_state_description.

  description = text-000.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
  methods IP_SEARCH
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

  methods CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG
    redefinition .

    importing
      !IV_DATA_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

    redefinition .

    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW IMPLEMENTATION.


method call_outbound_plug.

  data: lv_plug_method type seocmpname.

  concatenate 'OP_' iv_outbound_plug into lv_plug_method.   "#EC NOTEXT
  translate lv_plug_method to upper case.                 "#EC SYNTCHAR

  try.
      call method (lv_plug_method).
      me->fire_outbound_plug( iv_outbound_plug ).
    catch cx_sy_dyn_call_error.
      raise exception type cx_bsp_wd_incorrect_implement
        exporting
          textid     =
            cx_bsp_wd_incorrect_implement=>window_plug_undefined
          controller = me->view_id
          plug       = iv_outbound_plug.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method IP_PROFILE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'PROFILE'

endmethod.


method IP_SEARCH.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'SEARCH'

endmethod.


method OP_SIM.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'TOSIM'

endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.


*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
          iv_controller = me
          iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW
  create public .

public section.

  type-pools ABAP .
  methods IS_ON_POPUP
    returning
      value(RESULT) type ABAP_BOOL .

  methods IP_PROFILE
    redefinition .
  methods IP_SEARCH
    redefinition .
protected section.

  methods DO_VIEW_INIT_ON_ACTIVATION
    redefinition .
  methods OP_SIM
    redefinition .
  methods DO_REPLACE_INITIAL_VIEW
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_MAINWINDOW_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method do_replace_initial_view.

  if viewarea = |Root| and
     viewname = |ProfSearchUsage.IUBOTRCP/ProfSearch| and
     me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( ) is bound.
    replace_viewname = |IUBOTRCP/ProfileOV|.
  endif.

endmethod.


method do_view_init_on_activation.

  data:
    ent       type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
    col       type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    prof_id   type char10,
    field     type ihttpnvp,
    fields    type tihttpnvp,
    comp_set  type crmt_genil_appl.


* in Simulation Mode:
* // load component set, get profile instance and navigate to SimWindow
  me->request->if_http_entity~get_form_fields( changing fields = fields ).

  read table fields into field with key name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_preview=>co_sim_param_name.
  if sy-subrc = 0 and to_upper( field-value ) = abap_true.
    read table fields into field with key name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_preview=>co_profile_param_name.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and field-value is not initial.
      replace all occurrences of '-_-_-amp-_-_-' in field-value with '&'.
      prof_id = to_upper( field-value ).
      ent = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity( name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof  key = prof_id ).
      if ent is bound.
        ent->get_property_as_value(
          exporting
            iv_attr_name = 'GENIL_COMPSET'
          importing
            ev_result    = comp_set ).                      "#EC NOTEXT
        if comp_set is not initial.
          cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( )->load_component_set( comp_set ).
        endif.
        create object col type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
        col->add( ent ).
        me->op_sim( col ).
**       set method to POST to trigger nav queue processing
*        me->request->set_method( 'POST' ).
      endif.
    endif.
  else.
    read table fields into field with key name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_preview=>co_profile_param_name.
    if sy-subrc = 0 and field-value is not initial.
      replace all occurrences of '-_-_-amp-_-_-' in field-value with '&'.
      prof_id = to_upper( field-value ).
      ent = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity( name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof  key = prof_id ).
      if ent is bound.
        create object col type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
        col->add( ent ).
        me->ip_profile( col ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method ip_profile.

  me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->set_collection( iv_collection ).

endmethod.


method IP_SEARCH.
endmethod.


method is_on_popup.

  result = me->is_toplevel_window.

endmethod.


method op_sim.

  me->navigate(
    source_rep_view = me->rep_view
    outbound_plug   = 'MainWindowToSimWindow'
    data_collection = iv_data_collection ).                 "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view. "decomment to activate locale view"


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.

* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

      WHEN 'select'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSelect(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'sort'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSort(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.


endmethod.


method DO_INIT_CONTEXT.

*   set initial selection mode for all tables


endmethod.


method DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT.

*   build all dummy tables


    typed_context->OCA->build_table( ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.


    data: lv_event TYPE REF TO cl_htmlb_event_tableview.

    lv_event ?= htmlb_event.

    me->typed_context->OCA->eh_on_row_selection(
       iv_htmlb_event    = lv_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONSORT.


    me->typed_context->OCA->eh_on_sort(
       iv_htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'NODE'                                     "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->NODE ).


    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'OCA'                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->OCA ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustOCA'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS
    for event NEW_FOCUS of CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF line.

    include type CRM_ISUTREE_OCAV.

    TYPES:

           END OF line.

    CREATE DATA rv_sample TYPE line.

endmethod.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    entity ?= focus_bo.
    TRY.
        lv_collection = entity->get_related_entities(
               iv_relation_name = 'IsuBolTreeCustNodeOCA' ).

      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data NODE type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN00 read-only .
  data OCA type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01 read-only .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods CREATE_NODE .
  methods CREATE_OCA .

  methods CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES
    redefinition .
  methods CONNECT_NODES
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.

    IF me->NODE IS BOUND AND
       me->OCA IS BOUND.
      coll_wrapper = ME->NODE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
      SET HANDLER ME->OCA->on_new_focus
                  FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes


    CREATE_NODE( ).



    CREATE_OCA( ).



endmethod.


method CREATE_NODE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN00'

        model_id       = 'NODE' ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
    NODE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/MainWindow'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'NODE'
    iv_node_2_bind = NODE  ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_OCA.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_ONECLICKACTIO_CN01'

        model_id       = 'OCA' ).                           "#EC NOTEXT
    OCA ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      NODE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      OCA->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

  create public .

  data COLUMN type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFCOLUMNS_CN01 read-only .

*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFCOLUMNS_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

    redefinition .

    redefinition .

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFCOLUMNS_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.

    IF me->PROFILE IS BOUND AND
       me->COLUMN IS BOUND.
      coll_wrapper = ME->PROFILE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
      SET HANDLER ME->COLUMN->on_new_focus
                  FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_COLUMN.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFCOLUMNS_CN01'

        model_id       = 'COLUMN' ).                        "#EC NOTEXT
    COLUMN ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      PROFILE->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      COLUMN->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes


    CREATE_PROFILE( ).



    CREATE_COLUMN( ).



endmethod.


method CREATE_PROFILE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFCOLUMNS_CN00'

        model_id       = 'PROFILE' ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
    PROFILE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/MainWindow'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'PROFILE'
    iv_node_2_bind = PROFILE  ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view. "decomment to activate locale view"


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

*     Added by wizard
      WHEN 'search'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        EH_ONSEARCH( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

*     Added by wizard
      WHEN 'refresh'.                                       "#EC NOTEXT
        EH_ONREFRESH( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'select'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSelect(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
endmethod.


method EH_ONREFRESH.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'refresh'

endmethod.


method EH_ONSEARCH.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'search'

endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.


*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...




endmethod.


method OP_SEARCH.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'SEARCH'

endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'PROFILE'                                  "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->PROFILE ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILEOV IMPLEMENTATION.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.


*   Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

      WHEN OTHERS.
        global_event = super->do_handle_event( event           = event
                                               htmlb_event     = htmlb_event
                                               htmlb_event_ex  = htmlb_event_ex
                                               global_messages = global_messages ).
    ENDCASE.


endmethod.


method IP_PROFILE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'PROFILE'

endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.


*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
          iv_controller = me
          iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILEOV_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.
