method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

* Added by wizard
CREATE_PROFILE( ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_PROFILE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILEOV_CN00'

        model_id       = 'PROFILE' ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
    PROFILE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/MainWindow'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'PROFILE'
    iv_node_2_bind = PROFILE  ).
endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_restore.

  data:
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


  state_container->get_item(
    exporting
      im_name  = 'PROFILE'
    importing
      ex_value = col ).

  me->profile->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_store.

  state_container->add_item(
    im_name  = 'PROFILE'
    im_value = me->profile->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ) ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method if_bsp_wd_history_state_descr~get_state_description.

  description = text-000.

  replace '&1' in description with me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_ID' ).
  replace '&2' in description with me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_DESC' ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback~get_buttons.

*  data:
*    profile_view type ref to if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback.
*
*
** delegate to profile view
*  try.
*      profile_view ?= me->get_subcontroller_by_viewname( 'IUBOTRCP/Profile' ). "#EC NOTEXT
*      rt_buttons = profile_view->get_buttons( ).
*    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
**     no overviewset -> render own buttons?
*  endtry.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback~get_number_of_visible_buttons.

  rv_result = 5.

endmethod.


method IP_PROFILE.
endmethod.


method wd_destroy.

  if me->view_manager->workarea_ref_set = abap_true.
    raise event history_trigger.
  endif.

  super->wd_destroy( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CN00 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProf'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods GET_I_PROF_ID
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_M_PROF_ID
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods GET_PROF_ID
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_PROF_ID
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type STRING .

  methods IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data OWNER type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_IMPL .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method get_i_prof_id.

  check me->owner is bound.

  if lines( me->owner->prof_id_tab ) > 1.
    rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
  else.
    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.
  endif.

endmethod.


method GET_M_PROF_ID.

  DATA: attr    TYPE CRMT_TREE_PROFILE.

  DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

  GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

  metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'PROF_ID'  "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_PROF_ID.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustProf not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'PROF_ID' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustProf/PROF_ID not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).
          value = '-CURR/QUANT REF DATA MISSING-'.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  super->if_bsp_model~init(
    id     = id
    owner  = owner ).

  me->owner ?= owner.

endmethod.


method set_prof_id.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFILE_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method do_view_init_on_activation.

*  data:
*    qs        type ref to cl_crm_bol_query_service,
*    ent       type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
*    col       type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
*    prof_tab  type table of crmt_pnt_profile,
*    field     type ihttpnvp,
*    fields    type tihttpnvp,
*    core      type ref to cl_crm_bol_core,
*    comp_set  type crmt_genil_appl,
*    type_line type ihttpnvp,
*    obj_types type crmt_ext_obj_name_tab.
*
*
*
*  check me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->size( ) = 0.
*
*
*  clear me->prof_id.
*  refresh me->prof_id_tab.
*  clear me->type.
*  refresh me->type_tab.
**  me->typed_context->tree->collection_wrapper->clear_collection( ).
*
*  me->request->if_http_entity~get_form_fields( changing fields = fields ).
*
*  read table fields into field with key name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_preview=>co_profile_param_name.
*  if sy-subrc = 0.
*    translate field-value to upper case.                  "#EC SYNTCHAR
*    field-name = field-value.
*    me->prof_id = field-value.
*    if not me->prof_id is initial.
*      qs = cl_crm_bol_query_service=>get_instance( cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof_qs ).
*      qs->set_property( iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'  iv_value = me->prof_id ). "#EC NOTEXT
*      col ?= qs->get_query_result( ).
*      ent = col->get_first( ).
*      if ent is bound.
*        field-value = ent->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_DESC' ).
*        ent->get_property_as_value(
*          exporting
*            iv_attr_name = 'GENIL_COMPSET'
*          importing
*            ev_result    = comp_set ).                      "#EC NOTEXT
*        if not comp_set is initial.
*          core = cl_crm_bol_core=>get_instance( ).
*          core->load_component_set( comp_set ).
*          try.
*              me->obj_model = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( ).
*            catch cx_crm_genil_general_error.
*              clear me->obj_model.
*          endtry.
*          if obj_model is bound.
*            obj_model->get_object_list(
*              exporting
*                iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>root_object
*              importing
*                et_object_list = obj_types ).
*            loop at obj_types into type_line-name.
*              type_line-value = type_line-name.
*              append type_line to me->type_tab.
*            endloop.
*            refresh obj_types.
*            obj_model->get_object_list(
*              exporting
*                iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object
*              importing
*                et_object_list = obj_types ).
*            loop at obj_types into type_line-name
*              where table_line = 'PointOfDelivery' or
*                    table_line = 'Premise' or
*                    table_line = btil_object_name-admini or
*                    table_line = btil_object_name-adminh.
*              type_line-value = type_line-name.
*              append type_line to me->type_tab.
*            endloop.
*            delete me->type_tab
*              where name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_pres or
*                    name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof or
*                    name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_node.
*            sort me->type_tab by name.
*            read table type_tab into type_line index 1.
*            me->type = type_line-name.
*          endif.
*        endif.
*      endif.
*    endif.
*    append field to me->prof_id_tab.
*  else.
*    qs = cl_crm_bol_query_service=>get_instance( cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof_qs ).
*    col ?= qs->get_query_result( ).
*    if col is bound.
*      ent = col->get_first( ).
*      while ent is bound.
*        field-name  = ent->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_ID' ). "#EC NOTEXT
*        translate field-name to upper case.               "#EC SYNTCHAR
*        field-value = ent->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_DESC' ). "#EC NOTEXT
*        append field to me->prof_id_tab.
*        if me->prof_id is initial.
*          me->prof_id = field-name.
*        endif.
*        ent = col->get_next( ).
*      endwhile.
*    endif.
*  endif.
*
*  me->eh_onrefresh( ).

endmethod.


method eh_onrefresh.

  data:
    ent type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.


  ent ?= me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
  if ent is bound.
    ent->reread( ).
    me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->publish_current( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method eh_onsearch.

  me->op_search( ).

endmethod.


method eh_onselect.

*  data:
*    dd_listbox_event type ref to cl_htmlb_event_selection,
*    event            type ref to cl_htmlb_event.
*
*
*  event = cl_htmlb_manager=>get_event( runtime->server->request ).
*  if event->name = 'dropdownListBox' and event->event_type = 'select'. "#EC NOTEXT
*    dd_listbox_event ?= event.
*  endif.
*
*  if dd_listbox_event is bound.
*    me->prof_id = dd_listbox_event->selection.
*
*
*
*  endif.
*
*  me->eh_onrefresh( ).

endmethod.


method get_buttons.

  data:
    wico    type ref to cl_iubotrcp_mainwindow_impl,
    buttons type crmt_thtmlb_button_ext_t,
    button  type crmt_thtmlb_button.

  field-symbols:
    <button> type crmt_thtmlb_button_ext.


** hide buttons on profile view...
*  if me->view_manager->workarea_ref_set = abap_true.
**   ...if overview page toolbar is potentially visible and...
*    wico ?= me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
*    if wico is bound and wico->is_on_popup( ) = abap_false.
**     ...if we are not on a popup
*      return.
*    endif.
*  endif.

  buttons = me->if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback~get_buttons( ).
  loop at buttons assigning <button>.
    move-corresponding <button> to button.
    append button to result.
  endloop.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback~get_buttons.

  data:
    button type crmt_thtmlb_button_ext,
    wico   type ref to cl_iubotrcp_mainwindow_impl.


* render search button (not on popup)
  wico ?= me->view_manager->get_window_controller( ).
  if wico is not bound or wico->is_on_popup( ) = abap_false.
    button-page_id         = me->component_id.
    button-icon_src        = 'ICON_SEARCH'.
    button-enabled         = abap_true.
    button-on_click        = 'search'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    button-text            = text-002.
    append button to rt_buttons.
  endif.

* render refresh button
  clear button.
  button-page_id         = me->component_id.
  button-type            = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_refresh.
  button-enabled         = abap_true.
  button-on_click        = 'refresh'.                       "#EC NOTEXT
  button-text            = text-000.
  append button to rt_buttons.


* render separator
  clear button.
  button-page_id         = me->component_id.
  button-type            = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_separator.
  append button to rt_buttons.

* render simulation button
  clear button.
  button-page_id         = me->component_id.
  button-icon_src        = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url( iv_icon_name = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_synchronize  iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
  button-enabled         = abap_true.
  button-on_client_click = me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_ID' ).
  replace all occurrences of '&' in button-on_client_click with '-_-_-amp-_-_-'.
  button-on_client_click = 'window.open( "' &&
                           cl_bsp_wd_appl_model=>get_appl_model( iv_bsp_appl = 'IUBOTRCP' iv_model_type = 'CL_BSP_WD_APPL_MODEL_DDIC' )->get_start_url( ) &&
                           '&sim=X' &&
                           '&prof_id=' &&
                           button-on_client_click &&
                           '" )'.                           "#EC NOTEXT
  button-text            = text-001.
  append button to rt_buttons.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_toolbar_callback~get_number_of_visible_buttons.
endmethod.


method IF_BSP_WD_TOOLBAR_CALLBACK~GET_SYSTEM_BUTTONS.
endmethod.


method op_search.

  me->view_manager->navigate(
    source_rep_view = me->rep_view
    outbound_plug   = 'ProfileToProfSearch' ).              "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method select_profile.
*
*  me->eh_onselect( ).
*
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_WINDOW
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data TYPED_CONTEXT type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH_CTXT read-only .

  methods IP_F4HELP
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
  methods IP_SAVEDSEARCHEDIT
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
  methods IP_SAVEDSEARCHGO
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
  methods OP_WCFSELECT
    importing
      !IV_DATA_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

  methods CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods OP_PROFILE
    importing
      !IV_DATA_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

  methods WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH IMPLEMENTATION.


method CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG.

    data: LV_PLUG_METHOD type SEOCMPNAME.

    concatenate 'OP_' IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG into LV_PLUG_METHOD.
    translate LV_PLUG_METHOD to upper case.               "#EC SYNTCHAR

    try.
        if IV_DATA_COLLECTION is bound.
          CALL METHOD (LV_PLUG_METHOD)
            EXPORTING
              IV_DATA_COLLECTION = IV_DATA_COLLECTION.
        else.
          CALL METHOD (LV_PLUG_METHOD).
        endif.
      catch CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ERROR.
        RAISE EXCEPTION type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
          EXPORTING
            TEXTID     = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>WINDOW_PLUG_UNDEFINED
            CONTROLLER = ME->VIEW_ID
            PLUG       = IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG.
    endtry.

endmethod.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

* Added by wizard
CREATE_WCFQuery( ).

* Added by wizard
CREATE_WCFResult( ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_WCFQUERY.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH_CN00'

        model_id       = 'WCFQuery' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    WCFQuery ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

endmethod.


method CREATE_WCFRESULT.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSEARCH_CN01'

        model_id       = 'WCFResult' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    WCFResult ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_restore.

  data:
    col type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


  state_container->get_item(
    exporting
      im_name  = 'WCFQUERY'
    importing
      ex_value = col ).

  me->wcfquery->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

  state_container->get_item(
    exporting
      im_name  = 'WCFRESULT'
    importing
      ex_value = col ).

  me->wcfresult->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_store.

  state_container->add_item(
    im_name  = 'WCFQUERY'
    im_value = me->wcfquery->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ) ).

  state_container->add_item(
    im_name  = 'WCFRESULT'
    im_value = me->wcfresult->collection_wrapper->get_copy( ) ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *

    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/ProfSearch'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'WCFQuery'

method CONSTRUCTOR.

method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* generated by search page wizard.
* the method does the event handling. the standard events are dealt
* with in the super method.

  case htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

*  Events

    when others.
      super->do_handle_event(
          event           = event
          htmlb_event     = htmlb_event
          htmlb_event_ex  = htmlb_event_ex
          global_messages = global_messages
             ).
  endcase.

endmethod.


method NAVIGATE_TO_LINK.
* generated by the search page wizard.
* the method calls the appropriate outbound plug depending on the
* field selected.

  data:
    lr_collection type ref to if_bol_bo_col.


* if navigation links are used, the code supplying lr_collection
* has to be added before calling the outbound plug.
*
    if ir_entity is bound.
      create object lr_collection type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
      lr_collection->add( ir_entity ).
    endif.

  case iv_field.

*  NavigationCode
when 'PROF_ID'.
op_PROF_ID( lr_collection ).

    when others.

  endcase.

endmethod.


method OP_PROF_ID.
"#EC NEEDED
** generated by search page wizard
endmethod.

* generated by search page wizard.

* you can change the options here afterwards.

SET_OPTION( IV_OPTION = 'SELECTION_MODE' IV_VALUE = 'NONE' ).

*  Buttons

endmethod.

    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSRCHR_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_PROFSRCHR_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_P_PROF_ID.

if me->running_in_f4_popup( ) = abap_false.
  case iv_property.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_event_link.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_onclick.
      rv_value = 'CLICKONLINK'.
  endcase.
endif.

endmethod.


method GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE.

  types: begin of line,
    include type CRM_ISUTREE_CUST_PREVIEW_PROFA.
  types: end of line.

  create data rv_sample type line.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_restore.

  data:
    owner type ref to cl_iubotrcp_profsrchvs_impl.


  owner ?= me->owner.

  state_container->get_item(
    exporting
      im_name  = 'GV_SHOW_SEARCH_FIELDS'
    importing
      ex_value = owner->gv_show_search_fields ).

  state_container->get_item(
    exporting
      im_name  = 'GV_RESULT_LIST_TITLE'
    importing
      ex_value = owner->gv_result_list_title ).

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_history_state~state_store.

  data:
    owner type ref to cl_iubotrcp_profsrchvs_impl.


  owner ?= me->owner.

  state_container->add_item(
    im_name  = 'GV_SHOW_SEARCH_FIELDS'
    im_value = owner->gv_show_search_fields ).

  state_container->add_item(
    im_name  = 'GV_RESULT_LIST_TITLE'
    im_value = owner->gv_result_list_title ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method wd_destroy.

  if me->view_manager->workarea_ref_set = abap_true.
    raise event history_trigger.
  endif.

  super->wd_destroy( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view. "decomment to activate locale view"


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

*     Added by wizard
      WHEN 'simulate'.                                      "#EC NOTEXT
        EH_ONSIMULATE( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'select'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSelect(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'sort'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSort(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.


*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...




endmethod.


method EH_ONSIMULATE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'simulate'

endmethod.


method EH_ONSORT.




endmethod.


method OP_EMPTY.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'EMPTY'

endmethod.


method OP_TREE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'TREE'

endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.
* Set the models for output

* Added by wizard
view->set_attribute(
      name = 'PROFILE'                                      "#EC NOTEXT
      value  = typed_context->PROFILE ).

* Added by wizard
view->set_attribute(
      name = 'PARAM'                                        "#EC NOTEXT
      value  = typed_context->PARAM ).
endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view. "decomment to activate locale view"


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.

* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

      WHEN 'select'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSelect(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'sort'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSort(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.


endmethod.


method DO_INIT_CONTEXT.

*   set initial selection mode for all tables



    typed_context->ATTR->set_selection_mode(

      IV_SELECTION_MODE = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TV=>SELMODE_SINGLE

    ).



endmethod.


method DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT.

*   build all dummy tables


    typed_context->ATTR->build_table( ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.


    data: lv_event TYPE REF TO cl_htmlb_event_tableview.

    lv_event ?= htmlb_event.

    me->typed_context->ATTR->eh_on_row_selection(
       iv_htmlb_event    = lv_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONSORT.


    me->typed_context->ATTR->eh_on_sort(
       iv_htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
       iv_htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).



endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'ATTR'                                     "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->ATTR ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value ''. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods GET_M_NAME
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods GET_I_NAME
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_NAME
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_NAME
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING

      !VALUE type STRING .
  methods GET_M_VALUE
    importing

    returning

  methods GET_I_VALUE
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_VALUE
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_VALUE
    importing

    redefinition .

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method get_i_name.

  rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.

endmethod.


method get_i_value.

  rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.

endmethod.


method GET_M_NAME.


    DATA: attr    TYPE NAME_KOMP.

    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

    GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'NAME'                            "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_M_S_STRUCT.

*  if component = 'VALUE'.
*  try.
*      call method ME->GET_M_value
*        exporting
*          ATTRIBUTE_PATH = attribute_path
*        receiving
*          METADATA       = METADATA.
*  endtry.
*  else.
CALL METHOD SUPER->GET_M_S_STRUCT
  EXPORTING
    ATTRIBUTE_PATH = attribute_path
    component      = component
  RECEIVING
    METADATA       = metadata
    .
*  endif.
endmethod.


method get_m_value.

  data: attr type string.

  data: attr_name    type string.

  data: dref    type ref to data.

*  data: struct      type string.
*
*  data: it type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator.
*
*  data: idx type sytabix.
*  data: idx_string type string.
*  data: idx_dummy type string.
*
*
*  if me->owner is bound.
*
*    it = me->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
*
*    split attribute_path at '[' into idx_dummy idx_string.
*    split idx_string at ']' into idx_string idx_dummy.
*
*    idx = idx_string.
*
*    it->get_by_index( idx ).
*
*    attr_name = me->get_name( attribute_path = space  iterator = it ).
*
*    case me->owner->current_obj_type_kind.
*      when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_access.
*        struct = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_key_struct_name( me->owner->current_obj_type ).
*        if struct is initial.
*          create data dref type guid_16.
*        else.
*          try.
*              attr_name = struct && '-' && attr_name.
*              create data dref type (attr_name).
*            catch cx_root.
*              try.
*                  create data dref type (struct).
*                catch cx_root.
*              endtry.
*          endtry.
*        endif.
*      when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_query.
*        struct = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_attr_struct_name( me->owner->current_obj_type ).
*        try.
*            attr_name = struct && '-' && attr_name.
*            create data dref type (attr_name).
*          catch cx_root.
*            try.
*                create data dref type (struct).
*              catch cx_root.
*            endtry.
*        endtry.
*    endcase.
*
*  endif.

  if dref is not bound.

    get reference of attr into dref.

  endif.

  metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'VALUE'                             "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_NAME.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode ATTR not bound'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'NAME' ).             "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'ATTR/NAME not bound'.                        "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).
        value = '-CURR/QUANT REF DATA MISSING-'.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF line.

    TYPES:
      NAME TYPE NAME_KOMP,
          VALUE TYPE STRING,

           END OF line.

    CREATE DATA rv_sample TYPE line.

endmethod.


method GET_VALUE.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode ATTR not bound'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'VALUE' ).            "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'ATTR/VALUE not bound'.                       "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).
        value = '-CURR/QUANT REF DATA MISSING-'.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  super->if_bsp_model~init(
    id     = id
    owner  = owner ).

  me->owner ?= owner.

endmethod.


method SET_NAME.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'NAME' ).             "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
*        TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref       = copy
            value          = value
            attribute_path = attribute_path.
*        CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
*          FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
*          assign copy->* to <l_data>.
*         please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*         conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*         unit relation
*         Coding sample:
*         provide currency for currency fields or decimals for quantity (select from T006).
*          cl_bsp_utility=>instantiate_simple_data(
*                             value = value
*                             reference = c_currency
*                             num_decimals = decimals
*                             use_bsp_exceptions = abap_true
*                             data = <l_data> ).
*      ENDTRY.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'NAME'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'NAME'                 "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method SET_VALUE.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'VALUE' ).            "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
*        TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref       = copy
            value          = value
            attribute_path = attribute_path.
*        CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
*          FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
*          assign copy->* to <l_data>.
*         please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*         conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*         unit relation
*         Coding sample:
*         provide currency for currency fields or decimals for quantity (select from T006).
*          cl_bsp_utility=>instantiate_simple_data(
*                             value = value
*                             reference = c_currency
*                             num_decimals = decimals
*                             use_bsp_exceptions = abap_true
*                             data = <l_data> ).
*      ENDTRY.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'VALUE'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'VALUE'                "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data ATTR type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CN00 read-only .

*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods CREATE_ATTR .

  methods CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES
    redefinition .
  methods CONNECT_NODES
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.


endmethod.


method CREATE_ATTR.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_CN00'

        model_id       = 'ATTR' ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
    ATTR ?= model.
    CLEAR model.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes


    CREATE_ATTR( ).



endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR
  create public

  global friends CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data CURRENT_OBJ_TYPE type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME read-only .
  data CURRENT_OBJ_TYPE_KIND type CHAR1 read-only .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods DO_CLEANUP_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method do_cleanup_context.

  clear:
    me->current_obj_type,
    me->current_obj_type_kind.

endmethod.


method do_prepare_output.

  data:
    parent   type ref to cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl,
    obj_type type crmt_ext_obj_name.

  types: begin of ltype_attr_struct,
         name type name_komp,
         value type string,

         end of ltype_attr_struct.

  data: lv_struct_ref type ref to ltype_attr_struct,
        lv_value_node type ref to cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
        lv_bo_coll    type ref to if_bol_bo_col.



  try.
      parent ?= m_parent.
      if parent is bound.
*       get object type from parent (View SimParam)
        obj_type = parent->typed_context->param->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'BOLTYPE' ).
*       fill attributes
        if me->current_obj_type <> obj_type.
*         clear old values
          me->typed_context->attr->collection_wrapper->clear( ).
*         determine attributes and fill collection


          data: ls_line         type crmt_name_value_pair,
                lv_object_name  type crmt_ext_obj_name,
                struct      type name_komp,
                lt_x031l      type table of x031l.
          field-symbols: <line> type x031l.
          me->current_obj_type_kind = parent->typed_context->param->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'BOLTYPEKIND' ).
          case me->current_obj_type_kind.
            when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_access.
              struct = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_key_struct_name( obj_type ).
              if struct is initial.
                struct = 'GUID_16'.
              endif.
            when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_query.
              struct = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_attr_struct_name( obj_type ).
          endcase.

          if struct is not initial.

            call function 'DDIF_NAMETAB_GET'
              exporting
                tabname   = struct
                all_types = abap_true
              tables
                x031l_tab = lt_x031l
              exceptions
                others    = 0.

            loop at lt_x031l assigning <line>.
              create data lv_struct_ref.
              lv_struct_ref->name = <line>-fieldname.
              create object lv_value_node
                exporting
                  iv_data_ref = lv_struct_ref.

              me->typed_context->attr->collection_wrapper->add( lv_value_node ).
            endloop.

            me->current_obj_type = obj_type.

          endif.

        endif.
      endif.
    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
*     unknown parent -> ???
  endtry.

* prepare table
  super->do_prepare_output( iv_first_time ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

      !VALUE type STRING .

  methods GET_I_BOLTYPE
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .

    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_BOLTYPE
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type STRING .

    importing

    returning

      !IV_DISPLAY_MODE type ABAP_BOOL default ABAP_FALSE
    returning

    importing
      !IV_MODE type CHAR1 default IF_BSP_WD_MODEL_SETTER_GETTER=>RUNTIME_MODE
      !IV_INDEX type I optional
    returning

    returning

      !IV_INDEX type I optional
    returning

    redefinition .

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_BOLKEY.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode PARAM not bound'.                                "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOLKEY' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'PARAM/BOLKEY not bound'.                     "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).
        value = '-CURR/QUANT REF DATA MISSING-'.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

method GET_I_BOLKEY.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

    TRY.
        IF current->is_property_readonly(
                      'BOLKEY' ) = abap_false.              "#EC NOTEXT
          rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method GET_I_BOLTYPE.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.

      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

                      'BOLTYPE' ) = abap_false.             "#EC NOTEXT
          rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.



endmethod.

    ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method GET_M_BOLKEY.


    DATA: attr    TYPE numc3.

    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

    GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'BOLKEY'                          "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_M_BOLTYPE.


    DATA: attr    TYPE CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME.

    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

    GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'BOLTYPE'                         "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_M_BOLTYPEKIND.

  DATA: attr    TYPE CHAR1.

  DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

  GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

  metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'BOLTYPEKIND'  "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method get_p_boltype.

  case iv_property.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_picklist.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_server_event.
      rv_value = abap_true.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method get_p_boltypekind.

  case iv_property.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_fieldtype.
      rv_value = cl_bsp_dlc_view_descriptor=>field_type_picklist.
    when if_bsp_wd_model_setter_getter=>fp_server_event.
      rv_value = abap_true.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method get_v_boltype.

  data:
    type_line type bsp_wd_dropdown_line,
    type_tab  type bsp_wd_dropdown_table,
    obj_model type ref to if_genil_obj_model,
    obj_types type crmt_ext_obj_name_tab,
    type_key  type string.


  case me->get_boltypekind( attribute_path = space ).
    when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_query.
      if me->boltype_q_vh_descr is not bound.
*       determine available access objects from BOL model
        try.
            obj_model = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( ).
            if obj_model is bound.
              obj_model->get_object_list(
                exporting
                  iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>query_object
                importing
                  et_object_list = obj_types ).
              loop at obj_types into type_line-key where table_line np cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_model_prefix && '*'.
                type_line-value = type_line-key.
                append type_line to type_tab.
              endloop.
              clear obj_types.
              obj_model->get_object_list(
                exporting
                  iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>dquery_object
                importing
                  et_object_list = obj_types ).
              loop at obj_types into type_line-key where table_line np cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_model_prefix && '*'.
                type_line-value = type_line-key.
                append type_line to type_tab.
              endloop.
              sort type_tab by key.
              create object me->boltype_q_vh_descr type cl_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr
                exporting
                  iv_source_type     = if_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr=>source_type_table
                  iv_selection_table = type_tab.
*             set initial value to first bol object
              read table type_tab into type_line index 1.
              if sy-subrc = 0.
                type_key = type_line-key.
                me->set_boltype( value = type_key  attribute_path = space ).
              endif.
            endif.
          catch cx_crm_genil_general_error.
        endtry.
      endif.
      rv_valuehelp_descriptor = me->boltype_q_vh_descr.
    when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_access.
      if me->boltype_a_vh_descr is not bound.
*       determine available access objects from BOL model
        try.
            obj_model = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( ).
            if obj_model is bound.
              obj_model->get_object_list(
                exporting
                  iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>root_object
                importing
                  et_object_list = obj_types ).
              loop at obj_types into type_line-key where table_line np cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_model_prefix && '*'.
                type_line-value = type_line-key.
                append type_line to type_tab.
              endloop.
              clear obj_types.
              obj_model->get_object_list(
                exporting
                  iv_object_kind = if_genil_obj_model=>access_object
                importing
                  et_object_list = obj_types ).
              loop at obj_types into type_line-key where table_line np cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_model_prefix && '*'.
                type_line-value = type_line-key.
                append type_line to type_tab.
              endloop.
              sort type_tab by key.
              create object me->boltype_a_vh_descr type cl_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr
                exporting
                  iv_source_type     = if_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr=>source_type_table
                  iv_selection_table = type_tab.
*             set initial value to first bol object
              read table type_tab into type_line index 1.
              if sy-subrc = 0.
                type_key = type_line-key.
                me->set_boltype( value = type_key  attribute_path = space ).
              endif.
            endif.
          catch cx_crm_genil_general_error.
        endtry.
      endif.
      rv_valuehelp_descriptor = me->boltype_a_vh_descr.
  endcase.

endmethod.


method get_v_boltypekind.

  data:
    type_line type bsp_wd_dropdown_line,
    type_tab  type bsp_wd_dropdown_table,
    type_key  type string.


  if me->boltypekind_vh_descr is not bound.
    type_line-key   = cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_query.
    type_line-value = text-000.
    append type_line to type_tab.
    type_line-key   = cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_access.
    type_line-value = text-001.
    append type_line to type_tab.
    create object me->boltypekind_vh_descr type cl_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr
      exporting
        iv_source_type     = if_bsp_wd_valuehelp_pldescr=>source_type_table
        iv_selection_table = type_tab.
*   set initial value to first bol object kind
    read table type_tab into type_line index 1.
    if sy-subrc = 0.
      type_key = type_line-key.
      me->set_boltypekind( value = type_key  attribute_path = space ).
    endif.
  endif.

  rv_valuehelp_descriptor = me->boltypekind_vh_descr.

endmethod.


method IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ltype_attr_struct,
           BOLTYPE TYPE CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME,
           BOLKEY TYPE sytabix,

           BOLTYPEKIND TYPE CHAR1 , "Added by wizard
           END OF ltype_attr_struct.


    super->if_bsp_model~init( id    = id
                              owner = owner ).

    DATA: lv_struct_ref TYPE REF TO ltype_attr_struct,
          lv_value_node TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
          lv_bo_coll    TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col.

    CREATE DATA lv_struct_ref.
    CREATE OBJECT lv_value_node
      EXPORTING
        iv_data_ref = lv_struct_ref.
    CREATE OBJECT lv_bo_coll TYPE cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

    lv_bo_coll->add( lv_value_node ).

    set_collection( lv_bo_coll ).
endmethod.


method SET_BOLKEY.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOLKEY' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
*        TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref       = copy
            value          = value
            attribute_path = attribute_path.
*        CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
*          FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
*          assign copy->* to <l_data>.
*         please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*         conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*         unit relation
*         Coding sample:
*         provide currency for currency fields or decimals for quantity (select from T006).
*          cl_bsp_utility=>instantiate_simple_data(
*                             value = value
*                             reference = c_currency
*                             num_decimals = decimals
*                             use_bsp_exceptions = abap_true
*                             data = <l_data> ).
*      ENDTRY.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'BOLKEY'.                                "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'BOLKEY'               "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method SET_BOLTYPE.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOLTYPE' ).          "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
*        TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref       = copy
            value          = value
            attribute_path = attribute_path.
*        CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
*          FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
*          assign copy->* to <l_data>.
*         please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*         conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*         unit relation
*         Coding sample:
*         provide currency for currency fields or decimals for quantity (select from T006).
*          cl_bsp_utility=>instantiate_simple_data(
*                             value = value
*                             reference = c_currency
*                             num_decimals = decimals
*                             use_bsp_exceptions = abap_true
*                             data = <l_data> ).
*      ENDTRY.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'BOLTYPE'.                               "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'BOLTYPE'              "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method SET_BOLTYPEKIND.
    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
    dref = current->get_property( 'BOLTYPEKIND' )."#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
*        TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref       = copy
            value          = value
            attribute_path = attribute_path.
*        CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
*          FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
*          assign copy->* to <l_data>.
*         please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*         conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*         unit relation
*         Coding sample:
*         provide currency for currency fields or decimals for quantity (select from T006).
*          cl_bsp_utility=>instantiate_simple_data(
*                             value = value
*                             reference = c_currency
*                             num_decimals = decimals
*                             use_bsp_exceptions = abap_true
*                             data = <l_data> ).
*      ENDTRY.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'BOLTYPEKIND'."#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'BOLTYPEKIND' "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

* Added by wizard
CREATE_PROFILE( ).

* Added by wizard
CREATE_PARAM( ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_PARAM.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_CN01'

        model_id       = 'PARAM' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    PARAM ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

endmethod.


method CREATE_PROFILE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_CN00'

        model_id       = 'PROFILE' ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
    PROFILE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/SimWindow'                          "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'PROFILE'
    iv_node_2_bind = PROFILE  ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM
  create public

  global friends CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAMATTR_IMPL .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  constants CO_BOL_TYPE_KIND_QUERY type CHAR1 value 'Q'. "#EC NOTEXT
  constants CO_BOL_TYPE_KIND_ACCESS type CHAR1 value 'A'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods GET_SIM_TEXT
    returning
      value(RESULT) type STRING .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods EH_ONSIMULATE
    redefinition .
  methods OP_TREE
    redefinition .
  methods OP_EMPTY
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMPARAM_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method eh_onsimulate.

  data:
    entity     type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    col        type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    name       type crmt_ext_obj_name,
    key_ref    type ref to data,
    key_str    type name_komp,
    attr_ctrl  type ref to cl_iubotrcp_simparamattr_impl,
    attr_bo    type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
    attr_it    type ref to if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
    attr_name  type name_komp,
    query      type ref to cl_crm_bol_query_service,
    dquery     type ref to cl_crm_bol_dquery_service,
    query_par  type crmt_name_value_pair,
    query_part type crmt_name_value_pair_tab,
    max_size   type sytabix.

  field-symbols:
   <typed_key> type any,
   <value>     type any.


* destroy old usage
  me->comp_controller->get_component_usage( 'SimTreeUsage' )->delete_component( ).

* get max size
  max_size = me->typed_context->param->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'BOLKEY' ).

  try.

*     get attributes
      attr_ctrl ?= me->get_subcontroller_by_viewname( 'IUBOTRCP/SimParamAttr' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      if attr_ctrl is bound.
        attr_it = attr_ctrl->typed_context->attr->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
        if attr_it is bound.

*         get bol type
          name = me->typed_context->param->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'BOLTYPE' ).

          case me->typed_context->param->collection_wrapper->get_current( )->get_property_as_string( 'BOLTYPEKIND' ).

            when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_query.

              case cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_object_kind( name ).

                when if_genil_obj_model=>query_object.

                  query = cl_crm_bol_query_service=>get_instance( name ).

                  attr_bo = attr_it->get_first( ).
                  while attr_bo is bound.

                    attr_name = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'NAME' ).

                    query->set_property_as_string(
                      iv_attr_name = attr_name
                      iv_value     = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'VALUE' ) ).

                    attr_bo = attr_it->get_next( ).
                  endwhile.

                  col = query->get_query_result( ).

                when if_genil_obj_model=>dquery_object.

                  dquery = cl_crm_bol_dquery_service=>get_instance( name ).

                  attr_bo = attr_it->get_first( ).
                  while attr_bo is bound.

                    attr_name = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'NAME' ).

                    dquery->add_selection_param(
                      iv_attr_name = attr_name
                      iv_sign      = 'I'
                      iv_option    = 'EQ'
                      iv_low       = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'VALUE' ) ).

                    attr_bo = attr_it->get_next( ).
                  endwhile.

                  query_par-name = 'MAX_HITS'.
                  query_par-value = max_size.
                  append query_par to query_part.
                  dquery->set_query_parameters( query_part ).

                  col = dquery->get_query_result( ).

              endcase.

            when cl_iubotrcp_simparam_impl=>co_bol_type_kind_access.

              key_str = cl_crm_genil_model_service=>get_runtime_model( )->get_key_struct_name( name ).
              if key_str is initial.
                key_str = 'GUID_16'.
              endif.

              create data key_ref type (key_str).

              assign key_ref->* to <typed_key>.

              attr_bo = attr_it->get_first( ).
              while attr_bo is bound.

                attr_name = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'NAME' ).

                try.
                    assign component attr_name of structure <typed_key> to <value>.
                    if sy-subrc = 0.
                      <value> = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'VALUE' ).
                    else.
                      <typed_key> = attr_bo->get_property_as_string( 'VALUE' ).
                    endif.
                  catch cx_root.
                endtry.
                attr_bo = attr_it->get_next( ).
              endwhile.

*             get entity
              entity = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity( name = name  key = <typed_key> ).
              if entity is bound.
                create object col type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
                col->add( entity ).
              endif.

          endcase.

        endif.

      endif.

*     adjust max size
      if max_size > 1 and col is bound and col->size( ) > 1.
        while col->size( ) > max_size.
          col->remove( iv_bo = col->get_last( ) ).
        endwhile.
      endif.

*     set profile
      me->comp_controller->get_component_usage( 'SimTreeUsage'
        )->get_context_node( 'PROFILE'
          )->collection_wrapper->get_current(
            )->set_property(
              iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'
              iv_value     = me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current(
                               )->get_property_as_string( 'PROF_ID' ) ). "#EC NOTEXT

*     set root object
      me->comp_controller->get_component_usage( 'SimTreeUsage'
        )->get_context_node( 'ROOTOBJECTS' )->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

*     navigate to tree (triggers building of tree)
      me->op_tree( ).

    catch cx_root.

*     show empty view
      me->op_empty( ).

  endtry.

endmethod.


method get_sim_text.

  result = text-000.

endmethod.


method OP_EMPTY.

  me->view_manager->navigate(
    source_rep_view = me->rep_view
    outbound_plug   = 'SimParamToEmpty'
    data_collection = iv_data_collection ).

endmethod.


method op_tree.

  me->view_manager->navigate(
    source_rep_view = me->rep_view
    outbound_plug   = 'SimParamToSimTree'
    data_collection = iv_data_collection ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMWINDOW IMPLEMENTATION.


method CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG.

    data: LV_PLUG_METHOD type SEOCMPNAME.

    concatenate 'OP_' IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG into LV_PLUG_METHOD.
    translate LV_PLUG_METHOD to upper case.               "#EC SYNTCHAR

    try.
        if IV_DATA_COLLECTION is bound.
          CALL METHOD (LV_PLUG_METHOD)
            EXPORTING
              IV_DATA_COLLECTION = IV_DATA_COLLECTION.
        else.
          CALL METHOD (LV_PLUG_METHOD).
        endif.
      catch CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ERROR.
        RAISE EXCEPTION type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
          EXPORTING
            TEXTID     = CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>WINDOW_PLUG_UNDEFINED
            CONTROLLER = ME->VIEW_ID
            PLUG       = IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG.
    endtry.

endmethod.


method IP_PROFILE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'PROFILE'

endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.


*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
          iv_controller = me
          iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_SIMWINDOW_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

  methods EH_ONSELECT_TYPE
    importing
      !HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT optional
      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .
  methods EH_ONTEST
    importing
      !HTMLB_EVENT type ref to CL_HTMLB_EVENT optional
      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .

    importing

      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .

    importing

    importing

      !HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional .

    importing

    importing

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view.


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.

*   Data input processing
    fill_model_data( fields   = form_fields
                     messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* Eventhandler

  case HTMLB_EVENT_EX->EVENT_SERVER_NAME.

*     Added by wizard
    WHEN 'test'.                                            "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONTEST( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

*     Added by wizard
    WHEN 'select_type'.                                     "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONSELECT_TYPE( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

*     Added by wizard
    WHEN 'select_prof'.                                     "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONSELECT_PROF( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

    when 'select'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONSELECT(
                HTMLB_EVENT_EX = HTMLB_EVENT_EX ).

    when 'expand'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONEXPAND(
                HTMLB_EVENT_EX = HTMLB_EVENT_EX ).

    when 'collapse'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONCOLLAPSE(
                HTMLB_EVENT_EX = HTMLB_EVENT_EX ).

    when 'refresh'.                                         "#EC NOTEXT
      EH_ONREFRESH(
                HTMLB_EVENT_EX = HTMLB_EVENT_EX ).

    when others.
  endcase.
endmethod.


method DO_PREPARE_OUTPUT.

*   build all dummy tables


    IF typed_context->Tree->node_tab IS INITIAL.
      typed_context->Tree->refresh( ).
    ENDIF.

    typed_context->Tree->build_table( ).



endmethod.


method EH_ONCOLLAPSE.

*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...


endmethod.


method EH_ONEXPAND.

*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...


endmethod.


method EH_ONREFRESH.

*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...


endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.

*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...


endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT_PROF.
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'select_prof'

endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT_TYPE.
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'select_type'

endmethod.


method EH_ONTEST.
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'test'

endmethod.


method IP_INBOUNDPLUG.

*   put in your inbound plug coding here...


endmethod.


method OP_TODETAIL.
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'TODETAIL'

endmethod.


method OP_TOEMPTY.
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'TODETAIL'

endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.
* Set the models for output

  view->set_attribute(
      name   = 'Tree'                                       "#EC NOTEXT
      value  = typed_context->Tree ).

* Added by wizard
  view->set_attribute(
        name = 'TEST'                                       "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->TEST ).

* Added by wizard
  view->set_attribute(
        name = 'PROFILE'                                    "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->PROFILE ).
endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.



class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN00 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_TREE
  create public .

public section.

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value 'IsuBolTreeCustProf'. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods CONSTRUCTOR .
  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS
    for event NEW_FOCUS of CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .

  methods REFRESH
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class ZL_BOLTREE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE
    redefinition .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.

  super->constructor( ).

  ME->SELECTION_MODE = SELMODE_single.

endmethod.


method GET_TABLE_LINE_SAMPLE.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF line.
        include type crm_isutree_hier.
        types:
           END OF line.

    CREATE DATA rv_sample TYPE line.

endmethod.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    entity ?= focus_bo.
    TRY.
        lv_collection = entity->get_related_entities(
               iv_relation_name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_rel_prof_rootnode ).

      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.


method REFRESH.

    DATA: lv_entity   TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
          lv_iterator TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
          lv_root     TYPE REF TO if_bsp_wd_tree_node.

    reset_node_mapper( ).

    TRY.
        lv_iterator = me->collection_wrapper->get_iterator( ).
        lv_entity ?= lv_iterator->get_first( ).
        WHILE lv_entity IS BOUND.

          lv_root = me->node_factory->get_proxy(
                 iv_bo         = lv_entity
                 iv_proxy_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN01' ).

          try.
              if lv_root is bound.
                data lo_node type ref to cl_iubotrcp_tree_cn01.
                lo_node ?= lv_root.
                lo_node->mo_tree = me.
              endif.
            catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
          endtry.

          lv_root->node_key = add_root_node( lv_root ).
          lv_entity ?= lv_iterator->get_next( ).
        ENDWHILE.

      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN01 IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.

  super->constructor( iv_bo = iv_bo  iv_node_factory = iv_node_factory ).

  me->node_expanded = abap_true.

endmethod.


method GET_BOL_TYPE.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustNode not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = me->bo.
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOL_TYPE' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustNode/BOL_TYPE not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.

method GET_I_BOL_TYPE.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.

      current = me->bo.

method GET_M_BOL_TYPE.


  DATA: attr    TYPE CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME.

  DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'BOL_TYPE'  "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).
