  DATA: attr    TYPE CRMT_SEQU.

  DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

  GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

  metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
       attribute_ref  = dref
       attribute_path = attribute_path
       name           = 'SEQUENCE'  "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
       no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_NODE_ID.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'IsuBolTreeCustNode not bound'."#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = me->bo.
    endif.


  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'NODE_ID' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'IsuBolTreeCustNode/NODE_ID not bound'."#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                  "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.

method IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE~GET_CHILDREN.

  DATA: lv_coll   TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
        lv_entity TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
        lv_child  TYPE REF TO if_bsp_wd_tree_node.

  TRY.
      lv_entity ?= me->bo.
      lv_coll = lv_entity->get_related_entities(
            iv_relation_name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_rel_node_subnode ).
      lv_entity ?= lv_coll->get_first( ).
      WHILE lv_entity IS BOUND.

*       avoid endless recursions for multi-level recursive nodes!
        if me->mo_tree is bound and lv_entity->get_property_as_string( 'RECURSIVE' ) = 'M'.
          data ls_node type crmt_bsp_treetable_node.
          read table me->mo_tree->node_tab into ls_node transporting node_key parent_key
            with key node_key = me->if_bsp_wd_tree_node~node_key.
          if sy-subrc = 0.
            data lv_recursion_found type abap_bool.
            lv_recursion_found = abap_false.
            while ls_node-parent_key is not initial.
              read table me->mo_tree->node_tab into ls_node transporting node_key parent_key
                with key node_key = ls_node-parent_key.
              if sy-subrc = 0 and ls_node-node_key is not initial.
                if me->mo_tree->get_bo( ls_node-node_key ) = lv_entity.
                  data lo_node type ref to cl_iubotrcp_tree_cn01.
                  try.
                      lv_child = me->mo_tree->get_node_by_key( ls_node-node_key ).
                      lo_node ?= lv_child.
                      lo_node->mv_multi_recursion = abap_true.
                      lv_child->collaps_node( ).
                    catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
                  endtry.
                  lv_recursion_found = abap_true.
                  exit.
                endif.
              else.
                exit.
              endif.
            endwhile.
            if lv_recursion_found = abap_true.  "recursion found -> exit!
              lv_entity ?= lv_coll->get_next( ).
              continue.
            endif.
          endif.
        endif.

        lv_child = me->node_factory->get_proxy(
            iv_bo = lv_entity
            iv_proxy_type = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN01'
            iv_parent_proxy = me ).

        try.
            if lv_child is bound.
              lo_node ?= lv_child.
              lo_node->mo_tree = me->mo_tree.
            endif.
          catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        endtry.

        APPEND lv_child TO rt_children.
        lv_entity ?= lv_coll->get_next( ).
      ENDWHILE.
    CATCH CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL
          CX_CRM_GENIL_MODEL_ERROR.
  ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~get_icon.

  if me->mv_multi_recursion = abap_true or
     me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'RECURSIVE' ) = abap_true.
    rv_icon = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
                iv_icon_name = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_refresh
                iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
  elseif me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'FOLDER' ) = abap_true.
    rv_icon = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
                iv_icon_name = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_component
                iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
  elseif me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'HIDDEN' ) = abap_true.
    rv_icon = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
                iv_icon_name = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_inactive
                iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
  else.
    rv_icon = cl_thtmlb_util=>get_dyn_icon_url(
                iv_icon_name = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_icon_object_folder
                iv_icon_type = cl_thtmlb_util=>gc_button_icon ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_wd_tree_node~get_icon_tooltip.

  if me->mv_multi_recursion = abap_true or
     me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'RECURSIVE' ) = abap_true.
    data lo_elemdescr type ref to cl_abap_elemdescr.
    lo_elemdescr ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'REKRI' ).
    rv_result = lo_elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-scrtext_m.
  elseif me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'FOLDER' ) = abap_true.
    lo_elemdescr ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'CRMT_PNODE_FOLDER' ).
    rv_result = lo_elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-scrtext_l.
  elseif me->bo is bound and me->bo->get_property_as_string( 'HIDDEN' ) = abap_true.
    lo_elemdescr ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'SKWF_HDDEN' ).
    rv_result = lo_elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-scrtext_l.
  endif.

endmethod.


method SET_BOL_TYPE.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = me->bo.
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

  TRY.

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'BOL_TYPE' ). "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_crm_cic_parameter_error.
    ENDTRY.

    CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial cx_sy_move_cast_error
          cx_crm_genil_model_error.
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'BOL_TYPE'."#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'BOL_TYPE' "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

  ENDIF.

endmethod.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value ''. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods GET_I_VALUE
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_M_VALUE
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods GET_VALUE
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_VALUE
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type STRING .

  methods IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data OWNER type ref to CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_IMPL .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data TYPE_VALUEHELP type ref to CL_BSP_WD_VALUEHELP_PLDESCR .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_I_VALUE.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

    TRY.
        IF current->is_property_readonly(
                      'VALUE' ) = abap_false.               "#EC NOTEXT
          rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method GET_M_VALUE.



    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    create data dref type string.



    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'VALUE'                           "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_VALUE.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode TEST not bound'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'VALUE' ).            "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'TEST/VALUE not bound'.                       "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.                     "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  types: begin of ltype_attr_struct,
         value type string,
         end of ltype_attr_struct.


  super->if_bsp_model~init( id    = id
                            owner = owner ).

  me->owner ?= owner.

  data: lv_struct_ref type ref to ltype_attr_struct,
        lv_value_node type ref to cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
        lv_bo_coll    type ref to if_bol_bo_col.

  create data lv_struct_ref.
  create object lv_value_node
    exporting iv_data_ref = lv_struct_ref.
  create object lv_bo_coll type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

  lv_bo_coll->add( lv_value_node ).

  set_collection( lv_bo_coll ).

endmethod.


method SET_VALUE.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'VALUE' ).            "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'VALUE'.                                 "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'VALUE'                "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CTXT definition
  public

  create public .

public section.

  methods CREATE_TEST .

    redefinition .

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.

    IF me->profile IS BOUND AND
       me->tree IS BOUND.
      coll_wrapper = ME->profile->get_collection_wrapper( ).
      SET HANDLER ME->tree->on_new_focus
                  FOR coll_wrapper ACTIVATION iv_activate.
    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_PROFILE( ).

    CREATE_Tree( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_node( ).

* Added by wizard
    CREATE_TEST( ).

endmethod.


method CREATE_NODE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN02'

        model_id       = 'node' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    node ?= model.
    CLEAR model.


  me->owner->do_context_node_binding(
    IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = cl_bsp_wd_controller=>co_type_window
    IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = 'NODE'
    IV_NODE_2_BIND      = node ).

endmethod.


method CREATE_PROFILE.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,           "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.           "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN04'

        model_id       = 'PROFILE' ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
    PROFILE ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

* Added by wizard
* bind Context Node to controller
    owner->do_context_node_binding(
    iv_controller_type = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_WINDOW
    iv_name = 'IUBOTRCP/MainWindow'                         "#EC NOTEXT
    iv_target_node_name = 'PROFILE'
    iv_node_2_bind = PROFILE  ).
endmethod.


method CREATE_TEST.
    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN03'

        model_id       = 'TEST' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    TEST ?= model.
    CLEAR model.

endmethod.


method CREATE_TREE.

    DATA:
      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *

    model = owner->create_model(

        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_CN00'

        model_id       = 'tree' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    tree ?= model.
    CLEAR model.


* initial setting for depandant model node
    coll_wrapper =
      profile->get_collection_wrapper( ).
    TRY.
        entity ?= coll_wrapper->get_current( ).
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
    ENDTRY.
    IF entity IS BOUND.
      tree->on_new_focus(
                   focus_bo = entity ).
    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

    redefinition .
  methods EH_ONSELECT_PROF

CLASS CL_IUBOTRCP_TREE_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).


endmethod.


method do_init_context.

  me->typed_context->tree->refresh( ).

  me->preselect_1st_entry( ).

endmethod.


method EH_ONCOLLAPSE.
  data: LV_EVENT type ref to CL_thtmlb_TREE.
  field-symbols: <LINE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.

  LV_EVENT ?= HTMLB_EVENT_EX.
  TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->COLLAPSE_NODE( LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY ).
endmethod.


method EH_ONEXPAND.
  data: LV_EVENT type ref to CL_thtmlb_TREE.
  field-symbols: <LINE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.

  LV_EVENT ?= HTMLB_EVENT_EX.
  TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->EXPAND_NODE( LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY ).
endmethod.


method eh_onrefresh.

  data:
    col   type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
    ent   type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
    key   type char10.


  me->typed_context->tree->collection_wrapper->clear_collection( ).

  key = me->prof_id.
  check not key is initial.

  ent = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity( name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_obj_prof  key = key ).
  check ent is bound.

  me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->clear( ).
  me->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->add( ent ).

  ent->reread( ).

  col = ent->get_related_entities( iv_relation_name = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cust_il=>co_rel_prof_rootnode ).

  me->typed_context->tree->collection_wrapper->set_collection( col ).

  me->typed_context->tree->refresh( ).

  me->preselect_1st_entry( ).

endmethod.


method EH_ONSELECT.
  data: LV_EVENT type ref to CL_thtmlb_TREE,
        COL      type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL,
        BO       type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS,
        TNODE    type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE.
  field-symbols: <LINE> type CRMT_BSP_TREETABLE_NODE.

  try.
      LV_EVENT ?= HTMLB_EVENT_EX.

*     remove previous selection.
      TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->DESELECT_ALL( ).

      if LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY is initial.
        TNODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->GET_NODE_BY_INDEX( LV_EVENT->ROW_INDEX ).
        check tnode is bound.
        LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY = TNODE->NODE_KEY.
      else.
        TNODE = TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->GET_NODE_BY_KEY( LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY ).
      endif.
      check tnode is bound.
      TNODE->SELECTED = ABAP_TRUE.

      BO = TYPED_CONTEXT->TREE->GET_BO( LV_EVENT->ROW_KEY ).

      typed_context->node->collection_wrapper->clear( ).

      if bo is bound.
        typed_context->node->collection_wrapper->add( bo ).
      endif.

    catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
*
  endtry.


endmethod.


method eh_onselect_prof.

  data:
    dd_listbox_event type ref to cl_htmlb_event_selection,
    event            type ref to cl_htmlb_event.


  event = cl_htmlb_manager=>get_event( runtime->server->request ).
  if event->name = 'dropdownListBox' and event->event_type = 'select'."#EC NOTEXT
    dd_listbox_event ?= event.
  endif.

  if dd_listbox_event is bound.
    me->prof_id = dd_listbox_event->selection.
  endif.

  me->eh_onrefresh( ).

endmethod.


method eh_onselect_type.

  data:
    dd_listbox_event type ref to cl_htmlb_event_selection,
    event            type ref to cl_htmlb_event.


  event = cl_htmlb_manager=>get_event( runtime->server->request ).
  if event->name = 'dropdownListBox' and event->event_type = 'select'."#EC NOTEXT
    dd_listbox_event ?= event.
  endif.

  if dd_listbox_event is bound.
    me->type = dd_listbox_event->selection.
  endif.

endmethod.


method eh_ontest.

*  data:
*    lv_title                     type string,
*    lv_tree_profile              type crmt_pnt_profile,
*    lr_cnode                     type ref to cl_bsp_wd_context_node,
*    lr_coll                      type ref to if_bol_bo_col,
*    lr_bo                        type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.
*
*  data:
*    entity  type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,
*    name    type crmt_ext_obj_name,
*    key     type ref to data,
*    popup   type ref to if_bsp_wd_popup.
*
*  field-symbols:
*    <key> type any.
*
*
*  name = me->type.
*
*  key = me->get_current_test_key_ref( ).
*
*  assign key->* to <key>.
*
*  entity = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>get_entity( name = name  key = <key> ).
*  check entity is bound.
*
*
** create popup
*  lv_tree_profile = me->prof_id.
*
*  popup = me->comp_controller->window_manager->create_popup(
*    iv_usage_name          = 'tree_test'                    "#EC NOTEXT
*    iv_interface_view_name = 'MainWindow'                   "#EC NOTEXT
*    iv_title               = lv_title ).
*
*  lr_cnode = popup->get_context_node( 'PROFILE' ).          "#EC NOTEXT
*  if lr_cnode is bound.
*    lr_bo = lr_cnode->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
*    lr_bo->set_property(
*      iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'                              "#EC NOTEXT
*      iv_value     = lv_tree_profile ).
*  endif.
*
*
*
*  lr_cnode = popup->get_context_node( 'ROOTOBJECTS' ).      "#EC NOTEXT
*
*  if lr_cnode is bound.
*    lr_cnode->collection_wrapper->clear_collection( ).
*    create object lr_coll type cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
*    lr_coll->add( entity ).
*    lr_cnode->collection_wrapper->set_collection( lr_coll ).
*  endif.
*
**     open popup
*  call method popup->set_window_height
*    exporting
*      iv_height = '500'.                                    "#EC NOTEXT
*  call method popup->set_window_width
*    exporting
*      iv_width = '700'.                                     "#EC NOTEXT
*
*  popup->open( 'DEFAULT' ).                                 "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method get_current_test_key_ref.

  data:
    struc_name type strukname,
    obj_type   type crmt_ext_obj_name,
    bo         type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access,
    value      type string,
    rtti       type ref to cl_abap_typedescr,
    rtti2      type ref to cl_abap_elemdescr,
    offset     type int4.

  field-symbols:
    <value> type any,
    <comp>  type any.


  if me->obj_model is bound and not me->type is initial.
    obj_type = me->type.
    struc_name = me->obj_model->get_key_struct_name( obj_type ).
    if struc_name is initial.
      struc_name = 'GUID_16'.                               "#EC NOTEXT
    endif.
    create data result type (struc_name).
    assign result->* to <value>.
    check <value> is assigned.

    bo = me->typed_context->test->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    value = bo->get_property_as_string( 'VALUE' ).          "#EC NOTEXT

    rtti = cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data( <value> ).
    if rtti->type_kind = cl_abap_typedescr=>typekind_struct1.
      do.
        assign component sy-index of structure <value> to <comp>.
        if sy-subrc = 0.
          rtti2 ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data( <comp> ).
          <comp> = value+offset.
          add rtti2->output_length to offset.
          if offset >= strlen( value ).
            exit.
          endif.
        else.
          if sy-index = 1.
            <value> = value.
          endif.
          exit.
        endif.
      enddo.
    elseif rtti->type_kind = cl_abap_typedescr=>typekind_struct2 or
           rtti->type_kind = cl_abap_typedescr=>typekind_table.
      clear result.
    else.
      <value> = value.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method op_todetail.
endmethod.


method OP_TOEMPTY.
endmethod.


method preselect_1st_entry.

  data:
    event type ref to cl_thtmlb_tree.


* preselect first entry
  me->typed_context->tree->build_table( ).

  if me->typed_context->tree->collection_wrapper->size( ) > 0.

    create object event.

    event->row_index = 1.

    me->eh_onselect( htmlb_event_ex = event ).

  endif.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS.
  if FCONTEXT_CLASS is initial.
    FCONTEXT_CLASS = CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT=>C_DEFAULT_CONTEXT_CLASS.
  endif.
  RV_RESULT = FCONTEXT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

  SUPER->WD_CREATE_CONTEXT( ).

  if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
    CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
      IV_CONTROLLER = ME
      IV_TYPE       = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT'
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

  CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
    IV_CONTROLLER = ME
    IV_TYPE       = GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS( )
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  TYPED_CONTEXT ?= CONTEXT.

endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.
  clear TYPED_CONTEXT.
  SUPER->WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT( ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN03 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_FOCUS_SELECTION.

  DATA:
    current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  TRY.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        EXPORTING
          iv_attr_name = 'FOCUS_SELECTION'
        IMPORTING
          ev_result = value ).                              "#EC NOTEXT
    CATCH cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

endmethod.


METHOD get_mode.

  DATA:
    current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  TRY.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        EXPORTING
          iv_attr_name = 'MODE'
        IMPORTING
          ev_result = value ).                              "#EC NOTEXT
    CATCH cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD GET_PROFGRP_ID.

  DATA:
    current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  TRY.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        EXPORTING
          iv_attr_name = 'PROFGRP_ID'
        IMPORTING
          ev_result = value ).                              "#EC NOTEXT
    CATCH cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.


method get_profgrp_sel.

  data:
    current    type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  try.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        exporting
          iv_attr_name = 'PROFGRP_SEL'
        importing
          ev_result = value ).                              "#EC NOTEXT
    catch cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      return.
  endtry.

endmethod.


METHOD get_prof_id.

  DATA:
    current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  TRY.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        EXPORTING
          iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'
        IMPORTING
          ev_result = value ).                              "#EC NOTEXT
    CATCH cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      RETURN.
  ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_RESOLVER.
  clear RR_RESOLVER.
  try.
      RR_RESOLVER = GET_TREE_PROPERTIES( )-RESOLVER.
    catch CX_ROOT.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      clear RR_RESOLVER.
  endtry.
endmethod.


method get_tree_properties.

  data:
    current type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  try.
      current->get_property_as_value(
        exporting
          iv_attr_name = 'TREEPROPERTIES'
        importing
            ev_result = value ).                            "#EC NOTEXT
    catch cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      return.
  endtry.

* validate properties
  if to_upper( value-expand_collapse_all ) = 'L'.
*   expand/collapse mode L or l are only supported after import of the corresponding note 2088898
*   // structure type CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CN00=>TY_REL_NODE has been enhance by this note
    data ls_tree_node_rel type cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_cn00=>ty_tree_node_rel.
    field-symbols <lv_hier_level> type sytabix.
    assign component 'HIER_LEVEL' of structure ls_tree_node_rel to <lv_hier_level>.
    if sy-subrc <> 0.  "tree is not ready -> set expansion mode back to standard
      value-expand_collapse_all = abap_true.
      current->set_property(
        iv_attr_name = 'TREEPROPERTIES'
        iv_value     = value ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  data:
    lr_struct_ref type ref to crm_isutree_control,
    lr_value_node type ref to cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
    lr_bo_coll    type ref to if_bol_bo_col.

  super->if_bsp_model~init( id    = id
                            owner = owner ).

  create data lr_struct_ref.
* set default values
  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-type                = 'COLUMN'. "#EC NOTEXT
  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-toolbar_foreign_use = 'FALSE'. "#EC NOTEXT
  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-maxbuttonnumber     = '8'.  "#EC NOTEXT
  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-personalizable      = 'FALSE'. "#EC NOTEXT
  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-fill_up_empty_rows  = 'TRUE'. "#EC NOTEXT
  if cl_crm_iu_ic_appl=>is_table_download2excel_active( ) = abap_true.
    lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-download_excel      = 'TRUE'. "#EC NOTEXT
  else.
    lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-download_excel      = 'FALSE'. "#EC NOTEXT
  endif.

  lr_struct_ref->treeproperties-vertical_scrolling_mode = 'FAKE'. "#EC NOTEXT

  create object lr_value_node
    exporting
      iv_data_ref = lr_struct_ref.
  create object lr_bo_coll
    type
    cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

  lr_bo_coll->add( lr_value_node ).

  set_collection( lr_bo_coll ).

endmethod.


method SET_PROFGRP_SEL.

  data:
    current type ref to if_bol_bo_property_access.


  current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

  try.
      current->set_property(
        exporting
          iv_attr_name = 'PROFGRP_SEL'
          iv_value     = prof_id ).                         "#EC NOTEXT
    catch cx_root.                                       "#EC CATCH_ALL
      return.
  endtry.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN06 IMPLEMENTATION.


method is_requested_by_using_comp.

  if me->mv_requested_by_using_comp = abap_true or
     lcl_collection_wrapper=>is_collection_wrapper_attached( me->collection_wrapper ) = abap_true.
    rv_requested_by_using_comp = abap_true.
  endif.

endmethod.


method set_collection_wrapper.

  super->set_collection_wrapper( collection_wrapper ).

  me->mv_requested_by_using_comp = abap_true.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.
