class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public

  global friends CL_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SRV
                 CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL
                 CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE
                 CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL
                 IF_CRM_IU_IL_S4OP_TREE_ENH .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE .
  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_SRV .

  types:
    ty_objects type standard table of ref to object with default key .

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value '' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods GET_SUBSCRIBERS
    importing
      !IV_EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !IV_EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
    returning
      value(RT_HANDLERS) type TY_OBJECTS .
  methods GET_TYPED_BOL_TREE
    returning
      value(RO_BOL_TREE) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  methods GET_TYPED_WICO
    returning
      value(RO_WICO) type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL .
  class-methods GET_EVENT_SERVICE
    importing
      !IR_PARENT_COMPONENT type ref to CL_BSP_WD_COMPONENT_CONTROLLER
      !IV_TREE_USAGE_NAME type STRING
    returning
      value(RR_EVENT_SERVICE) type ref to IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE .
  methods DEACTIVATE_TREE_FILTER .

  methods IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT
    redefinition .
protected section.

  types:
    ty_handler_tab type standard table of ref to cl_abap_weak_reference with default key .
  types:
    begin of ty_subscriber,
         event_type type crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_type,
         event_id   type crmt_iu_bol_tree_event_id,
         handlers   type ty_handler_tab,
  end of ty_subscriber .
  types:
    ty_subscriber_tab type hashed table of ty_subscriber with unique key event_type event_id .
  types:
    begin of ty_subscriber_storage,
      usage type ref to if_bsp_wd_component_usage,
      subscribers type ty_subscriber_tab,
    end of ty_subscriber_storage .

  class-data FACTION_STARTER_EXISTS type ABAP_BOOLEAN value ABAP_UNDEFINED ##NO_TEXT.
  class-data:
    subscriber_storage type hashed table of ty_subscriber_storage with unique key usage .
  data SUBSCRIBERS type TY_SUBSCRIBER_TAB .
  data MO_PARAM_CONTAINER type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER .
  data MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED type ABAP_BOOL .
  data TYPED_BOL_TREE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  data TYPED_COCO type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL .
  data TYPED_WICO type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL .

  methods GET_TYPED_COMPONENT_CONTROLLER
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL .
  methods GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL .
  methods GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER
    returning
      value(RR_RESULT) type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL .
  methods ADJUST_COLUMNS
    changing
      !CT_COLUMNS type CRMT_ISUTREE_ADJUSTED_COLUMN_T .
  methods ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS
    changing
      !CT_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS type CRMT_THTMLB_BUTTON_T .
  methods HANDLE_DND
    importing
      !IO_DRAG_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY optional
      !IV_DRAG_NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID optional
      !IO_DRAG_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
      !IO_DRAG_OBJECT type ref to OBJECT optional
      !IO_DROP_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !IV_DROP_NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID
      !IO_DROP_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE
    returning
      value(RV_REFRESH_TREE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods HANDLE_EVENT
    importing
      !EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
      !EVENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY optional
      !NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID optional
      !IO_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
      !IO_HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional
      !IV_SUPPRESS_GENERIC_NAV type ABAP_BOOL optional .
  methods HANDLE_EVENT_OCA_ADVANCED
    importing
      !EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
      !EVENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY optional
      !PROF_ID type CHAR10 optional
      !NODE_ID type CRMT_NODE_ID optional
      !IO_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
      !IO_HTMLB_EVENT_EX type ref to IF_HTMLB_DATA optional
      !IV_SUPPRESS_GENERIC_NAV type ABAP_BOOL optional
    returning
      value(RV_HANDLED) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_DND_ACTIVE
    importing
      !IO_TREE_NODE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    exporting
      !EV_DRAG_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL
      !EV_DROP_ACTIVE type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_EVENT_ACTIVE
    importing
      !EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
      !EVENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !IR_EVENT_HANDLER_CALLED type ref to ABAP_BOOL optional
      !IO_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    returning
      value(RV_ACTIVE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods IS_EVENT_OCA_ADVANCED_ACTIVE
    importing
      !EVENT_TYPE type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_TYPE
      !EVENT_ID type CRMT_IU_BOL_TREE_EVENT_ID
      !EVENT_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY
      !IO_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional
    returning
      value(RV_ACTIVE) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods PREPARE_RELATION_FILTER
    importing
      !FILTER type ref to CL_CRM_BOL_RELATION_FILTER
      !HIER type CRM_ISUTREE_HIER
      !IO_PARENT_NODE_ENTITY type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE optional .
  methods RESTORE_SUBSCRIBERS
    importing
      !IO_USAGE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_COMPONENT_USAGE .
  methods SET_BOL_TREE
    importing
      !IR_TREE type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_IMPL optional .
  methods STORE_SUBSCRIBERS
    importing
      !IO_USAGE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_COMPONENT_USAGE .
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD adjust_columns.

  DATA:
    lt_handler      TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root         type ref to cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


* first execute for toolbar button event type subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_col_event_type
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).
      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_colmns )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_colmns
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->adjust_columns(
              exporting
                io_event_service        = me
              CHANGING
                ct_columns              = ct_columns ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'ADJUST_COLUMNS'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* then execute for generic subcriber
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = space
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).
      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_colmns )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_colmns
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->adjust_columns(
              exporting
                io_event_service = me
              CHANGING
                ct_columns       = ct_columns ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'ADJUST_COLUMNS'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD adjust_toolbar_actions.

  DATA:
    lt_handler      TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root         type ref to cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


* first execute for toolbar button event type subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_butt_event_type
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).
      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_toolbr )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_toolbr
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->adjust_toolbar_actions(
              exporting
                io_event_service   = me
              CHANGING
                ct_toolbar_actions = ct_toolbar_actions ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* then execute for generic subcriber
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = space
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).
      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_toolbr )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_adj_toolbr
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->adjust_toolbar_actions(
              exporting
                io_event_service   = me
              CHANGING
                ct_toolbar_actions = ct_toolbar_actions ).
          CATCH cx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'ADJUST_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method DEACTIVATE_TREE_FILTER.

  check GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.

  GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->EH_ONDEACTIVATE_FILTER( ).

endmethod.


METHOD get_event_service.

  DATA:
    tree_usage TYPE REF TO if_bsp_wd_component_usage.


  CHECK ir_parent_component IS BOUND.
  tree_usage = ir_parent_component->get_component_usage( iv_tree_usage_name ).

  TRY.
      rr_event_service ?= tree_usage->get_context_node( 'EVENT_SERVICE' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.                        "#EC NO_HANDLER
  ENDTRY.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_SUBSCRIBERS.
  data(LT_SUBS) = value #( SUBSCRIBERS[ EVENT_TYPE = IV_EVENT_TYPE EVENT_ID = IV_EVENT_ID ]-HANDLERS optional ).
  loop at LT_SUBS into data(LR_WEAK).
    data(LR_HANDLER) = LR_WEAK->GET( ).
    if LR_HANDLER is bound.
      insert LR_HANDLER into table RT_HANDLERS.
    endif.
  endloop.
endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_BOL_TREE.
  RO_BOL_TREE = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ).
endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_COMPONENT_CONTROLLER.
  RR_RESULT = TYPED_COCO.
endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER.
  if TYPED_BOL_TREE is not bound.
    data(LR_WCO) = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).
    if LR_WCO is bound.
      try.
          TYPED_BOL_TREE = cast #(
            LR_WCO->GET_SUBCONTROLLER_BY_VIEWNAME(
              IV_VIEWNAME = 'IUBOTREE/IsuBolTree'
            )
          ) ##NO_TEXT.
        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR ##NO_HANDLER.
      endtry.
    endif.
  endif.
  RR_RESULT = TYPED_BOL_TREE.
endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_WICO.
  RO_WICO = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).
endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER.
  if TYPED_WICO is not bound.
    data(LR_COCO) = GET_TYPED_COMPONENT_CONTROLLER( ).
    if LR_COCO is bound.
      try.
          TYPED_WICO = cast #(
            LR_COCO->IF_BSP_WD_WINDOW_MANAGER~GET_WINDOW(
              IV_WINDOW_NAME = 'MainWindow'
            )
          ) ##NO_TEXT.
        catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR ##NO_HANDLER.
      endtry.
    endif.
  endif.
  RR_RESULT = TYPED_WICO.
endmethod.


METHOD handle_dnd.

  DATA:
    lv_node_id     TYPE crmt_node_id,
    lr_handler     TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_dnd_handler,
    lr_object_ref  TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root        TYPE REF TO cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


* handle dnd in subscribers for special drop node ID and common ID
  lv_node_id = iv_drop_node_id.

  DO 2 TIMES.
    READ TABLE subscribers
      ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
      WITH TABLE KEY event_type = 'DND'
                     event_id   = lv_node_id.               "#EC NOTEXT

    IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
      LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
        lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

        IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*         conditional breakpoint
*         // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*         // or
*         // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*         // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
          ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                 SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                          iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_dnd )
                 CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                             iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_dnd
                             iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                             iv_node_id     = iv_drop_node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

          TRY.
              data lv_no_tree_refresh type abap_bool.
              lv_no_tree_refresh = abap_false.
              lr_handler->handle_dnd(
                exporting
                  io_drag_entity      = io_drag_entity
                  iv_drag_node_id     = iv_drag_node_id
                  io_drag_node_entity = io_drag_node_entity
                  io_drag_object      = io_drag_object
                  io_drop_entity      = io_drop_entity
                  iv_drop_node_id     = iv_drop_node_id
                  io_drop_node_entity = io_drop_node_entity
                  io_event_service    = me
                importing
                  ev_no_tree_refresh  = lv_no_tree_refresh ).
              if lv_no_tree_refresh = abap_false.
                rv_refresh_tree = abap_true.
              endif.
            CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                  "#EC CATCH_ALL
*             conditional breakpoint
*             // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*             // or
*             // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*             // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
              ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                     SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                              iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                     CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                                 iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                                 iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

              cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
                method = 'HANDLE_DND' handler = lr_handler
                prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                node_id = iv_drop_node_id
                exc    = lx_root ).                         "#EC NOTEXT
          ENDTRY.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

*   try common subscriber within next loop if node ID is supplied
    IF lv_node_id IS INITIAL.
      EXIT.
    ELSE.
      CLEAR lv_node_id.
    ENDIF.
  ENDDO.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD handle_event.

  DATA:
    lv_component   TYPE bsp_wd_component_name,
    lr_col         TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
    lr_entity      TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
    lr_handler     TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_host_view   TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_controller,
    lr_nav_service TYPE REF TO if_crm_ui_navigation_service,
    lr_nav_entity  TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
    lr_object_ref  TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root        TYPE REF TO cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.

  IF event_type = 'BUTT' or event_type = 'OCA'.
    data(LV_PROF_ID) = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( ).
    DATA(loca) = cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>get_oca( prof_id = LV_PROF_ID node_id = cond #( when event_type = 'BUTT' then SPACE else node_id ) oca_id = event_id ).
    IF loca-kind IS NOT INITIAL.
      DATA(lv_handled) = handle_event_oca_advanced(
        event_type              = event_type                 " BOL Tree: Navigation Event Type
        event_id                = event_id                 " BOL Tree: Navigation Event ID
        event_entity            = event_entity                 " Entity
        prof_id                 = lv_prof_id
        node_id                 = node_id                 " Node ID
        io_node_entity          = io_node_entity                 " Provides Nodes for Tree Service
        io_htmlb_event_ex       = io_htmlb_event_ex                 " Input Data from HTMLB
        iv_suppress_generic_nav = iv_suppress_generic_nav
      ).
      IF lv_handled IS NOT INITIAL.
        RETURN.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

* first handle events for special event subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = event_id.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_node_id     = node_id
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->handle_event( event_type    = event_type
                                      event_id      = event_id
                                      event_entity  = event_entity
                                      node_id       = node_id
                                      io_event_service = me
                                      io_node_entity = io_node_entity
                                      io_htmlb_event_ex = io_htmlb_event_ex ).
          CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                    "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'HANDLE_EVENT'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* handle events for event type subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_node_id     = node_id
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->handle_event(
              event_type       = event_type
              event_id         = event_id
              event_entity     = event_entity
              node_id          = node_id
              io_event_service = me
              io_node_entity   = io_node_entity
              io_htmlb_event_ex = io_htmlb_event_ex ).
          CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                    "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'HANDLE_EVENT'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* handle events for general subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = space
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_node_id     = node_id
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->handle_event(
              event_type       = event_type
              event_id         = event_id
              event_entity     = event_entity
              node_id          = node_id
              io_event_service = me
              io_node_entity   = io_node_entity
              io_htmlb_event_ex = io_htmlb_event_ex ).
          CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                    "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'HANDLE_EVENT'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* handle generic link event if no subscriber is registered for
  IF  iv_suppress_generic_nav <> abap_true
  AND event_type = 'LINK'
  AND event_entity IS BOUND
  AND ( lr_handler IS NOT BOUND OR event_id EQ 'GENERIC' ). "#EC NOTEXT
    lr_nav_service = cl_crm_ui_navigation_service=>get_instance( ).

    IF lr_nav_service IS BOUND.
*     conditional breakpoint
*     // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*     // or
*     // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*     // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
      ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
             SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                      iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt )
             CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                         iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_handle_evt
                         iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                         iv_node_id     = node_id
                         iv_event_type  = event_type
                         iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

*     special handling for BTAdminH objects: generic navigation works in this case only with its root object BTOrder
      IF event_entity->get_name( ) EQ 'BTAdminH'.           "#EC NOTEXT
        lr_entity = event_entity->get_root( ).
      ELSE.
        lr_entity = event_entity.
      ENDIF.

      TRY.
          lr_host_view ?= GET_TYPED_window_CONTROLLER( )->get_host_view( ).
          lv_component = substring_before(
            val = lr_host_view->complete_name( || )
            sub = |/| ).
        CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error cx_sy_ref_is_initial. "#EC NO_HANDLER
      ENDTRY.

      lr_nav_entity = cl_crm_ui_descriptor_obj_srv=>create_entity_based(
        ir_entity           = lr_entity
        iv_ui_object_action = 'B'
        iv_component        = lv_component ).               "#EC NOTEXT

      IF lr_nav_entity IS BOUND.
        CREATE OBJECT lr_col TYPE cl_crm_bol_bo_col.
        lr_col->add( lr_nav_entity ).
        lr_nav_service->navigate_dynamically(
          EXPORTING
            iv_data_collection = lr_col ).
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD handle_event_oca_advanced.

  CALL FUNCTION 'SEO_CLASS_EXISTENCE_CHECK'
    EXPORTING
      clskey = VALUE seoclskey( clsname = |CL_CRMS4_IU_ACTION_STARTER| )
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 6.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    rv_handled = abap_false.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.
  rv_handled = abap_true.

  CALL METHOD ('CL_CRMS4_IU_ACTION_STARTER')=>cl_execute_oca
    EXPORTING
      event_type                    = event_type
      event_id                      = event_id
      event_entity                  = event_entity
      node_id                       = node_id
      prof_id                       = prof_id
      io_node_entity                = io_node_entity
      io_htmlb_event_ex             = io_htmlb_event_ex
      iv_suppress_generic_nav       = iv_suppress_generic_nav
      io_context_node_event_service = me
    RECEIVING
      rv_handled                    = rv_handled.

ENDMETHOD.


method IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT.

  SUPER->IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT( ID = ID OWNER = OWNER ).

  try.
      TYPED_COCO ?= OWNER.
    catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR ##NO_HANDLER.
  endtry.
  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ).

  " prepare shared paramter container
  if not MO_PARAM_CONTAINER is bound.
    MO_PARAM_CONTAINER = CL_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER=>GET_INSTANCE( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE_GOTO_FIRST_PAGE.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_MODE                     = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->CO_MODE_RESET_PAGE
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE_NO_SELECTION.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_MODE                     = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->CO_MODE_NO_SELECTION ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE_SELECT_FIRST.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_MODE                     = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->CO_MODE_SELECT_FIRST ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE_WITH_SELECTION.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_BO                       = IV_SELECTION
    IV_MODE                     = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->CO_MODE_SELECTION
    IT_SELECTION_PATH           = IT_SELECTION_PATH ).      "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~BUILD_TREE_WITH_VIRTUAL_ROOT.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED = IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED
    IV_EVENT_NAME               = 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'
    IV_BO                       = IV_VIRTUAL_ROOT
    IV_MODE                     = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->CO_MODE_VIRTUAL_ROOT ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~EXPAND.

  data:
    IU_BO     type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE,
    TREE_NODE type ref to IF_BSP_WD_TREE_NODE.


  check GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound and
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT is bound and
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE is bound.

  check IV_OBJECT is bound
     or IV_NODE_KEY is bound.

  if IV_NODE_KEY is bound.
    if IV_COLLAPSE_CHILDREN eq ABAP_TRUE.
      IU_BO ?= IV_NODE_KEY.
      GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->ENSURE_NODE_IS_VISIBLE( IU_BO ).

      TREE_NODE = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_BO( IU_BO ).

      if TREE_NODE is bound.
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( TREE_NODE ).
      endif.
    endif.

    if TREE_NODE is bound.
      TREE_NODE->EXPAND_NODE( ).
    endif.
  elseif IV_OBJECT is bound.
    TREE_NODE = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODE_BY_ENTITY( IV_OBJECT ).

    if TREE_NODE is bound.
      if IV_COLLAPSE_CHILDREN eq ABAP_TRUE.
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->COLLAPSE_ALL_SUB( TREE_NODE ).
      endif.

      TREE_NODE->EXPAND_NODE( ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~EXPAND_ALL_SUB.

  check GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = 'EXPAND_ALL_SUB'
    IV_BO         = IV_OBJECT
    IV_NODE_KEY   = IV_NODE_KEY
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~FOCUS_PARENT.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT( IV_EVENT_NAME = 'FOCUS_PARENT_REQUESTED' ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~FOCUS_SUB.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT( IV_EVENT_NAME = 'FOCUS_SUB_REQUESTED' ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_FOCUS_NODE.

  try.
      if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
        data LO_TYPED_CONTEXT type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT.
        LO_TYPED_CONTEXT = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->GET_TYPED_CONTEXT( ).
        if LO_TYPED_CONTEXT is bound and
           LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE is bound and
           LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
          RO_FOCUS_NODE = LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL->GET_CURRENT_NODE( ).
        endif.
      endif.
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_MULTI_NODES.

  check GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound and
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT is bound and
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE is bound.

  if IV_MAKE_NOTVISIBLE_VISIBLE eq ABAP_TRUE.
    GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->MAKE_ENTITIES_VISIBLE( IR_ENTITY ).
  endif.

  RV_NODE_KEY_TAB = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->GET_NODES_BY_ENTITY( IR_ENTITY ).

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_PARAM_VALUE.

  data:
    PARAM_CONT type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER,
    TREE_SRV   type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE.


  clear EV_VALUE.

  if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
    TREE_SRV = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->GET_TREE_SRV( ).

    if TREE_SRV is bound.
      PARAM_CONT = TREE_SRV->GET_PARAM_CONTAINER( ).

      if PARAM_CONT is bound.
        PARAM_CONT->GET_VALUE(
          exporting
            IV_NAME  = IV_NAME
          importing
            EV_VALUE = EV_VALUE ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_ROOT_NODES.

  try.
      if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
        data LO_TYPED_CONTEXT type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_CTXT.
        LO_TYPED_CONTEXT = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->GET_TYPED_CONTEXT( ).
        if LO_TYPED_CONTEXT is bound and
           LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE is bound and
           LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->FOCUS_COL is bound.
          RO_ROOT_NODES = LO_TYPED_CONTEXT->ISUBOLTREE->COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_COPY( ).
        endif.
      endif.
    catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_TREE_COMP_USAGE_NAME.

  if GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
    RV_COMP_USAGE_NAME = GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->GET_COMPONENT_USAGE_NAME( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~GET_TREE_PROFILE.

  if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
    RV_PROFILE = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->DETERMINE_TREE_PROF_ID( ).
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~IS_TABLE.

  if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound and
     GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->IS_TABLE( IV_ACTUAL = ABAP_TRUE ) = ABAP_TRUE.
    RV_RESULT = ABAP_TRUE.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~RESET_TREE.

  if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
    MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED = ABAP_FALSE.

    try.
        GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->GET_TREE_SRV( )->RESET_INSTANCE( IV_KEEP_NODE_INSTANCES = IV_KEEP_NODE_INSTANCES ).
      catch CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL.                       "#EC NO_HANDLER
    endtry.
  else.
    if IV_KEEP_NODE_INSTANCES = ABAP_TRUE.
      if MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED <> ABAP_TRUE.
        MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED = ABAP_UNDEFINED.
      endif.
    else.
      MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED = ABAP_TRUE.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~SAVE_TREE.

  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT( IV_EVENT_NAME = 'TREE_SAVE_REQUESTED' ). "#EC NOTEXT

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~SELECT_NODE.

  check GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
  GET_TYPED_WINDOW_CONTROLLER( )->RAISE_EVENT(
    IV_EVENT_NAME = 'SELECT_NODE'
    IV_BO         = IV_SELECTION
    IV_MODE       = IV_MODE
    IV_NODE_KEY   = IV_NODE_KEY
    IT_SELECTION_PATH = IT_SELECTION_PATH
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~SET_PARAM_VALUE.

  data:
    TREE_SRV   type ref to CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE,
    PARAM_CONT type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER.


  if GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( ) is bound.
    TREE_SRV = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->GET_TREE_SRV( ).

    if TREE_SRV is bound.
      PARAM_CONT = TREE_SRV->GET_PARAM_CONTAINER( ).

      if PARAM_CONT is bound.
        PARAM_CONT->SET_VALUE(
          IV_NAME  = IV_NAME
          IV_VALUE = IV_VALUE ).
      endif.
    endif.
  endif.

* store external parameters for later use
  if MO_PARAM_CONTAINER is not bound.
    MO_PARAM_CONTAINER = CL_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER=>GET_INSTANCE( ).
  endif.

  MO_PARAM_CONTAINER->SET_VALUE(
    IV_NAME  = IV_NAME
    IV_VALUE = IV_VALUE ).

endmethod.


METHOD if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service~subscribe.

  DATA:
    lv_already_subscribed TYPE abap_bool,
    ls_subscriber         TYPE ty_subscriber,
    lr_handler            TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_object_ref         TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber>       TYPE ty_subscriber.


  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = event_id.

  IF <fs_subscriber> IS ASSIGNED.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF NOT lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       Handler has been cleared, remove from list
        DELETE <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
      ELSEIF lr_handler = event_handler.
*       Handler already exists
        lv_already_subscribed = abap_true.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF lv_already_subscribed = abap_false.
      CREATE OBJECT lr_object_ref
        EXPORTING
          oref = event_handler.
      APPEND lr_object_ref TO <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
*   First subscriber for this event
    ls_subscriber-event_type = event_type.
    ls_subscriber-event_id   = event_id.

    CREATE OBJECT lr_object_ref
      EXPORTING
        oref = event_handler.
    APPEND lr_object_ref TO ls_subscriber-handlers.

    INSERT ls_subscriber INTO TABLE subscribers.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service~subscribe_drag_and_drop.

  DATA:
    lv_already_subscribed TYPE abap_bool,
    ls_subscriber         TYPE ty_subscriber,
    lr_handler            TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_dnd_handler,
    lr_object_ref         TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber>       TYPE ty_subscriber.


  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = 'DND'
                   event_id   = iv_drop_node_id.            "#EC NOTEXT

  IF <fs_subscriber> IS ASSIGNED.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS NOT BOUND.
*       Handler has been cleared, remove from list
        DELETE <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
      ELSEIF lr_handler = io_dnd_handler.
*       Handler already exists
        lv_already_subscribed = abap_true.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF lv_already_subscribed = abap_false.
      CREATE OBJECT lr_object_ref
        EXPORTING
          oref = io_dnd_handler.
      APPEND lr_object_ref TO <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
*   First subscriber for this event
    ls_subscriber-event_type = 'DND'.
    ls_subscriber-event_id   = iv_drop_node_id.

    CREATE OBJECT lr_object_ref
      EXPORTING
        oref = io_dnd_handler.
    APPEND lr_object_ref TO ls_subscriber-handlers.

    INSERT ls_subscriber INTO TABLE subscribers.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service~unsubscribe.

  DATA:
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


   READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = event_id.

  IF <fs_subscriber> IS ASSIGNED.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF NOT lr_handler IS BOUND
      OR lr_handler = event_handler.
*       handler instance does no longer exist, or exists and has to be removed
        DELETE <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_service~unsubscribe_drag_and_drop.

  DATA:
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_dnd_handler,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = 'DND'
                   event_id   = iv_drop_node_id.            "#EC NOTEXT

  IF <fs_subscriber> IS ASSIGNED.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF NOT lr_handler IS BOUND
      OR lr_handler = io_dnd_handler.
*       handler instance does no longer exist, or exists and has to be removed
        DELETE <fs_subscriber>-handlers.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD is_dnd_active.

  DATA:
    lv_drag_inactive TYPE abap_bool,
    lv_drop_inactive TYPE abap_bool,
    lr_handler       TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_dnd_handler,
    lr_object_ref    TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root          TYPE REF TO cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber>  TYPE ty_subscriber.


* set default value to unknown
  ev_drag_active = abap_undefined.
  ev_drop_active = abap_undefined.

* check if a subscriber exists for drag and drop handling
  LOOP AT subscribers ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber> WHERE event_type = 'DND'. "#EC CI_HASHSEQ
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       if there is any subsriber drag/drop is active
*       // (as long as no subscriber has set the value to ABAP_FALSE before)
        IF ev_drag_active <> abap_false.
          ev_drag_active = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

        IF ev_drop_active <> abap_false.
          ev_drop_active = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

        if io_tree_node is bound.
          data(lv_node_id) = io_tree_node->get_node_id( ).
          data(lo_wrapped_entity) = io_tree_node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
        endif.

*       check if subsriber is responsible for this node
        check <fs_subscriber>-event_id is initial or <fs_subscriber>-event_id = lv_node_id.

*       initialize values (by default drag/drop is not inactive)
        lv_drag_inactive = abap_false.
        lv_drop_inactive = abap_false.

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_dnd_act )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_dnd_act
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_node_id     = lv_node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

*       check implementation class
        TRY.
            lr_handler->is_dnd_inactive(
              EXPORTING
                io_entity        = lo_wrapped_entity
                iv_node_id       = lv_node_id
                io_node_entity   = io_tree_node
                io_event_service = me
              IMPORTING
                ev_drag_inactive = lv_drag_inactive
                ev_drop_inactive = lv_drop_inactive ).

            IF lv_drag_inactive = abap_true.
              ev_drag_active = abap_false.
            ENDIF.

            IF lv_drop_inactive = abap_true.
              ev_drop_active = abap_false.
            ENDIF.
          CATCH cx_root INTO lx_root.                    "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'IS_DND_ACTIVE'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = lv_node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDLOOP.

* return ABAP_TRUE or ABAP_FALSE
  ev_drag_active = boolc( ev_drag_active = abap_true ).
  ev_drop_active = boolc( ev_drop_active = abap_true ).

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD is_event_active.

  DATA:
    lr_entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_nav_entity   TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
    lr_nav_service  TYPE REF TO if_crm_ui_navigation_service,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root         type ref to cx_root,
    lv_node_id      type crmt_node_id.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.

* initially the action is active.
  rv_active = abap_true.

  IF event_type = 'OCA' AND io_node_entity IS BOUND.
    DATA(loca) = io_node_entity->get_oca( oca_id = event_id ).
    IF loca-kind IS NOT INITIAL.
      rv_active = is_event_oca_advanced_active(
        event_type              = event_type                 " BOL Tree: Navigation Event Type
        event_id                = event_id                 " BOL Tree: Navigation Event ID
        event_entity            = event_entity                 " Entity
        io_node_entity          = io_node_entity                 " Provides Nodes for Tree Service
      ).
      IF ir_event_handler_called IS BOUND.
        ir_event_handler_called->* = abap_true.
      ENDIF.
      return.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.


* first check activeness for special event subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = event_id.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       inform caller that custom implementation has been called
        IF ir_event_handler_called IS BOUND.
          ir_event_handler_called->* = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            rv_active = lr_handler->is_event_active(
              event_type       = event_type
              event_id         = event_id
              event_entity     = event_entity
              io_event_service = me
              io_node_entity   = io_node_entity ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            if io_node_entity is bound.
              lv_node_id = io_node_entity->get_node_id( ).
            endif.

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'IS_EVENT_ACTIVE'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = lv_node_id
              exc     = lx_root ). "# EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        IF rv_active EQ abap_false.
          RETURN.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* check activeness for event type subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = event_type
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).
      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.

*       inform caller that custom implementation has been called
        IF ir_event_handler_called IS BOUND.
          ir_event_handler_called->* = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            rv_active = lr_handler->is_event_active(
              event_type       = event_type
              event_id         = event_id
              event_entity     = event_entity
              io_event_service = me
              io_node_entity   = io_node_entity ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            if io_node_entity is bound.
              lv_node_id = io_node_entity->get_node_id( ).
            endif.

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'IS_EVENT_ACTIVE'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = lv_node_id
              exc     = lx_root ). "# EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        IF rv_active EQ abap_false.
          RETURN.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* check activeness for general subscribers
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = space
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      IF lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       inform caller that custom implementation has been called
        IF ir_event_handler_called IS BOUND.
          ir_event_handler_called->* = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act
                           iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                           iv_event_type  = event_type
                           iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            rv_active = lr_handler->is_event_active(
              event_type       = event_type
              event_id         = event_id
              event_entity     = event_entity
              io_event_service = me
              io_node_entity   = io_node_entity ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( ) ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            if io_node_entity is bound.
              lv_node_id = io_node_entity->get_node_id( ).
            endif.

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'IS_EVENT_ACTIVE'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
              node_id = lv_node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        IF rv_active EQ abap_false.
          RETURN.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* handle generic link event if no subscriber is registered for
  IF  rv_active = abap_true
  AND event_type = 'LINK'
  AND event_entity IS BOUND
  AND ( lr_handler IS NOT BOUND OR event_id EQ 'GENERIC' ). "#EC NOTEXT
*   conditional breakpoint
*   // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*   // or
*   // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*   // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
    ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
           SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                    iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act )
           CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                       iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_is_evt_act
                       iv_prof_id     = GET_TYPED_TREE_CONTROLLER( )->determine_tree_prof_id( )
                       iv_event_type  = event_type
                       iv_event_id    = event_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

    rv_active = abap_false.
    lr_nav_service = cl_crm_ui_navigation_service=>get_instance( ).

    IF lr_nav_service IS BOUND.
*     special handling for BTAdminH objects: generic navigation works in this case only with its root object BTOrder
      IF event_entity->get_name( ) EQ 'BTAdminH'.           "#EC NOTEXT
        lr_entity = event_entity->get_root( ).
      ELSE.
        lr_entity = event_entity.
      ENDIF.

      lr_nav_entity = cl_crm_ui_descriptor_obj_srv=>create_entity_based(
        ir_entity           = lr_entity
        iv_ui_object_action = 'B' ).                        "#EC NOTEXT

      IF lr_nav_entity IS BOUND.
        rv_active = lr_nav_service->is_dynamic_nav_supported( lr_nav_entity ).
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method IS_EVENT_OCA_ADVANCED_ACTIVE.
  if FACTION_STARTER_EXISTS = ABAP_UNDEFINED.
    call function 'SEO_CLASS_EXISTENCE_CHECK'
      exporting
        CLSKEY = value SEOCLSKEY( CLSNAME = |CL_CRMS4_IU_ACTION_STARTER| )
      exceptions
        others = 6.
    if SY-SUBRC <> 0.
      FACTION_STARTER_EXISTS = ABAP_FALSE.
    else.
      FACTION_STARTER_EXISTS = ABAP_TRUE.
    endif.
  endif.

  if FACTION_STARTER_EXISTS = ABAP_TRUE.
    call method ('CL_CRMS4_IU_ACTION_STARTER')=>CL_IS_ACTIVE_OCA
      exporting
        EVENT_TYPE                    = EVENT_TYPE
        EVENT_ID                      = EVENT_ID
        EVENT_ENTITY                  = EVENT_ENTITY
*       node_id                       = node_id
        IO_NODE_ENTITY                = IO_NODE_ENTITY
        IO_CONTEXT_NODE_EVENT_SERVICE = ME
      receiving
        RV_ACTIVE                     = RV_ACTIVE.
  else.
    RV_ACTIVE = ABAP_FALSE.
  endif.
endmethod.


METHOD prepare_relation_filter.

  DATA:
    lt_handler      TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_handler      TYPE REF TO if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler,
    lr_object_ref   TYPE REF TO cl_abap_weak_reference,
    lx_root         type ref to cx_root.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <fs_subscriber> TYPE ty_subscriber.


* execute for filter subcriber
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = if_crm_iu_bol_tree_evt_handler=>gc_filt_event_type
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_prep_filtr )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_prep_filtr
                           iv_prof_id     = hier-prof_id
                           iv_node_id     = hier-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->prepare_relation_filter(
              filter                = filter
              hier                  = hier
              io_event_service      = me
              io_parent_node_entity = io_parent_node_entity ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = hier-prof_id
                               iv_node_id     = hier-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'PREPARE_RELATION_FILTER'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = hier-prof_id
              node_id = hier-node_id
              exc     = lx_root )."# EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

* execute for generic subcriber
  READ TABLE subscribers
    ASSIGNING <fs_subscriber>
    WITH TABLE KEY event_type = space
                   event_id   = space.

  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    LOOP AT <fs_subscriber>-handlers INTO lr_object_ref.
      lr_handler ?= lr_object_ref->get( ).

      READ TABLE lt_handler WITH TABLE KEY table_line = lr_handler TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

      IF  sy-subrc NE 0
      AND lr_handler IS BOUND.
*       conditional breakpoint
*       // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*       // or
*       // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*       // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
        ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
               SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                        iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_prep_filtr )
               CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                           iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_evt_srv_prep_filtr
                           iv_prof_id     = hier-prof_id
                           iv_node_id     = hier-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

        TRY.
            lr_handler->prepare_relation_filter(
              filter                = filter
              hier                  = hier
              io_event_service      = me
              io_parent_node_entity = io_parent_node_entity ).
          CATCH cx_root into lx_root.                                 "#EC CATCH_ALL
*           conditional breakpoint
*           // to deactivate ALL breakpoints for this roundtrip,
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_ALL_BREAKPOINTS to ABAP_TRUE
*           // or
*           // to deactivate only THE LAST breakpoint for this roundtrip
*           // set CL_CRM_IU_COND_BP=>GV_DEACTIVATE_LAST_BREAKPOINT to ABAP_TRUE
            ASSERT ID crmuif_conditional_breakpoints
                   SUBKEY cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>if_cond_breakpoint_register~get_description(
                            iv_key = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception )
                   CONDITION cl_crm_iu_cond_bp_bt=>assert(
                               iv_break_event = if_crm_iu_cond_bp=>gc_event_bt_exception
                               iv_prof_id     = hier-prof_id
                               iv_node_id     = hier-node_id ) = abap_true. "#EC NOTEXT

            cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl=>raise_message_handler_error(
              method  = 'PREPARE_RELATION_FILTER'
              handler = lr_handler
              prof_id = hier-prof_id
              node_id = hier-node_id
              exc     = lx_root ).                       "#EC NOTEXT
        ENDTRY.

        APPEND lr_handler TO lt_handler.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD restore_subscribers.

  DATA:
    ls_subscriber_storage TYPE ty_subscriber_storage.


  IF  io_usage IS BOUND
  AND subscribers IS INITIAL.
    READ TABLE subscriber_storage
      INTO ls_subscriber_storage
      WITH TABLE KEY usage = io_usage.

    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      subscribers = ls_subscriber_storage-subscribers.
      DELETE TABLE subscriber_storage WITH TABLE KEY usage = io_usage.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


method SET_BOL_TREE.

  TYPED_BOL_TREE = IR_TREE.

  if TYPED_BOL_TREE is bound.
    if MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED = ABAP_TRUE.
      IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~RESET_TREE( ).
    elseif MV_TREE_SRV_RESET_REQUESTED = ABAP_UNDEFINED.
      IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE~RESET_TREE( IV_KEEP_NODE_INSTANCES = ABAP_TRUE ).
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


METHOD store_subscribers.

  DATA:
    ls_subscriber_storage TYPE ty_subscriber_storage.


  IF io_usage IS BOUND.
    ls_subscriber_storage-usage       = io_usage.
    ls_subscriber_storage-subscribers = subscribers.
    INSERT ls_subscriber_storage INTO TABLE subscriber_storage.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MODIFY TABLE subscriber_storage FROM ls_subscriber_storage.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  types:
    begin of GTY_FIND,
      string type string,
      alt_find_button_text type string,
      alt_cancel_button_text type string,
      operator type string,
    end of gty_find .

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value '' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT
    redefinition .
protected section.

private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09 IMPLEMENTATION.


method if_bsp_model~init.

  super->if_bsp_model~init( id    = id
                            owner = owner ).

  data: lv_struct_ref type ref to cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_cn09=>gty_find,
        lv_value_node type ref to cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
        lv_bo_coll    type ref to if_bol_bo_col.

  create data lv_struct_ref.
  create object lv_value_node
    exporting
      iv_data_ref = lv_struct_ref.
  create object lv_bo_coll
    type
      cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

  lv_bo_coll->add( lv_value_node ).

  set_collection( lv_bo_coll ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value '' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods ON_NEW_FOCUS
    for event NEW_FOCUS of CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER
    importing
      !FOCUS_BO .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10 IMPLEMENTATION.


method ON_NEW_FOCUS.

    DATA: lv_collection TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col,
          entity        TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity.

*   get collection of dependent nodes
    TRY.
        if focus_bo is bound.
          create object lv_collection type cl_crm_bol_entity_col.
          lv_collection->add( focus_bo ).
        endif.
      CATCH cx_crm_genil_model_error.
*       should never happen
        EXIT.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.
    me->set_collection( lv_collection ).


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.
