class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT
  create public .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_COCO_CTXT .

  constants C_DEFAULT_CONTEXT_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME value 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT' ##NO_TEXT.
  data SELECTEDNODES type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN11 read-only .
  data SELECTEDENTITIES type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN12 read-only .
  constants C_CN_SELECTEDOBJECT type STRING value 'SELECTEDOBJECT' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_FIND type STRING value 'FIND' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_EVENT_SERVICE type STRING value 'EVENT_SERVICE' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_TRANSACTION type STRING value 'TRANSACTION' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_PARENTOBJECTS type STRING value 'PARENTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_PROFILE type STRING value 'PROFILE' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_FOCUSOBJECTS type STRING value 'FOCUSOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_ROOTOBJECTS type STRING value 'ROOTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SUBOBJECTS type STRING value 'SUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_FILTEROBJECTS type STRING value 'FILTEROBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS type STRING value 'ALLSUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SELECTEDNODES type STRING value 'SELECTEDNODES' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CN_SELECTEDENTITIES type STRING value 'SELECTEDENTITIES' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants:
    begin of C_CONTEXT_NODES,
        SELECTEDOBJECT type STRING value 'SELECTEDOBJECT' ##NO_TEXT,
        FIND           type STRING value 'FIND' ##NO_TEXT,
        EVENT_SERVICE  type STRING value 'EVENT_SERVICE' ##NO_TEXT,
        TRANSACTION    type STRING value 'TRANSACTION' ##NO_TEXT,
        PARENTOBJECTS  type STRING value 'PARENTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        PROFILE        type STRING value 'PROFILE' ##NO_TEXT,
        FOCUSOBJECTS   type STRING value 'FOCUSOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        ROOTOBJECTS    type STRING value 'ROOTOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        SUBOBJECTS     type STRING value 'SUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        FILTEROBJECTS  type STRING value 'FILTEROBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        ALLSUBOBJECTS  type STRING value 'ALLSUBOBJECTS' ##NO_TEXT,
        SELECTEDNODES  type STRING value 'SELECTEDNODES' ##NO_TEXT,
        SELECTEDENTITIES type STRING value 'SELECTEDENTITIES' ##NO_TEXT,
      end of C_CONTEXT_NODES .
  data SELECTEDOBJECT type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10 read-only .
  data FIND type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09 read-only .
  data EVENT_SERVICE type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08 read-only .
  data TRANSACTION type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN07 read-only .
  data PARENTOBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN05 read-only .
  data PROFILE type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN03 read-only .
  data FOCUSOBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN00 read-only .
  data ROOTOBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN02 read-only .
  data SUBOBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN01 read-only .
  data FILTEROBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN04 read-only .
  data ALLSUBOBJECTS type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN06 read-only .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods CREATE_EVENTSERVICE .
  methods CREATE_FIND .
  methods CREATE_SELECTEDENTITIES .

  methods CREATE_SELECTEDOBJECT .

    returning

    returning

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.
  data: COLL_WRAPPER type ref to CL_BSP_WD_COLLECTION_WRAPPER.

* Added by wizard
  COLL_WRAPPER = FOCUSOBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( ).
  set handler ME->SELECTEDOBJECT->ON_NEW_FOCUS for COLL_WRAPPER activation IV_ACTIVATE.
endmethod.


method CREATE_ALLSUBOBJECTS.
*    DATA:
*      model        TYPE REF TO if_bsp_model,
*      coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
*      entity       TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,    "#EC *
*      entity_col   TYPE REF TO if_bol_entity_col.    "#EC *
*
*    model = owner->create_model(
*
*        class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN06'
*
*        model_id       = 'AllSubObjects' ). "#EC NOTEXT
*    AllSubObjects ?= model.
*    CLEAR model.

  ALLSUBOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN06'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

*  try.
*      OWNER->DO_CONTEXT_NODE_BINDING(
*        IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_COMPONENT
*        IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = conv #( C_CN_ALLSUBOBJECTS )
*        IV_NODE_2_BIND      = ALLSUBOBJECTS
*      ) ##NO_TEXT.
*    catch CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT.
*  endtry.

endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.
* create context nodes

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_FOCUSOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_SUBOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_ALLSUBOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_FILTEROBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_ROOTOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_PROFILE( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_PARENTOBJECTS( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_TRANSACTION( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_EVENTSERVICE( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_FIND( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_SELECTEDOBJECT( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_SELECTEDNODES( ).

* Added by wizard
  CREATE_SELECTEDENTITIES( ).

endmethod.


method CREATE_EVENTSERVICE.

  EVENT_SERVICE ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN08'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_EVENT_SERVICE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_FILTEROBJECTS.

  FILTEROBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN04'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_FILTEROBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_FIND.

  FIND ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN09'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_FIND
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_FOCUSOBJECTS.

  FOCUSOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN00'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_FOCUSOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_PARENTOBJECTS.

  PARENTOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN05'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_PARENTOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_PROFILE.

  PROFILE ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN03'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_PROFILE
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_ROOTOBJECTS.

  ROOTOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN02'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_ROOTOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_SELECTEDENTITIES.

  SELECTEDENTITIES ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN12'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_SELECTEDENTITIES
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_SELECTEDNODES.

  SELECTEDNODES ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN11'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_SELECTEDNODES
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_SELECTEDOBJECT.

  SELECTEDOBJECT ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN10'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_SELECTEDOBJECT
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  " initial setting for depandant model node
  data(LR_COLLECTION_WRAPPER) = FOCUSOBJECTS->GET_COLLECTION_WRAPPER( ).
  try.
      data(LR_ENTITY) = cast CL_CRM_BOL_ENTITY( LR_COLLECTION_WRAPPER->GET_CURRENT( ) ).
      if LR_ENTITY is bound.
        SELECTEDOBJECT->ON_NEW_FOCUS( FOCUS_BO = LR_ENTITY ).
      endif.
    catch CX_SY_MOVE_CAST_ERROR.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method CREATE_SUBOBJECTS.

  SUBOBJECTS ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN01'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_SUBOBJECTS
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method CREATE_TRANSACTION.

  TRANSACTION ?= INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME = 'CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_CN07'
    MODEL_ID   = C_CN_TRANSACTION
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

endmethod.


method GET_TYPED_OWNER.
  if OWNER is instance of CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL.
    RR_RESULT = cast #( OWNER ).
  endif.
endmethod.


method INTERNAL_CREATE_MODEL.

  data(LV_CLASS_NAME) = CLASS_NAME.

  data(LR_TYPED_OWNER) = GET_TYPED_OWNER( ).
  if LR_TYPED_OWNER is bound.
    LV_CLASS_NAME = LR_TYPED_OWNER->GET_CONTEXT_NODE_IMPL_CLASS(
      IV_MODEL_ID      = MODEL_ID
      IV_DEFAULT_CLASS = LV_CLASS_NAME
    ).
  endif.

  if LV_CLASS_NAME is initial.
    LV_CLASS_NAME = CLASS_NAME.
  endif.

  MODEL_INSTANCE = OWNER->CREATE_MODEL(
    CLASS_NAME     = LV_CLASS_NAME
    MODEL_ID       = MODEL_ID
  ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN
  create public

  global friends IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_COCO_CTXT .

public section.

  interfaces IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_COCO .

  constants C_CE_SELECTION_CHANGED type STRING value 'SELECTION_CHANGED' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CE_BEFORE_BUILD_TREE type STRING value 'BEFORE_BUILD_TREE' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CE_AFTER_BUILD_TREE type STRING value 'AFTER_BUILD_TREE' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CE_FILTER_CHANGED type STRING value 'FILTER_CHANGED' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants C_CE_SORT_CHANGED type STRING value 'SORT_CHANGED' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods DELETE_EXTERNAL_USAGE
    returning
      value(RV_SUCCESS) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods RAISE_SELECTION_CHANGED .

  methods IF_CRM_IC_EVENT_LISTENER~HANDLE_EVENT
    redefinition .
protected section.

  data MO_EXTERNAL_USAGE type ref to CL_ABAP_WEAK_REFERENCE .

  methods ON_EXTERNAL_USAGE_CREATED
    for event CHILD_COMPONENT_CREATED of CL_BSP_WD_COMPONENT_USAGE
    importing
      !SENDER .
  methods GET_CONTEXT_NODE_IMPL_CLASS
    importing
      !IV_MODEL_ID type STRING
      !IV_DEFAULT_CLASS type SEOCLSNAME optional
    returning
      value(RV_CLASS) type SEOCLSNAME .

  methods DO_CLEANUP_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods DO_INIT_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_USAGE_INITIALIZE
    redefinition .
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_BSPWDCOMPONEN_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method delete_external_usage.

  data:
    lo_external_usage type ref to if_bsp_wd_component_usage.


  if me->mo_external_usage is bound.
    lo_external_usage ?= me->mo_external_usage->get( ).
    if lo_external_usage is bound.
*     allow event service to store its subscribers (so they can be restored later for the same usage)
      me->typed_context->event_service->store_subscribers( lo_external_usage ).
      clear me->mo_external_usage.  "avoid recursions!
      lo_external_usage->delete_component( ).
      rv_success = abap_true.
    endif.
  endif.

endmethod.


method do_cleanup_context.

  data:
    lo_event_srv type ref to if_crm_ic_event_srv.


  if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_ic_active( ) = abap_true.
*   unsubscribing from events
    lo_event_srv = cl_crm_ic_services=>get_event_srv_instance( ).
    if lo_event_srv is bound.
      lo_event_srv->unsubscribe(
        event_name = if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_cancel_interaction
        listener   = me ).
      lo_event_srv->unsubscribe(
        event_name = if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_interaction_after_end
        listener   = me ).
    endif.
  endif.

  set handler me->on_external_usage_created for all instances activation abap_false.
  clear me->mo_external_usage.

endmethod.


method do_init_context.

  data:
    lo_event_srv type ref to if_crm_ic_event_srv.


  if cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>is_ic_active( ) = abap_true.
*   subscribe to events
    lo_event_srv = cl_crm_ic_services=>get_event_srv_instance( ).
    if lo_event_srv is bound.
      lo_event_srv->subscribe(
        event_name = if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_cancel_interaction
        listener   = me ).
      lo_event_srv->subscribe(
        event_name = if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_interaction_after_end
        listener   = me ).
    endif.
  endif.

  set handler me->on_external_usage_created for all instances activation abap_true.

endmethod.


method GET_CONTEXT_NODE_IMPL_CLASS.
  RV_CLASS = IV_DEFAULT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method IF_CRM_IC_EVENT_LISTENER~HANDLE_EVENT.

  SUPER->IF_CRM_IC_EVENT_LISTENER~HANDLE_EVENT( EVENT = EVENT ).

  CASE event->get_name( ).
    WHEN if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_cancel_interaction
    OR   if_crm_ic_events_con_base=>gc_interaction_after_end.
      me->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper->clear( ).
      "me->build_tree( ).

  ENDCASE.

endmethod.


method on_external_usage_created.

  if sender is bound.
*   check if it the correct usage (sender->child_component = me)
    try.
        if sender->get_context_node( 'ROOTOBJECTS' ) = me->typed_context->rootobjects.
*         store my usage instance to be able to destroy it when deactivated later
          create object me->mo_external_usage exporting oref = sender.
*         deactivate usage creation event handler
          set handler me->on_external_usage_created for all instances activation abap_false.
*         allow event service to restore its subscribers
          me->typed_context->event_service->restore_subscribers( sender ).
        endif.
      catch cx_root.
*       wrong external usage, wait for next one...
    endtry.
  endif.

endmethod.


method RAISE_SELECTION_CHANGED.
  RAISE_COMPONENT_EVENT( IV_EVENT_NAME = C_CE_SELECTION_CHANGED ) ##NO_TEXT.
endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.
  SUPER->WD_CREATE_CONTEXT( ).
endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY.
  SUPER->WD_DESTROY( ).
endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.
  SUPER->WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT( ).
endmethod.


method WD_USAGE_INITIALIZE.
  SUPER->WD_USAGE_INITIALIZE( IV_USAGE ).
  if IV_USAGE->USAGE_NAME eq 'findPopup'.
    IV_USAGE->BIND_CONTEXT_NODE( IV_CONTROLLER_TYPE  = CL_BSP_WD_CONTROLLER=>CO_TYPE_COMPONENT
                                 IV_TARGET_NODE_NAME = 'FIND'
                                 IV_NODE_2_BIND      = 'FIND' ). "#EC NOTEXT
  endif.
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_CELLOBJPREVIE_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTREE_CELLOBJPREVIE
  create public .

public section.

  methods BUILD_PREVIEW_HTML
    importing
      !IO_VIEW type ref to IF_BSP_PAGE .
protected section.

  types:
    begin of gty_attr_data ,
      attribute type WCF_CDS_ATTRIBUTE_ID ,
      label type WCF_CDS_LABEL ,
      bol_path type WCF_CDS_BOL_PATH ,
    end of gty_attr_data .
  types:
    gty_attr_data_tab type standard table of gty_attr_data with empty key .
  types:
    begin of gty_attr_buffer ,
      object_type type bsp_dlc_object_type ,
      attr_data type gty_attr_data_tab ,
    end of gty_attr_buffer .
  types:
    gty_attr_buffer_tab type hashed table of gty_attr_buffer with unique key object_type .

  class-data:
    gt_attr_buffer type hashed table of gty_attr_buffer with unique key object_type .

  methods GET_ATTRIBUTES_FOR_OBJECT_TYPE
    importing
      !IV_OBJECT_TYPE type BSP_DLC_OBJECT_TYPE
    returning
      value(RT_ATTR) type GTY_ATTR_DATA_TAB .
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_CELLOBJPREVIE_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


method build_preview_html.

  try.

      data(lo_page_context) = io_view->get_page_context( ).
      if lo_page_context is not bound.
        return.  "no page context -> no rendering
      endif.

      data(lv_host_id) = me->request->get_form_field( |wcf_host_id| ).

      data(lo_bo) = cast cl_crm_bol_entity( cast cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_impl( me->m_parent
                      )->get_typed_context( )->isuboltree->get_bo_by_index(
                        iv_change_focus = abap_false
                        iv_index        = conv #( substring_before(
                                                    val = substring_after(
                                                            val = lv_host_id
                                                            sub = |[| )
                                                    sub = |]| ) ) ) ).

      if lo_bo is bound.

        data lo_entity type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity.
        lo_entity ?= lo_bo.
        try.
            data(lo_tree_node) = cast cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_node( lo_entity ).
            lo_entity ?= lo_tree_node->get_wrapped_entity( ).
          catch cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        endtry.

        if lo_entity is not bound.
          return.
        endif.

        data ls_object type crms_recent_objects.
        ls_object-entity      = lo_entity.
        ls_object-object_name = lo_entity->get_name( ).
        ls_object-genil_id    = lo_entity->get_key( ).
        cl_bsp_wd_object_descr=>get_instance( )->get_description(
          exporting
            ir_entity        = lo_entity
          changing
            cs_recent_object = ls_object ).

        data(lv_overlay_title) = ls_object-description.
        if lv_overlay_title is initial.
          lv_overlay_title = ls_object-object_type_descr.
        endif.

*       Get the visible attributes of the Recent Item to display on the overlay: we read this data from view wcf_ml_obj_flds
        loop at me->get_attributes_for_object_type( ls_object-object_type ) assigning field-symbol(<ls_attr>).
          try.
              data(lr_attr_val_data) = ls_object-entity->get_properties_by_bpath( conv #( <ls_attr>-bol_path ) ).
                if lr_attr_val_data is bound.
                  assign lr_attr_val_data->* to field-symbol(<lv_attr_val_data>).
                  if sy-subrc = 0.
                  data(lv_attr_value) = cl_crm_isu_il_tools=>convert_value_to_string( <lv_attr_val_data> ).
                  endif.
                endif.

              DATA lv_overlay_content TYPE string.
              concatenate lv_overlay_content '<tr>' '<td align="right" class="ch-grid-cell">' <ls_attr>-label ':' '</td>' '<td class="ch-grid-cell">' lv_attr_value '</td>' '</tr>'  into lv_overlay_content respecting blanks.
            catch cx_root.
          endtry.
          CLEAR lv_attr_value.
        ENDLOOP.

        concatenate '<b>' lv_overlay_title '</b>' '<br>' '<table>' lv_overlay_content  '</table>' into lv_overlay_content.

*       write the HTML
        data(lo_bee_table) = new cl_bsp_bee_table( ).
        lo_bee_table->add_html( html = lv_overlay_content ).
        lo_bee_table->if_bsp_bee~render( lo_page_context ).

      endif.

    catch cx_root.
  endtry.

endmethod.


method get_attributes_for_object_type.

* check buffer
  read table gt_attr_buffer assigning field-symbol(<ls_attr_buffer>) with table key object_type = iv_object_type.
  if sy-subrc <> 0.
*   create new buffer entry
    insert value #( object_type = iv_object_type ) into table gt_attr_buffer assigning <ls_attr_buffer>.
*   Get the visibles attributes of the Recent Item to display on the overlay: we read this data from the view wcf_ml_obj_flds
    data(lt_wcft_bol_attr) = cl_wcf_cds_bol_tag_provider=>get_attributes_data( iv_object_type ).
    if lt_wcft_bol_attr is not initial.
      loop at cl_wcf_ml_persistence=>get_ui_obj_type_fields( iv_object_type ) assigning field-symbol(<ls_attr>) where hidden = abap_false.
        try.
            data lv_attr_string type string.
            lv_attr_string = <ls_attr>-attribute.
            concatenate ' ' ':' iv_object_type ':' lv_attr_string into lv_attr_string respecting blanks.
            data(lv_label) = cl_wcf_cds_bol_tag_provider=>if_wcf_cds_data_provider~get_label( lv_attr_string ).
            if lv_label is not initial.
              read table lt_wcft_bol_attr assigning field-symbol(<ls_bol_attr>) with key attribute_id = <ls_attr>-attribute.
              if sy-subrc = 0.
                data(lv_bol_path) = <ls_bol_attr>-bol_path.
              else.
                clear lv_bol_path.
              endif.
              append value #( attribute = <ls_attr>-attribute  label = lv_label  bol_path = lv_bol_path ) to <ls_attr_buffer>-attr_data.
            endif.
          catch cx_wcf_cds_data_source.
        endtry.
      endloop.
    endif.
  endif.

* return buffered result
  rt_attr = <ls_attr_buffer>-attr_data.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_WINDOW
  create public .

public section.
*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data TYPED_CONTEXT type ref to CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP_CTXT read-only .

  methods IP_MESSAGE
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

  methods CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG
    redefinition .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  methods OP_CANCEL
    importing
      !IV_DATA_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .
  methods OP_FIND
    importing
      !IV_DATA_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL optional .

  methods WD_CREATE_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT

private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP IMPLEMENTATION.


method CALL_OUTBOUND_PLUG.

    data: LV_PLUG_METHOD type SEOCMPNAME.

    concatenate 'OP_' IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG into LV_PLUG_METHOD.
    translate LV_PLUG_METHOD to upper case.               "#EC SYNTCHAR

    try.
        if IV_DATA_COLLECTION is bound.
          call method (LV_PLUG_METHOD)
            EXPORTING
              IV_DATA_COLLECTION = IV_DATA_COLLECTION.
        else.
          call method (LV_PLUG_METHOD).
        endif.
      catch CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ERROR.
        raise exception type CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT
          exporting
            TEXTID     =
              CX_BSP_WD_INCORRECT_IMPLEMENT=>WINDOW_PLUG_UNDEFINED
            CONTROLLER = ME->VIEW_ID
            PLUG       = IV_OUTBOUND_PLUG.
    endtry.

endmethod.


method IP_MESSAGE.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'MESSAGE'

endmethod.


method OP_CANCEL.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'CANCEL'

endmethod.


method OP_FIND.
* Added by wizard: Outbound plug 'FIND'

endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.


*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
          iv_controller = me
          iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTREE_FINDPOPUP_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method ip_message.

  data: lv_msgsrv type ref to cl_bsp_wd_message_service.

  lv_msgsrv = cl_bsp_wd_message_service=>get_instance( ).
  lv_msgsrv->add_message(
        iv_msg_type       = 'I'
        iv_msg_id         = '0H'
        iv_msg_number     = 228
        iv_important_info = abap_true ).
endmethod.


method OP_CANCEL.
  me->fire_outbound_plug( 'CANCEL' ).
endmethod.


method OP_FIND.
  me->fire_outbound_plug( 'FIND' ).
endmethod.

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONSTRUCTOR.


    super->constructor( ).

    view_name = view.


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_DATA.


    super->do_handle_data( form_fields     = form_fields
                           global_messages = global_messages ).


endmethod.


method DO_HANDLE_EVENT.
* Eventhandler dispatching

    CASE htmlb_event_ex->event_server_name.

*     Added by wizard
      WHEN 'cancel'.                                        "#EC NOTEXT
        EH_ONCANCEL( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

*     Added by wizard
      WHEN 'find'.                                          "#EC NOTEXT
        EH_ONFIND( htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                    htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN 'SAMPLE_BTN'.                                    "#EC NOTEXT
        eh_onSAMPLE_BTN(
                  htmlb_event    = htmlb_event
                  htmlb_event_ex = htmlb_event_ex ).

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
endmethod.


method EH_ONCANCEL.
"#EC NEEDED
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'cancel'

endmethod.


method EH_ONFIND.
* Added by wizard: Handler for event 'find'

endmethod.


method EH_ONSAMPLE_BTN.


*   put in your eventhandlercoding here...




endmethod.


method SET_MODELS.

* Set the models for output

    view->set_attribute(
        name   = 'SEARCH'                                   "#EC NOTEXT
        value  = typed_context->SEARCH ).



endmethod.


method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

*   create the context
    context = cl_bsp_wd_context=>get_instance(
            iv_controller = me
            iv_type = 'CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CTXT' ).

    typed_context ?= context.


endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.

    CLEAR me->typed_context.
    super->wd_destroy_context( ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CN00 definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT_NODE
  create public .

*"* public components of class CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CN00
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
public section.

  constants BASE_ENTITY_NAME type CRMT_EXT_OBJ_NAME value ''. "#EC NOTEXT

  methods GET_I_STRING
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_M_STRING
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods GET_STRING
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .
  methods SET_STRING
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
      !VALUE type STRING .
  methods GET_I_OPERATOR
    importing
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(RV_DISABLED) type STRING .
  methods GET_M_OPERATOR
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
    returning
      value(METADATA) type ref to IF_BSP_METADATA_SIMPLE .
  methods GET_OPERATOR
    importing
      !ATTRIBUTE_PATH type STRING
      !ITERATOR type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL_ITERATOR optional
    returning
      value(VALUE) type STRING .

*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CN00 IMPLEMENTATION.


method GET_I_OPERATOR.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

    TRY.
        IF current->is_property_readonly(
                      'OPERATOR' ) = abap_false.              "#EC NOTEXT
          rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method GET_I_STRING.

    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.

    rv_disabled = 'TRUE'.
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

    TRY.
        IF current->is_property_readonly(
                      'STRING' ) = abap_false.              "#EC NOTEXT
          rv_disabled = 'FALSE'.
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
    ENDTRY.



endmethod.


method GET_M_OPERATOR.


    DATA: attr    TYPE STRING.

    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

    GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'OPERATOR'                          "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_M_STRING.


    DATA: attr    TYPE STRING.

    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.

    GET REFERENCE OF attr INTO dref.

    metadata ?= if_bsp_model_binding~get_attribute_metadata(
         attribute_ref  = dref
         attribute_path = attribute_path
         name           = 'STRING'                          "#EC NOTEXT
*      COMPONENT      =
         no_getter      = 1 ).


endmethod.


method GET_OPERATOR.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode SEARCH not bound'.                               "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'OPERATOR' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'SEARCH/OPERATOR not bound'.                    "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.                     "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method GET_STRING.


    DATA: current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.
    DATA: dref    TYPE REF TO data.


    value =
'ValueNode SEARCH not bound'.                               "#EC NOTEXT


    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.


    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'STRING' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.

    IF dref IS NOT BOUND.

      value = 'SEARCH/STRING not bound'.                    "#EC NOTEXT

      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    TRY.
        value = if_bsp_model_util~convert_to_string( data_ref = dref
                                    attribute_path = attribute_path ).
      CATCH cx_bsp_conv_illegal_ref.
        FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_data> type DATA.
        assign dref->* to <l_data>.
*       please implement here some BO specific handler coding
*       conversion of currency/quantity field failed caused by missing
*       unit relation
*       Coding sample:
*       provide currency, decimals, and reference type
*       value = cl_bsp_utility=>make_string(
*                          value = <l_data>
*                          reference_value = c_currency
*                          num_decimals = decimals
*                          reference_type = reference_type
*                          ).

        CONCATENATE <l_data> '-CURR/QUANT CONV FAILED-' INTO value
                    SEPARATED BY space.                     "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_root.
        value = '-CONVERSION FAILED-'.                      "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.


endmethod.


method IF_BSP_MODEL~INIT.

    super->if_bsp_model~init( id    = id
                              owner = owner ).

    DATA: lv_struct_ref TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_cn09=>gty_find,
          lv_value_node TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_value_node,
          lv_bo_coll    TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col.

    CREATE DATA lv_struct_ref.
    CREATE OBJECT lv_value_node
      EXPORTING
        iv_data_ref = lv_struct_ref.
    CREATE OBJECT lv_bo_coll
      TYPE
        cl_crm_bol_bo_col.

    lv_bo_coll->add( lv_value_node ).

    set_collection( lv_bo_coll ).


endmethod.


method SET_OPERATOR.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'OPERATOR' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'OPERATOR'.                                "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'OPERATOR'               "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.


method SET_STRING.

    DATA:
      current TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
      dref    TYPE REF TO data,
      copy    TYPE REF TO data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
      <nval> TYPE ANY,
      <oval> TYPE ANY.

*   get current entity
    if iterator is bound.
      current = iterator->get_current( ).
    else.
      current = collection_wrapper->get_current( ).
    endif.

*   get old value and dataref to appropriate type

    TRY.
        dref = current->get_property( 'STRING' ).           "#EC NOTEXT
      CATCH cx_sy_ref_is_initial.
        RETURN.
    ENDTRY.


*   assure that attribue exists
    CHECK dref IS BOUND.

*   set <oval> to old value
    ASSIGN dref->* TO <oval>.
*   create a copy for new value
    CREATE DATA copy LIKE <oval>.
*   set <nval> to new value
    ASSIGN copy->* TO <nval>.

*   fill new value using the right conversion
    TRY.
        CALL METHOD if_bsp_model_util~convert_from_string
          EXPORTING
            data_ref = copy
            value    = value.
      CATCH cx_sy_conversion_error.
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_bsp_conv_failed
          EXPORTING
            name = 'STRING'.                                "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDTRY.

*   only set new value if value has changed
    IF <nval> <> <oval>.

      current->set_property(
                      iv_attr_name = 'STRING'               "#EC NOTEXT
                      iv_value     = <nval> ).

    ENDIF.


endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CTXT IMPLEMENTATION.


method CONNECT_NODES.

    DATA: coll_wrapper TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper.


endmethod.


method CREATE_CONTEXT_NODES.


* create context nodes

    CREATE_SEARCH( ).



endmethod.


method create_search.

  data:
    model        type ref to if_bsp_model,
    coll_wrapper type ref to cl_bsp_wd_collection_wrapper,
    entity       type ref to cl_crm_bol_entity,             "#EC *
    entity_col   type ref to if_bol_entity_col.             "#EC *

  model = owner->create_model(

      class_name     = 'CL_IUBOTREE_FINDSTRING_CN00'

      model_id       = 'SEARCH' ).                          "#EC NOTEXT
  search ?= model.
  clear model.

  try.
      me->owner->do_context_node_binding(
        iv_controller_type  = cl_bsp_wd_controller=>co_type_component
        iv_target_node_name = 'FIND'                  "#EC NOTEXT
        iv_node_2_bind      = search ).
    catch cx_bsp_wd_incorrect_implement.
  endtry.

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

method EH_ONCANCEL.

  view_manager->get_window_controller( )->call_outbound_plug( iv_outbound_plug = 'CANCEL' ).
endmethod.


method eh_onfind.
  data window type ref to cl_bsp_wd_window.

  window = comp_controller->if_bsp_wd_window_manager~get_window( 'IUBOTREE/FindPopup' ) ##NO_TEXT.
  if window is not bound.
    window = comp_controller->if_bsp_wd_window_manager~get_window( 'IUICTREE/FindPopup' ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.
  window->call_outbound_plug( 'FIND' ).

endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD call_outbound_plug.

  data: lv_plug_method type seocmpname.

  concatenate 'OP_' iv_outbound_plug into lv_plug_method.   "#EC NOTEXT
  translate lv_plug_method to upper case.                "#EC TRANSLANG

  try.
      try.
          call method (lv_plug_method)
            exporting
              iv_data_collection = iv_data_collection.
        catch cx_sy_dyn_call_parameter_error.
          call method (lv_plug_method).
      endtry.
    catch cx_sy_dyn_call_error.
      me->fire_outbound_plug( iv_data_collection = iv_data_collection
                              iv_outbound_plug   = iv_outbound_plug ).
  endtry.

ENDMETHOD.


method GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS.
  if FCONTEXT_CLASS is initial.
    FCONTEXT_CLASS = CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_CTXT=>C_DEFAULT_CONTEXT_CLASS.
  endif.
  RV_RESULT = FCONTEXT_CLASS.
endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT.
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'DEFAULT'

endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT_NO_SELECTION.
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'DEFAULT_NO_SELECTION'

endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT_SELECT_FIRST.
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'DEFAULT'

endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT_WITH_SELECTION.
* Added by wizard: Inbound plug 'DEFAULT'

endmethod.


method IP_DEFAULT_WITH_VIRTUAL_ROOT.

method IP_EXPAND_ALL_SUB.

method WD_CREATE_CONTEXT.

  if 1 = 2 ##BOOL_OK. " for Reference
    CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
      IV_CONTROLLER = ME
      IV_TYPE       = 'CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_CTXT'
    ) ##NO_TEXT.
  endif.

  CONTEXT = CL_BSP_WD_CONTEXT=>GET_INSTANCE(
    IV_CONTROLLER = ME
    IV_TYPE       = GET_CONTEXT_IMPL_CLASS( )
  ) ##NO_TEXT.

  TYPED_CONTEXT ?= CONTEXT.

endmethod.


method WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT.
  clear TYPED_CONTEXT.
  SUPER->WD_DESTROY_CONTEXT( ).
endmethod.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL definition
  public
  inheriting from CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW
  create public .

public section.

  constants CO_MODE_EXPAND_ALL type CHAR1 value 'A' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_MODE_NO_SELECTION type CHAR1 value 'N' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_MODE_RESET_PAGE type CHAR1 value 'P' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_MODE_SELECTION type CHAR1 value 'S' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_MODE_SELECT_FIRST type CHAR1 value 'F' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants CO_MODE_VIRTUAL_ROOT type CHAR1 value 'R' ##NO_TEXT.

  events EXPAND_ALL_SUB
    exporting
      value(OBJECT) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS optional
      value(NODE_KEY) type ref to IF_UI_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_KEY optional .
  events FOCUS_PARENT_REQUESTED .
  events FOCUS_SUB_REQUESTED .
  events SELECT_NODE
    exporting
      value(SELECTION) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS optional
      value(MODE) type CHAR1 optional
      value(NODE_KEY) type ref to IF_UI_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_KEY optional
      value(IT_SELECTION_PATH) type IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>GTY_SELECTION_PATH_TAB optional .
  events TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED
    exporting
      value(SELECTION) type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS optional
      value(MODE) type CHAR1 optional
      value(ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED) type ABAP_BOOL optional
      value(PROCESSED) type ref to ABAP_BOOL optional
      value(IT_SELECTION_PATH) type IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>GTY_SELECTION_PATH_TAB optional .
  events TREE_SAVE_REQUESTED .

  methods GET_HOST_VIEW
    returning
      value(RO_HOST_VIEW) type ref to CL_BSP_CONTROLLER .
  methods RAISE_EVENT
    importing
      !IV_EVENT_NAME type STRING
      !IV_BO type ref to IF_BOL_BO_PROPERTY_ACCESS optional
      !IV_MODE type CHAR1 optional
      !IV_NODE_KEY type ref to IF_UI_IC_BOL_TREE_NODE_KEY optional
      !IV_ONLY_IF_ROOT_COL_CHANGED type ABAP_BOOL optional
      !IT_SELECTION_PATH type IF_CRM_IU_BOL_TREE_EVT_SERVICE=>GTY_SELECTION_PATH_TAB optional
    returning
      value(RV_PROCESSED) type ABAP_BOOL .
  methods UPDATE_CURRENT_CONFIG_DATA .

  methods IP_DEFAULT
    redefinition .
  methods IP_DEFAULT_NO_SELECTION
    redefinition .
  methods IP_DEFAULT_SELECT_FIRST
    redefinition .
  methods IP_DEFAULT_WITH_SELECTION
    redefinition .
  methods IP_DEFAULT_WITH_VIRTUAL_ROOT
    redefinition .
  methods IP_EXPAND_ALL_SUB
    redefinition .
  methods IP_FOCUS_PARENT
    redefinition .
  methods IP_FOCUS_SUB
    redefinition .
  methods IP_SAVE_TREE
    redefinition .
  methods SET_HOST_VIEW
    redefinition .
protected section.

  methods ON_HOST_VIEW_DISABLED
    for event CONTROLLER_DISABLED of CL_BSP_WD_VIEW_CONTROLLER
    importing
      !SENDER .
  methods USE_COLLECTION
    importing
      !IV_COLLECTION type ref to IF_BOL_BO_COL .

  methods DO_CLEANUP_CONTEXT
    redefinition .
  methods OP_NODE_CLICKED
    redefinition .
  methods OP_NODE_SELECTED
    redefinition .
private section.

  data MO_HOST_VIEW type ref to CL_ABAP_WEAK_REFERENCE .
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IUBOTREE_MAINWINDOW_IMPL IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD do_cleanup_context.

  DATA:
    lo_host_view_controller TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_view_controller.


  super->do_cleanup_context( ).

  lo_host_view_controller ?= me->get_host_view( ).

  IF lo_host_view_controller IS BOUND.
    SET HANDLER me->on_host_view_disabled FOR lo_host_view_controller ACTIVATION abap_true.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD get_host_view.

  IF me->mo_host_view IS BOUND.
    ro_host_view ?= me->mo_host_view->get( ).
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_default.

* set root collection if provided
  use_collection( iv_collection ).

** Event not needed any more -> Follopup Navigation will Build the tree...
*  RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_default_no_selection.

* set root collection if provided
  use_collection( iv_collection ).

  RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested
    EXPORTING
      mode = co_mode_no_selection.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_default_select_first.

* set root collection if provided
  use_collection( iv_collection ).

  RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested
    EXPORTING
      mode = co_mode_select_first.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_default_with_selection.

  DATA:
    bo TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.


  IF iv_collection IS BOUND.
    bo = iv_collection->get_current( ).
  ENDIF.

  RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested
    EXPORTING
      selection = bo
      mode      = co_mode_selection.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_default_with_virtual_root.

  DATA:
    lv_bol_type TYPE crmt_ext_obj_name,
    lv_name     TYPE crmt_ext_obj_name,
    lv_profgrp  TYPE crmt_iu_boltree_profgrp_id,
    lv_profile  TYPE char10,
    lr_bo       TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
    lr_coco     TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl,
    lr_ent      TYPE REF TO cl_crm_bol_entity,
    lr_obj_cust TYPE REF TO cl_crm_iu_ic_obj_cust,
    lr_profile  TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_value_node.


  IF iv_collection IS BOUND.
    lr_bo   = iv_collection->get_current( ).
    lr_ent ?= lr_bo.
  ENDIF.

  IF cl_crm_iu_ic_bol_tree_service=>is_ehp2_active( ) = abap_true.
    lv_name = lr_ent->get_name( ).

    CASE lv_name.
      WHEN 'BuilHeader'
      OR   'ConnectionObject'
      OR   'Premise'
      OR   'PointOfDelivery'.                               "#EC NOTEXT
        lr_coco ?= comp_controller.

        IF lr_coco IS BOUND.
          lr_profile ?= lr_coco->typed_context->profile->collection_wrapper->get_current( ).

          IF lr_profile IS BOUND.
            CALL METHOD lr_profile->if_bol_bo_property_access~get_property_as_value
              EXPORTING
                iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'
              IMPORTING
                ev_result    = lv_profile.

            IF NOT lv_profile IS INITIAL.
              SELECT SINGLE bol_type FROM  crm_isutree_hier
                                     INTO  lv_bol_type
                                     WHERE prof_id = lv_profile
                                     AND   parent_node_id = ''. "#EC WARNOK

              IF sy-subrc <> 0
              OR lv_bol_type <> lv_name.
                IF  lv_name = 'BuilHeader'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
                  lv_profile = 'IUICMD_BP'.                 "#EC NOTEXT
                  lr_profile->set_property(
                    iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'
                    iv_value     = lv_profile ).            "#EC NOTEXT
                ELSE.
                  lr_obj_cust = cl_crm_iu_ic_obj_cust=>get_instance( ref_comp_controller = lr_coco ).
                  lv_profile = lr_obj_cust->get_botree_prof_id( ).

                  lr_profile->set_property(
                    iv_attr_name = 'PROF_ID'
                    iv_value     = lv_profile ).            "#EC NOTEXT

                  lv_profgrp = lr_obj_cust->get_botree_profgrp_id( ).
                  lr_profile->set_property(
                    iv_attr_name = 'PROFGRP_ID'
                    iv_value     = lv_profgrp ).            "#EC NOTEXT
                ENDIF.
              ENDIF.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.

      WHEN OTHERS.

    ENDCASE.
  ENDIF.

  RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested
    EXPORTING
      selection = lr_bo
      mode      = co_mode_virtual_root.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_expand_all_sub.

  DATA:
    bo TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access.


  IF iv_collection IS BOUND.
    bo = iv_collection->get_current( ).
  ENDIF.

  RAISE EVENT expand_all_sub
    EXPORTING
      object = bo.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_focus_parent.

  RAISE EVENT focus_parent_requested.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_focus_sub.

  RAISE EVENT focus_sub_requested.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD ip_save_tree.

  RAISE EVENT tree_save_requested.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD on_host_view_disabled.

  DATA:
    lo_coco TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl.


  SET HANDLER me->on_host_view_disabled FOR sender ACTIVATION abap_false.

  lo_coco ?= me->comp_controller.
  IF lo_coco IS BOUND.
    if lo_coco->delete_external_usage( ) = abap_true.
*     ensure controller is really removed from embedding view set
      lcl_viewset_remover=>remove(
        io_embedded_view  = me
        io_embedding_view = sender ).
    endif.
  ENDIF.

  CLEAR me->mo_host_view.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD op_node_clicked.

  DATA:
    coco      TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl,
    tree_prop TYPE crm_isutree_tree_properties.


  coco ?= comp_controller.

  tree_prop = coco->typed_context->profile->get_tree_properties( ).
  IF tree_prop-disable_node_clicked IS INITIAL.
    me->fire_outbound_plug(
      iv_outbound_plug   = 'NODE_CLICKED'
      iv_data_collection = iv_data_collection ).            "#EC NOTEXT
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD op_node_selected.

  DATA:
    coco      TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl,
    tree_prop TYPE crm_isutree_tree_properties.


  coco ?= comp_controller.

  tree_prop = coco->typed_context->profile->get_tree_properties( ).

  IF tree_prop-disable_node_selected IS INITIAL.
    me->fire_outbound_plug(
      iv_outbound_plug   = 'NODE_SELECTED'
      iv_data_collection = iv_data_collection ).            "#EC NOTEXT
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD raise_event.

  DATA:
    lr_processed TYPE REF TO abap_bool.


  CASE iv_event_name.
    WHEN 'TREE_BUILD_REQUESTED'.                            "#EC NOTEXT
      IF rv_processed IS SUPPLIED.
        GET REFERENCE OF rv_processed INTO lr_processed.
      ENDIF.

      RAISE EVENT tree_build_requested
        EXPORTING
          selection                = iv_bo
          mode                     = iv_mode
          only_if_root_col_changed = iv_only_if_root_col_changed
          processed                = lr_processed
          it_selection_path        = it_selection_path.

    WHEN 'SELECT_NODE'.                                     "#EC NOTEXT
      RAISE EVENT select_node EXPORTING selection = iv_bo mode = iv_mode node_key = iv_node_key it_selection_path = it_selection_path.
      rv_processed = abap_true.

    WHEN 'FOCUS_PARENT_REQUESTED'.                          "#EC NOTEXT
      RAISE EVENT focus_parent_requested.
      rv_processed = abap_true.

    WHEN 'FOCUS_SUB_REQUESTED'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
      RAISE EVENT focus_sub_requested.
      rv_processed = abap_true.

    WHEN 'TREE_SAVE_REQUESTED'.                             "#EC NOTEXT
      RAISE EVENT tree_save_requested.
      rv_processed = abap_true.

    WHEN 'EXPAND_ALL_SUB'.                                  "#EC NOTEXT
      RAISE EVENT expand_all_sub EXPORTING object = iv_bo node_key = iv_node_key.
      rv_processed = abap_true.

  ENDCASE.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD set_host_view.

  DATA:
    lo_host_view_controller TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_view_controller.


* let the super implementation do its work
  super->set_host_view( iv_host_view ).

* if my last host is still there, then deactivate potential event listeners
  lo_host_view_controller ?= me->get_host_view( ).

  IF lo_host_view_controller IS BOUND.
    SET HANDLER me->on_host_view_disabled FOR lo_host_view_controller ACTIVATION abap_false.
  ENDIF.

* store my host
  IF iv_host_view IS BOUND.
    CREATE OBJECT me->mo_host_view
      EXPORTING
        oref = iv_host_view.
  ELSE.
    CLEAR me->mo_host_view.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD update_current_config_data.

  DATA:
    lo_alternative_parent TYPE REF TO cl_bsp_wd_view_controller.


* update my configuration data
  lo_alternative_parent ?= me->get_host_view( ).
  me->copy_config_keys_from_parent( iv_alternative_parent = lo_alternative_parent ).

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD use_collection.

  DATA:
    bo      TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_property_access,
    coco    TYPE REF TO cl_iubotree_bspwdcomponen_impl,
    iter    TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col_iterator,
    rootcol TYPE REF TO if_bol_bo_col .


* set root collection if provided
* (used for factsheets for instance, normally rootobjects node is filled in component directly)
  IF iv_collection IS BOUND.
    bo = iv_collection->get_current( ).

    IF bo IS BOUND.
      coco ?= me->comp_controller.
      rootcol = coco->typed_context->rootobjects->collection_wrapper.

      IF rootcol->size( ) = 0.
*       fill if empty
        IF iv_collection->size( ) GT 1.
          coco->typed_context->rootobjects->set_collection( iv_collection ).
        ELSE.
          rootcol->add( bo ).
        ENDIF.
      ELSE.
*       fill if other object
        iter = rootcol->get_iterator( ).

        WHILE bo IS BOUND.
          IF iter->find_bo( bo ) NE abap_true.
            coco->typed_context->rootobjects->set_collection( iv_collection ).
            RETURN.
          ENDIF.
          bo = iv_collection->get_next( ).
        ENDWHILE.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

class CL_IU_IC_BOL_TREE definition
  public
  abstract
  create public

  global friends CL_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_SERVICE .

public section.

  interfaces IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE .
  interfaces IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_ENH .
  interfaces IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_HIER .

  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !IO_PARAM_CONTAINER type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER optional .
protected section.
*"* protected components of class CL_IU_IC_BOL_TREE
*"* do not include other source files here!!!

  data MO_PARAM_CONTAINER type ref to IF_CRM_IU_NVP_DATA_CONTAINER .
private section.
*"* private components of class CL_IU_IC_BOL_TREE
*"* do not include other source files here!!!
ENDCLASS.



CLASS CL_IU_IC_BOL_TREE IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD constructor.

  me->mo_param_container = io_param_container.

ENDMETHOD.


method IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_ENH~GET_P_T_TABLE.
endmethod.


method IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_ENH~GET_V_T_TABLE.
endmethod.


method if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh~is_initially_expanded.

* by default we return ABAP_UNDEFINED
* // this means that the standard logix is used to determine if the node
* // is initally expanded (based on customizing settings [max. children/siblings])
  rv_initially_expanded = abap_undefined.

endmethod.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh~prepare_children.              "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


method if_iu_ic_bol_tree_enh~set_attribute.
* empty implemetation, by default nothing will be changed, standard code will run (COL_EDIT...)
endmethod.


method if_iu_ic_bol_tree_hier~adjust_hier_entries.

* method could be used to add multi-level recursions to the tree
* // example: PROFILE PROF_1  (NODE_0, NODE_1, NODE_2 and NODE_3 are statically defined in the BOL tree customizing)
* //
* // NODE_0
* //   |
* //    --> NODE_1
* //          |
* //           --> NODE_2
* //                 |
* //                  --> NODE_3
* //                        |   > here the recursion should start again on level NODE_1 (which is not possible in customizing)
* //                         --> NODE_1
* //                               |
* //                                --> NODE_2 .....

* 1) to solve this requirement an implementation class has to be assigned on the root node NODE_0

* 2) the implementation class has to implement interface IF_IU_IC_BOL_TREE_HIER and method ADJUST_HIER_ENTRIES
*    in case the class is inherited from CL_IU_IC_BOL_TREE, this method has to be redefined

* 3) the recursion node NODE_1 can now be added to the hierachy table CT_HIER with little adjustments (see example below)

* 4) so it is possible to adjust the relation from the recursive parent (NODE_3 in the example) or the sequence/expand limiters

* 5) the multi-level recursion node must not be marked as recursive statically in the customizing!!!

* 6) the BOL tree framework will ensure that no endless recursion is processed;
*    it will stop the recursive processing if the same object appears for the second time for the same node ID in the hierarchy

* 7) example implementation:


*  if iv_profile_id = 'PROF_1'.
*    data ls_hier type crm_isutree_hier.
*    read table ct_hier into ls_hier with key node_id = 'NODE_1'  parent_node_id = 'NODE_0'.
*    if sy-subrc = 0.
*      ls_hier-parent_node_id  = 'NODE_3'.                   "assign recursive parent
*      ls_hier-parent_node_rel = |Node3_To_Node1_Relation|.  "assign relation between recursive nodes
*      ls_hier-change_rel      = abap_false.                 "switch exit class processing if necessary
*      ls_hier-max_children    = 888.                        "the recursion node should not be opened initially
*      append ls_hier to ct_hier.                            "add hierarchy entry with same node ID to the list
*    endif.
*  endif.

endmethod.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree~get_attribute.                     "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree~get_children.                      "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree~is_hidden.                         "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree~refresh.                           "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.


METHOD if_iu_ic_bol_tree~render_cell.                       "#EC NEEDED

ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

class CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE definition
  public

  constants PROFILE_GROUP_NOT_DEFINED type SOTR_CONC value '3157A64C3CC2E30EE10000000A4286AF' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants PROFILE_INITIAL type SOTR_CONC value '4648A64C35C2F20EE10000000A4286AF' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants PROFILE_NOT_DEFINED type SOTR_CONC value '3257A64C3CC2E30EE10000000A4286AF' ##NO_TEXT.
  constants PROFILE_GROUP_EMPTY type SOTR_CONC value '0090FA0D8DC21ED3B585F9293C244631' ##NO_TEXT.

  methods CONSTRUCTOR
    importing
      !TEXTID like TEXTID optional

CLASS CX_CRM_IU_IC_BOL_TREE IMPLEMENTATION.


  method CONSTRUCTOR.

EXPORTING
TEXTID = TEXTID
PREVIOUS = PREVIOUS
.

me->VAL2 = VAL2 .

ENDCLASS.
